hana brata, mәnǝr ri taṅgal, piṅ, 3, maṅan kuñit, mūrṇama sadā, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ trisandhi hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra mahādeva, ya pinakarūpa, pinakapamulu, mvaṅ kavicakṣaṇan, [pha,] tan kaluputan.

Translation


taṅgal, piṅ, 4, amaṅan kәtan irәṅ, amukti labdha, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ cadu śakti hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra viṣṇu, ya pinakarupa, pinakarambut, [pha,] siddhaniṅ ṅvaṅ, anvargakǝn bapebu.

taṅ, piṅ, 5, […] amañcavara śakti, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pañcavara hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra śiva, ya pinakarūpa, pinaka Idhǝp, pinakatǝndhas [pha,] siddhaniṅ ṅvaṅ sugih tan kaharṣa.

3.228

hana brata maṅan raka, pūrṇama limaṅ raka, sira saṅ hyaṅ patūt sih tumurunābrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakarāma, pinakalalakon suka sugih tan panambut kārya.

(1139)
Translation


3.229

hana brata, mūrṇama tilәm, ṅa, maṅupavaśa[,] aṅraka kunǝṅ, [pha] utaṅiṅ atvanta, kәna sinahur[,] polihnya sakarәpta.

Translation


3.230

hana brata, ṅraka naṅkǝn kalivon, patra, ṅa, hyaṅ taruṇa turunābrata, [ya] pinakarūpa, [pha] siddhaniṅ vaṅ sugih lәmah śima.

Translation


3.231

hana brata, maṅan sarva phala, talǝs huvi vahvahan pisaṅ kunaṅ, pituṅ vәṅi lavasnya, kasubhagan kinaharṣan deniṅ istri phalanya, Abhoh kayu ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

Translation


3.232

hana brata, maṅan phala gantuṅ, davun sinabraṅ, ṅa, pha, prajurit.

Translation


3.233

hana brata, maṅan sarva buṅkah, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa hyaṅniṅ brata, suka sugih, puṣṭaka lǝṅǝn phalanya.

Translation


3.234

hana brata, amaṅan sarva phala, sapta rātri lavasnya, pha, kinasihaniṅ strī, yaniṅ strī kinasihaniṅ kakuṅ.

Translation


3.235

hana brata, amaṅan tur ambaṅkit, bhaṭārī keḍәp hyaṅniṅ brata, ṅgonaniṅ amimiti, riṅ pavon, punaṅ kininaṅ sәḍah sapon den tuvuh, lalamak lampuyaṅ, tan pamaṅan tan paṅinaṅ, yan tan panggugut lampuyaṅ, pha, vavadon tan pagigilutan, keḍәp malaki.

Translation


3.236

hana brata, amaṅan katambat tigaṅ bulih, naṅkǝn kalivon, tan pamaṅan paran paran, pituṅ kalivon samayanya, pha, apәkik tur lǝmǝsiṅ rambut.

Translation


3.237

hana brata, ambhūmi lәpa, ṅa, amaṅan jaṅaniṅ lǝlǝpa kabeh, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra Iśvara maveh brata, pha, kinasihaniṅ svami, keḍәp alaki, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ.

Translation


3.238

hana brata, amaṅana mimba, salek lavasnya, pha, athāravit.

Translation


3.239

hana brata, sarvatata, ṅa, amaṅan luṅggahiṅ gaṇḍa rusa kәliṅ, mvaṅ campaka garus, bhaṭāra śambhu hyaṅnya, pha, mulih[,] riṅ svarga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ riṅ bhaṭāra śiva.

(1140)
Translation


3.240

hana brata, vījāharā, ṅa, amaṅan vīja rumuhun, saha pucukiṅ gaṇḍa rusa, pucukiṅ alaṅ-alaṅ, pha, prajñan kita, sihaniṅ istrī.

(1141)
Translation


3.241

hana brata, maṅan sarva luṅgah luṅgahan, pucukiṅ dukut lәpas, pucukiṅ alaṅ-alaṅ, tuñjuṅ, vija tәluṅ jumput, sapta rātri pituṅ dina lavasanya, siddha kārya saphalanya, Amūrva ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

Translation


3.242

hana brata ṅantavali, ṅa, amaṅan hantavali, pañjaṅnya salǝṅkat madhya, pituṅ tumpǝk kalivon patәlasanya, mirica pituṅ viji, ligundi pituṅ muñcuk, pha, salara vighna hilaṅ donya, sojarira keḍәp, !...! katәmu maṅke mvaṅ dlāha.

Translation


3.243

hana brata nirambu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarva binumbon, satahun lavasnya, pha, mulih mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra rūdra, sasarnya majanma ri listvayu, apәkik prajurit.

Translation


3.244

hana brata, amaṅan kәtan baṅ[,] pituṅ vәṅi, hirәṅ pituṅ vәṅi, ivaknya sarva śuci, arariṅ śakti, ṅa, bhagavān paraśara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, akadaṅ voṅ pәkik.

Translation


3.245

hana brata, maṅan kәtan[,] ya taṅkǝp , voṅ tuṅgal tuṅgal riṅ kalivon, 7, hǝmbanya phala, sahaṅ, mәñan, aṅgara kaśih amaṅan, 7, alaṇdhyan, sira saṅ hyaṅ asihiṅ prāṇa turunābrata, ginañjaran śakti lima, pha, suka sugih, sapatinya vәnaṅ.

(1142)
Translation


3.246

hana brata, anila, ṅa, amaṅan kәtan hirәṅ, satahun samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya majanma riṅ mantrī.

Translation


3.247

hana brata, murāṇa, ṅa, amaṅan ñahñah lan gula tәbu, lamanya tigaṅ dina, pha, tan kataman siṅ saparanta.

Translation


3.248

Hana brata, maṅan tan dady akarvan, pituṅ lek lavasnya, suka magə̄ṅ phalanya, eka patra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

Translation


3.249

hana brata, tan kapadan, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pakǝmbulan, aduluran pañcamuna, sahuripnya riṅ amaṅan, alalab roṇḍon, mvaṅ kǝmbhaṅ, uttamaniṅ brata kabeh, pha, tan kapadan viśeṣa, maṅkana polahira saṅ viku tәmǝn tәmǝn.

Translation


3.250

hana brata, amaṅan tan pakǝmbulan, pәtaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, mantuk riṅ svarga bhaṭāra rudra, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ kulaputra, kaḍaṅ haji subhaga.

Translation


3.251

hana brata, aṅajum , ṅa, amaṅan riṅ vaton salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveh brata, pha, tәka atuduhiṅ paliṅgihan, keḍәp tәka ruruṅeniṅ voṅ.

(1144)
Translation


3.252

hana brata, amutәriṅ paṅkon, ṅa, amaṅan pinaṅku, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveh brata, pha, kinasihan deniṅ bapa ibu, malakya rabi, sasarnya dadi bhujaṅga lәvih.

(1145)
Translation


3.253

hana brata, amaṅan [ri] ryaghūrṇita, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, siddhi mantra, listvayu paripūrṇa.

Translation


3.254

hana brata, naṅkə̄nāra, ṅa, yan amaṅan aṅagǝm jinah, 7, salek samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ rūdra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, akәlar tan kәneṅ śrī kita.

(1146)
Translation


3.255

hana brata, asaṇḍiṅ jinah keteṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra Indra maveh brata, pha, prajña prakavi, Aṣṭa kośala, sasarnya dadi patih sugih.

(1147)
Translation


3.256

hana brata, maṅan aṅadut, satavun lavasnya, pha, sugih siddhi mandi, vāk bhajra subhaga.

(1148)
Translation


3.257

hana brata, amaṅan kupat pāṇḍava, 3, paṅanǝn esuk, 1, paṅanǝn tәṅah ṅve, 1, paṅanǝn sore, 1, pha, rinakṣa deniṅ rāt, kinasavitan deniṅ sama janma, hajana livavaktayanya, tan pamuruṅ polihnya.

(1149)
Translation


3.258

hana brata, maṅan kupat, mevaka sarva śukla, tәluṅ vәṅi divasanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha[,] biṣa ṅiduṅ, abәcikiṅ ulon, manisiṅ panutukan, mvaṅ kinasihaniṅ voṅ.

Translation


3.259

hana brata, adahar lәpǝt, lama tәṅah vulan, ranini kundaṅ kasih hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, arampiṅ.

Translation


3.260

hana brata, naḍah tumpəṅ, sahasta pañjaṅnya, śūnya ivaknya uyah arәṅ kevala, anarasvatī, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pitu tan palavan hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakaprajña, sih malakya rabi, siddhaniṅ vaṅ sugih tan surud, mvaṅ pradaṇānuṅku rāt.

Translation


3.261

hana brata, maṅan tumpəṅ, lavasnya tәṅah śaśih, lamun tan kavaśa, pituṅ dina, ranini paduka bhaṭārī hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ gulu.

Translation


3.262

hana brata, adva savәguṅ, bhaṭāra rūdra maveh brata, pha, sugih rumbe.

(1150)
Translation


3.263

hana brata, asidakǝp sarahina, bhaṭāra saṅkara maveh brata, pha kinasihaniṅ voṅ.

(1151)
Translation


3.264

hana brata, lumaku savәṅi sarahina, pha, dadi deva guru, sasarnya dadi viku bahu siṣya, apәkik rūpa, teja tiniṅhalan, sugih saṅkan rare, sugih tus tumus.

(1152)
Translation


3.265

hana brata, amәlәṅ tutuk sarahina vәṅi, pur, saṅ hyaṅ anәmu jagat sira turunābrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakarāma, pinakalalakon vadon, listvayu, prajñan, lanaṅ vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih, maṅke kalavan tǝmbe.

(1153)
Translation


3.266

hana brata ṅālamuñə̄ṅ, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ lәbur jagat sira turunābrata, ginañjaran śakti lima, voṅ tuṅgal sakvehiṅ sira abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakalakon, vastu rahayu, lanaṅ vadon suka sugih drәman keḍәp.

(1154)
Translation


3.267

hana brata, ṅalacakra, ṅa, sira saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa riṅ bhuvana, sira turunābrata, ginañjarān śakti tigaṅ rakṣa , sakvehaniṅ abrata, pha, suka sugih, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, lanaṅ vadon.

Translation


3.268

hana brata, mañca vaśa gina, ṅa, tan paṅlavaniṅ vadon aṅucap, naṅkǝn manis, yan vadon tan paṅucapiṅ kakuṅ, tan paṅinaṅ suruhiṅ apvan, lǝlǝmbaran vәnaṅ, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tinūtiṅ mās, salviriṅ drәventa tǝmbe.

Translation


3.269

hana brata, kukusaniṅ śarīra, ṅa, tan pamaṅan suku pat, lavasnya sakavaśahaniṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ cadu śakti sira turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakavaṅkoṅ, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ muṣṭika, keh avәlas, rovaṅ asih iri kita, aṅraṅkus brata.

(1155)
Translation


3.270

hana brata, tan pamaṅan bavi, hyaṅ manasija hyaṅnya, pituṅ tavun samayanya, pha, luputiṅ gәriṅ aguṅ, tur kinasihan deniṅ jagat.

(1156)
Translation


3.271

hana brata, tan pamaṅan śrәgāla, pha, rūpanta tan akusut.

(1157)
Translation


3.272

hana brata, tan pamaṅan ayam, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tan pamaṅgih marū.

Translation


3.273

hana brata, tan pamaṅan ayam, satahun samayanya, pha, tan panәmu marū, tur drәman.

(1158)
Translation


3.274

hana brata, akәrisa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan yan tan pasisig rumuhun, sari sarī, bhaṭārī śvari hyaṅniṅ brata, satahun sayamanya, pha, prajña, tavitan labdha mās kita.

Translation


3.275

hana brata ñandiṅ dhadhap, lama tigaṅ dina, tan pamaṅan, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅnya, pha, svarga lәvih dinuṅkapnya, subhaga kita, kula putra atәhǝr viśeṣa, bahudhǝṇdha ñakra vrәtti.

(1159)
Translation


3.276

hana brata, ṅapitu, ṅa, naṅkǝn dvadaśi śukla pakṣaniṅ kapitu, aṅupavaśa, bhaṭāra bhīma hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ bam̐ bhīmā ya namah, pamit, pha, viryavan kapintuhu deniṅ rāt, sugih mās pirak, hulun putra vrәddhi, siddha sakāryanta.

Translation


3.277

hana brata, ṅrәspati, ṅa, kramanyānaṅkǝn vrәspati ṅupavaśa, pha, listuhayu kita, siṅ kāryanta hayu.

(1160)
Translation


3.278

hana brata, tan pamaṅan pituṅ rātri, pha, viryavan siddha sakāryanta.

Translation


3.279

hana brata, ṅupavaśa, sacandra samayanya, riṅ ka sapuluh, pha, kapituhu deniṅ rāt, mās pirak tәka vrәddhi, kinasihan deniṅ paṇḍita.

Translation


3.280

hana brata, yan tәkaniṅ vәton, tan pamaṅan sarvvāmbǝkan, pha, antuka omah omah, tan surud dharmmanya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅnya.

(1161)
Translation


3.281

hana brata tan pamaṅan sarvvāmbǝkan, pva, ka, pha, keḍәp deniṅ rāt.

Translation


3.282

hana brata, amiraṅ, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarva prāṇa prāṇi, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārī pabyavara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, siṅ prih meṅgal katәmu, deva sih iri kita.

Translation


3.283

hana brata, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ puṣpa liṅga, aṅliga prāṇa, ṅa, hyaṅ aṅgaṣṭi sira turunābrata, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt, tur rūpanta muntab, śakti prajurit mahābhara, yan dadi vvaṅ abhra murub, tan kasoran rūpanta, dirggha yuṣa paripūrṇna, puruṣa viśeṣa.

(1162)
Translation


3.284

hana brata, aṅliṅga pәraṅ, ṅa, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ duhuṅ, bhaṭāra rūdra hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, Akveh vvaṅ tumaṅgalaṅ asih iri kita.

Translation


3.285

hana brata, aṅubi, ṅa, amaṅan aṅinum bañu rumuhun, huvusiṅ amaṅan, tan vәnaṅ aṅucap lavan voṅ, pha, akәlar, suka sugih, tan kǝna gәriṅ, tan sasar kapintuhu deniṅ rāt.

Translation


3.286

hana brata, maṅan tan pembuh, tan paṅinum bañu, pha, śakti kiteṅ ri niṣkala, lavasnya sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ dura dasih hyaṅnya, tatkālaniṅ abrata, tan paturviṅ rahina, [pha,] apaḍaṅ riṅ rūpa, apaḍaṅ kaṅ ati, kinasihaniṅ rat.

3.287

hana brata, ñәkul bañu, [ṅa,] tan pamaṅan sәga sadina, tan paturviṅ rahina vәṅi, aṅayapakǝn tәkeṅ polihnya, añjanma hayu, ma, rāga śūnya mahiśi taya, amaṅan sәga satatak, siniratiṅ toya añar, pamit, vus mapamit, madahar, sakantunanya, hayva mañapuhaṅ.

Translation


3.288

hana brata ñәkul bañu, mañjiṅ lima ṅaranya, kavaśa amaṅan suruh, maṅan sәkul inumi toya, sәga sakәpǝl tinatak ri lәpa lәpaniṅ taṅan, vәnaṅ inumi bañu sabran sore, lavasiṅ abrata, satavun, yan kavaśa, mokṣa salviriṅ lara, vighnaniṅ śarīra Ilaṅ donya.

Translation


3.289

hana brata, tan paṅinum vvai, tatkāla savuku galuṅan, Aṅhiṅ tāmaṅan antiga binǝṅdhǝm, harәpiṅ dhәṅǝn, sambi aṅadǝg tәṅaṅ ṅve tatkāla guṅe, Arddhaṇa bhaṭāra mrәtyu, phalanya kәdhuk timbul, tutug tumuvuh, puruṣa viśeṣa, śakti vani, kineriṅan deniṅ jagat, labdha vara gragaluṅān.

Translation


3.290

hana brata, aṅambaṅ, ṅa, yan amaṅan kinambaṅakәn riṅ bañu, satavun samayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu maveh brata, pha, mañjanma riṅ kaḍaṅ ajī, sugih vәsi, tūr keḍәp kavi prajurit.

Translation


3.291

[nyan ta saṅ citta varaṇā, umarah [ri] saṅ vala kula, mūla tattvaniṅ dadi kabeh, pahenak paṅrәṅə̄nta, mūlabhoktaniṅ kanirāśrayan, mvaṅ kābhyudayan, bhāvanya mvaṅ lakṣaṇanya, pūrvanya mvaṅ vәkasnya, maṅkana liṅ saṅ vala kula, nǝmbah hulun, Om̐ viku satakvan[,] tānaku, kita pva siksa ṅaran ika, duga-duga tumakvan, vuvus maṅkana, rәṅə̄n siptan i ṅhulun. pūrvaṃ śrī puruṣānte, varānugraha makanya, saṅ rojyam, narāsakane, Ayavaṃ vidyaṃ prajayaṃ. maṅkana pariñciniṅ cipta, kaliṅanya, pūrva haraniṅ mimitan, tripuruṣa haraniṅ brahmā viṣṇu Iśvara, vara ṅaraniṅ amiddhi , anugraha haraniṅ panuṅsuṅ , manoka ṅaraniṅ devata, saroja ṅaraniṅ manūtra, nara ṅaraniṅ mānuṣa, sakāla ṅaraniṅ samaṅke, yaśa ṅaraniṅ kirti, vidyā ṅaraniṅ hajī, aprayadha ṅaraniṅ pūjā, kaliṅanya, bhaṭāra sira magave pratapa riṅ vana giri, maṅaṣkāra bhaṭāra, bhaṭārī, Atitah kasukan amragat trәṣṇā, anusupi vanavāsa, maṅǝnakǝn tapa, manaṅsāra rāga, tinūt deniṅ manūṣa maṅke, atapa abrata, ayoga asamadhī, ayajña dāna kīrti, maṅhanakǝn brata apayapanya, Ulandriya, rumәgǝp pañcendriya, tuṅgalakәna riṅ tri sandhyā, piṇdhakǝn riṅ kaparāmarthan, vaḍahana yoga, sahabana samadhi, tindihana brata, tuṅgunǝniṅ dāna kīrti, laṅlaṅana riṅ āgama, pagǝrana pupūjān sasapon, lavaṅana saṅgarma, ugǝr ugǝrana sadā, inǝbana tuhu, tindihana kañciṅanā parāmartha, yeka ulahaniṅ saṅ tumaki-taki kābhyudayan, kābhyudayan ṅaranya, kavibhavan, kavibhavan ṅaranya, bandha savita, bandha savita ṅaranya, kasugihan kula rūpa, śakti vani, nirogha nirvighna , cakṣyah lavajjanā, subrata dīrgha yuṣa yovaṇa aveta urip, maṅkana phalaniṅ brata yan inabhyāsa, ya kābhyudayan de saṅ surupa, maṅkana liṅ saṅ citta varaṇa, riṅ saṅ vala kula. nambah hulun, mapa riṅ kanirāśrayan, mәne pukulun, mәne kami varah iri kita, lakoni siptaṅku riṅ lagi rumuhun, sājña pukulun, vurukәniṅ brata pukulun, pariñcinya, mvaṅ phalanya, A U ma.]

Translation


3.292

hana brata, tan pamaṅan tan paturu, bratanira saṅ hyaṅ vәkasniṅ kavi viśeṣa. pha, svarga lәvih, titisnya añakravartti, subhaga anulus, anurāga riṅ rāt, katәkan sapinakṣanira riṅ bhūmi, dinuluriṅ āyu, śakti vani mahābhāra.

Translation


3.293

hana brata, ambhairava pakṣa, siṅ pinaṅan, tuhun tan trәṣṇeṅ turu, bhaṭāra pavakānugrahani, mvaṅ devata, [pha,] bhūta gandharva masih, janmanya puruṣa viśeṣa, subhaga hanulus, ajrih kaṅ sarva galak.

Translation


3.294

hana brata, tan paṅgilani sarva tinaḍah, sambarana , ṅa, pha, viryavan siddha sugih saṅkan rare.

(1163)
Translation


3.295

hana brata, ṅarәṅ, ṅa, amaṅan harәṅ rumuhun[,] bhaṭārī gaṅga hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ gaṅgā ya namah, salek samayanya, pha, apәkik kerәṅan deniṅ jagat.

(1164)
Translation


3.296

hana brata, yan amaṅan maivak harәṅ tumpə̄r, pәtaṅ tavun samayanya, pha, keḍәp riṅ samanta janma, kinasihaniṅ rāt, keḍәpiṅ arabi anak anak.

Translation


3.297

hana brata, maṅan apisan, pituṅ lek pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt.

(1165)
Translation


3.298

hana brata nitīkrama, ṅa, amaṅan sadina sapisan, saṅ hyaṅ smara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, siṅ prih meṅgal katәmu, dirghyuṣa.

Translation


3.299

nahan brata, maṅan piṅ saptami, pituṅ lek samayanya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya.

Translation


3.300

hana brata, ambhūmi amasar bhuvana, ṅa, pha, sugih lәmah sīma.

Translation


3.301

hana brata, maṅaniṅ lәmah, pituṅ śaśih lavasnya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya, bhūmi ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

Translation


3.302

hana brata, mañcavara, ṅa, U, marәp maṅetan amaṅan, pa, marәp kidul amaṅan. pva, marәp aṅulon. va, marәp aṅalor amaṅan. ka, siṅ harәpira maṅan, duluranya lalab kabeh, mvaṅ kǝmbaṅ hanūt kadi varṇaniṅ sәga, pañcavarṇa, putih kuniṅ abaṅ Irәṅ, riṅ teṅah pañcavarṇa, deva rata hyaṅnya, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga pada bhaṭāra śiva, !pamit!, ma, Om̐ Om̐ śrī jagat guru paduke bhyo namah. sasarnya mañjanma rata añakravr̥tti, tan kapadhān.

Translation


3.303

hana brata, mañca vara dalәm, ṅa, kramanya, amaṅan uyah kevala, amaṅan sәkul kevala, salek tәluṅ dina samayanya, vus maṅkana, ulam kevala, vus maṅkana, toya kevala, vus maṅkana, aṅinaṅ kevala, vus maṅkana lavasnya, kәneṅ paṅan, tan kәneṅ turu, samaṅkana lavasnya, saṅ hyaṅ vәkasiṅ anuṅku rāt hyaṅnya ikaṅ brata, tan upir upir sukanta, mantuk riṅ svargan bhaṭāra dharma, janmanya suka maṅan aṅaṅgur, tan aṅhel panambut gave, suka sugih tan pasaṅkan, kaṅ vvaṅ masih deva bikṣuka, muleh iri kita.

Translation


3.304

hana brata, luhuriṅ kayu, ṅa, tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, vrәddhi putra, tur keḍәp siṅ paṅucap.

(1166)
Translation


3.305

hana brata, aturu luhuriṅ kayu, salek divasanya, pha, śakti kasiddhyan kapaṅguh.

Translation


3.306

hana brata, aṅalasa, ṅa, asaṅidaniṅ alas savәguṅ, tan papasa deniṅ voṅ, ṅuniveh sarva sato, asǝp, pha, prajurit riṅ paravu, aṅuṅgahana bahanya, va, harәṅ prajurit riṅ darāt luṅguhana vatu, [devatanya] saṅ buddha subrata, sasarnya dam puvavaṅ riṅ paravu, sugih savah, tur sugih paravu.

(1167)
Translation


3.307

hana brata, ṅraka sabran tilәm mvaṅ pūrṇama, sarva putus, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ silih asih maveh brata, pha, tinuṅgviṅ rāma reṇa, suka sugih prih avak, tur tan paṅubiṅ voṅ atuha.

Translation


3.308

hana brata, maṅan gǝḍaṅ tan kinulitan, tәluṅ vәṅi samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ murṣita hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, apәkik, yen istri mǝṅgǝpiṅ pahyunan, abәcikiṅ buddhi, vruhiṅ kaliṅanya, pituturiṅ bapebu.

Translation


3.309

hana brata, maṅan tuhuṅ pitpit rumuhun, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik muñcar, ṅaraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik aṅuñci pǝpǝt sira turunābrata, pinakabaghā, pinakarūpa, paṅadǝganiṅ vavadon, pinakalistvayu, [pha] drәman manis ta kita, lindihǝn voṅ apәkik, drәman anak anak, aputu riṅ niṣkala.

Translation


3.310

hana brata, ṅgilir kacaṅ, ṅa, kramanya, aṅuvāsa savәguṅ, amaṅan savәguṅ, hyaṅ prajā sadā hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, mantuk riṅ svargan bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasarnya mañjanma suka sugih, lәvih anulus, yan lanaṅ puruṣa kula pratyakṣa anurāga kita, sugih pisis riṅ dlāha, yan istri samaṅkana.

(1168)
Translation


3.311

hana brata, yan amaṅan sinaren kasumba, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik pari rāja, ṅa, hyaṅ maṇik teja bhūmi turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakarah-dagiṅ, pinakahati, [pha,] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, suka sugih, listvayu, sәkar analum, akǝmbaṅ avoh riṅ niṣkala.

Translation


3.312

hana brata, maṅan sәkul sapuluṅ, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik tampa, ṅaraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇḍala hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakakukusaniṅ śarīra, [pha,] asǝsǝkan kanakāguṅ, kalavan alit, aśrī asambaṅ jarijya, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ suka sugih, tan pәgat sādhana, mvaṅ mās maṇik, kinanti jagat kinanti japa kita riṅ dlāha.

Translation


3.313

hana brata, maṅān sәkul putih kuniṅ, aṅkǝn kalivon, humārәp purvva, mevaka bhīra, paṅan pisan saṅaṅ kalivon divasanya, Uttamā saṅaṅ vulan, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan hyaṅ antadeva, ya pinakarūpa, pinakasamūha, pinakadirgha yuṣa, yan lanaṅ pinakapәkikan, pinakapolah, pinakararas, yan vadon pinakakahayon pinakapolah , pinakahibon, pha, mulihiṅ svarga bhaṭāra śiva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ prabhu añakravarti, viku, bhujaṅga, śeva sogata, sugih malǝṅkә riṅ mās pirak, sarva sosoca, rare, hulun, kәbo sapi, mrәgādi, vrәddhi putra, tinuṅgviṅ bapebu, kaki nini, ma, Om̐ hram̐ hrim̐ sah parāmaśivāditya ya namah, ahyas.

Translation


3.314

hana brata, amiśeṣa, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pahupa, anlasana sәkul, yan vus kinurәn kurәn, ma, Atma tuturakәna mariṅ bhaṭāra viśeṣa, umuṅguh riṅ vindu nadha, sakāla niṣkāla, viśeṣa bhaṭāra baja, maty aturu, maty aluṅguh, maty aṅadǝg, lәsālәyǝp, pavak tan paśarīra sakāla niṣkāla.

(1169)
Translation


3.315

hana brata, nūtakǝn saśila bhaṭāra gaṇa, amuṣpa gaṇa, ṅa, yan amaṅan sәga nǝm kǝpǝl, sarahina, tiṅkahiṅ amaṅan, śīla gaṇā, nǝm vulan samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ bhaṭāra guru, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ viku Ijo, śakti dūra darśana, sojar ira keḍǝp.

Translation


3.316

hana brata, maṅan sәga sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, tan patәdha tan patambǝh, tan apilih ivaknya, Apan mayoni, ṅa, hyaṅ siddhi narasiṅha turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakalaku, [pha,] siddhaniṅ vaṅ anambadani śabda, sihniṅ rāt, ma, Om̐ Om̐ siddhi kāraṇāya namah svāhā, yan ahyas.

Translation


3.317

hana brata, jaṅga varṇa, ṅa, amaṅan sәga balaka, pituṅ dina lavasnya mābhyāsa, pha, keḍәp savuvusta deniṅ rāt, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, biṣa gamǝl aṅiduṅ.

Translation


3.318

hana brata, jaga śatru, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ saptanala hyaṅniṅ brata, kramanya, taṅgal pisan piṅ ro tәmu taṅgal piṅ pitu, lamun huvus sumurup vulan juga kita vәnaṅ aturu, livat saṅkeṅ taṅgal piṅ pitu, sakarәptāturu, maṅkāneṅ krәṣṇa pakṣa, lamun mәtu vulan juga kita turu, livat saṅke rika, sakarәpta turu, pha, riṅ dadi vvaṅ sugih, tan hana nuskr̥ta , riṅ niṣkāla.

Translation


3.319

hana brata, mūrāba, ṅa, maṅlәkasa taṅgaliṅ kapat mabrata, maṅana purāṇa, kǝmbaṅ nāgasāri, kulalaṭa, malabahaniṅ pūrṇama , polihnyāpәkik hayu tan pasiriṅ, ma, Om̐ smarāya namah, yan ahyas.

Translation


3.320

hana brata, taṅgal piṅ savlas, Atikukus, ṅa, phalanya virya, drәman anulus.

(1170)
Translation


3.321

hana brata, maṅan aronāron, ulam kalapa binakar, lima vәlas dina divasanya, saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ hulon.

(1171)
Translation


3.322

hana brata, amaṅan tan paron, pituṅ lek divasanya, pha, siddhakārya, jaya patra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

(1172)
Translation


3.323

hana brata, ṅavaśakәn sakvehiṅ brata, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra Umapati, [pha,] janmanya prabhu añakravartti, viku śakti bahu sikṣa, labdha vara subhaga.

Translation


3.324

hana brata, kadi rare, tan kinatәṅǝtakәn, pha, tan pavali valyañjanma kita, sasarnya dadi ratu.

Translation


3.325

nihan brata, amati agni, asisirih, 3, dina, tan pamaṅan sakalvirnya, tutug 3, dina, alabahan, tur tīrthanana, pha, hilaṅ pāpa kleṣaniṅ śarīra.

Translation


3.326

hana brata, amaṅan sǝsǝdhǝp rumuhun, pituṅ tavun divasanya, bhaṭārī vastu hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt.

Translation


3.327

hana brata, maṅan mevak uyah harәṅ, pha, keḍәp riṅ rāt, kineriṅan deniṅ bhuvana, kinajrihaniṅ śatru.

Translation


3.328

Ana brata, mamaṅan catur varṇa, limaṅ vәṅi lavasanya, prajña śakti phalanika, tәhǝr kinasihaniṅ rāt, Apurvva kita, sakabdhu ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.

Translation


3.329

hana brata maṅan riyana, 5, tәluṅ lek lavasnya, pha, halus jarijinta, niromanira.

(1173)
Translation


3.330

hana brata, ṅantara, ṅa, maṅan tṅaṅ ve , tәṅah vәṅi, tigaṅ lek lavasnya mabhyāsa, pha, śakti saturasta, suka magə̄ṅ.

Translation


3.331

hana brata, maṅan pituṅ kәpǝl, sadina, pituṅ rahina samayanya, mabrata, catur ṅaraniṅ brata, [pha] riṅ dadi vvaṅ sarva vәsi tan tumamāhi śariranta, riṅ niṣkāla.

Translation


3.332

hana brata, yan amaṅan tan paluṅguh, saṅ hyaṅ hayu maveh brata, saṅ hyaṅ laku laku haraniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa hayu raspati, [pha] suka riṅ lakunta, lәbur tampakta aśri iṅiriṅan, deniṅ pavoṅan, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ suka sugih, amūkti sāriniṅ kaḍaton, kita riṅ dlāha.

Translation


3.333

hana brata, amadhapa, ṅa, amaṅan riṅ paṅkon, malamak patra, saṅ hyaṅ sūkṣma maveh brata, phalanya sapolahta pantǝs, tan pәgat sihniṅ malakya rabi, salek samayanya, ma, Om̐ sūkṣmāya namah, pamit.

Translation


3.334

hana brata, tan pamaṅan sarvāmbǝkan, naṅkǝn pon, mvaṅ kalivon, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt.

Translation


3.335

hana brata, yan amaṅan aṅilo riṅ pahesan, naṅkǝn pūrṇama, satavun divasanya, pha, mañjanma riṅ kabayan buyut sugih.

Translation


3.336

nihan aji rambut, amaṅan sәga hirәṅ, naṅkǝn caturthi, śukla pakṣa, ma, hulun aṅaji rambut, tan abaṅ, tan ana raṅraṅ, tan ana putih, sәlǝm abuluniṅ gagak, adava, alambas, atәtәl, ṅkon rambutin hulun, katәmu maṅko, lәvih kaṅ tǝmbe hulun aṅaji rambut, vastu hulun aṅaji rambut, Om̐ sa ba ta A I namā śivāya.

Translation


3.337

hana brata, mona mūjā, pha, deva masih iri kita.

Translation


3.338

hana brata, mona, ṅa, yan aṅisiṅ, yan ahuyuh, yan adyus, yan alәlәṅa, yan abasahan, yan lumaku, pituṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāra śiva maveh brata, sasarnya sugih duve, sugih vәka, tur keḍәp, mañjanma riṅ mantrī.

Translation


I śaka, 1722. Vai, ka, vrә, vara mrakih, praṭipadā riṅ śukla pakṣa, Asuji maśa, rah, 2, tǝṅgǝk, 2. I rika divasanya, pūrṇna linikhita.

Apparatus


^1. om̐] P, om. G M N U
^2. parikramaniṅ] M N, panarima G P (lexical), tiṅkahiṅ panarima U (additive)
^3. mabrata,] M N P U, malәkasa brata G (additive)
^4. duruṅ] G M N U, vuruṁ P
^5. amvit] G M N P, hamita U
^6. iṅ] G M P, i N, ri U
^7. hyaṅ] G M N P, riṅ hyaṅ U (additive)

^326. prajñan] M N, om. G U
^327. ] G M N P U • hana brata yan amaṅan anūtakǝn vulan ... śiṣya təka; in P the title of the brata, mantra, and result is same with other witnesses, but tend to different in the technique to perform the observance. This is the complete passage of the ms P. "hana bratā hañutakәn hulan·, yan hamaṅan taṅgal hapisan·, sakәpәl·, taṁ, 2, rvaṁ kәpәl·, muṅgah sakәpәl· sadinā, tәkāniṁ taṅgal·, piṁ, 14, pūṛnama hamr̥ti, yan paṅloṁ hapisan·, piṁ, 14, sinuddhana sakәpәl·, tәkaniṁ til̥m hamr̥ti, tigaṁ lek· ṣamayanya, bhaṭārendra hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ surendra ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya mantukiṁ bhaṭāra śivā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ ratu, mvaṁ riṁ vikva bhavu siṣyā kitā." G U in 3.26 M N P in 3.29

^421. tur mantuk iṅ svargan bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya majanma riṅ viku bahu śiṣya,] M N, om. G P U
^422. ] G M N P U • hana bratta miramiśa,... hayu tmǝn G in 3.39 M in 3.40 N in 3.40 P There are two passages in P that is quite similiar to this brata. I consider to choose passage in order 3.34 instead of 3.92 because its more similiar to other mss. However, I put that brata in 3.92 as follows: hana brata niṛmaṅśā, kramanya tan pamaṅān, kәbo, celeṁ, sāpi, vәdus, salviriṁ kәna vәlaḥ dagiṁnyātan pamaṅanta kevala siṁ tan kәneṁ holaḥ dagiṁnya paṅanәn, hasiniṁ lvaḥ pinakādinya hisiniṁ tambak kunaṁ, karaṁ karaṁ vәnaṁ paṅa:nәnta, pituṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya l̥viḥ sakeṁ samanta janmā tanana haṅilaṅi sukanta U in 3.39
^423. ] M N • hana bratta niramiṣa,... deva bhūṭā sih iri kittha M in 3.41 N in 3.41

^480. ] G M N P U • hana bratta ṅalivon ... meṅgal katmu G in 3.46 M in 3.48 N in 3.48 P There is a passage in 3.78 that is quite similiar to other bratas as follows: hana bratā ṅalivonn, ṅa, ṅupavaṣa naṅkәn kalivon, phalanya siṁ priḥ Eṅgal katәkān sagaventa dinuluriṁ rahayu, tigaṁ tavun ṣamayanya U in 3.45

^506. ] M N P U • hanā bratta nūtakǝn ... sojarīra keḍǝp M in 3.51 N in 3.51 P in 3.45, and in 3.140 that is quite similiar to this passage. Here is the brata: hana brata nutakәn puṣpa bhaṭāra gaṇa, ṅa, hamaṅan nәm kәpәl, sadinā dina, phalanya mantukiṁ padhā bhaṭāra guru, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ viku hijo, śakti duradaṛṣaṇa, sojarira kedhәp U in 3.48

^845. […] kapintuhu. • G and P are different from M N U. Here is the G: jyeṣṭā, aṅlavar·, polihnya, kedhapa savinuvus, labḍa va; P: jyeṣṭa, aja haturiṅ istri, yan istri aja aturu riṅ kakuṅ
^846. vulan, […] vulan, saddhā, tan paturū lavan strī, strī tan paturu lavan lanaṅ, pha, drәman alaki, kinasihaniṅ lanaṅ, lanaṅ kinasihaniṅ vadon, tur keḍәp sapaṅucapta G and P are quite different here. Here the G: da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe; P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṁ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṁ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṁ siṁ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṁ griṁ haguṁ, kedhәpiṁ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgiḥ maru, sugiḥ dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṁ kinasihan tuvan mvaṁ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa. hana bratta ṅulante ... keḍǝp sapaṅucapta in 3.58 in 3.69 in 3.69 in 3.149 in 3.115 • G and P are quite different here. Here the G: da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe; P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṁ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṁ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṁ siṁ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṁ griṁ haguṁ, kedhәpiṁ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgiḥ maru, sugiḥ dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṁ kinasihan tuvan mvaṁ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa
^847. ] G M N P U • hana bratta ṅulante ... keḍǝp sapaṅucapta G in 3.58 M in 3.69 N in 3.69 P in 3.149 U in 3.115

^1144. ] N U • hana brata, haṅaju ... ruruṅeniṅ voṅ N in III.251 U in III.83
^1145. ] N U • hana bratā, hamutriṅ ... bhujaṅga l̥viḥ N in III.252 U in III.84
^1146. ] N U • hana brata, naṅkə̄nāra ... griṅ kitā N in III.254 N in III.78
^1147. ] N U • hana brata, hasaṇḍiṅ ... patiḥ sugiḥ N in III.255 U in III.90
^1148. ] G N P • hana brata, maṅan ... bhajrā subhagā G in III.88 N in III.256 N in III.122
^1149. ] N U • hana brata, hamaṅan ... pamuruṅ poliḥnya N in III.257 U in III.72
^1150. ] N U • hana bratā, haṅado ... sugiḥ rumbe N in III.262 U in III.91
^1151. ] N P U • hana brata, hasidakǝp ... kinasihaniṅ voṅ N in III.263 P in III.144 U in III.92
^1152. ] N P U • hana bratā, lumaku ... tus tumus N in III.264 P in III.145 U in III.93
^1153. ] N P U • hana brata, hamlə̄ṅ ... kalavan tǝmbe N in III.265 P in III.148 U in III.107
^1154. ] N U • hana bratā ṅalamuñə̄ṅ ... dr̥mman keḍǝp N in III.266 U in III.113
^1155. ] N U • hana bratā, kukuśaniṅ ... haṅraṅkus bratā N in III.269 U in III.74
^1156. ] N P • hana brata, tan ... deniṅ jagat N in III.270 P in III.103
^1157. ] N P • hana bratā, tan ... tan akusut N in III.271 P in III.104
^1158. ] N P • hana bratā, tan ... tūṛ dr̥maman N in III.273 P in III.137
^1159. ] N P • hana brata ñandiṅ ... bahuḍǝṇḍa ñakrāvr̥tti N in III.275 P in III.114
^1160. ] N P • hana brattha, ṅr̥spati ... kāṛyyanta hayu N in III.277 P in III.119
^1161. ] N P • hana bratā, yan ... rudra hyaṅnya N in III.280 P in III.110, III.136
^1162. ] N P • hana bratā, yan ... puruṣā viśeṣā N in III.283 P in III.25
^1163. ] N P • hana bratā, tan ... saṅkan rare N in III.293 P in III.87
^1164. ] N U • hana bratā, ṅar̥ṅ ... deniṅ jagat N in III.294 U in III.75
^1165. ] N P • hana brata nitikramā ... diṛgghā yuṣā N in III.297 N in III.117
^1166. ] N P • hana bratā, luhuriṅ ... siṅ paṅūcap N in III.303 N in III.98
^1167. ] N P U • hana brata, haṅelaśa ... sugiḥ paravu N in III.305 P in III.146 U in III.96
^1168. ] N P • hana bratā, ṅgiliṛ ... istrī samaṅkana N in III.309 P in III.115
^1169. ] N P • hana bratā, hamiṣeṣa ... sakāla niṣkāla N in III.313 P in III.112
^1170. ] N P • hana bratā, taṅgal ... muvaṅ hanulus N in III.319 P in III.111
^1171. ] N U • hana bratā, maṅan ... habcikaṅ hulon N in III.320 U in III.99
^1172. ] G N • hana brata, hamaṅan ... brata maṅkana G in III.102 N in III.321
^1173. ] N U • hana bratā maṅan ... ni romanirā N in III.328 U in III.109

Translation

Om̐. let there be no obstacle

This is the "Right Behaviour in [Performing] Observances". When you perform an observance, do not do it haphazardly, without having permission to the one who is in charge of the observances, [namely] the reverend Kaki Citragopta [and] Nini Citragopta. [The request] should be received [by means of] an offering of a white and green betel leaf on a well. The mantra is: “My Lord Kaki Citragopta and Nini Citragopta, I ask permission to perform an observance. My Lord, please accompany me when I perform an observance! Everything that I strive after, let it be obtained! If I make a mistake when performing an observance, let it be blamed on the reverend one who is in charge of the observances!” All your observances [will then be] like that. Further, the teeth-polishing leaves [have to be used] by the one who carries out the observances. The exceedingly good one is the hambulu; the result is [to become] rich in gold. There are the teeth-polishing leaves of the kayәn; the result is many children. There are the teeth-polishing leaves of the vaṅkal; the result is [to become] rich in rice. There are the teeth-polishing leaves of the lampәni; the result is that you are successful. The dosage of all the mixtures are the same. It is appropriate to pay full attention to it.

This is the "Holy Scripture on the Observances". One who makes an effort to obtain the supernatural qualities should devote his full attention to it. The supernatural qualities of the observance, without having the philosophy’s body of the truth, [just like] bars of hedge its philosophy, because [the truth] is used as the bounding body, together with the philosophy of the observance. And also for someone who will release supernatural powers, they are just like the left and right bodies. Thus the philosophy of observance and asceticism. That is why the one who makes an effort to obtain the goodness should perform it. [If] young people perform it, he will obtain the result of the observance at the young age. It will not be successful if it is not to be done (performed); it is not taking the arrangement from the one who arranged it. [Just like] when [one] cooks rice in the morning and eats [it] in the morning, cooks rice at noon and eats [it] at that noon, and if cook rice at evening and eats it in that evening, if it is not cooking, it is not eating. [The conclusion is] all conducts will obtain all the yields. That is the right way [in performing the observance]. Because of the bad and good conduct will be obtained, that is why good conduct should be done without delay. It originates from the philosophy of observance.

This is the "Detail Type on the Observances". It should be known

There is the observance of ‘cutting off the taste’: if one eats half, and then stands up for chewing betel. It’s better if one does not speak. After chewing betel, one can eat again. Its duration is one year. The deity is the Lord Uma. Mantra: "Om̐ salutations to Umā. [I take] leave!" Its result is the love of husband and wife will not cut off, and all people will love [you].

There is the observance of ‘eating rice ṅgi’: its duration is seven months. The deity is the Lord Vastu. Mantra: "Om̐ salutations to Vastu. [I take ] leave!" Its result is the love of husband and wife is not cut off, and also all humans are love and pity to you.

There is the observance of the ‘earth-leaf’: if one eats without using leaves, and [placing the food] openly on earth. The deity is reverend Vaiśravaṇa. Its appointed duration is one year and seven months. Mantra: “Om̐ sam̐ salutations to Vaiśravaṇa. [I take ] leave!”. Its result is being rich in land, piece of ground, and you will be loved by the king of the world and priests.

There is the observance of ‘full moon’ (mūrṇama): you are fasting every full moon. Its appointed duration is seven years and seven months. The deity is the Reverend Ratih. Mantra: “Om̐ salutations to Śrī Ratih! [I take] leave. Its result is that your work will be successful, God and Demon will love you.

There is an observance when one eats following the moonlight. The technical details are as follows. On the first day after the waxing moon, [you eat only] a handful. If the waxing period of the moon increases, it [should be] added by a handful until fifteen handfuls when the full moon, because it adds a handful every day. However, on the waning moon, it should decrease by a handful every day. Finally, one fasts when the dark moon. Its appointed duration is three months. The deity is the Lord Indra. Mantra: “Om̐ salutations to god Indra!” [I take leave]. Its result is to reach the heaven of the Lord Śiva. [Alternatively, if] something goes wrong, one is reborn as a smart king, and the priest who has many disciples.

130 <colophon>
. <quote>I śaka, 1722. vai, ka, vr̥, vara mrakiḥ, praṭipada riṁ sukla pakṣa, Asuji maśa, rah, 2, tǝṅgǝk, 2. I rika divaśanya, pūrṇna linikitha.</quote>
. </colophon>
. <!-- colophon should be structures with quote elements with attribute @type and @xml:lang when necessary -->
. </msItem>
135 </msContents>
. <physDesc>
. <objectDesc>
. <!-- Here you can give a physical description of the manuscript in prose-->
. <p>Palm-leaf manuscript. 51 leaves in Balinese script. Date: Thursday Kalivon, Vuku Marakih, first of a lunar fortnight in the bright half of the lunar month, third month or around September-October, unit 2, tens 2, 1722 Śaka or 1800 AD. Containing 332 vratas.</p>

. <body>
270 <div type="edition" xml:lang="kaw-Latn">
.
. <div>
. <ab xml:id="tattvabrata_00" type="invocation" xml:lang="san-Latn">
. <app>
275 <lem wit="#P">om̐</lem>
. <rdg wit="#G #M #N #U">
. <gap reason="omitted"/>
. </rdg>
. </app>
280 avighnam astu.</ab>
. </div>
.
. <div type="chapter" n="1">
. <ab xml:id="tattvabrata_01">
285nihan
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">parikramaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G #P" cause="lexical">panarima</rdg><rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">tiṅkahiṅ panarima</rdg></app>
.brata, yan kita
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">mabrata,</lem><rdg wit="#G" cause="additive"> malәkasa brata</rdg></app>
. hayva pati pati, yan
290 <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">duruṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">vuruṁ</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">amvit</lem> <rdg wit="#U">hamita</rdg>
. </app>
. <app>
. <lem wit="#G #M #P">iṅ</lem><rdg wit="#N">i</rdg><rdg wit="#U">ri</rdg></app>
295 saṅ asәḍahan brata,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">hyaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">riṅ hyaṅ </rdg></app>
. kaki citra gopta, nini citra gopta,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">tarimanən</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">ri tarimanәn</rdg></app>
. iṅ sumur,<app>
300 <lem wit="#G #P #U">caru</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">ca</rdg></app>,
. sәḍah putih hijo, <abbr>ma</abbr>,
. pukulun kaki citra gopta, nini citra gopta, iṅsun amvit abrata,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pukulun</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">brata pukulun</rdg></app>
. dulurәn iṅsun abrata, katәkana
305 <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">sapinakṣan</lem><rdg wit="#P">pinakṣan</rdg><rdg wit="#U">sapinokṣәn</rdg></app>
. iṅsun, yan
. <app><lem wit="#G #N #P #U">asalah</lem><rdg wit="#M">aṣanpah</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N">abrata</lem><rdg wit="#G #M #P #U">brata</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">asalaha</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">ta asalaha</rdg></app>
310 riṅ
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">saṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">saṅ hyaṅ</rdg><rdg wit="#U"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>
. asәḍahan brata, sabratanta maṅkana.
. mvah
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">sisigiṅ</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="haplography" >sisiṅ</rdg></app>
315 abrata, kaṅ rahayu tәmən, ambulu, pha, sugih mās,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">sisig</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="haplography">sig</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G #N #P #U">kayən,</lem><rdg wit="#M">hayәn</rdg></app>
. pha,
. <app><lem wit="#G #N #P #U">bahu putra</lem><rdg wit="#M"><gap reason="omitted"></gap>
320</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P #U">sisig vaṅkal,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">
325<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. pha, sugih pari, sisig lampәni, <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">pha,</lem>
330<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
335<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">labdhavara</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">vasiteṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P">kita.</lem>
340<rdg wit="#M #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
345<lem wit="#M #N #U">vor</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
350<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">sama</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
355<rdg wit="#U">samanteṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">kvehnya,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">
360<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">yogya</lem>
365<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">yoga yoya</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kayatnākәna</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kayatna</rdg>
370</app>
.tәmən.
.
.</ab>
.</div>
375
.<!-- end chapter 1-->
.
.<div type="chapter" n="2"><!-- start chapter 2-->
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_02">
380nihan saṅ hyaṅ tattva brata, kayatnākәna de saṅ amet kasiddhan, kasiddhaniṅ brata, tan pāvak tattvanira saṅ hyaṅ dharma,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">rajəg</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
385</rdg>
.</app>
.turus, <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">tattvanika</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">tatvanira</rdg>
390</app>,
.apan pinakāvak balәbəd,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">lavan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">lavan ta</rdg>
395</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tattvaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">tatva</rdg>
.</app>
400brata, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">mvaṅ aṅlәpasakən</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">maṅlәpasakәn</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">maṅlәpasa</rdg>
.</app>
405<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">kasiddhyan,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">kasiddhan</rdg>
.</app>
.sira kadyaṅganiṅ <app>
410<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">avak</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
415kiva tәṅən, maṅkana saṅ hyaṅ tattva brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">mvaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
420</rdg>
.</app>
.tapa, <app>
.<lem type="norm">mataṅnyan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N #U">mataṅyan</rdg>
425<rdg wit="#P">mataṅya</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">lәkasakәna</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">lәpasakәna</rdg>
430</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">de nira</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">de</rdg>
.</app>
435saṅ amet hayu, anom
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">alәkas</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">alәkasa</rdg>
.</app>
440anom <app>
.<lem wit="#M #U">amaṅggih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kapaṅgih</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mamaṅgih</rdg>
.</app>
445phalaniṅ brata, nora dadi <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">yan tan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">tan</rdg>
.</app>
.ginave, nora ṅalap
450<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">titahiṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">titahniṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">titāniṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">titahiṅ ṅalap titahiṅ</rdg>
455</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">atitah,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">atah</rdg>
.</app>
460kady aṅggāniṅ <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">haḍaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">aṅәḍaṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
465</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">esuk,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">aṅesuk</rdg>
470</app>
.esuk amaṅan, havan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">haḍaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">aṅәḍaṅ</rdg>
475</app>,
.havan amaṅan, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">yan iṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">yan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#G">
480<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">sore</lem>
485<rdg wit="#M #N">sory</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
490<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">aḍaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.
495</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">sore</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">sory</rdg>
500<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
505<lem wit="#M #N #U">maṅan,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
510
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">yan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
515</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">tan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">nora</rdg>
520<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
525<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">paḍaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
530<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">tan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
535</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">pamaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
540</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">saolah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P" cause="lexical">sapolah</rdg>
545</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">saolih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P" cause="lexical">sapolih</rdg>
.</app>,
550maṅkana kramanya, apan hala <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">hayuniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">hayu</rdg>
.</app>
.pagave katәmu, mataṅnyan larisakәna pagave hayu, mijil <app>
555<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">sakeṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">saṅke</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">tattva</lem>
560<rdg wit="#M #N"> tapa</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">brata.</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">brata, ṅa</rdg>
565</app>
.</ab>
.</div><!-- end chapter 2-->
.
.
570
.
.
.<div type="chapter" n="3"><!-- start chapter 3-->
. <ab xml:id="tattvabrata_03">
575nihan pariñciniṅ brata, kavruhakәna.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
580
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.1"><!-- start chapter 3-->
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_1">
585hana brata mәgat rasa, ṅa, <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">yan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">kramanya, yan</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
590<lem wit="#M #N">satәṅah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">vus</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P #U"></rdg>
.</app>
. amaṅan,
595<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">suməṅkāṅinaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pumәṅka āṅinaṅ</rdg>
.</app>,
. apәnəd tan <app>
600<lem wit="#P">paṅucap</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N #U">pahupa</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">vus</lem>
605<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
610<lem wit="#M #N">aṅinaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
615<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">malih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
620</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">amaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
625</rdg>
.</app>, satahun samayanya, bhaṭāri Umā hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">Umāyai</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P" cause="lexical">Umāye</rdg>
630<rdg wit="#U">Umāya</rdg>
.</app>
.namah, pamit, pha, tan pәgat sihniṅ malaky
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">arabi,</lem>
635<rdg wit="#P">amarami</rdg>
.</app>
.mvaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #U">samanta</lem>
640<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">sarva</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">kita katvaṅaniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">janma</lem>
645<rdg wit="#P">samaṅkana</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">paḍa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
650<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">sih.</lem>
655<rdg wit="#G">sihnya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
660</ab>
.</div><!-- end chapter 3.1-->
.
.<!-- Om maṃ, salutations to Umā!-->
.
665<div type="subchapter" n="3.2"><!-- start chapter 3.2-->
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_2">
.hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #U">maṅan</lem>
670<rdg wit="#N">amaṅan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">maṅana</rdg>
.</app>
.sәga
.<app>
675<lem wit="#G #N">ṅgi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">ṅgih</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">gaṅgi, ṅa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">slaṅgi</rdg>
.</app>,
680satahun pituṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārī vastu hyaṅnya, ma, om̐ vastu
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">devyai</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">devye</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">deva ya</rdg>
685</app>
.namah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pamit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
690<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.pha, tan
.<app>
695<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pәgat</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pәgatan</rdg>
.</app>
.sihniṅ malaky
.<app>
700<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">arabi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">amarabi</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">ṅuniveh</lem>
705<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">kunaṅ veh</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">sihniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="eye-skip">nikaṅ</rdg>
710<rdg wit="#U" cause="eye-skip">niṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sama janma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">janma kabeh</rdg>
715</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">paḍāsih avәlas</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">padha vәlas asisih</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="haplography">padhāvlas</rdg>
720</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">i</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive">kabeh iri</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">hiti</rdg>
725<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. kita.
730<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana maṅan sәga ṅgih...i kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
735<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.2 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.20 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
740</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.3">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_3">
.hana brata
745<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">bhūmipātra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">mbumipatrā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">abhumipatra</rdg>
.</app>,
750ṅa, yan amaṅan <app>
.<lem wit="#P">tan paharyan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">tan payyan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
755</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P">aṅlak i</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">aṅlaṅki</rdg>
760<rdg wit="#M #U">riṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">ri</rdg>
.</app>
.lәmah, hyaṅ <app>
.<lem wit="#N">vaiśravaṇa</lem>
765<rdg wit="#G #M #P">veśrāvaṇa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">śraivaṇa</rdg>
.</app>
.hyaṅnya, satahun <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pituṅ</lem>
770<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted">
.</gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
775lek samayanya, ma, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">sam̐ vaiśravaṇāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">śram̐ vaiśravāṇaya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M">śam̐ veśravaṇāya</rdg>
780<rdg wit="#P">śrī veśravanāya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">śive śravaṇaya</rdg>
.</app>
. namah, <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pamit</lem>
785<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.pha, sugih lәmah, śīma jana anurāga kita
790<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">ri saṅ prabhu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
795</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bhūmi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">mvaṅ ri saṅ</rdg>
.</app>
800viku.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata bhūmipātra...bhūmi viku <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#M"/>
805<ptr target="#N"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.3 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.2 </note>
.</app>
810</ab>
.</div>
.<!-- <p n="3.">-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.4">
815<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_4">hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">nulamidam</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">anulamidhan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">nulambinan</rdg>
820</app>,
.ṅa, aṅupavāsa savәguṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #U">atәlasan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">atrәsan</rdg>
825<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
830<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">savәguṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
835<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">tigaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">tәluṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.lek samayanya, pha, <app>
840<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">siṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
845<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">prih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">pinrih</rdg>
.</app>
.meṅgal katәmu
850<app>
.<lem wit="#P #M #N #U">denya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
855</app>,
.jana anurāga <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">kita, nirvighna kita</rdg>
.</app>,
860bhaṭāra brahmā hyaṅnya, ma, om̐ Am̐ brahmane namah, pamit.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata nulamidam...namah, pamit <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#M"/>
865<ptr target="#N"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.4 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.3 </note>
.</app>
870</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.5">
. <ab xml:id="tattvabrata_5">
875hana brata amaṅan tan kasurupan saṅ hyaṅ śiva raditya, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, bhaṭāra śiva <app>
.<lem wit="#M">hyaṅniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">hyaṅiṅ</rdg>
.</app> brata, pha, apaḍaṅ kaṅ ati, praṇa aṅən aṅənta, ekasadya, ma, om̐ mam̐ śivāya namah, yan ahyas.
.<app>
880<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note> hana amaṅan tan kasurupan...yan, ahyas <ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.5 </note>
.</app>
885</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.6">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_6">hana brata
890<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">tan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">yan</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
895<lem wit="#G #P">pamaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">amaṅan</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #U">yan</lem>
900<rdg wit="#M #N">tan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
905<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">kasurupan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kasurupaniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
910<lem wit="#P #U">saṅ hyaṅ sūrya,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">saṅ hyaṅ aditya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
915</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">satahun divasanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
920</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">bhaṭāra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">saṅ hyaṅ</rdg>
925</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">śiva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N" cause="additive">śiva raditya</rdg>
.</app>
930 hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ <app>
.<lem type="emn">namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #M #N #U"></rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
935<lem wit="#G #U">śivāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P">ya namah</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">pamit</lem>
940<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha, prajñan riṅ sarva kārya, makādi vidya,
945<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">muvah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
950</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">yan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
955</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">agamәlan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N #U">gamәlan</rdg>
960<rdg wit="#P">bisa</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">katha</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">gita</rdg>
965<rdg wit="#P">aṅiduṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mvaṅ riṅ katha</rdg>
.</app>,<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">kakavin</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">akakavin</rdg>
970<rdg wit="#U">riṅ kakavin</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
975<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">apiṅgiṅ</lem>
980<rdg wit="#M #N">kapiṅgiṅan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">kavisvara</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U"> tur kapiṅgiṅ</rdg>
.</app>, apәkik tan pasiriṅ.
.
985<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata yan amaṅan...tan pasiriṅ <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
990 in 3.6 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.5 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.4 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
995</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.7">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_7">
. hana brata
1000<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">mūrṇama</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">amūrṇama</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa,
1005<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">naṅkən</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">aṅkәn</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">naṅkәn</rdg>
.</app>
1010 pūrṇama,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">aṅupavāsa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P" cause="additive">kitāṅupavasa</rdg>
.</app>,
1015 pituṅ tahun
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pituṅ lek</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
1020</rdg>
.</app>
. samayanya, bhaṭārī ratih hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ <app>
.<lem type="emn">śrīratih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N #P #U">śrīrati</rdg>
1025</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">devyai</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N" cause="lexical">devye</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">devya</rdg>
1030</app>
. namah, pamit, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">siddha</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">prasiddha</rdg>
1035</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">kāryanta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">sakaryanta</rdg>
.</app>,
1040<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">deva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
1045</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bhūṭāsih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
1050</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
1055<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kita.</lem>
1060<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.
1065<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana mūrṇama...iri kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.6 <ptr target="#M"/>
1070<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.7 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.21 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
1075</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.8">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_8">
. hana brata nilәm, ṅa, <app>
1080<lem wit="#G">aṅkən</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">naṅkәn</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">manaṅkәn</rdg>
.</app>
. tilәm
1085<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
1090</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">aṅupavāsa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">ṅupavāśa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">maṅupavaṣā</rdg>
1095</app>,
. pituṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārī
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">rātri devī</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">vastri</rdg>
1100<rdg wit="#U">ratrī devam</rdg>
.</app>
. hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">rātri</lem>
1105<rdg wit="#G">vastri</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">devyai</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">daivye</rdg>
1110<rdg wit="#M #N">devye</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">devya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">deivya</rdg>
.</app> namah,
. pamit, pha,
1115<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kinasihaniṅ rāt kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kinasihaniṅ rāt</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">siddha saprayojñananta sama lavan pūṛṇna</rdg>
.</app>,
1120 deva <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bhūṭāsih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">bhūṭa maśih</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
1125<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">ri</rdg>
.</app>
. kita.
.
1130<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata nilәm...ri kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.7 <ptr target="#M"/>
1135<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.8 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.22 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
1140</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.9">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_9">
. hana brata narasvatī, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sәkul iṅiliran kevala tumpəṅ juga, tan paivak, kevala uyah, satahun
1145<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">pituṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">tigaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. lek samayanya, <app>
1150<lem wit="#G #M #N">bhaṭārī rāja lakṣmī hyaṅnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="line_omission"></rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">ma</lem>
1155<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
1160<lem wit="#G #M #N">Om̐</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app> śri rāja
1165<app>
.<lem type="emn">lakṣmyai</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N">lakṣmya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">lakṣmeyā</rdg>
.</app>
1170 namah, pamit, pha, təka
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">guṇanta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">guṇa</rdg>
.</app>,
1175 mvaṅ siddha
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #U">saprayojananta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">saprayojñananta</rdg>
.</app>,tәhәr subhaga kita, <app>
1180<lem wit="#M #N #U">lavan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">mvaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">sihniṅ</lem>
1185<rdg wit="#U">sih</rdg>
.</app> malaky arabi.
.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
1190<note>hana narasvatī...malaky arabi <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.8 <ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.9 </note>
1195</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
1200<!-- <p n="3.">-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.10">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_10">
. hana brata muṣpasadā, ṅa, yan amaṅan
1205<app>
.<lem wit="#P #U">mevak</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N">mevaka</rdg>
.</app>
. kəmbaṅ rumuhun, satahun lavasnya, saṅ hyaṅ smara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ śri smarāya
1210<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">nama svaha</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">nama</rdg>
.</app>,
1215 pamit, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">riṅ rūpa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">surupa</rdg>
.</app>
1220 tan pasiriṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">akveh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">Akveh mahyun iri kita, mvaṅ</rdg>
.</app> rәsəp asih iri kita.
1225
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata muṣpasadā...iri kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
1230 in 3.9 <ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.10 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.5 </note>
.</app>
1235</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
1240
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.11">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_11">
.hana brata ṅlepana, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevak alalab rumuhun tigaṅ tahun
.<app>
1245<lem wit="#G #M #N">samayanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">slamanya</rdg>
.</app>, bhaṭārī śrī hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">śrī</lem>
1250<rdg wit="#G">srīh</rdg>
.</app>
. śrī
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">devyai</lem>
1255<rdg wit="#G">ye</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">devya</rdg>
.</app> namah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">pamit</lem>
1260<rdg wit="#G">mapamit</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha, rūpanta śrī
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #U">amenak</lem>
1265<rdg wit="#M">menak</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #N">sugih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">mvaṅ sugih</rdg>
1270</app>
. pari,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U">akveh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive"> mvaṅ akeh</rdg>
1275</app> asih avlas iri kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata ṅlepana...iri kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
1280 in 3.10 <ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.11 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
1285</div>
.
.
.<!-- G hana brāta [4v] tan paṅinaṁ, satahun samalek samayanya, saṁ hyaṁ Aśvino deva hyaṁniṁ brata, ma, Om̐ Asvino deva ya namaḥ, pamit·, phalanya, meṅәt· rūpanta manis·, Akveḥ bhranta hyun iri kita-->
.
1290<!-- M hanā bratā tan paṅinaṁ, satavun salek samayanya, saṁ hyaṁ ma$no deva hyaṁ niṁ bratā, ma, Om̐ Asvino deva ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, meṅәt· rūpanta manis·, mvaṁ ha$- -kveḥ bhranta hyun hiri kitā-->
.
.<!-- N hana brata: tan paṅinaṁ, satahun salek ṣamayanya:, saṁ hyaṁ manodeva: hyaṁniṁ brata:, [SH] ma, Om̐ Asvino deva: ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, meṅət· tur rupa:nta manis·, mvaṅ a:kveḥ bhranta hyun iri kita-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata tan paṅinaṁ- -sәdaḥ, ṅa, satahun· salek ṣamayanya, hyaṁ haśvido devatanya, ma, Om̐ hasvino deva ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya, meṅә- -ttu rupānta manis·, hakveḥ branta mahyun i sirā-->
1295
.<!-- U hana bratā l̥ga tan paṅinaṁ, satahun salek samayanya, sāṁ hyāṁ maṣno deva hyaṁ niṁ brata, ma, Om̐ Asvino deva ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, meṅәt· mvaṁ rūpāntā manis·, Akveḥ brantā hyun iri kita
.-->
.
.
1300<div type="subchapter" n="3.12">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_12">
. hana
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">brata</lem>
1305<rdg wit="#U">brata lәga</rdg>
.</app>
. tan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">paṅinaṅ,</lem>
1310<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">paṅinaṅ sәdah, ṅa</rdg>
.</app>
. satahun <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">salek</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">samalek</rdg>
1315</app>
. samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">manodeva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">aśvino</rdg>
1320<rdg wit="#P">asvido</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">maṣnodeva</rdg>
.</app>
. hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐
.<app>
1325<lem type="conj">manodevāya</lem>
.</app> namah, pamit, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">meṅət</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">mәṅәt tur</rdg>
1330<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">meṅәt mvaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. rūpanta manis,<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mvaṅ akveh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">akveh</rdg>
1335</app> bhrānta
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">hyun</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mahyun</rdg>
.</app>
1340<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">i</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
1345<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">sira</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
1350<note>hana brata lәga tan paṅinaṅ...kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.11 <ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.12 <ptr target="#P"/>
1355 in 3.7</note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
1360
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.13">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_13">
.hana brata
1365<app>
.<lem wit="#P #U">lәga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">alәga</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">ṅlәga</rdg>
.</app>
1370 prāṇa, ṅa, yan amaṅan amaṅku
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">duhuṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="lexical">kәris</rdg>
.</app>,
1375<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">satahun</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">
. satavun lavasnya mvaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
1380 pituṅ lek samayanya, ma, Om̐ namo <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">rudrāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">ludraya</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
1385<lem wit="#G #P">svāha</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">namah</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">pamit</lem>
1390<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha, akeh
1395<app>
.<lem wit="#G">vvaṅ tumualaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">vaṅ tumulu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N #U">vvaṅ tumuluṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">jaya riṅ praṅ mvaṅ</rdg>
1400</app>
. riṅ jīvanta, mvaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">akeh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">akeh</rdg>
1405</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">avәlas asih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">asih</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">vaṅ kavәlas asih</rdg>
1410</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
1415</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">ri</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">kita</lem>
1420<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
1425<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata lәga prāṇa ... iri kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.12
.<ptr target="#M"/>
1430<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.13 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.8</note>
.</app>
.</ab>
1435</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta abhira, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka vuyaḥ, satahun tigāṅ lek· samaya nikaṁ brāta, bhaṭāreśvara hyaṁ[5r]nya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvarā ya namaḥ, pamit·, phalanya, priḥ meṅgal katmu, kinasihaniṁ rat kita, mvaṁ deva bhūta siḥ ri kita-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratāmbirā, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka huyaḥ, satavun tigāṁ lek ṣamayanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu, kinasihaniṁ rāt kittha, mvaṁ de$- -va bhūṭā siḥ ri kittha-->
1440
.<!-- N hana brata:mbira, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka huyaḥ, satahun tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, bhaṭa:ra Iśvara: hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara: ya namaḥ, pamit, pha:, [SH] priḥ meṅgal katmu, kinasihaniṁ ra:t kittha, mvaṁ deva bhūṭa: siḥ ri kittha-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata mbira, ṅa, yan hamaṅan· mevak huyaḥ kevala, satavun lavasnyā mvaṁ tigaṁ lek ṣamayanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṁnya. ma, Ōm̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ. phalanya siṁ priḥ Eṅgāl katәmu tuṛ kinasihan deniṁ deva- -bhuṭa, kinasihan deniṁ rāt·-->
.
1445<!-- U hana bratāmbira, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka huyaḥ, satahun tigaṁṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāreśvara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, siṁ pinriḥ heṅgal katmu, kinasihiṁ rāt kita, mvaṁ deva bhutāsih iri kita-->
.
.
.
.
1450<div type="section" n="3.14">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_14">
. hana brata
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">birā</lem>
1455<rdg wit="#G">abhira</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">mbira</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, yan amaṅan
.<app>
1460<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">mevaka</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mevak</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">uyah</lem>
1465<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">uyah kevala</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">satahun tigaṅ lek</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">satavun lavasnyā mvaṅ tigaṅ lek</rdg>
1470</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">samayanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive">samaya nikaṅ brata</rdg>
.</app>,
1475 bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ īśvarāya namah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pamit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
1480</rdg>
.</app>, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">prih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">siṅ pinrih</rdg>
1485</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">meṅgal</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">eṅgal</rdg>
.</app> katәmu, <app>
1490<lem wit="#G #M #N">kinasihaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">tur kinasihan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">kinashiṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
1495<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"> rāt </lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition"> deniṅ rāt </rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"> kita </lem>
1500<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">mvaṅ deva bhūṭa</lem>
1505<rdg wit="#U" cause="transposition">deniṅ deva bhuṭa</rdg>
.</app>
. sih
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">ri</lem>
1510<rdg wit="#U">iri</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
1515<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="lost"></gap>
.</rdg>
1520</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata birā ... ri kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
1525 in 3.13
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.14 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.28</note>
1530</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta tan paṅinaṁ sәr̥h iṅapvan·, satahun divasanya, bhaṭāri bhagavati hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ namo bhagāvatye namaḥ, pamit·, phalanya, lupu$tiṁ sarvva viṣā , nirvighna kita-->
1535
.<!-- M hana bratā tan pamaṅan sәr̥h iṅapvan·, satavun samayanya, bhaṭāri bhagāvati hyaṁnya$, ma, Om̐ namo bhagāvatye namaḥ, pamit·, pha, luputiṁ sarvva viṣā, nirvighnā kittha-->
.
.<!-- N hana brata tan pamaṅan sər̥h iṅapvan·, satahun samayanya:, bhaṭa:ri bhagavati hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ namo bha:gavatyai namaḥ, pamit·, luputiṁ saṛvva [SH] viṣa:, nirvighna kittha-->
.
1540<!-- P hana bratā maṅan· sәdaḥ hiṅapuhan· satavun· samayanya, bhaṭāra bhagavati hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ namo bhagavati ya namaḥ, pami- -t·. phalanya luputiṁ viṣayā kitā, nirvvighna kitā
.-->
.<!-- U hana brata tan pamaṅan· sәr̥h iṁṅapvan·, satahun samayanya, bhāṭāri bhagāvati hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ namo bhāgavatye namaḥ, phamit·, pha, luputiṁ saṛvva viṣya, nirvighna kita
.-->
.
1545<div type="subchapter" n="3.15">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_15">
. hana brata <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tan pamaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="eye-skip">maṅan</rdg>
1550</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sərәh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">sәḍah</rdg>
.</app>
1555<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">iṅapvan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">iṅapuhan</rdg>
.</app>,
. satahun
1560<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">samayanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">divasanya</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
1565<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"> bhaṭārī </lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">bhaṭāra</rdg>
.</app> bhagāvati
. hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ namo
.<app>
1570<lem wit="#N">bhagavatyai</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #U">bhagāvatye</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P"> bhagavati</rdg>
.</app> namah, pamit, pha, luputiṅ
.<app>
1575<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sarvaviṣa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">viṣaya kitā</rdg>
.</app>, nirvighna kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
1580<note>hana brata tan pamaṅan ... nirvighna kita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.14
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
1585 in 3.15 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.9</note>
.
.</app>
.</ab>
1590</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta hamaṅan naryyan roṇḍon· pituṁ tahun samayanya, bhaṭāreśvara hyaṁnya, mantra kadi ṅuni, pamit, phalanya, mantukiṁ padhuka bhaṭāreśvara, sasvaṛggā kita lavan sira, maṁjanma riṁ juru bhāṣaṇa, sugih hulun·, lābdha riṁ prabhū$ [5v], mvaṁ mantri, tan padha lāvan rovaṁta-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratāhāmaṅan āṅaryya rondon· pituṁ tavun samayanya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ padā bhaṭāra Iśvarā, sasāṛnya maṁjanmā riṁ juru baṣā, sugiḥ hulun·, lābda ri saṁ prabhū, mvaṁ mantri, tan padha lavan rovaṁta kabeḥ-->
1595
.<!-- N hana brata amaṅan aṅarya roṇḍon, pituṅ tahun samayanya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Īśvara ya namah, pamit, pha, mantuk iṅ pada bhaṭāra Īśvara, sasarnya maṅjanma ri juru bhāṣa, sugih hulun, labdha riṅ saṅ prabhu mvaṅ mantrī, tan pada lavan rovaṅta kabeh.-->
.
.<!-- P -->
.
1600<!-- U hana brata hamaṅanāṅāṛyya rondon·, pituṁ tahun samayanya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mantuk iṁ pāda bhāṭāra Iśvara, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ juru bhāṣa, sugiḥ hulun·, labda riṁ saṁ prabhu, mvaṁ mantri, tan padha lāvan rovangta kabeh-->
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.16">
1605<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_16">
.hana brata amaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">ṅaryan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U"></rdg>
1610</app>
. roṇḍon, pituṅ tahun samayanya,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">bhaṭāreśvara hyaṅnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U" cause="eye-skip"></rdg>
1615</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">ma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">mantra kadi ṅuni</rdg>
.</app>,
1620<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">Om̐ mam̐ Īśvarāya namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="syntactic"></rdg>
.</app>, pamit, pha, mantuk iṅ <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">pada</lem>
1625<rdg wit="#G">paduka</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">bhaṭāra Īśvara</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="orthographical">bhaṭāreśvara</rdg>
1630</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">sasarnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">sasvarggā kita lavan sira,</rdg>
.</app> maṅjanma ri juru
1635<app>
.<lem wit="#G">bhāṣaṇa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U"></rdg>
.</app>,
. sugih hulun, labdha <app>
1640<lem wit="#M #N #U">riṅ saṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">ri</rdg>
.</app> prabhu mvaṅ mantrī, tan pada lavan rovaṅta <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kabeh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
1645<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
1650
.<note>hana ṅaryan roṇḍon ... roṇḍon kabeh <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.15
.<ptr target="#M"/>
1655<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.16 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
1660<!-- G hana brāta haraka, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva buṅkaḥ, tigaṁ tavun samayanya, hyaṅ iśvāra hyaṅiṁ brāta, ma, pitibrāta, kaddhi ṅūni, phalanya , mantukiṁ śvaṛggā bhaṭāra śiva, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ viku guṇavan·, sugiḥ pirak· labdha riṁ saṁ prabhū, mvaṁ mantri-->
.
.
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅrakā, ṅa, hamaṅan sarvva buṅkaḥ, tigāṁ tavun samayanyā, hyaṁ Iśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ ya namaḥ svāhā, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ pada bhaṭāra śivā, sasārnya maṁjanma riṁ viku guṇavan·, sugiḥ pirak·, lābda riṁ saṁ prabhū mvaṁ - -mantri-->
.
1665
.<!-- N hana brata ṅraka, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva buṅkaḥ, tigaṁ tahun samayanya:, hyaṁ Iśva
.ra hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ ya namaḥ sva:ha, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ padḍa bhaṭara śiva, sasa:ṛnya maṁjanma: riṁ viku gu$ [SH] ṇava:n·, sugiḥ pirak·, labda riṁ saṁ prabhu mvaṁ mantrī-->
.
.
1670<!-- P -->
.
.
.<!-- U hana bratā ṅraka, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva buṅkaḥ, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, hyaṁ Iśvara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ ya namaḥ svāhā, pamit·, pha, mantuk iṁ bhaṭāra śiva, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ viku guṇavān·, sugiḥ pirak·, labda ri saṁ prabhu mvaṁ mantri.
.-->
1675<!-- <div n="3." type="chapter" xml:id="tattvabrata_04.">
.<head type="editorial" xml:lang="eng"></head><div><p>-->
.
.
.
1680<div type="subchapter" n="3.17">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_17">
.hana brata <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">ṅraka</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">araka</rdg>
1685</app>,
. ṅa, amaṅan sarva buṅkah, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, hyaṅ īśvara
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">hyaṅnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
1690<gap reason="omitted"></gap>hyaṅniṅ brata</rdg>
.</app>,
. ma, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #u">Om̐ mam̐ <supplied reason="omitted">śivā</supplied>ya namah svāhā, pamit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">pitibrāta, kaddhi ṅūni,</rdg>
1695</app>, pha, mantuk iṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">pada</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">śvarggā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">
1700<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app> bhaṭāra śiva, sasarnya maṅjanma riṅ viku guṇavān, sugih pirak, labdha riṅ saṅ prabhu mvaṅ mantrī.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
1705<note>hana brata ṅraka...mvaṅ mantrī <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.16
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
1710 in 3.17 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
1715<!-- G hana brata haṅumbakaṛṇnā, ṅa, yan aturu miriṁ satahun·, lumaḥ satahun·, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, bhaṭāra rudrā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ namo rudrā ya svaha, phalanya, kinasihaniṁ paṇḍita, kinatvaṅan deniṁ padhanta janma, siddha sapra[6r]yanta-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅumbhakarṇna, ṅa, yan aturu miriṁ satahun· lumaḥ satavun· kumur̥b satavun·, tigaṁ tavun samayanya, bhaṭāra rudrā hyaṁ niṁ bratā, ma, Om̐ namo rūdrā ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, kinasiha niṁ pāṇdhita kittha, samānta janma ṣamātvaṁ, siddha saprayojñananta||0||
.-->
.
1720<!-- N hana brata:ṅumbhakarṇna, ṅa, yan a:turu miriṁ satahun·, lumaḥ satahu$
.n·, kumur̥b satahun·, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, bhaṭara rudra: hyaṁniṁ brata:, ma, Om̐ namo rudra: ya na [SH] maḥ, pamit·, pha, kinasihaniṁ paṇḍita kittha. samanta janma samatvaṁ, sidḍa saprayojñananta
.-->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā ṅumbhākāṛṇnā, ṅa, miriṁ satahun haturu, ṅlumaḥ satavun·, roṁ tavun· samayanya, phalanya muliḥ riṁ śvaṛgga bhaṭāra rudrā, - -sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ hadimantri, labda riṁ saṁ prabhu
1725-->
.<!-- U hana brata mbhaṅumbakārṇna, ṅa, yan aturu miriṁ satahun·, ṅlumah satahun·, tigaṁ tahun ṣamayanya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṁ niṁ brata, ma, Om̐ namo rudra ya namaḥ pamit·, pha, kinasiha niṁ pāṇdhita, samanta janma samātvaṁ, siddha saprayojananta.
.-->
.
.
1730
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.18">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_18">
.hana brata <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">ṅumbhakarṇa</lem>
1735<rdg wit="#G">aṅumbakarṇnā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mbhaṅumbakārṇna</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa,
.<app>
1740<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">yan aturu miriṅ satahun</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">miriṅ satahun aturu</rdg>
.</app>,
. lumah satahun,
.<app>
1745<lem wit="#M #N">kumurәb satahun</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
1750<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tigaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">roṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. tahun samayanya,
1755<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅniṅ brata</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">bhaṭāra rudrā hyaṅnya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="line_omission"></rdg>
.</app>,
1760 ma, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">Om̐ namo rudrāya namah, pamit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">Om̐ namo rudrā ya svaha</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="line_omission"></rdg>
.</app>,
1765 pha, kinasihaniṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">paṇḍita kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">paṇḍita</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
1770<witDetail wit="#P">mulih...ri saṅ prabhu</witDetail>
.</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">samanta janma samatvaṅ</lem>
1775<rdg wit="#G">samānta janma ṣamātvaṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<witDetail wit="#P">mulih...ri saṅ prabhu</witDetail>
.</rdg>
.</app>, siddha <app>
1780<lem wit="#U">saprayojananta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N">saprayojñananta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<witDetail wit="#P">mulih...ri saṅ prabhu</witDetail>
.</rdg>
1785</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata ṅumbhakarṇa...siddha saprayojananta <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
1790 in 3.17
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.18 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.61</note>
1795</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
1800<!-- G kunaṅ ikaṅ amuna ṅisiṁ, priḥ meṅṅal kātmū, bahu sisya kita. -->
.
.<!-- M kunaṁ Ika yan muna ṅisiṁ, priḥ meṅgal katmu, bavu siṣya kittha -->
.
.<!-- N kunaṁ Ika yan muna ṅisiṁ, priḥ meṅga:l katmu, bahu sisya kita||0|| -->
1805
.<!-- P kunaṁ tikaṁ mūna ṅisiṁ, phalanya siṁ priḥ meṅgal katәmu. -->
.
.<!-- U kunaṅ ikaṁ yan muna ṅiṅisiṁ, priḥ meṅgal katәmu, bāhu siśya kita. -->
.
1810
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.19">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_19">
.kunaṅ
.<app>
1815<lem wit="#G #U">ikaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N"></rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">tikaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. yan
1820<app>
.<lem type="norm">mona</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">amuna</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">muna</rdg>
.</app>
1825<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">ṅisiṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">ṅiṅisiṅ</rdg>
.</app>,
. prih meṅgal katәmu, <app>
1830<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bahu śiṣya kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="line_omission"></rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
1835<note>kunaṅ ikaṅ yan mona ṅisiṅ ... śiṣya kita
.<ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.19 <ptr target="#P"/>
1840 in 3.17 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.18 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
1845
.<!-- G
. Kunaṁ ikaṅ amunā napu napu, phalanya, kinasihaniṁ paṇḍita, mvaṁ deva prabhū, rahayu riṁ janmānta|| -->
.
.<!-- M
1850 kunaṁ Ika yan muna napuḥ, pha, kinasihaniṁ pa:ṇḍita, mvaṁ deva: prabhū, rahayu riṁ [SH] pañjanmanta -->
.
.<!-- N
. kunaṁ hikaṁ yan muna napuḥ, pha, kinasihaniṁ pa:ṇḍita, mvaṁ deva: prabhū, rahayu riṁ [SH] pañjanmanta|| -->
.
1855<!-- P-->
.
.<!-- U
. kunaṁ ikaṁ yan muna napu, pha, kinasini pāṇdhi, mvaṁ deva prabhu, rahayu riṁ pañjanmanta.
.
1860-->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.20">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_20">
1865kunaṅ ikaṅ yan
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">mona</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">amunā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">muna</rdg>
1870</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">napu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">napu napu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">napuh</rdg>
1875</app>, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">kinasihaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">kinasihani</rdg>
.</app>
1880<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">paṇḍita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">pāṇdhi</rdg>
.</app>, mvaṅ deva prabhu, rahayu riṅ
.<app>
1885<lem wit="#M #N #U">pañjanmanta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">janmānta</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
1890<note>kunaṅ kunaṅ ikaṅ yan ... riṅ pañjanmanta
.<ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.20<ptr target="#U"/>
1895 in 3.19 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
1900<!-- G kunaṁ ikaṅ amuna sisig, phalanya, meṅәtiṁ janmāntara, jaya sakaṛyyanta-->
.<!-- M Ikaṁ muna sisig·,- - jaya karyyanta-->
.<!-- N Ikaṁ muna sisig·, jaya kaṛyyanta|| -->
.<!-- U Ikaṁ muna sisig, pha, jaya kāṛyyanta. -->
.
1905
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.21">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_21">
.<app>
1910<lem wit="#G">kunaṅ ikaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">ikaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">mona</lem>
1915<rdg wit="#M #N #U">muna</rdg>
.</app>
. sisig, <app>
.<lem wit="#U"> pha, </lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">phalanya, meṅәtiṅ janmāntara</rdg>
1920<rdg wit="#M #N">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>jaya kāryanta.
.<app>
1925<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>kunaṅ ikaṅ mona sisig...jaya kāryanta <ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.18
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
1930 in 3.21 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.21 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
1935
.
.<!-- G Kunaṅ ikaṁ amunā(ba)sma , phalanya, mantukiṁ svaṛggā bhaṭāri ratri, sasaṛnya majanma ri saṁ paṇḍita-->
.<!-- M Ikaṁ mūna baṣma, pha, mantukiṁ bhaṭārī ratri, sasārnya mañjanmā ri saṁ paṇdhita||0|| -->
.<!-- N Ikaṁ muna bhaṣma:, pha, mantukiṁ bhaṭarī ratri, sasaṛnya mañjanma: ri saṁ pa:ṇḍita||0|| -->
1940<!-- U Ikaṁ muna bhāṣma, pha, mantuk iṁ bhāṭāri ratri, sasaṛnya maṁjanma ri saṁ paṇdhita.-->
.<!-- .-->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.22">
1945<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_22">
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">kunaṅ ikaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">ikaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
1950<app>
.<lem type="norm">mona</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">amuna</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">muna</rdg>
.</app>
