1955 bhasma, pha, mantuk <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">iṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">iṅ svarggā</rdg>
.</app>
. bhaṭarī rātri, sasarnya
1960<app>
.<lem wit="#G">majanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">mañjanma</rdg>
.</app> ri saṅ paṇḍita.
.<app>
1965<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>ikaṅ kunaṅ mona bhasma ... saṅ paṇḍita <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.21
.<ptr target="#M"/>
1970<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.22 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
1975
.
.
.<!-- G hana brāta tan pakalasa yan aturu, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, hyaṁ nāga raja hyaṁniṁ brāta, ma, Om̐ namo nāga raja ya namaḥ, pāmit·, phalanya, deva bhūta siḥ ri kita, mvaṁ saṛva guṇa tkā ya|| -->
.
1980<!-- M hana bratā yan aturu tan pakalaśa, satavun tigāṅ lek ṣamayanya, hyaṁ nagha raja hyaṁ niṁ bratā, ma, Om̐ namo nagha ra$- -ja ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, deva bhuṭā sih iri kittha, mvaṁ sarvva guṇa tkā-->
.
.<!-- N hana bratta yan aturu tan pakalaśa, satahun tiga:ṅ lek ṣamayanya, hyaṁ nagha: ra:ja hyaṅniṁ brata:,$ [SH] ma, Om̐ nagha: ra:ja ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, deva bhūṭa: sih iri kittha, mvaṁ sa:ṛvva guṇa tka||0||-->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā tan pakalaṣā yan aturu, satavun tigaṁ lek· samayanya, hyaṁ nāga rāja hyaṁniṁ brata, ma, Ōm̐ nama naga- -rāja ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya deva bhūṭā siṁ hiri kitā, mvaṁ saṛvva guṇanta tәka-->
1985
.<!-- U hana brata yan aturu tan pakalasa, satahun tigāṁṅ lek ṣamayanya, hyaṁ nāgā rahajā hyaṁ niṁ brāta, ma, Om̐ namo nāma nāgārāja ya nāmaḥ, pamit·, pha, deva bhūta siḥ iri kita, muvaṁ sārvva guṇantā.-->
.
.
.
1990<div type="subchapter" n="3.23">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_23">
.hana brata <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">yan aturu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P" cause="transposition">tan pakalasa</rdg>
1995</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">tan pakalasa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">yan aturu</rdg>
.</app>,
2000 satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, hyaṅ nāga rāja hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ nāga rājāya namah, pamit, pha, deva bhūṭa
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">siṅ</rdg>
.</app>
2005<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">ri</rdg>
.</app>
. kita, mvaṅ <app>
2010<lem wit="#G #M #N">sarvaguṇa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">sārvvaguṇanta</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">təka.</lem>
2015<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive">tәka yā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
2020<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata yan aturu tan pakalasa ... sarvaguṇa təka <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.22
2025<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.23 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.12</note>
.</app>
2030</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
2035<!-- G hana brāta turu sumaṇḍā, tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu hyaṁnya, mantra, Om̐ Um̐ viṣṇave namaḥ, pam(i)t· , phalanya, maṇḍiśvara kita riṁ saṛvva janma-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā turu sumandaḥ, tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ Om̐ veṣṇave namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mandiśvara kitā riṁ samā janmā, lābda- -vara
.-->
.<!-- N hana brata: turu sumandaḥ, tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya:, bhaṭa:ra viṣṇu hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ Om̐ veṣṇave namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mandi śvara: kita: [SH] riṁ sama: janma:, labda vara-->
2040
.<!-- P hana brata haturu sugәda, ṅa, tigaṁ lek·, sama- -yanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu hyaṁnya, phalanya labda vara madiśvara, jananura
. ga kitā, kedhәp-->
.
.<!-- U hana bratā turū sumandhaḥ, tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārā viṣṇu hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ vaiṣnave namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mandhi svara kita riṁ sama janma, mvah labdha varaḥ. -->
2045
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.24">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_24">
2050hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">turu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">aturu</rdg>
.</app>
2055<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sumaṇḍah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">sugәda</rdg>
.</app>,
. tigaṅ lek samayanyā, bhaṭāra viṣṇu hyaṅnya, ma,
2060<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">Om̐</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2065</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">Um̐</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">Om̐</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
2070<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">viṣṇave</lem>
2075<rdg wit="#M #N">veṣṇave</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">vaiṣnave</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2080</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">namah, pamit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
2085</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">mandi svara</lem>
2090<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">labda vara madiśvara</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">jananuraga kitā</rdg>
2095</app>
. riṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">samajanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">sarvvajanma</rdg>
2100<rdg wit="#P">kedhәp</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">labdha vara</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
2105<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mvah labdha varah</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
2110<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata turu sumaṇḍah ... labdha vara <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.23
.<ptr target="#M"/>
2115<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.24 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.63 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
2120</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brata praṇa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan saṛvvambәkan·, tan pamaṅan asiṁ praṇi, pituṁ tahun samayanya, hyaṁ devatara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ devatara ya namaḥ svaha, pamit·, phalanya, putra vr̥ddhi, mvaṁ vnaṁ vnaṁ kbo sapi, saṛvva tinanәmta vr̥ddhi, ya kabeḥ -->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā praṇā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarvvambәkan·, tan pamaṅana praṇi, pituṁ tavun samayanya, hyaṁ devā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ devatāra ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, putra vr̥ddhi, mvaṁ vnaṁ vnaṁ, kbo sapi, sarvva tinanәmta vr̥ddhi kabe- -ḥ -->
2125
.<!-- N hana brata: praṇa:, ṅa, tan pamaṅa:n saṛvva:mbǝkan·, tan pamaṅana praṇi, pituṁ tahun samaya$nya, hyaṁ deva hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ deva:tara ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, putra vr̥dḍi, mvaṁ vnaṁ vnaṁ, kbo sapi, sa:ṛ [SH] vva tinanǝmta vr̥dḍi kabeḥ-->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā praṇā, ṅa, tan pamaṅa- -:n saṛvva prani, pituṁ tavun ṣamayanya, deva ratu hyaṁnya, phalanya putra vr̥ddhi, mvaṁ vәnaṁ vәnaṁ kәbo sapi celeṁ, kuda, bebek·, - -hayam·, dara kitiran· satavana, bañak·, salviriṁ hiṅon i ṅon· mvaṁ miṇā bhavu-->
.
2130<!-- U hana bratā praṇa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan· sarvvāmbәkan·, tan pamaṅan· praṇi, pituṁ tahun samayanya, hyaṁ deva hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ devatāra ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, putra vr̥ddhi, mvaṁ vәnaṁ vәnaṁ, kbo sapi, saṛvva tinanәmta vr̥ddhi kabeh.-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.25">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_25">
.hana brata prāṇa, ṅa,
2135<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tan pamaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2140</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sarvāmbǝkan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
2145</rdg>
.</app>,
.tan <app>
.<lem wit="#G">pamaṅan asiṅ prāṇi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">tan pamaṅana praṇi</rdg>
2150<rdg wit="#P">tan pamaṅān sarvva prani</rdg>
.</app>,
.pituṅ tahun samayanya, hyaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">devātara</lem>
2155<rdg wit="#M #N #U">devā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">deva ratu</rdg>
.</app>
. hyaṅnya,
.<app>
2160<lem wit="#G">ma, Om̐ devātarāya namah svaha, pamit,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">ma, Om̐ devātara ya namah, pamit</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2165</app> pha, putra vrәddhi, mvaṅ vәnaṅ vәnaṅ, kәbo sapi,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sarva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">salviriṅ</rdg>
.</app>
2170<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tinanǝmta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">iṅon-iṅon</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
2175<lem wit="#M #N #U">vrәddhi kabeh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">vrәddhi ya kabeh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mvaṅ miṇā bhavu</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
2180<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata prāṇa ... vrәddhi kabeh <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.24
.<ptr target="#M"/>
2185<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.25 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.63 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
2190</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta hamaṅan pisan savguṁ, saṁ hyaṁ sambu devatanya, ma, Om̐ śam̐ sāmbhu ve namaḥ, pamit·, phalanya, maṁ[7r]janma riṁ kula putra, subhāga siddha siṁ saprayojanantā, priḥ meṅgal· tka-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā maṅan pisan savguṁ, saṁ hyaṁ sambhu devatanyā, satahun divaśanya, ma, Om̐ sāmbhu ve namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mañjanma riṁ kula putra, subhagā siddhi siṁ saprayojñananta, priḥ meṅgal katmu-->
2195
.<!-- N hana brata maṅan pisan savguṁ, saṁ hyaṁ sambhu devatanya:, satahun divaśanya, ma, Om̐ sambhu ve namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mañjanma: riṁ kula putra, subha:ga sidḍi siṁ saprayojñananta, priḥ meṅgal katmu-->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā maṅan· sadinā sapisan·, saṁ hyaṁ śambu devatanya, ma, Ōm̐ saṁ hyaṁ śambu- -ve namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya, mañjanma rim kula putra subhaga siddha saprayojñānanta, siṁ kapriḥ Eṅgal katәmu-->
.
2200<!-- U hana brata hamaṅan· sapisan savguṁ, saṁ hyaṁ sambhu devatanya, ma, Om̐ śambhu deva namaḥ, pamit·, pha, maṁjanma riṁ kula putra, subhāga siddhi asiṁ prayojananta, priḥ meṅgal katmu. -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.26">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_26">
2205hana brata amaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pisan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">sadinā</rdg>
.</app>
2210<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">savәguṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">sapisan</rdg>
.</app>,
. saṅ hyaṅ sambhu devatanya,
2215<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">satahun divasanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U" cause="line_omission"></rdg>
.</app>,
. ma,
2220 Om̐ <app>
.<lem type="emn">śambhave</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">sambhuve</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#G">śam̐ sāmbhuve</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">saṅ hyaṅ śambuve</rdg>
2225<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">śambhu deva</rdg>
.</app>
. namah, pamit, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</lem>
2230<rdg wit="#G #U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ kula putra, subhaga
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">siddhi</lem>
2235<rdg wit="#G #P">siddha</rdg>
.</app>
. siṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">saprayojananta</lem>
2240<rdg wit="#M #N #P">saprayojñananta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">prayojananta</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">prih</lem>
2245<rdg wit="#P">siṅ kaprih</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">meṅgal</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">eṅgal</rdg>
2250</app> katәmu.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata amaṅan pisan savәguṅ ... meṅgal katәmu <ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
2255 in 3.25
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.26 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.10 </note>
2260</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratā hamaṅan pisan sa- -vguṁ, saṁ hyaṁ sāmbhu hyaṅ iṁ bratā, tigāṁ tahun samayanya, pha, dr̥mman haputra, siṁ priḥ meṅgal katkan-->
2265
.<!-- N hana [SH] brata:, hamaṅan sapisan savguṁ, saṁ hyaṁ sambhu hyaṅiṁ brata:, tigaṁ tavun lavasnya:, pha, dr̥mana:putra, siṁ priḥ meṅgal katkan·-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.27">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_27">
2270hana brata, amaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M">pisan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">sapisan</rdg>
.</app>
2275 savәguṅ, saṅ hyaṅ śambhu hyaṅiṅ brata, tigaṅ tahun lavasnya, pha, drәman aputra, siṅ prih meṅgal katəkan.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note>hana brata amaṅan sapisan ... meṅgal katəkan
.<ptr target="#M"/>
2280<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.27 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
2285
.
.<!-- M hana bratā maṅan pisan sadinā, sakavaśa niṁ habratā, saṁ hyaṁ sambhu hyaṁnya, pha, mañjanma riṁ kula putra, siddha saprayojñananta-->
.
.<!-- N hana brata:maṅan pisan sadina:, sakavaśaniṅ a:brata:, saṁ hyaṁ sa:ṁbhu hyaṁnya:, pha, mañjanma: riṁ kula pu$ [SH] tra, sidḍa saprayojñananta-->
2290
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.28">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_28">
.hana brata maṅan pisan sadina, sakavaśaniṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ śambhu hyaṅnya, pha, majanma riṅ kula putra, siddha <app>
.<lem type="norm">saprayojananta</lem>
2295<rdg wit="#M #N">saprayojñananta</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note>hana brata maṅan pisan sadina ... siddha saprayojananta
2300<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.28 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
2305</div>
.
.
.<!-- G hana brāta nutakәn vulan·, ṅa (KURANG), yan amaṅaniṁ taṅgal·, 1, sakpәl·(BEDA), yaniṁ taṅgal, 2, rva kpәl _ _ _ _
.
2310makahiṅana lima vlās· kpәl·,
.yaniṁ pūṛṇnama,
.Apan atambәḥ sakpәl
. _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
. kunәṁ irikaṁ paṅlvaṁ,
2315 lvaṅāna ta ya sakpәl·,
. naṅkәn· rahina,
. havkāsan aṅupavāśā,
. yan tilәm·,
. tigaṁ hulan divāśanya,
2320 bhaṭārendra hyaṁnya,
. ma, Om̐ surendhra ya namaḥ, pamit·,
. phalanya, mantukiṁ padha bhaṭāra śivā,
. sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ [7v] ratu (KURANG),
. mvaṁ viku bahu sisya kita-->
2325
.<!-- M hana bratā yan āmaṅan hanūtakәn vulan·, lviṛnya, taṅgal pisan·, sakpәl·, yan avuvuḥ taṅgal·, havuvuḥ sakpәl·,
.
.makahiṅana lima vlas· kpәl·,
.yaniṁ pūṛṇnamā,
2330Apan ātambәḥ sakpәl hirikaṁ sarahina,
.kunaṁ riṁ paṅlvaṅā,
.lvaṅana$- - ta ya sakpәl·,
.naṅkәn rahinā,
.havkasan aṅupavaśa yaniṁ tilәm·,
2335tluṁṅ lek ṣamayanya,
.bhaṭāra Indrā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ surendrā ya namaḥ, pamit·,
.pha, mantukiṁ padā bhaṭāra śiva,
.sasarnya mañjanma riṁ ratu prajñān·,
.mvaṁ viku bahu siṣya$- -kittha-->
2340
.<!-- N hana brata: yan a:maṅan hanūta:kǝn ulan·, lviṛnya:, taṅgal pisan·, sakplǝl·, yan avu
.$vuḥ taṅgal·, havuvuḥ sakpǝl·,
.maka:hiṅana: lima vlas· kpǝl·,
.yaniṁ puṛṇnama,
2345Apana:tambǝḥ sakǝ [SH] pǝl
.hirikaṁ sarahina:,
.kunaṁ ri paṅlva:ṁ,
.lva:ṅa:na sakpǝl·,
.naṅkǝn rahina,
2350havkasana:ṅupavaśa yaniṁ tīlǝm·,
.tluṅ lek ṣamayanya,
.bhaṭa:ra Indra: hyaṁnya,
.ma, Om̐ surendra: ya namaḥ, pamit,
.pha, mantukiṁ pada: bhaṭa:ra: śiva:,
2355sa$ [SH] saṛnya mañjanma: riṁ ratū prajña:n·, mvaṁ viku bahu siṣya: kittha:-->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā hañutakәn hulan·, yan hamaṅan taṅgal hapisan·, sakәpәl·, taṁ, 2, rvaṁ kәpәl·, muṅga- -ḥ sakәpәl· sadinā, tәkāniṁ taṅgal·, piṁ, 14,
.
.pūṛnama hamr̥ti, yan paṅloṁ hapisan·, piṁ, 14, sinuddhana sakәpәl·, tәkaniṁ til̥- -m hamr̥ti, tigaṁ lek· ṣamayanya, bhaṭārendra hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ surendra ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya mantukiṁ bhaṭāra śivā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ ratu, mvaṁ riṁ vikva bhavu siṣyā kitā.
2360-->
.
.<!-- U hana brata yan hamaṅan hanūtakәn ulan·, ṅa, taṅgal pisan· sakpәl·, yan avuvuḥ taṅgalnya, avuvu sakәpə̄l,
.makahina lima vlas kpәl·,
.riṁ pūrṇnama,
2365Apan atambәḥ sakpәl·,
.riṁ rahina,
.kunaṁ riṁ paṅlvaṁ,
.loṅana saka sakpәl·,
.avkasan haṅupavaśa yaniṁ til̥m·,
2370tluṁ lek samayanya,
.hida bhaṭāra Indra hyaṁnya,
.ma, Om̐ surendra ya namaḥ, pamit·,
.phalanya, mantuk iṁ bhaṭāra śiva,
.sasaṛnya maṁjānma riṁ ratu,
2375mvaṁ viku bahu śiṣya kita.-->
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.29">
2380<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_29">
.hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">yan amaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
2385<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">anūtakǝn</lem>
2390<rdg wit="#G">nutakәn</rdg>
.</app>
. vulan,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">lvirnya</lem>
2395<rdg wit="#G #U">ṅa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
2400 taṅgal
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">pisan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">1</rdg>
.</app>,
2405 sakәpǝl,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">yaniṅ avuvuh taṅgal, avuvuh sakәpǝl</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G"> yan taṅgal, 2, rva kpәl _ _ _ _ </rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">yan avuvuh taṅgalnya, avuvu sakәpə̄l,</rdg>
2410</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">makahiṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">makahina</rdg>
.</app>
2415 lima vәlas kәpǝl,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">riṅ</rdg>
.</app>
2420 pūrṇama, apan atambǝh sakǝpǝl
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">irikaṅ sarahina</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
2425</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">riṅ</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kunaṅ</lem>
2430<rdg wit="#G">kunәṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #U">ri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">irikaṅ</rdg>
2435<rdg wit="#N">ri</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #U">paṅlvaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">paṅlvaṅā</rdg>
2440</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">lvaṅana ta ya sakәpǝl</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">loṅana saka sakpәl</rdg>
.</app>,
2445<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">naṅkǝn rahina</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2450</app>,
. avәkasan aṅupavaśa
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #N">yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">yan</rdg>
2455</app>
. tilǝm,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">tәluṅ lek samayanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="lexical">tigaṁ ulan divāśanya</rdg>
2460</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">bhaṭāra indra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">bhaṭārendra</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">ida bhaṭāra Indra</rdg>
2465</app>
. hyaṅnya,
. ma, Om̐ surendrāya namah, pamit, pha, mantuk iṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">pada</lem>
2470<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app> bhaṭāra śiva,
. sasarnya majanma riṅ
2475 ratu <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">prajñan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2480</app>,
. mvaṅ viku bahu śiṣya kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata yan amaṅan anūtakǝn vulan ... śiṣya təka; in P the title of the brata, mantra, and result is same with other witnesses, but tend to different in the technique to perform the observance. This is the complete passage of the ms P.
2485 "hana bratā hañutakәn hulan·, yan hamaṅan taṅgal hapisan·, sakәpәl·, taṁ, 2, rvaṁ kәpәl·, muṅgah sakәpәl· sadinā, tәkāniṁ taṅgal·, piṁ, 14, pūṛnama hamr̥ti, yan paṅloṁ hapisan·, piṁ, 14, sinuddhana sakәpәl·, tәkaniṁ til̥m hamr̥ti, tigaṁ lek· ṣamayanya, bhaṭārendra hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ surendra ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya mantukiṁ bhaṭāra śivā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ ratu, mvaṁ riṁ vikva bhavu siṣyā kitā."
.<ptr target="#G"/>
.<ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.26
.<ptr target="#M"/>
2490<ptr target="#N"/>
.<ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.29 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
2495</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta patrahāra, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva roṇḍon·, sari sari, bhaṭāra mahesvara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ Om̐ maheśvara ya namaḥ, pāmit·, phalanya, (ma)ntukiṁ svaṛggā bhaṭāra guru, sasāṛnya maṁjanma riṁ svaṛgā bhaṭāra brahmā, mva viṣṇu kiteṁ dlāhanya-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā patrahara, ṅa, hamaṅan sarvva rondon·, sari sari, bhaṭāra maheśvara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ Om̐ maheśvara ya nāmaḥ, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ svargga bhaṭāra guru, sasārnya mañjanmā riṁ svargga bhaṭāra brahma, - - mvaṁ bhaṭāra viṣṇu, yaniṁ dlāha-->
2500
.<!-- N hana brata patraha:ra, ṅa, hamaṅa:n saṛvva roṇḍon·, sari sari, bhaṭa:ra maheśvara: hyaṁnya:, ma, Om̐ Om̐ maheśvara: ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛ [SH] gga: bhaṭa:ra: guru, sasaṛnya: mañjanma: riṁ svaṛgga bhaṭa:ra brahma:, mvaṁ bhaṭa:ra viṣṇu, yaniṁ dla:ha
.-->
.
.
2505<div type="subchapter" n="3.30">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_30">
. hana brata pattrāhāra, ṅa, amaṅan sarva roṇḍon, sari-sari, bhaṭāra maheśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ Om̐ maheśvarāya namah, pamit, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra guru, sasarnya
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mañjanma</lem>
2510<rdg wit="#G">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ svarga bhaṭāra brahmā,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mvaṅ</lem>
2515<rdg wit="#G">mva</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">bhaṭāra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
2520<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. viṣṇu,
.<app>
2525<lem wit="#M #N">yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kiteṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">dlāha</lem>
2530<rdg wit="#G">dlāhanya</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata pattrāhāra ... yaniṅ dlāha <ptr target="#G"/>
2535 in 3.27
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.30 </note>
.</app>
2540</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta, phalahara, ṅa, hamaṅān saṛvva phala, sāri sāri, bhaṭāra brahmā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ Am̐ brahmāne namaḥ, pamit·, phalanya, muliḥ mareṅ svaṛggā bhaṭāra guru, mvaṁṅ amaṅguḥ śivāpādha, (kurang: sasarnya) maṁjanmeṅ kula putra kita dlāha-->
.
2545<!-- M hana bratā, palahara, ṅa, maṅan saṛvva phala, sari sari, bhaṭāra brahmā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ brahmāne namaḥ, pha, muliḥ mareṅ svarggā bhaṭāra guru, mvaṁ humaṅguḥ śiva padā, sasārnya mañjanma ri kulā go- -tra kiteṁ dlāha
.-->
.
.<!-- N hana brata: phala ha:ra, ṅa,$ maṅan saṛvva phala, sari-sari, bhaṭa:ra brahma: hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ brahma:ne namaḥ, pha, muliḥ mareṁ svaṛgga bha [SH] ṭa:ra guru, mvaṁ humaṅgguḥ śiva pada:, sasaṛnya: mañjanma: riṁ kula gotra kiteṁ dlaha:
.-->
2550
.<!-- P hana brata phalahara, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva phala sari sari, bhaṭāra- -brahmā hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ Am̐ brahmāne namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya mūliṁ riṁ svaṛggan bhaṭāra guru, mvaṁ humuṅguḥ śivapadhā, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ kula- -putra kiteṁ dlahā
.-->
.
.<!-- U hana brata phalahara, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva phala sāri sāri, bhaṭāra brāhma hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ brahmaṇe namaḥ, pamit·, phalanya muliḥ mareṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṁ humaṅguḥ śiva pada, sasaṛnya mañjadma riṁ kula gotra kiteng dlāhan.
2555-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.31">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_31">
.hana brata phalāhāra, ṅa,
2560<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">maṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">amaṅan</rdg>
.</app>
. sarvaphala, sari-sari, bhaṭāra brahmā hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐
2565<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">Am̐</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2570</app>
. brahmane namah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">pamit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">
2575<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. pha, mulih mariṅ
.<app>
2580<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">svarga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">svargan</rdg>
.</app>
. bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ
.<app>
2585<lem wit="#M #N #U">umaṅgguh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">maṅguh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">umuṅguh</rdg>
.</app>
. śiva pada,
2590<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">sasarnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2595</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma riṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">maṅjanmeṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mañjadma riṅ</rdg>
2600</app>
. kula
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">putra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">gotra</rdg>
2605</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">kiteṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kita</rdg>
.</app>
2610<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">dlāha</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">dlāhan</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
2615<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana brata phalāhāra ... kiteṅ dlāha <ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.28
.<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
2620 in 3.31 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.14 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.27 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
2625</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta nirambu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva _ _ _ _ , baṭāra rudrā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ kadi ṅūni, phalanya, mantukiṁ padha [8r] bhaṭāra rudrā, sasāṛnya Añjanma riṁ lituhayu, prājñā-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā hanirambhu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarvva hәmba hәmba, baṭāra rudrā hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ namo ru$drā ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ padā bhaṭāra rudrā, sasārnya mañjanmā ri listuhāyu paripūṛṇna, prajñān kittha- -->
2630
.<!-- N hana brata hanirambu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva hǝmba hǝmba, bhaṭa:ra rudra: hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ namo rudra ya namaḥ, pamit·, pha, mantukiṁ pada: [SH] bhaṭa:ra rudra, sasaṛnya mañjanma: riṁ listuhayu prajña: kittha-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata nirambu, ṅa, kaṁ pinaṅan saṛvva hәmba- -bhaṭāra rudra hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ rudra ya namaḥ. phalanya mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra rudra, sasaṛnya mañjanma, listuhayu paripūṛṇna, prajñān·-->
.
2635<!-- U hana brata hanirambu, ṅa, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṁnya, tan pamaṅan hәmba hәmba, ma, Om̐ nama rudra ya namaḥ, pamit· pha, mantuk iṁ pada bhaṭāra rudra, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ listvāyu, mvaṁ prajñā kita.-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.32">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_32">
.hana brata
2640<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">nirambu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">anirambu</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa,
2645<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">tan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kaṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="transposition">tan</rdg>
.</app>
2650<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">pamaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">pinaṅan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">pamaṅan</rdg>
.</app>
2655<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">sarva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2660</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">ambә-ambә</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="illegible"></gap>
2665</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">әmba</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="transposition">әmba-әmba</rdg>
.</app>,
. bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅnya, ma, <app>
2670<lem wit="#M #N #U">Om̐ namo rudrāya namah, pamit,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">Om̐ kadi ṅūni</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">Ōm̐ rudraya namah</rdg>
.</app>
. pha, mantuk iṅ
2675<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pada</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">svarga</rdg>
.</app>
. bhaṭāra rudra, sasarnya
2680<app>
.<lem wit="#G">añjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
2685<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">riṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2690</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">lituhayu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">listuhāyu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">listvāyu</rdg>
2695</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #U">prajña</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #P">prajñān</rdg>
.</app>
2700<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2705</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note>hana...kita <ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.29
2710<ptr target="#M"/>
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.32 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.35 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.28 </note>
2715</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta ṅasaṅa, ṅa, mabrāta ṅkәn kasaṅa, saṁ hyaṁ bhayu devatanya, ma, Om̐ bam̐ tam̐ bāyu ve namaḥ, pamit, phalanya, mantukiṁ bhaṭāra prajapa(t)i, rare mukti tkeṅ atuha-->
2720
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅasaṅā, ṅa, habratā yaṅkәn kasaṅha, saṁ hyaṁ bāyu hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ tam̐ bāyu ve namaḥ, pamit, pha, mantukiṁ svargga bhaṭāra prajāpati, rare mukti suka tkeṅ atuvvā-->
.
.<!-- N hana bratā ṅasaṅha, ṅa, habrata yaṅkǝn kasaṅha, saṁ hyaṁ bayu hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ tām̐ bayu ve namaḥ, pamit, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra prajapāti, rare mukti suka tkeṅ atuha-->
.
2725<!-- P hana brata ṅasaṅa, ṅa, mabrata naṅkәn kasaṅā, saṁ hyaṁ basu devatanya, ma, Om̐ bham̐ bayu ve namaḥ, pamit. phalanya mantukiṁ svaṛggan bhaṭāraprajāpati, rare kitā mūkti sukka tәkeṁ hatuhā-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata ṅasaṅā, ṅa, habratā naṅkәn kasaṅa hamr̥ti bhaṭārabhayu hyaṁnya, phalanya muliḥ riṁ svaṛgan bhaṭāra prajāpati, saṅka rare, bahu mitra, hamukti sukkā riṁ dlahā-->
.
.<!-- U hana brata ṅasaṅa, ṅa, Abrata yanangkәn kasaṅa, saṁ hyaṁ bayu devatanya, ma, Om̐ tam̐ bayu vai namaḥ, pamit, pha, mantuk iṁ svaṛggan bhaṭārā prajapati, rarenyāmukti suka tkeṅ atuha-->
2730
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.33">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_33">
.hana brata ṅasaṅa, ṅa,
.<app>
2735<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">abrata</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">mabrata</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">yan aṅkǝn</lem>
2740<rdg wit="#G">ṅkәn</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">yaṅkәn</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">naṅkәn</rdg>
.</app>
. kasaṅa, saṅ hyaṅ
2745<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bāyu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">basu</rdg>
.</app>
. hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ tam̐
2750<app>
.<lem type="emn">bāyave</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N #P #U">bayuve</rdg>
.</app>
. namah, pamit, pha, mantuk iṅ
2755<app>
.<lem wit="#P #U">svargan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2760<rdg wit="#M #N">svargga</rdg>
.</app>
. bhaṭāra prajāpati,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">rare</lem>
2765<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">rare kita</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">rarenya</rdg>
2770</app>
. mukti sukha tәkeṅ atuha.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana brata ṅasaṅa ... ṅatuha
2775<ptr target="#G #U"/>
. in 3.30 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.33 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.33 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.36, 3.82 <ptr target="#U"/>
2780 in 3.30 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
2785
.<!-- G hana brāta mopavaśa, ṅa, Aṅkәn dvadaśi śūklā pakṣa, kalaniṁ kapitu juga, brāta bhaṭāra bhima, ma, Om̐ bham̐ bima ya namaḥ, pamit, phalanya, viṛyyavan kapintuhu deniṁ rat, sugiḥ mās pirak, rare hulun, putra vr̥ddhi, siddha kaṛyya-->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā mopavaśa, naṅkәn dvadaśi sūkla pākṣa, kala niṁ kapitu jugā, bratā bhaṭāra bhīmā, ma, Om̐ bam̐ bhīmā ye namaḥ, pamit, pha, viryyavān kapintuhu deniṁ ratu, sugiḥ mas pirak, mvaṁ rare hulun, putra vr̥ddhi, siddha kaṛyyanta-->
.
2790<!-- N hana brata mopavaśā, naṅkǝn dvā daśi sukla pakṣa, kalaniṁ kapi jugā, bratta bhaṭāra bhīma, ma, Om̐ bām̐ bhīma ye namaḥ, pamit, pha, viṛyyavān kapintuhu deniṁ ratū, sugiḥ mās pirak, mvaṁ rare hulun, putra vr̥dḍi, sidḍa kaṛyyanta-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata-->
.
.<!-- U hana brata mopavaśa, nāngkәn dvadaśi suklā pakṣa, kala niṁ kapitu juga, brata bhaṭāra bhima, ma, Om̐ bhima ye namaḥ, pamit, pha, viṛyyavān kapituhu deniṁ ratu, sugiḥ mas pirak, mvaṁ rare hulun, putra vr̥ddhi, siddha kāṛyanta-->
2795
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.34">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_34">
.hana brata mopavāsa,
2800<app>
.<lem wit="#G">aṅkǝn</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">naṅkәn</rdg>
.</app>
. dvadaśi śukla pakṣa, kālaniṅ
2805<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #U">kapitu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">kapi</rdg>
.</app>
. juga, brata bhaṭāra bhīma, [ṅa], ma, Om̐ bam̐
2810<app>
.<lem type="emn">bhīmāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">bhīmaye</rdg>
.</app>
. namah, pamit, pha, vīryavan kapintuhu deniṅ
2815<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">ratu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">rat</rdg>
.</app>,
. sugih mās pirak,
2820<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">mvaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2825</app>
. rare hulun, putra vrәddhi, siddha
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kāryanta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">karyya</rdg>
2830</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā mopavaśa ... siddha kaṛyyanta
.<ptr target="#G"/>
2835 in 3.31 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.34 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.34 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.83 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.31 </note>
2840</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta hasta, ṅa, hamaṅan haṛyyan, lpa lpaniṁ taṅan kivā, mevaka vuyaḥ, tumpaṅakniṁ taṅanta, sabagya yan tan pauyaḥ, phalanya, Agə̄ṁ kasiddhyanta, Apagәḥ kaprajñan kamedan -->
2845
.<!--M hana bratā ṅaṣṭa, ṅa, hamaṅan i yyan, lpa lpaniṁ taṅan kivā, mevaka Uyaḥ, tumpaṅakniṁ taṅan, sabagyan tan paUyaḥ, pha, Agәṁ kasidyanta, hapagәḥ kaprajñanta tan medan -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratāṅaṣṭā, ṅa, hamaṅan i yyan, lpa lpaniṁ taṅan kivā, mevaka Uyaḥ, tumpaṅakniṁ taṅan, sabagya yan tan paUyaḥ, pha, hagə̄ṁ kasidyanta, hapagǝḥ kaprajñanta tan medan-->
.
2850<!-- P hana brata haṣṭa ṅa, yan amaṅan haṛyyaniṁ l̥pa l̥paniṁ taṅan kivā, mewaka huyaḥ, sabagyan tan pahuyaḥ, phalanya magәṁ kasiddhyantā, pagәḥ kaprajñanta -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata ṅasta, ṅa, hamaṅan i ṛyyan, ri lpa lpa niṁ taṅan kivā, mevak Uyaḥ, tumpәṅakniṁ taṅanya, sabhāgya yan tan pahuyaḥ, pha, agə̄ṁ kasiddyanta, apagə̄ḥ kaprajñan tiki denya kamedanya-->
.
.<!-- <div n="3." type="chapter" xml:id="tattvabrata_04.">
2855<head type="editorial" xml:lang="eng"></head><div><p>-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.35">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_35">
.hana brata
2860<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">aṅasta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">hasta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">ṅasta</rdg>
.</app>,
2865 ṅa, amaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">i</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
2870</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">haryan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">yyan</rdg>
2875<rdg wit="#P">haryyaniṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">ryyan</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">lәpa-lәpaniṅ</lem>
2880<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">ri lәpa-lәpaniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. taṅan kiva,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">mevaka</lem>
2885<rdg wit="#U">mevaka</rdg>
.</app> uyah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tumpaṅakәn</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
2890<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. iṅ
.<app>
2895<lem wit="#M #N">taṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">taṅanta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2900<rdg wit="#U">taṅanya</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #U">sabhāgya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N #P">sabagyan</rdg>
2905</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #U">yan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
2910</rdg>
.</app>
. tan pauyah, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">agə̄ṅ</lem>
2915<rdg wit="#P">magәṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. kasiddhyanta, apagǝh
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">kaprajñanta</lem>
2920<rdg wit="#G">kaprajñan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">kaprajñan tiki</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">tan medan</lem>
2925<rdg wit="#G">kamedan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">denya kamedanya</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
2930<note> hana bratāṅaṣṭā... tan medan
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.34 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.35 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.35 <ptr target="#P"/>
2935 in 3.37 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.34 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
2940
.<!-- G hana brāta pratisuptā, ṅa, Aturu pisan tan paturu muvaḥ, phalanya, Ikaṁ abicāryya vdhi ri kita-->
.<!-- M hana bratā pratipāda suptā, ṅa, yan aturū sapisan tan patūru muvaḥ, pha, Ikaṁ habicāryyā vdhi hiri kittha-->
.<!-- N hana bratta pratipadā supta, ṅā, yan āturu sapisan, tan paturu muvah, pha, Ikaṅ ābicāryya vdi hiri kittha -->
.<!-- P hana brata pratipadha suptā, ṅa, haturu sapisan, yan hataṅi tan paturu maliḥ, phalanya hikaṁ habhicari havәdi hiri kitā-->
2945<!-- U hana brata pratipaddhā supta, ṅa, yan aturū sapisan tan paturū muvaḥ, pha, Ikaṁṅ abhicāṛyya vdi hiri kita -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.36">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_36">
.hana brata
2950<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">pratipāda supta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">pratisuptā</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa,
2955<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">yan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
2960</app>
. aturu
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G">pisan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">sapisan</rdg>
2965<rdg wit="#P">sapisan, yan ataṅi </rdg>
.</app>,
. tan paturu
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">muvah</lem>
2970<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">malih</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha, ikaṅ
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">abhicāra</lem>
2975<rdg wit="#G #M #N #U">abicāryya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">abhicari</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">vәdi</lem>
2980<rdg wit="#P">avәdi</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">ri</rdg>
2985</app>
. kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā pratipādasuptā,... vdi hiri kittha
2990<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.35 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.36 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.36 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.38 <ptr target="#U"/>
2995 in 3.35 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
3000<!-- G hana (bra)ta tri sadya, ṅa, madyus piṁ tiga sarahina, mvaṁ vṅi, phalanya, lituhayu, sugiḥ lviḥ saṅkeṁ vijiliṁ tapa-->
.<!-- M hana brata tri sadya, ṅa, madyus piṁ tigā sarahinā, mvaṁ vṅi, pha, listvayu, sugiḥ lviḥ saṅkeṁ tapā vijilnyā -->
.<!-- N hana bratā tri sanḍya, ṅa, madyus piṁ tigā sarahina, mvaṁ vṅi, pha, listvayu, sugiḥ lviḥ saṅkeṁ tapā vijilnya -->
.<!-- P hana bratā tri sadyā, ṅa, haṅupavaśa madyus piṁ tiga sarahinā, piṁ tiga riṁ ratri, phalanya, listuhayu paripūṛṇna, sugiḥ lviḥ sakeṁ tapānta -->
.<!-- U hana brata tri sāndya, ṅa, madyus piṁ tiga sarahina, mvaṁ vṅi, pha, listvāyu sugiḥ lviḥ sakeṁ tapa vijilnya-->
3005
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.37">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_37">
.hana brata
.<app>
3010<lem wit="#G #N #P">trisandhyā</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M"></rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa,
.<app>
3015<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">madyus</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">aṅupavaśa madyus</rdg>
.</app>
. piṅ tiga sarahina,
.<app>
3020<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">mvaṅ vәṅi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">piṁ tiga riṅ ratri</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha,
.<app>
3025<lem wit="#G">lituhayu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U"></rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">listuhayu paripūṛṇna</rdg>
.</app>,
. sugih lәvih
3030<app>
.<lem type="norm">sakiṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N">saṅkeṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">sakeṅ</rdg>
.</app>
3035<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">tapa vijilnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">vijiliṅ tapa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">tapanta</rdg>
.</app>.
3040<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tri ... tapa vijilnya
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.36 <ptr target="#M"/>
3045 in 3.37 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.37 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.39 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.36 </note>
.</app>
3050</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta mr̥ta māsa, ṅa, mahāṛyyan rvaniṁ vuṅlon, makadi hañcaṅkokiṁ vaḥnya, satahun samayanya, phalanya, siddha siṁ sakaṛyyanta, lituhayu, sugiḥ subhāga kita -->
.
3055<!-- M hana bratā mr̥tta māsā, ṅa, mahāryyan rva niṁ vuṅlon, makadi hañcaṅkokiṁ vvaḥnya, pha, siddha siṁ sakaryyanta, listvayū, sugiḥ subhāga kittha -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratta mr̥tta masā, ṅa, mahāṛyyan rvaniṁ vuṅlon, makadi yañ caṅkokiṁ vvaḥnya, pha, sidḍa siṁ sakaṛyyanta, listvayu, sugiḥ subhaga kita-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata hamr̥ta maṣa, ṅa, mahaṛyyan rvaniṁ huṅlon makādi yan caṅkokiṁ vahyā, satavun samayanyā siddha siṁ kāṛyyanta, listuhayu paripuṛṇnā, sugiḥ subhaga kitā -->
3060
.<!-- U hana bratā mratāmāsa, ṅa, mahaṛyyan rva niṁ vuṅlon, makādi yañ cangkok iṁ vvaḥnya, pha, sidā siṁ sakaṛyyanta, listvāyu, sugiḥ subhaga kita. -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.38">
3065<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_38">
.hana brata amr̥ta māsa, ṅa, maharyan rvaniṅ vuṅlon, makādi añcaṅkokiṅ vvahnya, pha, siddha siṅ sakāryanta, lituhayu, sugih subhaga kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta mr̥tta ... subhaga kita
3070<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.37 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.38 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.38 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.40 <ptr target="#U"/>
3075 in 3.37 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
3080<!-- G hana bratā narahan, ṅa, tan pamaṅan saṛvvavr̥ddhiniṁ strī, vnaṁ sar_ _ _ ṅsa paṅanәna, phalanya, siddhā sapinalakunta, kinahyunaniṁ stri kita -->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā narahan, ṅa, tan pamaṅan savr̥ddhiniṁ grī, vnaṁ sarvva maṅśa paṅanәnta, pha, siddha siṁ pinalākunta, kunayuna niṁ stri kittha -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratā narahan, ṅa, tan pamaṅan savr̥dḍiniṁ srī, vnaṁ saṛvva maṅśa paṅanǝnta, pha, sidḍa siṁ pinalakunta, kinahyunaniṁ stri kittha -->
3085
.<!-- U hana brata narahan, ṅa, tan pamaṅan savr̥ddiniṁ stri, vnaṁ saṛvva maṅsa paṅanәnta, pha, siddā siṁ pinalakunta, kinahyuna niṁ stri kita -->
.
.<!-- Pilihan savrәddhiniṅ sri lebih masuk akal karena setelahnya ada penjelasan tentang jenis makanan yang dimakan yaitu sarvamaṅśa-->
.
3090<div type="subchapter" n="3.39">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_39">
.hana brata narahan, ṅa, tan pamaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">savrәddhiniṅ srī</lem>
3095<rdg wit="#G">sarvvavr̥ddhiniṅ strī</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M">savr̥ddhiniṅ grī</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">savr̥ddiniṅ stri</rdg>
.</app>,
. vәnaṅ sarvamaṅśa
3100<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">paṅanǝnta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">paṅanena</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha, siddha
3105<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">siṅ pinalakunta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">sapinalakunta</rdg>
.</app>,
. kinahyunaniṅ strī kita.
3110<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā narahan ... stri kittha
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.38 <ptr target="#M"/>
3115 in 3.39 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.39 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.38 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
3120</div>
.
.
.<!-- G hana brata niramiṣa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva maṅśa, kbo, sap(i), cele(ṁ), panadanya _ _ _ _ _ valā siṁ tan kneṁ kolaḥ dhagiṁnya, hisiniṁ lvaḥ pinakadhinya, kunə̄ṅ sesiniṁ tambak, mvaḥ karaṁ karaṅan, vnaṁ buktinta, pituṁṅ lek samayanya, phalanya, lviḥ saṅkeṁ lviḥ samanta janma, tan hanā liriṅane kita, hayu tmәn -->
.
3125<!-- M hana bratā miṣā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarvva maṅśā, lvirre, kbo, sapi, celeṁ, makadinya tan paṅanәnta, kevala siṁ tan kneṁ holaḥ,
.hivak kaṁ kna paṅanәnta, hisiniṁ lvaḥ, mvaḥ tambak, isiniṁ sagāra, kakaraṅan, hiku vnaṁ bhuktinta, pituṁṅ lek ṣamayanyā, pha, lviḥ sakeṁ samā samanta janmā, tan āna niriṅane kittha, tūṛ mantukiṁ svaṛggān bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ viku bavu siṣya, hayū tmәn -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratta miramiśa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva maṅśa, lvire, kbo, sapi, celeṁ, makadīnya tan paṅanǝnta, kevalya siṁ tan kneṅ olaḥ, hivak kaṁ kna paṅanǝnta, hisiniṁ lvaḥ, mvaṁ tambak, hisiniṁ saghara, kakaraṅan, hiku vnaṁ bhuktinta, pituṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, lviḥ saṅkeṁ samā samanta janmā, tan āna niriṅane kittha, tuṛ mantukiṁ svaṛggan bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ viku bahu sisyā, hayu tmǝn -->
.
3130<!-- P hana brata niramisā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan, saṛvva maṅsa, kәbo, sapi, celeṁ, kevala siṁ tan kәneṁ holaḥ dagiṁnya paṅanәnta, hisiniṁ lva pinakādinya, kunaṁ sahihiniṁ tambak pinakādinya mvaṁ karaṁ karam juga vnaṁ bhuktinta, pituṁ lek ṣamayanya, phalanya lviḥ sakeṁ samanta janma, taneniriṅa kita, hayu tәmәn -->
.
.
.<!-- U hana bratā mira mira miśa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarva kәbo sapi, celeng, makādinya tan pangәnanta, kekava tan kneṅ olaḥ, Ekanya, isi niṁ lvaḥ, pinakādinya, kunaṁ sesi niṁ tambak, mvaṁ karaṁ karaṅan, vnaṁ bhukti, pituṁ lek samayanya, pha, lviḥ sakeng lvih riṁ sama samanta janma, tan hana niriṅane kita, hayu tmәn -->
.
3135<!-- nirāmiṣa 1188:16 (Skt nirāmiṣa, fleshless; nirāmiṣāśin; eating no flesh) to abstain from flesh
. WtS 23.4: brata ṅaranya nirāmiṣādi. -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.40">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_40">
3140hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">nirāmiṣa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">miṣā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N #U">miramiśa</rdg>
3145</app>,
. ṅa, tan pamaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">sarvamaṅśa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
3150<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">lvire</lem>
3155<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
. kәbo, sapi, celeṅ,
3160<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">makādinya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">panadanya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
3165</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">tan paṅanǝnta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
3170<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P">kevala</lem>
3175<rdg wit="#G">_ _ _ _ _vala</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">kevalya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">kekava</rdg>
.</app>
. siṅ tan kәneṅ
3180<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">olah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive">kolah dagiṅnya</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
3185<lem wit="#M #N">ivak kaṅ kәna paṅanǝnta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
3190<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">ekanya</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
3195<lem wit="#M #N">isiniṅ lvah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">isiniṅ lvaḥ pinakadhinya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">isiniṅ lva pinakādinya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">isiniṅ lvah, pinakādinya</rdg>
.</app>,
3200<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mvaṅ tambak</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kunə̄ṅ sesiniṅ tambak</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">kunaṅ sahihiniṁ tambak pinakādinya</rdg>
.</app>,
3205<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">isiniṅ sāgara</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
3210</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">kakaraṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">mvah karaṅ karaṅan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mvaṅ karaṅ karam</rdg>
3215<rdg wit="#U">mvaṅ karaṅ karaṅan</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">iku vәnaṅ bhuktinta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">vnaṅ buktinta</rdg>
3220<rdg wit="#P">juga vnaṅ bhuktinta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">vnaṁ bhukti</rdg>
.</app>,
. pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, lәvih
.<app>
3225<lem wit="#M #P #U">sakeṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #N">saṅkeṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">samanta</lem>
3230<rdg wit="#M #N">sama samanta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">lvih riṅ sama samanta</rdg>
.</app>
. janma, tan hana
.<app>
3235<lem wit="#M #N #U">niriṅane</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">liriṅane</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">taneniriṅa</rdg>
.</app> kita, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">tur mantuk iṅ svargan bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya majanma riṅ viku bahu śiṣya,</lem>
3240<rdg wit="#G #P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>hayu tәmǝn.
.<app>
3245<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta miramiśa,... hayu tmǝn
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.39 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.40 <ptr target="#N"/>
3250 in 3.40 <ptr target="#P"/>
. There are two passages in P that is quite similiar to this brata. I consider to choose passage in order 3.34 instead of 3.92 because its more similiar to other mss. However, I put that brata in 3.92 as follows: hana brata niṛmaṅśā, kramanya tan pamaṅān, kәbo, celeṁ, sāpi, vәdus, salviriṁ kәna vәlaḥ dagiṁnyātan pamaṅanta kevala siṁ tan kәneṁ holaḥ dagiṁnya paṅanәn, hasiniṁ lvaḥ pinakādinya hisiniṁ tambak kunaṁ, karaṁ karaṁ vәnaṁ paṅa:nәnta, pituṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya l̥viḥ sakeṁ samanta janmā tanana haṅilaṅi sukanta <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.39 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
3255</div>
.
.
.<!-- M hana bratā niramiṣā, yan amaṅan mevakā huyaḥ, satavun tigāṅ lek ṣamayanyā, hyaṁ Iśvara hyaṁnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ ya namaḥ, pamit pha, siṁ pinriḥ meṅgal katmu, tūr kinasihan deni rāt kittha, mvaṁ deva bhuṭā sih iri kittha-->
.
3260<!-- N hana bratta niramiṣā, yan āmaṅan mevaka huyaḥ, satahun tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, hyaṁ Iśvara hyaṁnyā, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ, pamit, pha, siṁ pinriḥ meṅgal katmu, tuṛ kinasihan deniṁ rāt kittha, mvaṁ deva bhūṭā sih iri kittha-->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.41">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_41">
3265hana brata nirāmiṣa, yan amaṅan mevaka uyah, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, hyaṅ īśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ īśvarāya namah, pamit, pha, siṅ pinrih meṅgal katәmu, tur kinasihan deniṅ rāt kita, mvaṅ deva bhūṭāsih iri kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta niramiṣa,... deva bhūṭā sih iri kittha
.<ptr target="#M"/>
3270 in 3.41 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.41 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
3275
.
.
.<!-- G hana bratā cakravratti, ṅa, vr̥tti ginave cakrā rūpa, panunu skul saśiraḥniṁ vanāra gə̄ṁnya, yan kalanta maṅa _ _ pasaṁ taṁ vr̥ti, tumpaṅakniṁ skul, saśiraḥniṁ vanara gə̄ṁnya, Umar̥p vetan kita maṅan, hayva pjaḥ hikaṁ vr̥ti, pavusan kita maṅan, yan ahurip ikaṁ vr̥ti, huvusakәn denta maṅan, _ _ _, nya, meṅgal asiṁ sakaṛyyanta, siddhā katmū sapinakṣa, subaga kita, kinasihaniṁ pāṇḍita, mvaṁ saṁ prabhu, r̥si padha siḥ kabeḥ -->
.
3280<!-- M hana bratā candrāvr̥tti, ṅa, ginave candrā rūpa, panunu skul saśirah iṁ vanara gə̄ṁnyā, yan kalanta maṅan, pasaṁ taṁ vr̥tti, tumpaṅākniṁ skul, saśiraḥ iṁ vanara gə̄ṁnya, Umar̥p vetan kita pamaṅan, yan mati ghni hika vr̥ti, havusanā dentāmaṅan, pha, siṁ kaṛyyanta meṅgal siddha katmu siṁ pinakṣa, subhagā kittha, kinasiha niṁ saṁ pāṇdhita, mvaṁ saṁ prabhū, r̥sәp āsiḥ kabeḥ -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, candrāvr̥tti, ṅa, ginave candrā rūpā, panunu skul saśirahiṁ vanara gə̄ṁnya, yan kalanta maṅan, pasaṁ taṁ vr̥tti, tumpaṅakniṁ skul¸ saśirahiṁ vanarā, Umar̥p vetan kita pamaṅan, yan mati ghni hika riṁ vr̥tti, havusāna denta hamaṅan, pha, siṁ kaṛyyanta meṅgal katmu sidḍa siṁ pinakṣa, subhagā kittha, kinasihaniṁ saṁ pāṅḍita, mvaṁ saṁ prabhū, r̥sǝp asiḥ kabeḥ -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata ñakravaṛtti, ṅa. vr̥ti ginave cakrā rūpānya manunu sәkul sasirahiṁ vanara gәṁnya, yan kālaniṁ hamaṅan pasaṁ hikaṁ vr̥tti, tumpaṅakna riṁ sәkul, śiraḥniṁ vanara gәṁnya humar̥p vetan, kita hamaṅan, hayva pәjaḥ hikaṁ vr̥tti, husan kita hamaṅan, yan hurip hikaṁ vṛti huvusakna dlәntāmaṅan, phalanya siṁ sakāṛyyanta siddha katәmu saṁ pinakṣanta, subhaga kitā, kinaptihan deniṁ pāṇdhitā mvaṁ saṁ prabhu, r̥ṣi kabeḥ holasiḥ -->
3285
.<!-- U hana brata candravr̥ti, ṅa, ginave candra rupa, panunu skul ṣasirah iṁ vānarā gə̄ṁnya, yan kālantāmaṅan savataṁ vr̥ti, tumpaṅakәn iṁ skul, sasirah iṁ vānāra, Umakar̥p vetan sira maṅan, hayva pjah ikaṁ vr̥tti yapvan pjah ikaṁ vr̥tti, pahuvusan kita maṅān, yan urip ikaṁ vr̥tthi, huvusakәn dentāmaṅan, pha, siṁ kāṛyyanta meṅgal, sidda kitā siṁ pinakṣa, subhaggā kita, kinasiha niṁ pāṇdhita, mvaṁ saṁ prabhu, r̥sәp hasiḥ kabeḥ -->
.
.<!-- kata agni dinormalisasi-->
.
3290 <div type="subchapter" n="3.42">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_42">
.hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">candra vr̥tti</lem>
3295<rdg wit="#G">cakravratti</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">ñakravartti</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, <app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">vrr̥ti</lem>
3300<rdg wit="#M #N #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. ginave
3305<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">candra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">cakra</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
3310<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">rūpa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">rūpanya</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">panunu</lem>
3315<rdg wit="#P">manunu</rdg>
.</app>
. sәkul saśirahiṅ vānara gə̄ṅnya, yan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kālanta</lem>
3320<rdg wit="#P">kālaniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">maṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">amaṅan</rdg>
3325</app>,
. pasaṅ taṅ vr̥tti, tumpaṅakәn iṅ sәkul, saśirahiṅ vānara,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">umarәp</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">Umakar̥p</rdg>
3330</app>
. vetan kita
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">maṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">apaṅan</rdg>
3335</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">yan mati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">hayva pәjah agni</rdg>
.</app>
3340<app>
.<lem wit="#N">ika riṅ vr̥tti</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P #U">ikaṁ vr̥ti</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M">ika vr̥ti</rdg>
.</app>
3345 ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">avusana denta amaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">pavusan kita maṅan, yan ahurip ikaṅ vr̥ti, huvusakәn denta maṅan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">husan kita hamaṅan, yan hurip hikaṅ vr̥ti huvusakna dlәntāmaṅan</rdg>
3350<rdg wit="#U">pahuvusan kita maṅān, yan urip ikaṁ vr̥tthi, huvusakәn dentāmaṅan</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">siṅ kāryanta meṅgal, </lem>
3355<rdg wit="#G">meṅgal asiṅ sakaṛyyanta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">siṅ sakāryyanta</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M">siddha katәmu siṅ pinakṣa,</lem>
3360<rdg wit="#G">siddhā katmū sapinakṣa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">katәmu siddha siṅ pinakṣa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">katәmu saṅ pinakṣanta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sidda kitā siṅ pinakṣa</rdg>
.</app>
3365 subhaga kita,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kinasihaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kinaptihan</rdg>
.</app>
3370<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">saṅ paṇḍita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">pāṇdhita</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">deniṁ pāṇdhitā</rdg>
.</app>,
3375 mvaṅ saṅ prabhu,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">rәsǝp asih kabeh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">r̥si padha sih kabeh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">r̥ṣi kabeḥ olasih</rdg>
3380</app> kabeh.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, candrāvr̥tti,... asiḥ kabeḥ
.<ptr target="#G"/>
3385 in 3.40 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.42 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.42 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.41 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.40 </note>
3390</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
3395<!-- G hana brāta harakta, ṅa, hamaṅan laktan baṁ, satahun divasanya, phalanya, mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra brahmā, sasāṛnya maṁjanma vvaṁ bhaṇyaga sugiḥ -->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅraktā, ṅa, hamaṅan ktan bāṁ, satavun divasanyā, pha, siṁ kaṛyyanta siddha, mvaṁ mantukiṁ svaṛggā bhaṭāra brahmā, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ vvaṁ baṇyagā sugiḥ -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratta ṅrakta, ṅa, hamaṅan laktan bāṁ, satahun divaśanya, pha, siṁ kaṛyyanta sidḍa, mvaṁ mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra brahmā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ baṇyaga sugiḥ -->
3400
.<!-- P hana brata ṅrakta, ṅa, hamaṅan kәtan bāṁ, satahun ṣamayanya, phalanya mantukiṁ svaṛggān bhaṭāra brahmā, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ voṁ bhagya hasugiḥ-->
.
.<!-- U hana brata ṅrakta, ṅa, hamaṅan laktan bāṅ, satahun divaṣanya, pha, siṁ kāṛyyanta siddā, mvaṁ mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhāṭāra brāhmā, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ vvaṁ banyā sugiḥ -->
.
3405<div type="subchapter" n="3.43">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_43">
.hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">ṅrakta</lem>
3410<rdg wit="#G">arakta</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, amaṅan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #U">lakәtan</lem>
3415<rdg wit="#M #P">kәtan</rdg>
.</app>
. baṅ, satahun divasanya, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">siṅ kāryanta siddha</lem>
3420<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
3425<lem wit="#M #N #U">mvaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
3430 mantuk iṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">svarga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">svargan</rdg>
.</app>
3435 bhaṭāra brahmā, sasarnya
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
3440 riṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">baṇyaga sugih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M">vvaṅ bhaṇyaga sugih</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">voṅ bhagya asugih</rdg>
3445<rdg wit="#U">vva banyā sugih</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta ṅrakta ... baṇyaga sugiḥ
3450<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.41 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.43 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.43 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.42 <ptr target="#U"/>
3455 in 3.41 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
3460
.<!-- G hana brata duṛggā, ṅa, hamaṅan skul jahli, limaṁṅ lek samayanya, phalanya, mantukiṁ svaṛggā bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasaṛnya paṁjanma riṁ viku bahu sisya kita-->
.<!-- M hana bratānduṛggā, ṅa, hamaṅan skul jali, limaṅ lek samayanyā, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛggā bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ viku bahusiṣya -->
.<!-- N hana bratta ndurgga, ṅa, hamaṅan skül jali, limāṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svārgga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ viku bahu sisya-->
.<!-- P hana brata dūṛgga, ṅaranya hamaṅan sәkul jali, limaṁ lek ṣamayanya, phalanya mantukiṁ bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasaṛnya mañjadma riṁ viku bhahu siṣya, kitā-->
3465<!-- U hana brata ndurgga, ṅa, hamaṅan skul juli, limaṅ lek samayanya, pha, mantuk iṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ viku bāhu śiṣya-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.44">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_44">
.hana brata
3470<app>
.<lem wit="#G #U">durga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">ndurga</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, amaṅan sәkul
3475<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">jali</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">jahli</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">juli</rdg>
.</app>,
3480 limaṅ lek samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">svarga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
3485</rdg>
.</app>
. bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mañjanma</lem>
3490<rdg wit="#G">paṅjanma</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mañjadma</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app> riṅ viku bahu
.<app>
3495<lem wit="#M #N #U">śiṣya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">sisya kita</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
3500<note> hana bratta ndurgga ... bahu sisya
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.42 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.44 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.44 <ptr target="#P"/>
3505 in 3.43 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.42 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
3510
.
.<!-- G hana brāta kanaka drāva, ṅa, hamaṅan skul kuniṁ, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, phalanya, mantukiṁ svaṛggā bhaṭāra saṁ mahadeva, sasaṛnya _ _ nma riṁ dhampvavaṁ sugiḥ -->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā kanakā drava, ṅa, hamaṅan sga kuniṁ, tigaṁ tavun samayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛggā saṁ hyaṁ mahādevā, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ dampvavaṁ sugiḥ -->
3515
.<!-- N hana bratta kanaka drava, ṅa, hamaṅan skul kuniṁ, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛgga saṁ hyaṁ mahādeva, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ dampvavaṁ sugiḥ-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata kanakadravā, ṅa, hamagan sәkul kuniṁ, tigaṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya mantukiṁ svaṛggān bhaṭāra mahādeva, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ -->
.
3520<!-- U hana brata kanaka drāvā, ṅa, hamaṅan skul kuniṁ, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, pha, mantuk iṁ svaṛgga sa hyaṁ mahādeva, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ dampvavaṁ sugiḥ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.45">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_45">
.hana brata kanaka drava, ṅa, amaṅan
3525<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P #U">sәkul</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M" cause="lexical">sәga</rdg>
.</app>
. kuniṅ, tigaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ
3530<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">svarga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">svargan</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
3535<lem wit="#M #N">saṅ hyaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">bhaṭāra</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sa hyaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. mahādeva, sasarnya
3540<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">_ _nma</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
3545 riṅ <app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">da mpuhavaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">vvaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. sugih.
3550<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta kanaka drava ... dampvavaṁ sugiḥ
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.43 <ptr target="#M"/>
3555 in 3.45 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.45 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.44 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.43 </note>
.</app>
3560</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- G hana brāta phalahara, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva phala, tigaṅ lek samayanya, phalanya mantukiṁ padha bhaṭāra sāddhā śiva, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ janma sugiḥ bahu vadva -->
3565
.<!-- M hana bratā phalahāra, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva phalā, tigāṅ lek ṣamayanyā, pha, mantukiṁ svāṛgga bhaṭāra śaddha śiva, sasāṛnya mañjanma riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ bahu siṣya, bahu vadvā -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratta phalahāra, ṅa, hamaṅan saṛvva phalā, tigāṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra śadḍā śiva, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ, bahu sisya, bahu vadva -->
.
3570<!-- U hana brata phalahāra, ṅa, hamaṅanhā saṛvva phala, tigaṁṅ lek samayanya, pha, mantuk iṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra sadā śiva, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, listvahayu paripūṛṇna -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.46">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_46">
.hana brata phala āhāra, ṅa,
3575<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">amaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">amaṅanha</rdg>
.</app>
. sarvaphala, tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ
3580<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">svarga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">padha</rdg>
.</app>
. bhaṭāra sadāśiva, sasarnya
3585<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ
3590<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">vvaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">janma</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
3595<lem wit="#G #M #N">sugih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sugih saṅkan rare</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">bahu śiṣya</lem>
3600<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">listvahayu paripūrṇna</rdg>
.</app>,
3605<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">bahu vadvā</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
3610</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta phalahāra ... bahu vadvā
.<ptr target="#G"/>
3615 in 3.44 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.46 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.46 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.44 </note>
.</app>
3620</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- G hana brata nduma, ṅa, tan paṅan tampakiṅ apuy, tigāṁ tahun samayanya, phalanya, mantukiṁ śvaṛggā bhaṭāra brahmā, sasāṛnya maṁjanma riṁ vaṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, lituhayu paripūṛṇna -->
3625
.<!-- M hana bratāndumā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan tampakiṁ ṅapuy, tigāṁ tavun samayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svāṛggā bhaṭāra brahmā, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, listvayu paripūṛṇna-->
.
.<!-- N hana bratāndumā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan tampakiṅ apuy, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra brahmā, sasāṛnya mañjanmā riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, listvayu paripūṛṅna-->
.
3630<!-- P hana brata, ndumā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan huṛyyaniṁ hapuy, phalanya, muliḥ riṁ svaṛggan bhaṭāra Iśvarā, mañjanma riṁ kula putra riṁ dlahā-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.47">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_47">
.hana brata ndhūma, ṅa, tan pamaṅan
3635<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">tampakiṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">huryyaniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. apuy,
3640<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">tigaṅ tahun samayanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
3645</app>,
. pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">mantuk iṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mulih riṅ</rdg>
3650</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">svarga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">svargan</rdg>
.</app>
3655 bhaṭāra
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">brahmā</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">Iśvarā</rdg>
.</app>,
3660<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">sasarnya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
3665</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
3670<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N">riṅ vvaṅ sugih saṅkan rare</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">riṁ kula putra riṅ dlahā</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
3675<lem wit="#G #M #N">lituhayu paripūrṅa.</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
3680<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratāndumā ... listvayu paripūṛṅna
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.45 <ptr target="#M"/>
3685 in 3.47 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.47 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.79 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
3690</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta ṅalivon, ṅa, moliha pituṁ tumpәk kalivon, phalanya, priḥ maṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅalivon, ṅa, moliha pituṁ tumpәk kalivon, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- N hana bratta ṅalivon, ṅa, molihā pituṁ tumpǝkalivon, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
3695<!-- P -->
.<!-- U hana brata ṅalivon, ṅa, moliha pituṁ tumpәk kalivon, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.48">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_48">
3700hana brata ṅalivon, ṅa, moliha pituṅ tumpǝk kalivon, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta ṅalivon ... meṅgal katmu
.<ptr target="#G"/>
3705 in 3.46 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.48 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.48 <ptr target="#P"/>
. There is a passage in 3.78 that is quite similiar to other bratas as follows: hana bratā ṅalivonn, ṅa, ṅupavaṣa naṅkәn kalivon, phalanya siṁ priḥ Eṅgal katәkān sagaventa dinuluriṁ rahayu, tigaṁ tavun ṣamayanya <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.45 </note>
3710</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta maṅan saṛvva vija, ṅa, mvaṁ pucukiṁ ṅalalaṁ, phalanya, vak bājrā siddhi mantra, jayeṁ satru kita-->
3715<!-- M hana bratā maṅan saṛvva vija, mvaṁ pucukiṁ halaṁ halaṁ pha, vāk bhajrā, siddhi mantra, jaya kittha-->
.<!-- N hana bratā maṅan saṛvva vijā, mvaṁ pucukiṅ halalaṁ, pha, vāk bhajra, sidḍi mantra, jaya kitthā -->
.<!-- U hana bratā maṅan saṛvva vijā, muvaṁ pucuk iṅ alaṁ ṅalaṁ, pha, vak bajra, siddi mantrā, jaya si kita -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.49">
3720<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_49">
.hana brata maṅan sarva
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">vīja</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive">vija, ṅa</rdg>
3725</app>,
. mvaṅ pucukiṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">alaṅ alaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">ṅalalaṅ</rdg>
3730</app>,
. pha, vāk bajra, siddhi mantra,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">jaya kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">jayeṅ satru kita</rdg>
3735<rdg wit="#U">jaya si kita</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā maṅan ... jaya kitthā
3740<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.47 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.49 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.49 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.46 </note>
3745</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
3750<!-- G hana brata bhūmi patra, ṅa, saṅaṁ tahun divasanya, phalanya, kasambega de saṁ paṇdhita,
. sugiḥ ḷmaḥ sima, vr̥ddhi kadaṁ vaṛggānta makveḥ -->
.
.<!-- M hana brata bhūmi patra, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pahrāyyan, saṅaṁ tavun samayanyā, pha, kasambhega deniṁ saṁ pāṇdhitā,
. sugiḥ lmaḥ simā, vr̥ddhi kaṁ vāṛgga kadhaṁtā, pinituhu deniṁ rāt, bahu siṣyā, viddhyagamā, kinatvaṅan de saṁ prabhū, yogānya śila gaṇa jugā, maṅkana phalanya -->
3755
.<!-- N hana bratā bhūmi patra, ṅa, yan āmaṅan tan parāṛyan, saṅaṁ tahun samayanya, pha, kasāmbhega de saṁ pāṅḍita,
. sugiḥ lmaḥ śimā, vr̥dḍi kaṁ vaṛggā kaḍaṁta, pinituhu deniṁ rāt, bahu siṣya, vidyagama, kinatvaṅan de saṁ prabhū,
. yoganya śila gaṅa jugā, maṅkana phalanya-->
.
3760<!-- P hana brata bhumi patra, ṅa, hamaṅan mar̥piṁ hibu, riṁ l̥maḥ tan paharyyan, pәtaṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya kasambhega deniṁ saṁ pāṇdhitā,sugiḥ l̥maḥ, mvaṁ śima bahu vaṛggā, pinituhu deniṁ rāt, pāṇdhitā bahu siṣyā, vidya samanta, rāja guru sira, dr̥ve gama,
.kinatvaṅan deniṁ prabhu, yogya silaṅgana juga maṅkana phalanya -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata bhūmi putra, ṅa, saṅaṁ tahun samayanya, pha, kasambega de saṁ pāṇdita,
. sugiḥ lmah sima, vr̥ddi kaṁ kadaṁ vaṛgganta, pinituhu deniṁ rāt, bāhu sisyā, vidya samaptā, vidyāgama, kinatvaṅan de saṁ prabhu, yoganyā śila gaṇa juga, maṅkana phalanya -->
3765
. <div type="subchapter" n="3.50">
. <ab xml:id="tattvabrata_50">
.hana brata bhūmi
.<app>
3770<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">patra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">putra</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa,
.<app>
3775<lem wit="#M #N">yan amaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">amaṅan harәpiṅ ibu riṅ lәmah</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#G #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
3780</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P">tan paharyan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">tan pahrāyyan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">tan parāryan</rdg>
3785<rdg wit="#G #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
3790<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">saṅaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pәtaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. tahun samayanya, pha, kasambega
.<app>
3795<lem wit="#M #P">deniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #N #U">de</rdg>
.</app>
. saṅ paṇḍita, sugih
.<app>
3800<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">lәmah sīma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">lәmah mvaṅ śima</rdg>
.</app>,
. vrәddhi
.<app>
3805<lem wit="#M #N #U">kaṅ varga kadaṅta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">kadaṅ varggānta makveh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">bahu varggā</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
3810<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">pinituhu deniṅ rāt</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
3815<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">bahu śiṣya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
3820</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">vidyā āgama</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">vidya samapta, rāja guru sira, dr̥ve gama,</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">vidya samapta, vidyāgama</rdg>
3825<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
. kinatvaṅan
3830<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">de saṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">deniṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
3835</rdg>
.</app> prabhu,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">yoganya śila gaṇa juga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">yogya silaṅgana juga</rdg>
3840<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>, maṅkana phalanya.
.<app>
3845<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā bhūmi ... maṅkana phalanya
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.48 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.50 <ptr target="#N"/>
3850 in 3.50 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.2 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.47 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
3855</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratānūtakәn puṣpā bhaṭāra gāṇa, hamaṅan moliha nәm kpәl, pisan naṅkәn dinā, pha, mantukiṁ padā bhaṭāra guru, sasārnya mañjanma riṁ viku Ijo, sakti dura dāṛśśaṇa, sojarīra kedhәp -->
.
.<!-- N hanā bratta nūtakǝn puṣpā bhaṭāra ghaṅā, hamaṅan moliha nǝm, kpǝl pisan aṅkǝn dinā, pha, mantukiṁ pada bhaṭāra guru, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ viku Ijo, śakti durā darśśaṅa, sojarīra keḍǝp -->
3860
.
.<!-- P hana brata hanutākәn puṣpa bhaṭāra gaṇa, hamaṅana holiḥ nәm kәpәl hapisan nāṅkәn dinā, phalanya mantuk riṁ padha bhaṭāra guru, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ viku hijo śakti dhira dhaṛśaṇa, kaedhәp. -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata hanutakәn puṣpa bhāṭāra ghaṇa, hamaṅan holihā nәm kpәl, sapisan aṅkәn dina, pha, mantuk iṁ paddā bhaṭāra guru, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ viku Ijo, śakti dura dārśśaṇa, kedhәp-->
3865
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.51">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_51">
. hana brata
.<app>
3870<lem wit="#M #N #P">anūtakǝn</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">nūtakәn</rdg>
.</app>
. puṣpa bhaṭāra gaṇa,
.<app>
3875<lem wit="#M #N #U">amaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">amaṅana</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">moliha</lem>
3880<rdg wit="#P">olih</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">oliha</rdg>
.</app>
. nǝm kәpǝl pisan
.<app>
3885<lem wit="#N #U">aṅkǝn</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #P">naṅkәn</rdg>
.</app>
. dina, pha,
.<app>
3890<lem wit="#M #N #U">mantuk iṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mantuk riṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. pada bhaṭāra guru, sasarnya
.<app>
3895<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ viku ijo, śakti
.<app>
3900<lem wit="#M #N #U">dūradarśaṇa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">dhira dhaṛśaṇa</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">sojarira</lem>
3905<rdg wit="#P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app> keḍәp.
.<app>
3910<lem wit="#M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hanā bratta nūtakǝn ... sojarīra keḍǝp
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.51 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.51 <ptr target="#P"/>
3915 in 3.45, and in 3.140 that is quite similiar to this passage. Here is the brata: hana brata nutakәn puṣpa bhaṭāra gaṇa, ṅa, hamaṅan nәm kәpәl, sadinā dina, phalanya mantukiṁ padhā bhaṭāra guru, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ viku hijo, śakti duradaṛṣaṇa, sojarira kedhәp <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.48 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
3920
.
.<!-- G hana brāta tan paṅinum bañu yan huvus amaṅan, pituṁ samayanya, phalanya, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- M hana bratā tan paṅinum bañu ri vuvusniṅ amaṅan, pituṁ tavun samayanya, pha, tan kacalan phalanta -->
.<!-- N hana bratā tan paṅinum bañu, ri huvusniṅ amaṅan, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, tan kacalan phalanta -->
3925<!-- P hana brata tan paṅinum bañu yan havuvus hamaṅan pituṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya tan kacalan saventa-->
.<!-- U hana brata tan paṅinumma bañu ri vusiṅ amaṅan, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, tan kavalan phalanta-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.52">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_52">
3930hana brata tan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">paṅinum</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">paṅinuma</rdg>
.</app>
3935 bañu,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">ri huvusniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">yan huvus</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M">ri vuvusniṅ</rdg>
3940<rdg wit="#P">yan avuvus</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">ri vusiṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. amaṅan, pituṅ
.<app>
3945<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">tahun</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
3950 samayanya, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">tan kacalan phalanta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">prih meṅgal katәmu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">tan kacalan saventa</rdg>
3955<rdg wit="#U">tan kavalan phalanta</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tan ... kacalan phalanta
3960<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.50 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.52 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.52 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.19 <ptr target="#U"/>
3965 in 3.49 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
3970
.<!-- G hana brāta tan paṅinum bañu, Aṅinaṁ sәrәḥ tan vinalik satahun samayanya, phalanya, cinavәtan deniṁ stri, yan strī tinapihan deniṁ jalunya, thәṛ tan mandi Ikaṁ viṣa Iri ya -->
.
.<!-- M hana bratā tan paṅinum bañu, haṅinaṁ sr̥ḥ tan vinalik, satavun samayanya, pha, cinavәtan deniṁ histri, yanīm strī tinapihan deniṁ kakuṁ, thәṛ tan mandi hikaṁ viṣya hiri kitthā -->
.
3975<!-- N hana bratā tan paṅinum bañu, haṅinaṁ sr̥ḥ tan vinalik, satahun samayanya, pha, cinavǝtan deniṁ histrī, yaniṁ strī tinapihan deniṁ kakūṁ, thǝṛ tan mandi Ikaṁ viṣyā hiri kittha -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata tan paṅinum toya, haṅinaṁ sәr̥ḥ tan vinalik, satavun ṣamayanya, phalanya cinavәtan deniṁ histri, yan histri tinampihan deniṁ kākūṁnya, tәhәṛ tan mandi ya hikaṁ viṣā ya hiri yā -->
.
.<!-- U hana bratā tan paṅinum bañu, ṅinaṁ spaḥ tan vinalik, sātahun samayanya, pha, cinavәtan deniṁ stri, yann iṁ stri, yaniṁ stri tinapihan deniṁ kakuṁ, thәṛ tan mandi hikaṁ viṣya hiri kita -->
3980
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.53">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_53">
.hana brata tan paṅinum
.<app>
3985<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bañu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">toya</rdg>
.</app>,
. aṅinaṅ
.<app>
3990<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">sәrәh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sәpah</rdg>
.</app>
. tan vinalik, satahun samayanya, pha, cinavǝtan deniṅ
.<app>
3995<lem wit="#G #U">strī</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P">istri</rdg>
.</app>,
. yaniṅ strī tinapihan deniṅ
.<app>
4000<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">kakuṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">jalunya</rdg>
.</app>,
. tәhәr tan
.<app>
4005<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">mandi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">mandi ya</rdg>
.</app>
. ikaṅ
.<app>
4010<lem wit="#M #N">viṣya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">viṣa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">viṣāya</rdg>
.</app>
. iri
4015<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">ya</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
4020<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tan ... hiri kittha
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.49 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.53 <ptr target="#N"/>
4025 in 3.53 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.46 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.50 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
4030</div>
.
.
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅekadaśi, ṅa, yan taṅgal piṁ savlas ikaṁ kasapuluḥ, kita matihāra, moliha tigaṁ kasupuluḥ, pha, mantukiṁ padā bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasāṛnya mañjanma riṁ ratu sakti -->
.<!-- N hana brata ṅekadaśi, ṅa, yan taṅgal piṁ savlas iṁ kasāpuluḥ, kita matihāra, molihā tigaṁ kaśapuluḥ, pha, mantukiṁ padā bhatāra Iśvara, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ ratū śakti -->
4035<!-- P hana brata ṅekadaśi, ṅa, yan taṅgal piṁ savәlas, hikaṁ sapuluḥ, hamatihara, hmoliḥ hikaṁ tigaṁ sapuluḥ, phalanya, mantukiṁ padhā bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ ratu śakti -->
.<!-- U hānā brata ṅekadaśi, ṅa, yan taṅgal piṁ savlas i kasapuluḥ, kitā matihāra, molihā tigaṁ kaśapuluḥ, pha, mantuk iṁ pada bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasaṛnya maṁjanma riṁ śugiḥ ratu śakti -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.54">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_54">
4040hana brata ṅekadaśi, ṅa, yan taṅgal piṅ savәlas
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">iṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #P">ikaṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">i</rdg>
4045</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kasapuluh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">sapuluh</rdg>
.</app>,
4050<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
4055</app>
. matiāhāra,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">moliha tigaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">moliha ikaṅ tigaṅ</rdg>
4060</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kasapuluh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">sapuluh</rdg>
.</app>,
4065 pha, mantuk iṅ pada bhaṭāra īśvara, sasarnya
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">maṅjanma</rdg>
.</app>
4070<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">riṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">riṅ śugih</rdg>
.</app> ratu śakti.
.<app>
4075<lem wit="#M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana brata ṅekadaśi ... ratu sakti
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.54 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.54 <ptr target="#P"/>
4080 in 3.47 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.51 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
4085
.
.<!-- M hana bratā lviḥ sakeṁ bratā kabeḥ, pāñca mūna, hikaṅ amunā sada kāla, haṅraṅku bratā kabeḥ, pha, kapaṅgiḥ suka magə̄ṁ, mañjanmā riṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, sugiḥ skul, Athәṛ saśabdanta kedәp denim rāt kabeḥ-->
.
.<!-- N hana bratā lviḥ saṅkeṁ brata kabeḥ, pañca muna, ṅa, Ikaṅ hamuna sadḍa kāla, Aṅraṅkus bratā kabeḥ, pha, kapaṅgiḥ suka magə̄ṁ, mañjanmā riṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, sugiḥ skul, Athǝṛ saśabdanta keḍǝp deniṁ rat kabeh-->
4090
.<!-- P hana brata lviḥ saṅkeṁ pañca muṇnā, hikaṁ hamuka saddha kāla, haṅrakṣabrata kabeḥ, phalanya mamaṅgiḥ suka magə̄ṁ, phala bhoga, phala bhoja, mamukti saṅkā rare, tәhәṛ kedhәpiṁ rāt kabeḥ -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata lviḥ sakeṁ pañcamuna, Ikaṅ amuna sadākāla, haṅraṅkul brata kabeḥ, pha, kapaṅgiḥ muka magə̄ṁ, mañjadmā riṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, sugiḥ skul, athәṛ sabdanta kedhәp deniṁ rāt kabeh -->
.
4095<div type="subchapter" n="3.55">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_55">
.hana brata lәvih
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #U">sakeṅ</lem>
4100<rdg wit="#M #N">saṅkeṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P #U">pañca mona</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N" cause="additive">brata kabeh, pañca mona</rdg>
4105</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P #U">ikaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N" cause="additive">ṅa, ikaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
4110<app>
.<lem type="norm">amona</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">amuna</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">amuka</rdg>
.</app>
4115 sadā kāla,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">aṅraṅkul</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">aṅraṅku</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">aṅraṅkus</rdg>
4120<rdg wit="#P">aṅrakṣa</rdg>
.</app> brata kabeh, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kapaṅgih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mamaṅgih</rdg>
4125</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">suka</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">muka</rdg>
.</app>
4130 magə̄ṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mañjanma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">phala bhoga, phala bhoja</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mañjadma</rdg>
4135</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">riṅ sugih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mamukti</rdg>
.</app>
4140 saṅkan rare,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">sugih sәkul</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
4145</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">atәhәr</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">tәhәr</rdg>
4150</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">saśabdanta</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sabdanta</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
4155<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">keḍәp deniṅ</lem>
4160<rdg wit="#P">kedhәpiṅ</rdg>
.</app> rāt kabeh.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā lviḥ ... keḍǝp deniṁ rat kabeh
4165<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.55 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.55 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.48 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.52 </note>
4170</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratā vadak, ṅa, tan pamaṅan skul vadāṁ, pituṁṅ lek samayanyā, pha, hakveḥ vvaṁ harse kittha -->
4175<!-- N hana bratā vaḍan, ṅa, tan pamaṅan skul vadāṁ, pituṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, Akveḥ vvaṅ ārṣe kitthā -->
.<!-- P hana bratā hanvanda ṅaranya, tan pamaṅan sәkul vadaṁ, pitum lek ṣamayanya, kevala nasi jakan, paṅan sakavasā, phalanya hakveḥ hasiḥ hiri kitā -->
.<!-- U hana brata dhadhak, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sgā vadaṁ, pituṁ lek samayanya, pha, Akveḥ vvaṁ harṣe kita -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata vadhak, ṅa, tan pamaṅān sәga vadaṁ, pituṁ tavun ṣamayanya, phalanya listuhayu paripūṛṇna, kinasihan deniṁ samanta janma-->
4180<!-- P hana bratā vandha, ṅaranya, tan pamaṅan sәkul vadaṁ pituṁ lek ṣamayanya, kevala nasi jākan paṅan sakava, phalanya kveḥ masiḥ hiri kitā -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.56">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_56">
.hana brata
4185<app>
.<lem wit="#N">maḍaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">vadak</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">anvanda</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">dhadhak</rdg>
4190</app>,
. ṅa, tan pamaṅan sәkul
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">madaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U"></rdg>
4195</app>,
. pituṅ lek
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">samayanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">ṣamayanya, kevala nasi jakan, paṅan sakavasā,</rdg>
4200</app>,
. pha, akveh
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">vvaṅ harṣe</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">asih iri</rdg>
4205</app> kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā vaḍan ... ārṣe kitthā
.<ptr target="#M"/>
4210 in 3.56 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.56 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.28, 3.49, 3.91 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.53 </note>
.</app>
4215</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratā tan kneṁ dyus, tan kneṁ lṅā, tigāṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, listvayu paripūṛṇna, vicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ samanta janmā -->
.
4220<!-- N hana bratta tan kneṁ dyus, tan kneṁ lǝṅhā, tigāṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, listvāyu paripuṛṅna, vicakṣaṅā, kinasihan deniṁ samānta janmā -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata tan kneṁ l̥ṅa, tatan kneṁ dyus, tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, listvāyu paripūrṇna, vicakṣāṇa, kinasiha deniṁ sāmanta janmā -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.57">
4225<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_57">
.hana brata tan kәneṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">dyus</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="transposition">lәṅa</rdg>
4230</app>,
. tan kәneṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">lǝṅa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U" cause="transposition">lәṅha</rdg>
4235</app>,
. tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha,
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">listvayu</rdg>
4240</app>
. paripūrṇa, wicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṅ samanta janma.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta tan ... samānta janmā
4245<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.57 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.57 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.54 </note>
.</app>
4250</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratā maṅan tan pinakevuhan, tān kar̥ṇan, tan vnaṁ hakarvan, satavun samayanya, pha, kedhәp deniṁ rat, lvīstvayu paripūṛṇna, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- N hana bratta maṅan tan pinakevuhan, tan kar̥ṇān, tan vnaṁ hakarvan, satahun ṣamayanya, pha, keḍǝp deniṁ rāt, listvayu paripuṛṅna, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
4255<!-- P hana brata bhukti tan kinimbuhan, tan kar̥ṇan tan vәnaṁ hakaṛvvan satavun samayanya, phalanya kedhәpa deniṁ rāt, listuhayu paripūṛṇna, siṁ priḥ katәkan -->
.<!-- U hanā bratā tan pakevuhan, tan kar̥ban, tan vnaṁ hakāṛvvan, satahun sāmayanya, pha, kedhәp dheniṁ rāt listuhayu, paripūrṇna, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.58">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_58">
4260hana brata maṅan tan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">pakevuhan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">pinakevuhan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">kinimbuhan</rdg>
4265</app>,
. tan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">karәṇan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">karәban</rdg>
4270</app>,
. tan vәnaṅ akarvan, satahun samayanya, pha,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">keḍәp</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kedәpa</rdg>
4275</app>
. deniṅ rāt,
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">lvīstvayu</rdg>
4280<rdg wit="#N">listvayu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">listuhayu</rdg>
.</app>
. paripūrṅa,
.<app>
4285<lem wit="#M #N #U">prih meṅgal katәmu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">siṅ prih katәkan</rdg>
.</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U"></lem>
4290<note> hana bratta maṅan ... meṅgal katmu
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.58 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.58 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.20 <ptr target="#U"/>
4295 in 3.55 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
4300<!-- M hana bratā maṅan tan pahimbuḥ, pituṁ tavun samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- N hana bratā maṅan tan pahimbuḥ, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- U hāna brata hamaṅan tan pahimbuḥ, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu-->
.<!-- U hanā brata hamaṅan tan pahimbuḥ, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu-->
.
4305<div type="subchapter" n="3.59">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_59">
.hana brata
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #M">maṅan</lem>
4310<rdg wit="#U">amaṅan</rdg>
.</app>
. tan paimbuh, pituṅ tahun samayanya, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U"></lem>
4315<note> hana bratā maṅan ... meṅgal katmu
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.59 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.59 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.56, 3.57 </note>
4320</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta ṅadite, ṅa, Aṅkәn· radhite ma—tihara, satahun samayanya, phalanya vāk bajra, siddhi mantrā, jaya satru -->
4325<!-- M hana bratā ṅradite, ṅa, Aṅkәn radite hamatihara, satavun ṣamayanya, pha, vāk bhajrā sidi mantra, jayeṁ satru kittha -->
.<!-- N hana bratā, Aṅradite, ṅa, Aṅkǝn radite hamatihāra, satahun samayanya, pha, vāk bhajrā, sidḍi mamantra, jayeṁ śatru kittha -->
.<!-- P hana brata ṅandhite, ṅa, manaṅkәn radite hamitiharā satavun ṣamayanya, phalanya vak bajrā siddhi mantra jaya śatru -->
.<!-- U hana brata hangr̥dite, ṅa, Aṅkәn radite hamātihārā, satahun samayanya, pha, vak bajrā, siddi mantrā, jaya savruhantā -->
.
4330<div type="subchapter" n="3.60">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_60">
.hana brata
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">aṅraditya</lem>
4335<rdg wit="#G">ṅadite</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M">ṅradite</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">aṅradite</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">ṅanndhite</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">aṅrәdite</rdg>
4340</app>,
. ṅa,
.<app>
