.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">aṅkǝn</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">manaṅkәn</rdg>
4345</app>
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">raditya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #M #N #P #U">radite</rdg>
.</app>
4350<app>
.<lem type="norm">amatiāhāra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">matihara</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #U">amātihārā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">amitiharā</rdg>
4355</app>,
. satahun samayanya, pha, vāk bajra, siddhi
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #P #U">mantra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">mamantra</rdg>
4360</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">jayeṅ śatru kita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">jaya satru</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">jaya savruhanta</rdg>
4365</app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, Aṅradite ... śatru kittha
.<ptr target="#G"/>
4370 in 3.51 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.60 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.60 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.51 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.58 </note>
4375</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brata maṇḍava, ṅa, hamaṅan limaṁ kpәl, sāri sāri, limaṁ vulan samayanya, phalanya, kaṣṭāgunan tkā, viṛyyavan tkā, subhaga paripūṛṇna -->
4380<!-- M hana bratāmāṇdhava, ṅa, hamaṅan limaṁ kpәl sari sari, limaṁ lek ṣamayanya, pha, Aṣṭa guṇā, subhaga paripūṛṇna -->
.<!-- N hana bratā maṇḍava, ṅa, hamaṅan limaṁ kpǝl, sari sari, limāṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, Aṣṭāguṇa, subhagā paripuṛṅna -->
.<!-- P hana brata maṇdhava ṅaranya, hamaṅan limaṁṅan limaṁ kәphәl, sari sari, limaṁ lek ṣamayanya, phalanya kaṣṭaguṇanya padhā tәkā, kaviṛyyavan subhaga paripuṛṇna -->
.<!-- U hāna brāta hamaṇdhava, ṅa, hamaṅan limāṁ kpәl sāri sāri, limaṅ lek samayanya, pha, Asṭā gūṇā, paripūrṇna -->
.
4385
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.61">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_61">
. hana brata
.<app>
4390<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">maṇḍāva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">amaṇdhava</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, amaṅan
.<app>
4395<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">limaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">limaṅan limaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. kәpǝl sari sari, limaṅ
.<app>
4400<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">lek</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">vulan</rdg>
.</app>
. samayanya, pha,
.<app>
4405<lem wit="#M #N #U">aṣṭaguṇa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G" cause="additive">kaṣṭāgunan tәka, viryyavan tәkā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">kaṣṭaguṇanya padhā tәka, kaviryyavan</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
4410<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">subhaga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
4415 paripūrṇa.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā maṇḍava ... subhagā paripuṛṅna
.<ptr target="#G"/>
4420 in 3.52 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.61 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.61 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.33 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.59 </note>
4425</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
4430<!-- G hana brāta saṁ bhima, ṅa, yan taṅgal _ _ _ siṁ kapitu, Amatihara sāri-sāri, phalanya, suka vr̥ddhi, siddhi mantra, jaya satru kedhәp deniṁ rat, prājña biṣā gamәl, aṅiduṁ, sugiḥ _ _ rak, mvaṁ rare hulun, vnaṁ vnaṁ kbo sapi, Akveḥ punpunanya, krama nihan, yan tәṅaḥ vṅi maṅadәṅ aṅekapadha, tan kneṁ turu, mvaṁ ṅasaṅguṇi, siddhi kita-->
.
.<!-- M hana brata saṁ bbhīmā, ṅa, yen taṅgal piṁ pat blasiṁ kapitu, hamatihara, pha, suka vr̥ddhi, siddhi mantra, jayeṁ satru, kedhәp deniṁ rāt, prajñā biṣa gamәl hāṅidu, sugiḥ mas pirak, mvaṁ rare hulun, vnaṁ vnaṁ kbo sapi, harakaḥ punpunanya, kramanya, kramanya yaniṁ tṅaḥ vṅi haṅadәg haṅekapadā, tan kәna turu, mvaṁ hasaṅguṇī, siddhi kittha -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratta saṁ bhīmā, ṅa, yen taṅgal piṁ pat bǝlasiṁ kapitu, hamatihāra, pha, suka vr̥dḍi, sidḍi mantra, jayeṁ śatru, keḍǝp deniṁ rāt, prajña biṣāgamǝl, haṅiduṁ, sugiḥ mās pirak, mvaṁ rare hulun, vnaṁ vnaṁ, kbo sapi, hakeḥ punpunanya, kramanya, yaniṁ tṅaḥ vṅi haṅadǝg aṅeka padā, tan kna turu, mvaṅ hasaṅguni, sidḍi kittha-->
4435
.<!-- P hana brata saṁ bhima, ṅa, yan riṁ taṅgal piṁ rva vәlasiṁ kapitu, hamatiharā, sari sari, phalanya suka vr̥ddhi siddhi mantra, jaya śatru kedhәp deniṁ rāt, prajñān bisa hagamәl muvaṁ haṅiduṁ, sugiḥ mās pirak, rare hulun vәnaṁ vәnaṁ, kәbo sapi, hakveḥ hulunya, yaniṁ tәṅaḥvәṅi haṅadәg aṅeka padhā, tan kәneṁ turu mvaṁ hasaṅguliṁ, phalanya, siddhi kitā -->
.
.<!-- U hanā brāta sāṁ bhima, ṅa, yen taṅgal piṁ pāt blas iṁ ka pitu, hāmātihāra, pha, suka vr̥ddi, siddhi mantra, jayeṁ śatru, kedhәp deniṁ rāt, prajñā bisā gamәl, aṅidhuṁ, sugiḥ mās pirāk, mvaṁrare Ulun, vnaṁ vnaṁ kbo sapi, hakeḥ punpunanya, makakramanya, yaniṁ tṅaḥ vṅi, haṅadhәg haṅekā pada, tān kneṁ turu, mvaṁṅ asaṁguni, siddi kitā -->
.
4440<div type="subchapter" n="3.62">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_62">
.hana brata saṅ bhīmā, ṅa,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P">yan</lem>
4445<rdg wit="#M #N #U">yen</rdg>
.</app>
. taṅgal
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">piṅ pat bǝlas iṅ</lem>
4450<rdg wit="#G">_ _ _ siṁ kapitu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">piṁ rva vәlasiṅ</rdg>
.</app> kapitu,
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">amatiāhāra</lem>
4455<rdg wit="#G #M #N #U">amatihara</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">amatihara sari-sari</rdg>
.</app>,
. pha, suka vrәddhi, siddhi mantra,
.<app>
4460<lem wit="#M #N #U">jayeṅ śatru</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G #P">jaya satru</rdg>
.</app>,
. keḍәp deniṅ rāt, prajña bisa agamǝl,
.<app>
4465<lem wit="#G #N #U">aṅiduṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">aṅidu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">muvaṅ aṅiduṅ</rdg>
.</app>,
. sugih
4470<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">mās pirak</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">_ _ rak</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
4475<lem wit="#M #N #U">mvaṅ rare hulun</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">rare hulun</rdg>
.</app>,
. vәnaṅ vәnaṅ, kәbo sapi,
.<app>
4480<lem wit="#G #P">akveh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">arakeh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N #U">akeh</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
4485<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">punpunanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">hulunya</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">kramanya</lem>
4490<rdg wit="#G">krama nihan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">makakramanya</rdg>
4495</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">yan</rdg>
.</app>
4500 tәṅah vәṅi
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">aṅadǝg</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">maṅadәg</rdg>
.</app>
4505 aṅekapāda, tan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">kәneṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">kәna</rdg>
.</app>
4510 turu, mvaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">asaṅguni</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">masaṅguni</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">asaṅguliṅ, phalanya</rdg>
4515</app>, siddhi kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta saṁ ... sidḍi kittha
.<ptr target="#G"/>
4520 in 3.53 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.62 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.62 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.52 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.60 </note>
4525</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratā tan pamaṅan hivak bavi, pha, tan kataman deniṁ saṛvva viṣya, mvaṁ tilā vudug, sakveḥnya pada doḥ, siddhi mantra kittha, devā bhūṭā pāṇdhitā manuṣa padha siḥ -->
4530<!-- N hana bratā tan pamaṅan hivak bavi, pha, tan katamānā deniṁ saṛvva viṣya, mvaṁ Ilā vudug, sakveḥnya paḍa doḥ, sidḍi mantrā kittha, devā bhūṭā paṇḍita manuṣā paḍa siḥ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.63">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_63">
.hana brata tan pamaṅan ivak bavi, pha, tan kataman deniṅ sarvaviṣya, mvaṅ
4535<app>
.<lem wit="#N">ila</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">tilā</rdg>
.</app> vuḍug, sakvehnya paḍa doh, siddhi mantra kita, deva bhūṭa paṇḍita mānuṣa paḍa sih.
.<app>
4540<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tan ... paḍa siḥ
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.63 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.63 </note>
4545</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratāmgat raṣa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan hivak celeṁ, tan pamaṅan asiyuṅan, tan pamaṅan hivak taṅiri, tan pamaṅan ktan gajiḥ, tan pamaṅanā dūṛyyan mvaṁ naṅkā, mvaṁ gdhaṁ varaṅan, tan pamaṅana kacaṁ hijo, kunaṁ pala buṅkaḥ, pala gantuṁ, pha, śakti l̥viḥ, sakar̥pta katkan, tәmbe-->
4550
.<!-- N hana bratāmgat raṣā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan hivak celeṁ, tan pamaṅan āsiyuṅan , tan pamaṅan hivak taṅiri, tan pamaṅan ktan gajiḥ, tan pamaṅana duṛyyan, mvaṁ naṅka, mvaṁ gḍaṁ varaṅān, tan pamaṅana kacaṁ hijo, kunaṁ phala buṅkaḥ, phala gantuṁ, pha, śakti l̥viḥ, sakār̥ptā katkan tǝmbe -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.64">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_64">
4555hana brata mәgat rasa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan ivak celeṅ, tan pamaṅan asiyuṅan, tan pamaṅan ivak taṅiri, tan pamaṅan kәtan gajih, tan pamaṅan duryan, mvaṅ naṅka, mvaṅ gәḍaṅ varaṅan, tan pamaṅan kacaṅ hijo, kunaṅ phala buṅkah, phala gantuṅ, pha, śakti lәvih, sakārәpta katəkan tǝmbe.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratāmgat raṣā ... katkan tǝmbe
.<ptr target="#M"/>
4560 in 3.64 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.64 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
4565
.
.<!-- M hana bratā ṅasapuluḥ, ṅa, bratānirā saṁ sinuhun iṁ panatāran, kramanya, kramanya, nkul bañu, tan paṅinaṁ, hamvitane ri taṅgal pisaniṁ kadaśa, havusana ri til̥mi kaśapuluḥ, salek ṣamayanya, rehiṁ caru hamit, yan alkasa bratā, hanәmbaḥiṁ saṅgar, ca, tumpə̄ṁ guriḥ, Ikvak lambharaṅ iṭik, dulurana graṁ griḥ, kapitim, hantigan, kacambaḥ, pelas lalab, Uraṅīṅ asinan, pisaṁ kәmbaṁ raka vovohan, duvgan, tbu, bañu kuvuṁ, skar maṅle, gambirr inaṅgit, maṅle tuñuṁ, campaka, salviraniṁ kәmbaṁ vaṅi, haturakniṁ devā, l̥ṅa vaṅi burat vaṅi, vurap ūrap, jajā, sakālviṛraniṁ hamik amikan, vastra piṅhe saparadәg, sasari gnәp, harttha, 225, dhūpā dhipa mñan candāna, mvaṁ sandānenasab, vija kәmbaṁ skārūrā, nihan deniṅ āmantra, mvitā sәsәdәp, rumuvun, kavr̥tta rok lavan madhū, sәsәdәpaknā, dukāmvitā ya, hanәmbahakna kavaṅi, ri saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ śrī mahādevā ya namaḥ, tlas, ṅaturi carū, ma, Om̐ devā darū veddha dhami, sā ba ta A I, nāmā śiva ya, A U mā, Aḥ, Om̐ deva sukambavantu, tlasta ṅәmaṅūrā, hanambuta bratā , savulan hankul toya, Ambasaneṁ til̥m, sәsәdhәpi samaṅkana, Uyah ar̥ṁ, ma, Om̐ namo mahādeva ya namaḥ, nāma śivaya, Avighnamāstu -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratā ṅaśapulu, ṅa, brattanirā saṁ sinuhun iṁ panātharan, kramanya nkul bañu, tan paṅinaṁ, Amvitāneṁ ri taṅgal pisaniṁ ka daśā, havusāna ri tīlǝmi ka śapuluḥ, salek ṣamayanya, rehi caru hamit, yanalkasābrata, hanǝmbahi saṅgar·, ca, tumpə̄ṁ guriḥ, Ivak lambharaṅ hitik, dulurā nā graṁ griḥ, kapitiṁ, hantigā, kacambaḥ, pelas lalab, Uraṅiṅ asinan, pisaṁ kǝmbaṁ, raka vovohan , duvgan , tbu, bañu kuvuṁ, skār maṅle, gambir iṅaṅgit, maṅle tuñjuṁ, campaka, salviraniṁ kǝmbaṁ vaṅi, hatuṛakniṁ devā, lṅā vaṅī burat vaṅi, hurap uṛap jajā, sakalvirāmikāmikan , vastra piṅe saparadǝg, sasaṛi gnǝp, hartha, 225, ḍūpa ḍipā mñan caṅḍanā, mvaṁ caṇḍanenasab, vija kǝmbhaṁ skār urā, nihan deniṅ amantrā, mvītā sǝsǝḍǝp ru muhun , kavr̥ttārok lavan maḍu, sǝsǝḍǝpaknā, dukāmvitī taya, hanǝmbahakna kavaṅī, riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ śrī mahā deva ya namaḥ, tlas , ṅatuṛi carū, ma, Om̐ devadaru veḍaḍāmi, sa ba ta A I, nama śiva ya, A U mā, Aḥ, Om̐ deva sukam bavantu, tlasta ṅǝmbaṅurā, hanambuta bratta, savulan hankul bañu, Amkasāneṁ tīl̥m, sǝsǝḍǝpi samaṅkana, Uyaḥ har̥ṁ, ma, Om̐ namo mahā deva ya namaḥ, nāma śiva ya, Avighnamāstu -->
4570
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.65">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_65">
. hana brata
.<app>
4575<lem wit="#M">ṅasapuluh</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">ṅasapulu</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, bratanira saṅ sinuhun iṅ panatharan,
.<app>
4580<lem wit="#N">kramanya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M" cause="additive">kramanya, kramanya</rdg>
.</app>
. nәkul bañu, tan paṅinaṅ,
.<app>
4585<lem wit="#M">amvitane</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">amvitaneṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. ri taṅgal pisaniṅ kadaśa, avusana ri tilǝmi kasapuluh, salek samayanya,
.<app>
4590<lem wit="#M">rehi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">rehi</rdg>
.</app>
. caru amvit, yan alәkasa brata, anǝmbah
.<app>
4595<lem wit="#M">iṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">i</rdg>
.</app>
. saṅgar, ca, tumpәṅ gurih, ivak lambaraṅ itik, dulurana gәraṅ grih, kapitiṅ,
.<app>
4600<lem wit="#N">antiga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">antigan</rdg>
.</app>,
. kacambah, pelas lalab, uraṅ iṅasinan, pisaṅ kǝmbaṅ, raka vovohan, duvәgan, tәbu, bañu kuvuṅ, sәkar maṅle, gambir
.<app>
4605<lem wit="#M">inaṅgit</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">inaṅgit</rdg>
.</app>,
. maṅle <app>
.<lem wit="#N">tuñjuṅ</lem>
4610<rdg wit="#N">tuñuṅ</rdg>
.</app>,
. campaka, salviraniṅ kǝmbaṅ vaṅi, aturakәn iṅ deva, lәṅa vaṅi burat vaṅi, hurap urap jajā,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M">sakalviraniṅ</lem>
4615<rdg wit="#N">sakalviranikaṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. amikāmikan, vastra piṅe saparadǝg, sasari gnǝp, hartha, 225, dhūpa dhipā mәñan
. caṅdhanā, mvaṅ <app>
.<lem wit="#N">candhanenasab</lem>
4620<rdg wit="#N">sandanenasab</rdg>
.</app>,
. vija kǝmbaṅ sәkār urā, nihan deniṅ amantrā, mvītā sǝsǝdhǝp rumuhun, kavrәttārok lavan madhu, sǝsǝdhǝpakәna,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M">dukāmvita</lem>
4625<rdg wit="#N">dukāmviti</rdg>
.</app> ta ya, anǝmbahakәna kavaṅi,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">riṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">ri</rdg>
4630</app>
. saṅgar, ma, Om̐ śrī mahādevāya namah, tәlas, ṅaturi caru, ma, Om̐ devadāru
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">vidadhāmi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">vedhadhāmi</rdg>
4635</app>,
. sa ba ta a i, nama śivāya, a u ma, ah, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">devās</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">deva</rdg>
4640</app>
. sukham bhavantu, tәlas ta
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">ṅǝmbaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">ṅәmaṅ</rdg>
4645</app>
. urā, anambuta brata, savulan anәkul
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">bañu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M" cause="lexical">toya</rdg>
4650</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">amәkasaneṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">Ambasaneṅ</rdg>
.</app>
4655 tīlәm, sǝsǝḍǝpi samaṅkana, Uyah harәṅ, ma, Om̐ namo mahā devāya namah,
.<app>
.<lem type="norm">namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">nama</rdg>
.</app>
4660 śivāya, avighnam astu.
. caruniṅ labahana brata, sapuluṅ sapuluṅ mevakǝmbaṅ, kadi ṅūnī mantra.
. yan āṅarddhānakǝñ caru, kadi duk amvita juga, huvusan, ma, Om̐.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
4665<note> hana bratā ṅaśapuluh ... nāma śivāya, Avighnamāstu
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.65 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.65 </note>
.</app>
4670</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- M hana bratā kodara, ṅa, savulan lavasnya, hamvitane taṅgal apisaniṅ karo, tan pamaṅanā saṛvva praṇi, mvaṁ salviriṁ vijiliṁ sagāra, santa veśa ta kittha, mavastra piṅe, hagәglaṅa lave kinunirān, taṅan tәṅәn, hayva mamati mati saṛvvambәkan, makacarunya mvita bratā, skuliṁ tamas, hulamāna sāṛvva gaṅan, vadaḥ limas, tuhuṁ salvirnya, papare, baligo, sambәl, salvirnya tan pataraṣi, gogoreṅan, kolantaṁ,
.
4675cacaṅanon ginoreṁ, mvaṁ papare ginoreṁ, pada hembanāna sasavi, hәmba sakalor huvus ratə̄ṁ, tumpaṅākniṁ skuliṁ tamas, makadi yan āna pәhan, miñak mavadaḥ limas, den asṛi deni ṅ aniṅkaḥ caru, sdhaḥ voḥ raka raka vovohan, pisaṁ kәmbaṁ den asaṅkәp, dūvgan, Upacara, dhupa dhipā, vija candāne nasab, sajekna parāniṁ caru, riṁ bhaṭāra gaṇa pati, saṁ bhr̥giriti, saṁ hyaṁ Iśvarā, bhaṭārī Umā, sira padha hatūranā caru,
.
.lumkas kita hanambutana bratā, masucya radina śarīra, haṅabakti riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ nāndiśvarā mahakala ya namaḥ, Om̐ śrī bhraṅgiriti ya namaḥ, Om̐ sam̐ sāpta r̥ṣi bhyo namaḥ, Om̐ maheśvara ya namaḥ, Om̐ śrī Umāye namaḥ, tlas haturakәn carunta riṁ deva, ma, Om̐ Im̐ namaḥ, Om̐ devāscarāve namaḥ, Amr̥tātmakā ya svahā|| yan halabvana bratā kadi ṅūni, duk vavu lumkas abratā, luvarana glaṁ save kuniṁ, mahuvusanā ri tīl̥miṁ bhadravadā jugā-->
.
.<!--N hana bratta kodara, ṅa, savulan lavasnya, hamvitāne taṅgal pisaniṅ karo, tan pamaṅana sārvva praṇī, mvaṁ salviriṁ vijiliṁ śagāra, śantāveṣā ta kitthā, mavastra piṅe, hagәglaṅā lave kinuniran , taṅan tṅǝn , hayva mamati mati saṛvva mbə̄kan , makācarunya mvitā bratta, skuliṁ tamās, hulamāna saṛvva gaṅān, vaḍaḥ limās, tuhuṁ salvirnya, papare, baligo, sambǝl, salviranya tan pataraṣi, gogoreṅan koleṇṭaṁ,
4680
.cacaṅanon ginoreṁ, mvaṁ papare ginoreṁ, paḍa hǝmbanāna sasavi, hǝmba sakalor·, huvus ratǝṁ tumpaṅakniṁ skul iṁ tamas , makadi yan āna phān, miñak, mavaḍaḥ limās, den aśrī deniṅkaḥ caru, sḍaḥ voḥ, raka vovohan, pisaṁ kǝmbaṁ den āsaṅkǝp, duvgan, Upacara
.ḍūpā ḍipā, vija caṅḍanenasab, sājekna paraniṁ caru, riṁ bhaṭāra gaṅāpati, saṁ bhr̥ṅgiritī, saṁ hyaṁ Iśvarā, bhaṭāri Umā, sira paḍa atuṛana caru,
.
.lumkas kita hanambuta bratta, masucya radinā śarīra, Aṅabakti riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ nāndiśvara mahākāla ya namaḥ, Om̐ bhr̥ṅgiritī ye namaḥ, Om̐ sam̐ sāpta r̥ṣi bhyo namaḥ, Om̐ maheśvara ya namaḥ, Om̐ śrī Umā ye namaḥ, tlas haturākǝñ carunta riṁ deva, ma, Om̐ Im̐ namaḥ, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Amr̥ttātmaka ya svāha|| yan halabvana bratā kadi ṅūni, duk vahu lumkasā bratta, luvarana glaṁ lave kuniṁ, mahuvusana ri tīlǝmiṁ bhadravadā jugā -->
4685
.<!-- 1 : radin 1472:10 clean, cleansed of all impurities -->
.
.
.<!-- <ab xml:id="tattvabrata_"> -->
4690
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.66">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_66">
. hana brata
.<app>
4695<lem type="conj">vr̥kodara</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">kodara</rdg>
.</app>,
. ṅa, savulan lavasnya,
.<app>
4700<lem type="norm">amvitana i</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">amvitane</rdg>
.</app>
. taṅgal
.<app>
4705<lem wit="#N">pisan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">apisan</rdg>
.</app>
. iṅ karo, tan pamaṅana sarvaprāṇi, mvaṅ salviriṅ vijiliṅ sagāra, śāntā veṣa ta kita, mavastra piṅe, agәgәlaṅa lave kinuniran, taṅan tәṅǝn, hayva mamati mati sarvāmbәkan, makacarunya
.<app>
4710<lem type="emn">amvita</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">mvitā</rdg>
.</app>
. brata, sәkuliṅ tamas, ulamana sarvagaṅan, vaḍah limas, tuhuṅ salvirnya, papare, baligo, sambǝl, salviranya tan patarasi, gogoreṅan
.<app>
4715<lem wit="#N">kolentaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">kolantaṅ</rdg>
.</app>, cacaṅanon ginoreṅ, mvaṅ papare ginoreṅ, padha ǝmbanana sasavi, hǝmba sakalor, huvus ratǝṅ tumpaṅakniṅ sәkul iṅtamas, makadi yan ana pәhan, miñak, mavaḍah limas, den aśrī
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M">deniṅ aniṅkah</lem>
4720<rdg wit="#N">deniṅkah</rdg>
.</app>
. caru, sәḍah voh,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">raka</lem>
4725<rdg wit="#M" cause="additive">raka-raka</rdg>
.</app>
. vovohan, pisaṅ kǝmbaṅ den asaṅkǝp, duvәgan, upacara dhūpā dhipā, vija caṅdanenasab,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">sajiakәna</lem>
4730<rdg wit="#M #N">sajekna</rdg>
.</app>
. paraniṅ caru, riṅ bhaṭāra gaṅāpati, saṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">bhrәṅgiritī</lem>
4735<rdg wit="#M">bhr̥giriti</rdg>
.</app>,
. saṅ hyaṅ iśvarā, bhaṭārī umā, sira paḍa aturana caru, lumәkas kita
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">anambuta</lem>
4740<rdg wit="#M">anambutana</rdg>
.</app>
. brata, maśucya radina śarīra, aṅabakti riṅ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ nandīśvara mahākālaya namah, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">bhrәṅgiriṭībhyaṃ</lem>
4745<rdg wit="#M #N">bhrәṅgiritī</rdg>
.</app>
. namah, Om̐ sam̐ sāptaṛṣibhyo namah, Om̐ maheśvarāya namah, Om̐ śrī
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">umāyai</lem>
4750<rdg wit="#M #N">umāye</rdg>
.</app>
. namah, tәlas haturakǝn carunta riṅ deva, ma, Om̐ im̐ namah, Om̐ deva carave namah, amr̥tātmakāya svāhā.
. yan alabvana brata kadi ṅūni, duk vahu lumәkasa brata, luvarana gәlaṅ lave kuniṅ, mahuvusana ri tibhadralǝmiṅ bhadravāda juga.
.<app>
4755<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta kodara ... bhadravadā jugā
.<ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.66 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.66 </note>
4760</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!---->
4765<!-- G nihan paṅastutiniṁ brata, riṁ vulan āmr̥ttamaśa, kavruhakna, ḷkasnyā hamatighni, sarahina, yaniṁ vulan kaphaṭ, hamr̥ttamaśanya, riṁ pūrṇnama, mantra stutinira, yan aṅabakti åmvitiṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ tvaṣṭa vai devā mr̥tta tvam, porṇnamāsi namo stute, mamocya sarvva papebhyā, candra ….{lo}kaṁ sagaccāti, saṁ hyaṁ ṅāsmara devatanya, bratanya ayva maṅan sarvva rondon, phalanya dhadi śiṁ tinandhurtā. Caru sarvva pavitra, tumpәṁ putiḥ, papaṅgaṅ itik, graṁ griḥ, yantiga, sdhaḥ vho, raka vo-vohan, pisaṁ kәmbaṁ, dhupa den asaṅkәp, mantraniṁ ṅhaṅaturakәñ caru, ma, Om̐ devācara ve namaḥ, candra deva ya svāha||
.
.yaniṁ vulan, 5, riṁ tiḷm amr̥ttamaśanya, saṁ hyaṁ mahadeva devatanya, bratanya, ayva vuvus ala, ayva nәmbaṁ boñcaḥ, phalanya, dr̥man āvәvәkasan. Caru tuṅgal kadi ṅuni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ mitra vai devāmr̥tta tvaṁ, åpavasya damostute, mamocyā sarvva papebhyā, åghnilokaṁ sagaccāti. Aturakna carunta riṁ deva kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ devā cara ve nāmaḥ, ådeva ya svaha || yaniṁ vulan, 6, riṁ piṁ volu amr̥ttamaśanya, bratanya, tuṅgal kadi ṅuni, saṁ hyaṁ ṅatanu devatanya, bratanya yva ṅinәp, yan aluluṅā, phalanya sugiḥ tan kahilaṅan, caru kadi ṅuni, mantra stutinya, Om̐ kr̥ṣṇā ve devā mr̥tta tvaṁ, åṣṭamyantu namo stute, mamocyā sarvva papebhyā, viṣṇu lokaṁ sagacchati. Åturākna caruntā kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ devācara ve namaḥ, viṣṇu devā ya svaha || yaniṁ kapitu, riṁ piṁ tiga vlas, amr̥ttamaśanya, bratanya tuṅgal kadi ṅūni, saṁ hyaṁ manasija devatanya, bratanya, åṅrakā, phalanya sugiḥ kedhәp, kātkan siṁ sinadyanta, caru kadi ṅūni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ bāruṇā devā mr̥tta tvaṁ, trayodaśya namostute, mamocya sarvva papebhyā, rudrālokaṁ sagacchati. Åturakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ devācara ve nāmaḥ, rūdrā devāta ya svaha || yaniṁ vulan kavolu, piṁ ro åmr̥ttamāśanya, brata tuṅgal kadi ṅūni, saṁ hyaṁ anaṅga devatanya, bratanya, ayva maṅan suku paṭ, phalanya sugiḥ patik vnaṁ, caru kadi ṅūni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ vivāśvandevā mr̥tta tvaṁ, dvitiyaccha namo stute, mamocyā sarvva pāpebhyā, sūryyālokaṁ sagacchati, aturakna carunta riṁ devā, ma, Om̐ devā cara ye namaḥ, sūryyā devāta ya svāha || yaniṁ vulan kasaṅa, riṁ piṁ ṅәnәm amr̥ttamasanya, brata tuṅgal kadi ṅūni, saṁ hyaṁ ravi devatanya, ayva maṅan āsu, phalanya pәkik rāspati, poliḥ prajurit, caru kadi ṅūni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ åṅśaḥ ve devā mr̥tta tvaṁ, ṣaṣtyāñceva nāmostute, mamoccha sarvva papebhyā, årkkalokaṁ, sagacchati, åtūrakna taṁ caru riṁ devā, mantra, Om̐ devācara ve namaḥ, årkkā devā ya svāha || yaniṁ vulan kaśapuluḥ, riṁ piṁ paṭ āmr̥ttamaśanya, saṁ hyaṁ brahmā devatanya, ayva ndәḷṁ ruhūr·, phalanya kinasihaniṁ hyaṁ, caru kadi ṅūni, māntra stutinira, Om̐ dāta devā mr̥tvaṁ, catūrttyantu namo stute, mamocyā sarvva papebhyā, brahmalokaṁ sagacchati, brata kadi ṅūni, haṅaturākna taṁ caru, ma, Om̐ devācara ve nāmaḥ, dhatr̥ devā ya nāmaḥ svāhva || yaniṁ vulan jyeṣṭā, riṁ piṁ limā amr̥ttamāśanya, brata kadi ṅuni, saṁ hyaṁ ekājaya hyaṁnya, bratanya, ayva ñampat, phalanya, kedhep mandi kcāpta, caru kadi ṅuni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ indra ve devāmr̥tta tvaṁ, pañcamyantu namo stute, mamocya sarvva pāpebhyā, indralokaṁ sagacchati, atūrakna carunta, ma, Om̐ devācara ve nāmaḥ, indra devā ya svaha || yaniṁ ṅulan sadha, riṁ pratipadha śuklā amr̥ttamaśanya, bratanya, tuṅgal kadi ṅuni, saṁ hyaṁ virāyoddha devatanya, bratanya, ayva turu lavan istrīnya, phalanya, ke……ḥ omahta || caru kadi ṅuni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ åryya madevā mr̥tta tvaṁ, pratipadha namo stute, mamocya sarvva pāpebhyo, årkkalokaṁ sagacchati. Haturakna carunta, mantra, Om̐ devācara ve namaḥ, årkkā devā ya svaha || yaniṁ vulan kaśa, riṁ piṁ sapuluḥ amr̥ttamasanya, bratanya, tuṅgal kadi ṅūni, saṁ hyaṁ virakusuma devatanya, bratanya, ayva maṅan phala buṅkaḥ, phalanya, sugiḥ anom, dr̥man avәvәkasan, caru tuṅgal kadi ṅūni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ bhāganaḥ devāmr̥tta tvaṁ, daśamyantu namo stute, mamocyā sarvva pāpebhyo, viśvalokaṁ sagacchati. Atūrakna caru, ma, Om̐ devācara ve namaḥ, bhaga deva ya svaha || yaniṁ vulan karo, riṁ piṁ pitu ama tka maśanya, bratanya kadi ṅūni, saṁ hyaṁ jaya kusuma devatanya, bratanya, ayva maṅan sapi, phalanya luputiṁ tuju tlu, dr̥man ātiven-iven, caru kadi ṅūni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ puṣyā ve devā mr̥tta tvaṁ, saptāmyantu namostute, mamocyā sarvva pāpebhyā, sūryyalokaṁ sagacchati. Aturakna carunta, Om̐ devācara ve nāma, puṣya deva ya svaha || yaniṁ vulan katiga, riṁ piṁ saṅa hamr̥ttamaśanya, brata kadi ṅuni, saṁ hyaṁ manobhāva devātanya, bratanya, ayva maṅan celeṁ, phalanya luputiṁ griṁ ṅāguṁ, caru kadi ṅuni, mantra stutinira, Om̐ parjjādyaḥ devā mr̥tta tvaṁ, nāvamyantu namostute, mamocyā sarvva pāpebhyā, indralokaṁ sagacchati, hatūrakna ya caruntā, ma, Om̐ devācara ve namaḥ, indra devā ya svāha ||0|| gnap ikaṁ brata samaṅkana, rva vlas vulan ri kalaniṁ kāhamr̥ttamaśanya, hamatighni, hiṁhanta phalanya, kapaṅguḥ denira saṁ maṅhanakәn brata, dirghyayuṣā paripūrṇna, riṁ dlāha maṅdadyakәn rātu viśeṣā, ayvā cavuḥ, yan kalaniṁ abrata ||0|| -->
.
.
4770
.
.
.<!-- G -->
.
4775<!-- M nihan tiṅkahiṅ ābratā ri mr̥tta maśa, ṅa, hal̥kasā kittha hamati ghni, samaptā rahinā, mvaṁ caru saṛvva pavitra, tumpə̄ṁ putiḥ, papaṅgaṁ Iṭik, graṁ griḥ hantigan, sdhaḥ voḥ, rakā vovohan, pisaṁ kәmbaṁ dhūpa den asaṅkәp ||0|| nihan paṅvijiknya,
.
.yan riṁ vulan, ka, 4, pūṛṇnamā, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ ṣṭace devā mr̥tṭatvaṃ, pūṛṇnamasi namostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyaḥ, ta candrā leki gaccata, hāturakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva sarave namaḥ, candrā deva ya svāhā -->
.
.<!-- N nihan tiṅkahiṁ habratā riṁ mr̥tta maśā, ṅa, halǝkasa kita hamati ghni, samaptā rahinā, mvaṁ caru sāṛvva pavitra, tumpə̄ṁ putiḥ, papaṅgaṁ Iṭik, graṁ gri hāntigā, sḍaḥ voḥ, rakā vovohan , pisaṅ kǝmbaṁ, ḍūpā den asaṅkǝp||0|| nihan paṅvijinyā,
4780
.yan riṁ vulan , ka, 4, puṛṇnamā, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ ṣṭacedevamr̥ttatvaṃ, puṛṅnamāsi namostute, mamocyā saṛvva papebhyoḥ, ta candrā leki gaccata. Hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, candrā deva ya svāhā-->
.
.<!-- P nihan tiṅkahiṁ habratā riṁ mr̥ta maṣā hal̥kasa kitā hamati gәni, samapta rahinā. mvaṁ caru saṛvva pavitra, tumpәṁ putiḥ papaṅgaṁ hitik. gәraṁ griḥ, hantigā, sәdaḥ voḥ kavovohan. pisaṁ kәmbaṁ, dupa denāsaṅkәp ||0|| nyan paṅriñcinya,
.
4785yan riṁ hulan kapat, pūṛṇnammmā. stutinira riṁ taṅgal, ma, Om̐ haṣṭāce deva mr̥tatvaṃ, pūṛṇnamasi nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyaḥ, candra lekaṃ sagacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ devā carave namaḥ, candrā deva ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- U nihan tingkahiṁṅ abrata riṁṅ amrata māṣa, ṅa, haṅkәsakәn kita hāmati gni, samapṭā rahina, mvaṁ caru saṛvva pavitra, tumpәṁ putiḥ, papaṅgāṁaṅ itik graṁ griḥ hantiga, sdaḥ voḥ rakā vovohan, pisaṁ kәmbāṁ, dhupa den asaṅkәp. nihan paṅuvijinya,
.
. yaniṁ vulan, ka, 4, pūrṇnama, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ tvastace devā mr̥tatvam, pūrṇnama si namostute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyo, candra leka sagaścati. haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva caru ve namaḥ, candra deva ya svāhā.-->
4790
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.67">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_67.">
. nihan tiṅkahiṅ
.<app>
4795<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">abrata</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">brata</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ
.<app>
4800<lem type="norm">amr̥ta māsa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">mr̥tta maśa</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">mr̥tta maśā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mr̥ta maṣā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">amrata māṣa</rdg>
4805</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">ṅa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
4810</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">alǝkasa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">aṅkәsakәn</rdg>
4815</app>
. kita amati gәni, samaptā rahinā, mvaṅ caru sarvapavitra, tumpəṅ putih,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">papaṅgaṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">papaṅgaṅan</rdg>
4820</app>
. itik, gәraṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P #U">grih</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">gri</rdg>
4825</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U">hantiga</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">hantigan</rdg>
.</app>,
4830 sәḍah voh,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">raka vovohan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kavovohan</rdg>
.</app>,
4835 pisaṅ kǝmbaṅ, dhūpa den asaṅkǝp.
. nihan <app>
.<lem wit="#N">paṅvijinya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">paṅvijiknya</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">paṅriñcinya</rdg>
4840<rdg wit="#U">paṅuvijinya</rdg>
.</app>,
.</ab>
.
.<!-- M yan riṁ vulan, ka, 4, pūṛṇnamā, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ ṣṭace devā mr̥tṭatvaṃ, pūṛṇnamasi namostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyaḥ, ta candrā leki gaccata, hāturakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva sarave namaḥ, candrā deva ya svāhā-->
4845
.<!-- N yan riṁ vulan , ka, 4, puṛṇnamā, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ ṣṭacedevamr̥ttatvaṃ, puṛṅnamāsi namostute, mamocyā saṛvva papebhyoḥ, ta candrā leki gaccata. Hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, candrā deva ya svāhā-->
.
.<!-- P yan riṁ hulan kapat, pūṛṇnammmā. stutinira riṁ taṅgal, ma, Om̐ haṣṭāce deva mr̥tatvaṃ, pūṛṇnamasi nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyaḥ, candra lekaṃ sagacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ devā carave namaḥ, candrā deva ya svahā-->
.
4850<!-- yaniṁ vulan, ka, 4, pūrṇnama, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ tvastace devā mr̥tatvam, pūrṇnama si namostute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyo, candra leka sagaścati. haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva caruve namaḥ, candra deva ya svāhā.-->
.
.<p n="1">
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U"> yaniṅ</lem>
4855<rdg wit="#M #N #P">yan riṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. vulan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P">kapat</lem>
4860<rdg wit="#M #N #U">ka, 4</rdg>
.</app>,
. pūrṇama, stutinira riṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">saṅgar</lem>
4865<rdg wit="#P">taṅgal</rdg>
.</app>,
. ma, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">ṣṭace</lem>
4870<rdg wit="#P">haṣṭāce</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">tvastace</rdg>
.</app>
. devamr̥tatvaṃ, pūrṇamasi namostute,
.<app>
4875<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">mamocya</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P">sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
4880<rdg wit="#N">sarvapapebhyoh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">pāpebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P #U">candra</lem>
4885<rdg wit="#M #N">tā candrā</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">leki</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">lekaṃ</rdg>
4890<rdg wit="#U">leka</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">gacchata</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">sagacati</rdg>
4895<rdg wit="#U">sagaścati</rdg>
.</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ <app>
.<lem wit="#N">devacarave</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">devasarave</rdg>
4900<rdg wit="#U">devacaruve</rdg>
.</app> namaḥ, candradevāya svāhā.</p>
.
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan ka limā, til̥m, paṅastutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ mitridevā mr̥ttatvaṃ, Avamasya namostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyoḥ, Aghna lokaṃ sagaccate, haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ devācārave namaḥ, Aghni devā ya svāha-->
.
4905<!-- N yaniṁ vulan, kalīma, tīlǝm , paṅastunira riṁ saṅgar , ma, Om̐ mitri devamr̥ttatvaṃ, Avamasya namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ, Aghnalokaṃ sagaccate. Hatūrakna carunta kadi kadi ṅūnī, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Aghni deva ya svāhā||0||-->
.
.<!-- P yan riṁ hulan, ka, 5, til̥m, paṅastutunira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ mitrita devā prathanuṃtvaṃ, hamavasyā namostute, mamoca saṛvva papebhyaḥ, viṣṇu lokaṃ sagacati. haturakna carunta kādi ṅūni, riṁ deva, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ, viṣṇu deva ya svahā.-->
.
.<!-- U yeniṁ vulan ka lima, til̥m, paṅustitinira riṁ saṇgaṛ, ma, Om̐ mitrita devāmr̥tatvam, Amavasya namostute, mamocchya saṛvva pāpebhyo, aghni lokam sagaścati. hāturakna caruntā kādi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ devā caruve namaḥ, Agni devā ya svāhā.-->
4910
.<p n="2">
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U"> yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">yan riṅ</rdg>
4915</app>
. vulan
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">kalima</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">5</rdg>
4920</app>,
. tilǝm,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">stutinira</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">paṅastutinira</rdg>
4925<rdg wit="#N">paṅastunira</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">paṅastutunira</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">paṅastitinira</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ saṅgar, ma, Om̐
4930<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mitri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">mitrita</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
4935<lem wit="#M #N #U">devāmr̥tatvaṃ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">prathanuṃtvaṃ</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">avamasya</lem>
4940<rdg wit="#P #U">amavasya</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya</lem>
4945<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">mamocya</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P">sarvapapebhyah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">sarvva papebhyoh</rdg>
4950<rdg wit="#U">sarvva pāpebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#U">aghnilokaṃ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">aghnalokaṃ sagaccate</rdg>
4955<rdg wit="#P">viṣṇu</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#P">sa gacchati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">sagaccate</rdg>
4960<rdg wit="#U">sagaścati</rdg>
.</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">carave</lem>
4965<rdg wit="#U">caruve</rdg>
.</app>
. namaḥ, agnidevāya svāhā.</p>
.
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan kanәm, taṁ, piṁ, 8, stuti nirā ri saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ kr̥ṣṇarava devāmr̥ttatvaṃ, mastamyantu nāmostute, mocya saṛvva pāpebhyoḥ, viṣṇu lokaṃ sagaccati, hatūrakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ devā carāve namaḥ, viṣṇu deva ya svāhā -->
4970
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan ka nǝm , taṅgal piṁ, 8, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ kr̥ṣṇāravā deva mr̥tṭvam , Aṣṭāmyantu namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ, viṣṇu lokaṃ sagāccati|| haturakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namah , viṣṇu devā ya svahā||0||-->
.
.<!-- P -->
.
4975<!-- U yaniṁ vulan kanәm, taṁ, piṁ, 8, stuti nira riṁ saṅgār·, ma, Om̐ kr̥ṣṇarava devā mr̥tatvaṃ, Aṣṭām yantu namostute, mamoccya saṛvvā pāpebyā, viṣṇu lokaṃ sagaścati. aturakna caruntā kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ devā carave namaḥ, viṣṇu devā ya svahā.-->
.
.<p n="3">
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U"> yaniṅ</lem>
4980<rdg wit="#P" cause="line_omission">yaniṅ...svāhā</rdg>
.</app>
. vulan kanǝm,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #U">taṅ,</lem>
4985<rdg wit="#N">taṅgal</rdg>
.</app> piṅ, 8, stutinira riṅ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ kr̥ṣṇāravā devāmr̥tṭvam,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U">aṣṭāmyantu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">mastamyantu</rdg>
4990</app>
. namostute,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">mocya sarvvapāpebhyoḥ</rdg>
4995<rdg wit="#N">mamocya sarva papebhyoh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mamoccya sarvva pāpebyā</rdg>
.</app>,
. viṣṇu lokaṃ sa gacchati.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni,
5000 ma, Om̐ deva carave namah, viṣṇudevāya svāhā.</p>
.
.
.<!-- M yyaniṁ vulan kapitū, taṁ, piṁ, 13, stutinira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ bāruṇā devā mr̥tṭatvaṃ, trayodam namostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyoḥ, ṅudrā lokaṃ sagācchate, hatūrakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ devā carāve namaḥ, rudrā devaya svāhā
.-->
5005
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan kapitu, taṁ piṁ, 13, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ baruṇā deva mr̥tvam, trayodāmna namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ, ṅudra lokaṃ sagaccāte. hatuṛakna carunta kādī ṅūnī, ma, Om̐ deva cārave namaḥ, rudrā deva ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- P yan riṁ vulan kapitu taṅgal piṁ tlulas, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ bharaṇa deva mr̥tatvaṃ, trayodhaṃ namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ, rudra lokaṃ sagacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma,Ōm̐ deva rudrā deva ya svahā-->
.
5010<!-- U yaniṁ vulan kapitu, taṁ, piṁ, tiga vlas, stutinira riṁ saṅgār·, ma, Om̐ baruṇa devā mratatvam, trayodaśa namostute, mamoccyā sarvvā pāpebyo, rudr̥ lokaṃ sagaścati. aturakna caruntā kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, rudra deva ya svāhā.-->
.
.<p n="4">
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U"> yaniṅ</lem>
5015<rdg wit="#P">yan riṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. vulan kapitu, taṅ, piṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">13</lem>
5020<rdg wit="#P">tәlulas</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">tiga vәlas</rdg>
.</app>,
. stutinira riṅ saṅgar, ma, Om̐
.<app>
5025<lem wit="#M #N #U">baruṇā</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">bharaṇa</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P">devāmr̥tatvaṃ</lem>
5030<rdg wit="#N">mr̥tvam</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mratatvam</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P">trayodām</lem>
5035<rdg wit="#N">trayodāmna</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">trayodaśa</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute,
.<app>
5040<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyoḥ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mamoccyā sarvvā pāpebyo</rdg>
.</app>
5045<app>
.<lem wit="#P #U">rudra</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">ṅudra</rdg>
.</app>
. lokaṃ
5050<app>
.<lem wit="#P">sa gacchati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">sagācchate</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">sagaccāte</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sagaścati</rdg>
5055</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kādī ṅūni, ma, Om̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">devacarave namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
5060<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
. rudradevāya svāhā.</p>
.
5065
.<!-- M yaniṅ vulan kavolu, taṁ, piṁ, 2, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, Om̐ vivasvā deva mrәtṭatvaṃ, dvātiyeva namostute, mamocya sarvva pāpebhyoḥ, sūryyalokaṃ sagacati. hatūrakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, sūryyā devāta ya namah svāhā. -->
.
.<!-- N yaniṅ vulan kavolu, taṅ, piṅ, 2, stutinira riṅ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ vivasvā deva mrәttatvam, dvātiyeva namostute, mamocya sarva papebhyo, sūryyalokaṃ sagaccate. haturakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carāve namah, suryyā devata ya namah svāhā.-->
.
5070<!-- P yan riṁ vulan kavulu taṅgal pindo, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ vivāśva mratatvaṃ, dvityā ve namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ, sūṛyya lokaṁ sagacati. haturakna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva caraya ve namaḥ, sūṛyya devata ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan kavolu, tang, piṁ, 2, stuti nira riṁ saṅgār·, ma, Om̐ vivaśva devā mr̥tatvaṃ, dvatiyeva namostute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyā, sūṛyya lokam sagaścati. aturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva carave nama suryya devatā yasvāhā-->
.<p n="5">
.<app>
5075<lem wit="#M #N #U"> yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">yan riṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. vulan
.<app>
5080<lem wit="#M #N #U">kavolu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kavulu</rdg>
.</app>,
. taṅ,
.<app>
5085<lem wit="#M #N #U">piṅ, 2</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pindo</rdg>
.</app>,
. stutinira riṅ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ vivasvā
.<app>
5090<lem wit="#M #N #U">devāmr̥ttatvam</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">mratatvaṃ</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">dvātiyeva</lem>
5095<rdg wit="#P">dvityā</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
5100<rdg wit="#M">mamocya sarvva pāpebhyoḥ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">mamocya sarva papebhyo</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyā</rdg>
.</app>,
5105 sūryyalokaṃ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P">sa gacchati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">sa gaccate</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sa gaścati</rdg>
5110</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">carave</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">caraya</rdg>
5115</app>
. namaḥ, sūrya devatāya namah svāhā.</p>
.
.
.
5120<!-- M yaniṁ vulan kasaṅha, taṁ, piṁ, 4, stuti nira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ Astunateva mr̥tṭatvaṃ, ṣaṣṭyentevā namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, Aṣālokaṃ sagāccati, haturakna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva cārave namaḥ, Aṛkka deva ya svāhā ||0||-->
.
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan kasaṅā, taṁ, piṁ, 6, stutīnira ri saṅgār, ma, Om̐ Astunāteva mr̥tṭatvaṃ·, pāṣṭyente vā namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, Athalokaṃ sagaccati. hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūnī, Om̐ deva caravei ya namaḥ, Arkkā deva ya svāhā||0|-->
.
.<!-- P yaniṁ vulan kasaṅā taṅgal piṁ nәm stutinira riṁ saṅgāṛ, ma, Ōm̐ hastunātha deva hamratatvaṃ, saṁptyenheva namostute, mamoca saṛvva papebhyoḥ, hata lokaṃ sagacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ svahā||0|| -->
5125
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan kasaṅa, tang, piṁ, 6, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ Astu katevāmr̥tatvaṃ, ṣaṣmyente va namostute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyo, Arṭha lokaṃ sagaścati. aturakna carunta riṁ saṅgar kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, suryya devata ya svāhā.-->
.
.<p n="6">
.yaniṅ vulan kasaṅa, taṅ, piṅ,
5130<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U">6</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">4</rdg>
.</app>,
. stutinira
5135<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P #U">ri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">riṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. saṅgar, ma, Om̐
5140<app>
.<lem wit="#P">astunāthadeva</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">Astunateva</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">astukatevā</rdg>
.</app>
5145 amr̥tatvaṃ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">pāṣṭyentevā</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">ṣaṣṭyentevā</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">saṁptyenheva</rdg>
5150<rdg wit="#U">ṣaṣmyenteva</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
5155<rdg wit="#M">mamocya saṛvvapapebhyo</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">mamocya sarvvapapebhyo</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">mamoca sarvvapapebhyoḥ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">mamoccya sarvvapāpebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
5160<app>
.<lem type="emn">arkalokaṃ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">Aṣālokaṃ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N">Athalokaṃ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">hatalokaṃ</rdg>
5165<rdg wit="#U">artha</rdg>
.</app>
. sa
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">gaccati</lem>
5170<rdg wit="#U">gaścati</rdg>
.</app>.
. haturakәna carunta <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">kadi ṅūni</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">riṅ saṅgar kadi ṅuni</rdg>
5175</app>,
. Om̐ devacarave
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">namah svaha</rdg>
5180</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">arkadevāya svāhā</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
5185</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">surya devataya svāhā</rdg>
.</app>.
.</p>
.
5190
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan kadaśa, taṁ, piṁ, 4, stuti nira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ yagāvvei deva mr̥tṭatvaṃ, catūṛ dyantu nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyoḥ, brahma lokaṃ sagācati, hatūrakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, datr̥deva ya svāhā -->
.
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan kadaśa, tāṁ, piṁ, 4, stutinira riṁ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ yāgave deva mr̥ttatavam, catuṛdḍyantu namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebbhyoḥ, brahma lokaṃ sagacāti hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, ḍatr̥ deva ya svāhā-->
.
5195<!-- P yan riṁ vulan kadaśa taṅgal piṁ pat, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ yagave deva hamr̥tatvaṃ, catuṛ dyantu namostute, mamocyā saṛvva papebhyoḥ, brahmā lokaṃ saṅgacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ, cakra deva ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan ka daśa, tang, piṁ, 4, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ yagave devā mratatvam, catur dyantu namostute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebyo, brāhmā lokaṃ sagaścati. haturaknā carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, dhatra deva ya svāhā. -->
.
.<p n="7">
5200 yaniṅ vulan kadaśa, taṅ, piṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">4,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pat</rdg>
.</app>
5205 stutinira riṅ saṅgar,
.<abbr>ma,</abbr>
. Om̐ <app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U">yāgave</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">yagāvvei</rdg>
5210</app>
. devāmr̥ttatavam, catur ddhyantu namostute,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N #P">mamocya sarvapapebbhyoh</rdg>
5215<rdg wit="#U">mamoccya sarvvapāpebyo</rdg>
.</app>,
. brahmalokaṃ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">sa gacāti</lem>
5220<rdg wit="#P">sa ṅgacati</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sa gaścati</rdg>
.</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni, <abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ devacarave namah, <app>
5225<lem wit="#M #N #U">dhatr̥devāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">cakradevaya</rdg>
.</app> svāhā.</p>
.
.
5230<!-- M yaniṁ vulan jyeṣṭā, taṁ, piṁ, 5, stuti nira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ Indrave devā mr̥tṭatvaṃ, pañcamyantu nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyoḥ, Indrā lokaṃ sagāccati, haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Indrā devā ya svāhā|| 0||-->
.
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan jyeṣṭa, ta ṅgal piṁ, 5, stutinira riṁ saṅgar, ma, Om̐ Indrāve deva mr̥tṭatvaṃ·, mañcamyāntu namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, Indralokaṃ sagaccati|| hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūnī, ma, Om̐ deva cārave namaḥ, Indra deva ya svāhā||0/
. -->
.
5235<!-- P yaniṁ vulan jyeṣṭā taṅgal piṁ lima, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ Indra deva ya mr̥tatvaṃ, pañcamyantu namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, Indra lokaṃ saṅgacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ, Indra deba yā svahā||0||-->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan jyeṣtha, taṁ, piṁ, 5, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ Indrave devā mr̥tatvam, pañcamyantu namo stute, mamocyya saṛvva papābhyo, Indra lokaṃ sagaścati. aturakna carunta kadi ṅūni riṁ deva , ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Indra deva ya svāhā. -->
.
.<p n="8">
5240yaniṅ vulan jyeṣṭa, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #U">taṅ,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N #P">taṅgal</rdg>
.</app>
. piṅ,
5245<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">5</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">lima</rdg>
.</app>,
. stutinira riṅ saṅgar,
5250<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">Indrāve</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">Indra</rdg>
.</app>
5255<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">devāmr̥tatvaṃ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">deva ya mr̥tatvaṃ</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
5260<lem wit="#M #P #U">pañcamyāntu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">pañcamyāntu</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute,
.<app>
5265<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">mamocya sarvapapebhyoh</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N #P #U">mamocya sarva papebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
. Indralokaṃ
5270<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">sa gaccati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">saṅgacati</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sagaścati</rdg>
.</app>.
5275 haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūnī,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ devacārave namah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">Indradevāya</lem>
5280<rdg wit="#P">Indradebaya</rdg>
.</app> svāhā.
.</p>
.
.
5285
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan sadā, taṁ, piṁ, 1, stuti nira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ Aṛyyā madevā mr̥tṭatvaṃ, pratipadi nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyoḥ, Aṣṭa lokaṃ sagāccati,, hatūrakna carūnta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carāve namaḥ, Arkkā de- -vā ya svāhā-->
.
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan sadḍā, taṁ, piṁ, 1, stutinirā riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ Aṛyya madeva mr̥tṭatvaṃ, praṭipadī namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, Aṣṭalokaṃ sagaccati. hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ de va carave namaḥ, Arkkā deva ya svahā||0||-->
.
5290<!-- P yaniṁ vulan saddhā taṅgal hapisan, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ. ma, Ōm̐ harya madeva ya mr̥tatvaṃ, pratipadha namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo haṣṭa lokaṃ sagacati. haturakna carunta kāni ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ, haṛkka deva ya svahā||0|| -->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan sadda, taṁ, 1, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ Aṛyya madevā mr̥tatvaṃ, prati padi namo stute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyo, Arṣṭālokaṃ sagaścati. haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ devacarave, arṭha deva ya svāhā.-->
.<p n="9">
. yaniṅ vulan saddhā, taṅ, piṅ,
5295<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">1</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">apisan</rdg>
.</app>,
. stutinira riṅ saṅgar,
5300<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">Aryyamadevāmr̥tatvaṃ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">Aryamadevaya</rdg>
.</app>,
5305<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">praṭipadī</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">praṭipadī</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute,
5310<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">mamocya sarvapapebhyoḥ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#N #P #U">mamocya sarva papebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
5315 Aṣṭalokaṃ <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">sa gaccati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sa gaścati</rdg>
.</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni,
5320<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ devacarave <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">namah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
5325</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">Arkadevāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">arthadevaya</rdg>
5330</app> svāhā.</p>
.
.
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan kaṣā, taṁ piṁ, 10, stuti nira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ bhaghanā deva mr̥tṭatvaṃ, bhaṣamyantu nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyo, sūṛyya lokaṃ sagāccanti,, hatūrakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐ deva carāve namaḥ, bhaghanā deva ya svāhā-->
.
5335<!-- N yaniṁ vulan kaṣā, taṁ, piṁ, 10, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ bhaghā na devā mr̥tṭattvaṃ, bhaṣāmyantu namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, sūṛyya lokaṃ sagaccati|| haturā kna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, bhaghana deva ya svāhā-->
.
.<!-- P yaniṁ vulan kaṣā taṅgal piṁ daśā, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ bhagana deva mr̥tatvaṃ, bha śamyāntu namostute, mamoca saṛvva papebhyo, sūṛyya lokaṃ sagacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ devacara ve namaḥ, bhagaṇa deva ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan kasa, taṁ, piṁ, 10, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ bhavagan devā ya sthāmr̥tatvaṃ, daśimyuntu namo stute, mamoccya saṛvva pāpebhyo, suṛyya lokaṃ sagaścati. haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, bhāgana deva ya svāhā,.-->
5340<p n="10">
. yaniṅ vulan kasa, taṅ, piṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">10</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">daśa</rdg>
5345</app>,
. stutinira riṅ saṅgar,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐
.<app>
5350<lem wit="#M #N #P">bhaghāna</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">bhagavan</rdg>
.</app>
. devāmr̥tṭatvaṃ,
.<app>
5355<lem wit="#M #N #P">bhaṣāmyantu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">daśimyuntu</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute, <app>
.<lem type="norm">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
5360<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">mamocya sarva papebhyo</rdg>
.</app>, sūryalokaṃ <app>
.<lem wit="#N #P">sa gaccati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">sa gaccanti</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">sa gaścati</rdg>
5365</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi ṅūni,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ devacarave namah, bhaghanadevāya svāhā.</p>
.
5370
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan karo, taṁ, piṁ, 7, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ puṣya dve devā mr̥tṭa tvaṃ, saptā myantu nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyo, sūṛyya lokaṃ sagāccatti, hatūrakna carunta kaddi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ devā cararave namaḥ, puṣya devā ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan karo, taṁ, piṁ, 7, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ puṣya dvei deva mr̥tṭatvaṃ, sapta myantu nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, sūṛyyā lokaṃ sagaccāti|| hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, puṣya deva ya svāhā-->
.
5375<!-- P yaniṁ vulan karo taṅgal piṁ pitu, stutinira riṁ saṅgāṛ, ma, Ōm̐ puṣpadve deva mr̥tātvaṃ, saptamyantu namostute, mamoccya saṛvva papebhyo, sūṛyya lokaṃ sagacati. haturākna carunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ, puṣpa deva ya svahā. -->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan karo taṅgal, piṁ, 7, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ puṣyadve devā mr̥tatvaṃ, saptamyantu namostute , mamoccya sarvvā pāpebhyo, sūṛyya lokaṃ sagaścati. haturakna carunta kadi ṅuni, ma, Om̐deva carave namaḥ, puṣya deva ya svāhā.-->
.
.<p n="11">
5380 yaniṅ vulan karo, taṅ, piṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">7,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pitu</rdg>
.</app>
5385 stutinira riṅ saṅgar,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #P #U">puṣyadve</lem>
5390<rdg wit="#N">pusyadvei</rdg>
.</app>
. devāmr̥tatvaṃ, saptāmyantu namostute,
.<app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
5395<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
. sūryalokaṃ <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">sa gaccati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sa gaścati</rdg>
5400</app>,
. hatūrakәna carunta kadi ṅūni,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>, Om̐ devā
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U">carave</lem>
5405<rdg wit="#M">cararave</rdg>
.</app>
. namaḥ, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">puṣyadevāya</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">puṣpadevaya</rdg>
5410</app> svāhā</p>
.
.<!-- M yaniṁ vulan katigā, taṁ, 9, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ sājjadyaḥ devā mr̥tṭatvaṃ, navasantu nāmostute, mamocya saṛvva pāpebhyo, Indrā lokaṃ sagāccati, hatūrakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Indrā deva ya svāhā-->
.
.<!-- N yaniṁ vulan ka tigā, taṅgal piṁ, 9, stutinira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ ṣajjā dyaḥ deva mr̥ṭṭatvaṃ, navaṣyantu namostute, mā moccya saṛvva papebhyo, Indrā lokaṃ sagaccati|| hatuṛakna carunta kadi ṅūni, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Indrā devā ya svāhā-->
5415
.<!-- P yaniṁ vulan katigā taṅgal piṁ saṅā, stutinira riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Ōm̐ sajja dyaḥ deva mratatvaṃ, nāmasyantu namostute, mamocya saṛvva papebhyo, Indra lokaṃ sagacati. haturaknacarunta kādi ṅūni, ma, Ōm̐ deva carave namaḥ, puṣpa deva ya svahā-->
.
.<!-- U yaniṁ vulan ka tiga, taṁ, 9, stuti nira riṁ saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ ṣarjja dyaḥ devā mr̥tatvaṃ, navaṣyantu namo stute, mamoccyā saṛvva pāpebyo, Indra lokaṃ sagaścati. haturakna caruntā kadi ṅūni riṁ devā, ma, Om̐ deva carave namaḥ, Indra deva ya svāhā. Om̐ diṛgghāyur āstu, tat astu, Astu.-->
.
5420<p n="12">
. yaniṅ vulan katiga,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #U">taṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N #P">taṅgal</rdg>
5425</app>,
. piṅ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">9,</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">saṅa</rdg>
5430</app>
. stutinira riṅ saṅgar,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐
.<app>
5435<lem wit="#M #N #P">ṣajjādyah</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sarjadyah</rdg>
.</app> devāmr̥tatvaṃ,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U">navaṣyantu</lem>
5440<rdg wit="#M">navasantu</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">nāmasyantu</rdg>
.</app>
. namostute, <app>
.<lem type="emn">māṃ mocaya sarvapapebhyaḥ</lem>
5445<rdg wit="#M #N #P #U">māmoccya sarva papebhyo</rdg>
.</app>,
. Indrālokaṃ <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">sa gaccati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">sagaścati</rdg>
5450</app>.
. haturakәna carunta kadi
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P">ṅūni</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">ṅuni riṅ deva</rdg>
5455</app>,
.<abbr>ma</abbr>,
. Om̐ deva carave namah,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">Indradevāya</lem>
5460<rdg wit="#P">puṣpadevaya</rdg>
.</app> svāhā.
.</p>
.
.
5465<!-- M gnәp tiṅkahiṁ bratā samaṅkanā, rva vlas vulan kala niṁ hamr̥tta masa hamate ghni, kapaṅgiḥ de saṁ haṅanakәn bratā, dīrggha yuṣa, paripūṛṇna, riṁ dlāha mandādi ratu viśeṣā, hayva cavuḥ yan kala niṅ habratā, tlas,
.
.sma ta bratāṅkәna mravani siṁ pravani, Utamā dahat, tuhā gana ta ya bāratā, byakta tuṣṭātmakā saṁ piṭara nirā, tka riṁ kāki buyut īra suka, nītya sukātma ka vaneḥ, Ika ta den agatikna ddheniṅ amaṅunāyu niṁ śarirātma-->
.
.<!-- N gnǝp tiṅkahiṁ bratā samaṅkana, rva vlas vulan , kalaniṅ hamr̥tta maśa, Amati ghni, kapaṅgiḥ de saṁ haṅanakǝn bratā, dīṛgghā yuṣa paripuṛṇna, riṁ dlāha, mandadi ratū viśeṣā, hayva cavuḥ yan kalaniṅ ābrattta, tlas,
5470
.smā, tabrataṅkǝna mravani siṁ pravani, Uttamā dahat, tuhvā gana ta ya bharaṭā , byakta tuṣṭātmakā saṁ pitārannirā, tka rīṁ kaki buyutira suka, nītya sukātmaka vaneḥ, Ika ta den agatiniṅ amaṅun ayuniṁ śarīrātma-->
.
.<!-- P gәnәpniṁ tiṅkaḥniṁ brata, samaṅkana rva vәlas vulan kalaniṁ hamr̥ta maṣa, hamati gәnine saṁ haṅanakākәn brata, diṛgha yuṣa paripūṛṇna, ri dlahan mandadi ratu śakti maviśeṣa, hayva cavuḥ kālaniṁ yan habratā -->
.
5475<!-- U gnap tiṅkah iṁ brāta maṅkana, rva vlas vulan kāla niṁ amr̥ta māsa, hamāti gni, kapaṅgiḥ de saṁ haṅanakәn brata, dirgghā yuṣa paripūrṇna, riṁ dlahan maṅdadi ratu viśeṣā, hayva cahuḥ yan kākāla niṁṅ abrata-->
.
.<p>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">gәnǝp</lem>
5480<rdg wit="#P">gәnәpniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">tiṅkahiṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">tiṅkahniṅ</rdg>
5485</app>
. brata samaṅkana, rva vәlas vulan, kālaniṅ amr̥ta māsa,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U">amati</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M">amate</rdg>
5490</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">gәni</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">gәnine</rdg>
.</app>,
5495 kapaṅgih de saṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">haṅanakǝn</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">haṅanakakәn</rdg>
.</app>
5500 brata, dīrgha yuṣa paripūrṇa, riṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">dlāha</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">dlahan</rdg>
.</app>,
5505<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">mandadi</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">maṅdadi</rdg>
.</app>
. ratu viśeṣa, hayva cavuh <app>
5510<lem wit="#M #N">yan kālaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">kalaniṅ yan</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">yan kākālaniṅ</rdg>
.</app> abrata, <app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">tәlas</lem>
5515<rdg wit="#P #U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>.
.</p>
5520
.<p>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N">
.<abbr>sma,</abbr> ta brataṅkǝna mravani siṅ pravani, uttama dahat, tuhva gaṇa ta ya <app>
5525<lem type="emn">brata</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">bharata</rdg>
.</app>,
. byakta tuṣṭātmaka saṅ pitaranira, təka riṅ kaki buyutira sukha, nitya sukhātmaka vaneh, ika ta den agatiniṅ amaṅun ayuniṅ śarīrātma</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P #U">
5530<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
.</p>
.
5535<p>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> nihan tiṅkahiṅ abrata ... ayuniṅ śarīrātma
.<ptr target="#G"/>
5540 in 3.89 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.67 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.67 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.141 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.61 </note>
5545</app>
.</p>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta adyus anuṅkura, ṅa, yaniṁ śravaṇamāsa, ådyus davuḥ, 7, pisan, riṁ sore, phalanya, hulun masiḥ ri kita.-->
5550<!-- M hana bratā hadyus hanuṅku rāt, ṅa, yaniṁ śravaṇa maśa, hadyusā dhavuḥ, 7, pisan riṁ sore, pha, hulun masih iri kittha-->
.<!-- N hana bratā hadyus hanuṅku rāt, ṅa, yan riṁ śravaṇā maṣā, hadyusā davuḥ, 7, pisa n riṁ sore, pha, hulun masih iri kitthā|-->
.<!-- P hana bratā dyus hañuṅku rāt, ṅa, yaniṁ śravana masā hadyus davuḥ, 7, riṁ sore, phalanya hulun māsiḥ hiri kitā.-->
.<!-- U hana brāta hadyus hanuṅkurāt, yen iṁ śravaṇa māsa, hadyusa dhavuḥ pitu, pisān riṁ sore, pha, hulun masiḥ iri kita. -->
.
5555<div type="subchapter" n="3.68">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_68">
. hana brata adyus
.<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #U">anuṅku rāt</lem>
5560<rdg wit="#G">anuṅku ra</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#P">añuṅku rāt</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">ṅa</lem>
5565<rdg wit="#U">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>,
.</ab>
5570</div>
.
.<div>
.<p n="1" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.1">
.<app>
5575<lem wit="#G #M #P">yaniṅ</lem>
.<rdg wit="#N">yan riṅ</rdg>
.<rdg wit="#U">yen iṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. śravaṇa masa,
5580<app>
.<lem wit="#G #P #U">adyus</lem>
.<rdg wit="#M #N">adyusa</rdg>
.</app> ḍavuh,
.<app>
5585<lem wit="#G #M #N #P">7</lem>
.<rdg wit="#U">pitu</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #U">pisan</lem>
5590<rdg wit="#P">
.<gap reason="omitted"></gap>
.</rdg>
.</app>
. riṅ sore, <abbr>pha</abbr>, hulun masih
5595<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U">iri</lem>
.<rdg wit="#G">ri</rdg>
.</app> kita.
.</p>
5600
.
.<!-- G Yaniṁ bhadravada, ådyus da{vuh}….. phalanya, kasubhagan. .-->
.<!-- M yan riṁ bhadravadā, hadyusā dhavuḥ, 4, pha, kasubhāgā nuṅku rāt-->
.<!-- N yan riṁ bhadravadā, hadyusā davuḥ, 4, pha, kasubhagā nuṅku rāt-->
5605<!-- P yaning badravada hadyus davuḥ, 4, lanya kaṁ subhāgan.-->
.<!-- U yaniṁ bhadravāda, hadyusa dhavuḥ pāt, pha, kasubhāgan. -->
.
.<p n="2" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.2">
. <app><lem wit="#G #P #U">yaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">yan riṅ</rdg></app>
5610 bhādravada,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#P">adyus</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P">4</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#U">pat</rdg> </app>,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#P">lanya</rdg></app>,
5615 <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">kasubhagan</lem><rdg wit="#P">kaṅ subhagan</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">anuṅku</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">nuṅku</rdg><rdg wit="#G #P #U"><gap reason="omitted"> </gap></rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">rāt</lem><rdg wit="#G #P #U"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>.
.</p>
.
5620
.<!-- G Yaniṁṅ asuji, ådyus dhavuḥ, 5, phalanya, sarvva salaka tkā-->
.<!-- M yaniṅāsuji hādyusā dhavuḥ, 5, pha, saṛvva salaka tka-->
.<!-- N yaniṅ hasuji, hadyusā ḍavuḥ, 5, pha, saṛvva salaka tkā-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ hasuji, dyus davuḥ, 5, phalanya, saṛvva salakā tәka.-->
5625<!-- U yan iṁṅ asuji, hadyusa dhavuḥ lima, pha, saṛvva slaka tkā.-->
.
.
.<p n="3" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.3">
. yaniṅ asuji,
5630 <app><lem wit="#G #P #U">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">adyusa</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">5</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="lexical">lima</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, sarvasalaka tәka.
.</p>
5635
.<!-- G Riṁ karttika, ådyus dhavuḥ, 8, riṁ ratri, phalanya, bahu putrā, -->
.<!-- M yaniṁ kāṛttikā, hadyusa dhavuḥ. 8, pha, bavu putra||-->
.<!-- N yaniṁ kaṛttikā, hadyusā ḍavuḥ, 8, riṁ ratri, pha, bahu putra-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ kaṛttikā hadyus davuḥ, 8, riṁ ratri, phalanya bahu putra mvaṁ mās pirak kapaṅgiḥ, maṅkana kramanya-->
5640<!-- U yan iṁ kaṛtṭikā, hadyusa dhavuḥ volu, riṁ ratri, pha, bāhu putra. -->
.
.
.
.<p n="4" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.4">
5645 <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">yaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">riṅ</rdg></app>
. karttikā,
. <app><lem wit="#G #P">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">adyusa</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">8</lem><rdg wit="#U">volu</rdg></app>,
5650 <app><lem wit="#G #N #P #U">riṅ rātri</lem><rdg wit="#M"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">bahu putra</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">bahu putra mvaṅ mās pirak kapaṅgiḥ, maṅkana kramanya</rdg></app>.
.</p>
.
5655
.<!-- G yaniṁ magga{<margga…}-sira, hadyus davuḥ, 4, riṁ ratri, phalanya, prabhu masiḥ-->
.<!-- M yaniṁ māṛggā sirā, hadyusā dhavuḥ, 4, riṁ ratri, pha, prabhū masiḥ-->
.<!-- N yan riṁ maṛgghā sirā, hadyusā davuḥ, 4, riṁ ratri, pha, prabhū masiḥ-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ maṛgga sira madyus davuḥ, 4, riṁ ratri, phalanya prabhu masiḥ.-->
5660<!-- U yaniṁ mārgga śira, hadyusā dhavuḥ phat riṁ ratri, pha, saṁ prabhū masiḥ.-->
.
. <p n="5" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.5">
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #P #U">yan riṅ</lem><rdg wit="#N">yan riṅ</rdg></app>
. margghā sira,
5665 <app><lem wit="#G">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">adyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#P">madyus</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">4</lem><rdg wit="#U">pat</rdg></app>,
. riṅ rātri,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
5670 <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">prabhu</lem><rdg wit="#U">saṅ prabhu</rdg></app>
. masih.
. </p>
.
.<!-- G Poṣyamāsa, madyus, dhavuḥ, 6, sore, phalanya, viryyavan. .-->
5675<!-- M yaniṁ poṣya masa, hadyusā dhavuḥ, 6, sore, pha, viṛyyavan -->
.<!-- N yaniṁ poṣya maśa, hadyusa davuḥ, 6, sore, pha, viṛyyavan-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ poṣya davuḥ, 6 sore, phalanya viṛyyavan.-->
.<!-- U yaniṁ poṣya māsa, hadyusa dhavuḥ nәm sore, pha, viryyavān.-->
.
5680
. <p n="6" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.6">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">yaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>
. poṣya
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">māsa</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
5685 <app><lem type="emn">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#G">madyus</rdg><rdg wit="#M #N #U">adyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">6</lem><rdg wit="#U">nәm</rdg></app>,
. sore,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
5690 vīryavan.
.</p>
.
.<!-- G -->
.<!-- M yaniṁ magā masa, hadyusa dhavuḥ, 8, vaṅun rahina jugā, pha, sugiḥ pari-->
5695<!-- N yaniṁ maghā maṣā, hadyusa davuḥ, 8, vaṅun rahina jugā, pha, sugiḥ pari-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ magha madyus davuḥ, 8, vaha rahinā guṇa, phalanya sugiḥ pari kitā.-->
.<!-- U yaniṁ maghā māsa, hadyusa dhavuḥ volu, vaṅun rahina juga, pha, sugiḥ pari.-->
.
.
5700 <p n="7" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.7">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">yaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">māgha māsa</lem><rdg wit="#P">magha</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem type="emn">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">adyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#P">madyus</rdg></app> ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P">8</lem><rdg wit="#G">volu</rdg></app>,
5705 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">vaṅun rahina juga</lem><rdg wit="#P">vaha rahina guṇa</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. sugih pari.
.</p>
.
5710<!-- G Yaniṁ phalguṇa māsa, madyus davuḥ, 2, rahina, phalanya, boga gәṁ katmū,-->
.<!-- M yaniṁ phalgunā maśā, hadyusa dhavuḥ, 2, rahinā, pha, bhoga gə̄ṁ tmu-->
.<!-- N yaniṁ phalguṇa maṣā, hadyusā davuḥ, 2, rahina, pha, bhoga gə̄ṅ katmu-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ phalguṇa madyus davuḥ, 2, rahinā phalanya deva masiḥ, saṛvva siddha kāṛyyanta. -->
.<!-- U yaniṁ phalguṇa, madyusā dhavuḥ ro, rahina, pha, bhoga katmu.-->
5715
.
. <p n="8" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.8">
. yaniṅ phalguṇa
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">māṣa</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
5720 <app><lem type="emn">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#G">madyus</rdg><rdg wit="#M #N">adyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#U">madyusa</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">2</lem><rdg wit="#U">ro</rdg></app>,
. rahina,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
5725 <app><lem wit="#G #N">bhoga gə̄ṅ katәmu</lem><rdg wit="#M">bhoga gәṅ tәmu</rdg><rdg wit="#P">deva
. masih, saṛvva siddha kārayanta</rdg><rdg wit="#U">bhoga katәmu</rdg></app>.
.</p>
.
.
5730<!-- G yañ caitra māsa, madyus dhavuḥ, 3, rahina, phalanya, deva masiḥ, sarvva karyyanta siddhā-->
.<!-- M yaniṁ cetra māśa, hadyusā dhavuḥ, 3, rahinā, pha, devā masiḥ saṛvva kaṛyyanta siddha-->
.<!-- N yaniṁ cetra maśa, madyusa davuḥ, 3, rahina, pha, devā masiḥ saṛvva kaṛyyanta sidḍa-->
.<!-- P -->
.<!-- U yan iṁ cetra mādyusā, mādyusa dhavuḥ tiga rahina, pha, devā masiḥ, mvaṁ svakāṛyyanta kasidda.-->
5735
. <p n="9" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.9">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">yaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">yan</rdg><rdg wit="#P" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">cetra māsa</lem><rdg wit="#U">cetra</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem type="emn">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#G">madyus</rdg><rdg wit="#M #N">adyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#U">madyusa, mādyusa</rdg></app>
5740 ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">3</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">tiga</rdg></app>,
. rahina, <abbr>pha</abbr>, deva masih
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">sarva kāryanta siddha</lem><rdg wit="#U">mvaṅ svakāryanta kasidda</rdg></app></p>
.
5745
.<!-- G yaniṁ vesaka māsa, ådyus dhavuḥ, 4, phalanya, lara niṅ ati ilaṁ.-->
.<!-- M yaniṁ veśakā masa, madyusā dhavuḥ, 4, pha, laraniṅ hati hilaṁ-->
.<!-- N yaniṁ veśaka maṣā, madyusa ḍavuḥ, 4, pha, laraniṅāti hilaṁ-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ vesaka madyus davuḥ, 4, phalanya, laraniṁ hati hilaṁ denya. -->
5750<!-- U yan i veśaka māsa, madyusa dhavuḥ pāt, pha, lara niṁ hati hilaṁ-->
.
. <p n="10" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.10">
. yaniṅ veśakha
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">māsa</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
5755 <app><lem wit="#G">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">madyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#P">madyus</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #P">4</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="lexical">pat</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. laraniṅ hati
5760 <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">hilaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">hilaṅ denya</rdg></app>.
.</p>
.
.<!-- G Yaniṁ jyeṣṭā, ådyus dhavuḥ, 4, phalanya, siṁ katkān, -->
.<!-- M yaniṁ jyeṣṭā, hadyuṣā dhavuḥ, 4, pha, siṁ kaṛyyanta katkan-->
5765<!-- N yaniṁ jyeṣṭā, hadyusā ḍavuḥ, 4, pha, siṁ kaṛyyanta katkan-->
.<!-- P yaniṁ jyeṣṭā, madyusa dhavuḥ pāt, pha, yan iṁ asiṁ katkan kaṛyyanta. -->
.<!-- U -->
.
. <p n="11" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.11">
5770 yaniṅ jyeṣṭā,
. <app><lem wit="#G">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">adyusa</rdg><rdg wit="#P">madyusa</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">4</lem><rdg wit="#P">pat</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
5775 <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">siṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">yaniṅ asiṅ</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">kāryanta</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition"></rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">katəkan</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition"></rdg></app>.
.</p>
.
5780<!-- G yaniṁ ṅasadha māsa, ådyus dhavuḥ, 7, phalanya, åjrahakәn mās pirak. Maṅkāna kramanya-->
.<!-- M yaniṁ hāsadā masa, madyuśa dhavuḥ, 7, pha, hañjrahakәn mās pirak, maṅkana kramanya-->
.<!-- N yaniṁ hasadḍa maśa, madyusā davuḥ, 7, pha, hañjrahakǝn mās pirak, maṅkāna kramanya-->
.<!-- P -->
.<!-- U yaniṁ asadda, madyusā dhavuḥ pitu, pha, aṁjrahakәn mās pirak. maṅkāna kramanya-->
5785
.
.<p n="12" xml:id="tattvabrata_68.12">
. yaniṅ aṣādha
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">masa</lem><rdg wit="#U"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
5790 <app><lem wit="#G">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">madyusa</rdg></app>
. ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">7</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="lexical">pitu</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. añjrahakǝn mās pirak, maṅkāna kramanya.
5795</p>
.</div>
.<!-- G ĩti sarira suddhā, ṅa -->
.<!-- M Iti śarīra śuddha bhūmi socca, ṅa-->
.<!-- N Itī śarīra śudḍa, bhūmi socca, ṅa-->
5800<!-- P Iti sarasuddha, bhūmi suddha, ṅa.-->
.<!-- U -->
.
.
.<div>
5805<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_68.13">
. Iti
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">śarīra</lem><rdg wit="#P">sara</rdg></app>
. śuddha,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">bhūmi socca</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#P">bhūmi sudha</rdg></app>, ṅa.
5810<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana brata adyus ... bhūmi socca, ṅa
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.57 <ptr target="#M"/>
5815 in 3.68 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.68 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.55 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.66 </note>
.</app>
5820</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- G -->
5825<!-- M hana bratā ṅulante, ṅa, hamilaṁ vulan, kaṣa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva buṅkaḥ, pha, dadi saṛvva tinanduṛ-->
.<!-- N hana bratta ṅulante, ṅa, hamilan vulan , kaṣa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva buṅkaḥ, pha, dadi saṛvva tinandur·-->
.<!-- P hana brata haniti vulan, ṅa, kramanya, vulan kaṣa tan kavaṣā hamaṅan saṛvva buṅkāḥ.-->
.<!-- U hana bratā ṅulaṇṭeṁ,ṅa, hamilaṁ vulān, kasa, tan pamaṅan saṛvva bungkah, pha, dadi kang saṛvva tinandur,-->
.
5830
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.69">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_69">
.hana brata
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">ṅulante</lem><rdg wit="#P">aniti vulan</rdg><rdg wit="#U">ṅulanteṅ</rdg>
5835 <rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
.</ab>
.
.<p n="1" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.1">
5840 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">amilaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G" cause="line_omission"></rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P">kramanya</rdg></app>
. vulan,
. kasa, tan
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pamaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">kavasa amaṅan</rdg></app> sarva buṅkah,
5845 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">dadi</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app> <app><lem wit ="#M #N">sarva</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">kaṅ sarva</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">tinandur</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>.</p>
.
.
5850<!-- G ka, 2, tan pamaṅan sapi, polihnya, luput riṁ griṁ sasab,-->
.<!-- M vulan, 2, tan pamaṅan sapi, pha, sugiḥ sapi, tan kagәriṅәn-->
.<!-- N vulan , 2, tan pamaṅan sapi, pha, sugiḥ sapi, tan kagǝriṅǝn-->
.<!-- P hulan karo tan kavasa hamaṅan sapi.-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 2, tan pamaṅan sapi, pha, sugi sapi, tan gәgәriṅәn.-->
5855
.<p n="2" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.2">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">vulan</lem><rdg wit="#G">ka</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">2</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">karo</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N #U">tan pamaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#P">tan kavasa amaṅan</rdg></app>
5860 sapi,
. <abbr><app><lem wit="#M #N #U"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G">polihnya</rdg><rdg wit="#P">
. <gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app></abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">sugih sapi,</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>
5865 <app><lem wit="#M #N">tan kagǝriṅǝn</lem><rdg wit="#G">luput riṅ gәriṅ sasab</rdg><rdg wit="#U">
. tan gegәriṅan</rdg></app>.</p>
.
.
.<!-- G -->
5870<!-- M vulan, 3, tan pamaṅañ celeṁ, pha, sugiḥ vvit, tan gәriṅ āguṁ, halaṅ alaṁ-->
.<!-- N vulan , 3, tan pamaṅañ celeṁ, pha, sugiḥ vvit, tan gǝriṅ āguṁ, halaṅ halaṁ-->
.<!-- P katiga, tan kavasa hamaṅan bavi-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 3, tan pamaṅan celeṁ, pha, sugiḥvit, tan griṁṅ aguṁ, mvaṁ halala.-->
.
5875
.
.<p n="3" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.3">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 3,</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">katiga</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#U">vulan, ka, 3</rdg><rdg wit="#G" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>
5880 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">tan pamaṅan,</lem><rdg wit="#P">tak kavasa</rdg></app>
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">sugih vvit</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">tan gǝriṅ aguṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>, <app><lem wit="#M #N">halaṅ halaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#P">mvaṅ alala</rdg></app>.</p>
.
5885
.
.<!-- G ka, 4, tan pamaṅan roṇḍon, polihnya, daḍdhi siṁ tinandur· -->
.<!-- M vulan, 4, tan pamaṅan saṛvva rondon, pha, dadi saṛvva rumambat, saṛvva gumantuṁ-->
.<!-- N vulan , 4, tan pamaṅan sāṛvva roṇḍon , pha, dadi saṛvva rumambat, saṛvva gumantuṁ-->
5890<!-- P kapat. tan kavasa hamaṅan saṛvva rondon-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 4, tān amaṅan sāṛvvā rondon, pha, dadi kaṁ sāṛvvā rumambat, mvaṁ phala gantuṁ.-->
.
.<p n="4" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.4">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 4,</lem><rdg wit="#G">ka, 4</rdg><rdg wit="#P">kapat</rdg>
5895 <rdg wit="#U">vulan, ka, 4</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G #M #N">tan pamaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#P">tan kavasa</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#U">tan amaṅan</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">sarva roṇḍon</lem><rdg wit="#G">roṇḍon</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G">polihnya</rdg><rdg wit="#P">
5900 <gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">dadi sarva rumambat</lem><rdg wit="#G">dadi siṅ tinandur</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#U">dadi kaṅ sarva rumambat</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">sarva gumantuṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg wit="#U">mvaṅ phala gumantung</rdg></app>.</p>
5905
.
.<!-- G ka, 5, yen aluluṅa tan paṅinәp, polihnya, sugiḥ dr̥vyā riṁ padhaṅan, mvaṁ rare hulun -->
.
.<!-- P kalimā, tan kavasa haṅinәp riṁ paluṅayan-->
5910
.
.<!-- M vulan, 5, tan patukāṛ, tan panәmbuṁ rare sili, pha, kedәp mavkā paṅucapta-->
.<!-- N vulan , 5, tan patukar·, tan panǝmbuṁ rare cili, pha, keḍǝp havkasa paṅūcapta-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 5, tan patukar tan pәmbaṁ rare cili, pha, pha, kedhәp havka paṅucape.-->
5915
.
.
.<p n="5" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.5">
.
5920 <app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 5</lem><rdg wit="#U">vulan, ka, 5</rdg></app>,
. tan patukar, tan
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">panǝmbuṅ</lem><rdg wit="#U">pәmbaṅ</rdg></app>
. rare cili,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
5925 keḍәp
. <app><lem wit="#M">mavәka</lem><rdg wit="#N">avәkasa</rdg><rdg wit="#U">avәka</rdg></app> paṅucapta.<note>G: ka, 5, yen aluluṅa tan paṅinәp, polihnya, sugih dr̥vya riṅ padhaṅan, mvaṅ rare hulun; kalima, tan kavasa haṅinәp riṅ paluṅayan </note></p>
.
.
.<!-- G ka, 6, tan pamәṅ iṁ rare, polihnya, dr̥man ahanak-->
5930<!-- P kanәm, haja mәṅiṁ rare. kapitu tan kavasa hamaṅan saṛvva vijā kevala saṛvva phala bhuktinәn-->
.
.
.<!-- M vulan, 6, tan paluluṅha, tulak vali yan luṅa, pha, sugiḥ kavula vr̥ddhi yakeḥ-->
.<!-- N vulan, 6, tan paluluṅha, tulak vali, yen luṅha, pha, sugiḥ kavulā, vr̥dḍi kabeḥ tuṛ ākeḥ-->
5935<!-- U vulan, ka, 6, tan aluluṁṅha tulak vali, yen huluṅhā, pha, sugiḥ kavula vr̥ddi akeḥ. -->
.
.
.
.
5940<p n="6" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.6">
.
.vulan,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">6,</lem><rdg wit="#U">ka, 6</rdg></app>
. tan
5945 <app><lem wit="#M #N">paluluṅhā</lem><rdg wit="#U">aluluṅha</rdg></app>,
. tulak vali,
. <app><lem wit="#M">yan</lem><rdg wit="#N #U">yen</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">luṅhā</lem><rdg wit="#U">uluṅha</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
5950 sugih kavula,vrәddhi
. <app><lem wit="#N">kabeh tur akeh</lem><rdg wit="#M">yakeh</rdg><rdg wit="#U">akeh</rdg></app>.
.
. <note> G: ka, 6, tan pamәṅiṅ rare, polihnya, dr̥man ahanak; </note></p>
.
5955
.
.<!-- G ka, 7, aṅraka, polihnya, apkik tūr śugiḥ pari -->
.<!-- P -->
.
5960
.<!-- M vulan, 7, tan pamaṅan sgā, pha, sugiḥ pari tan kakuraṅan tajak-->
.<!-- N vulan , 7, tan pamaṅan sgā, pha, sugiḥ pari, tan kakuraṅan tajak-->
.<!-- U ka, 7, tan pamaṅan sgā, pha, sugiḥ riṁ tan kakuraṅan tajak. -->
.
5965
.
.<p n="7" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.7">
.
.
5970<app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 7,</lem><rdg wit="#U">ka, 7</rdg></app>
. tan pamaṅan sәga,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">sugih pari</lem><rdg wit="#U">sugih riṅ</rdg></app>,
. tan kakuraṅan tajak.
5975
. <note> G: ka, 7, aṅraka, polihnya, apәkik tūr sugih pari</note></p>
.
.
.
5980<!-- G ka, 8, tan pamaṅan va…. polihnya, sugiḥ vnaṁ-vnaṁ-->
.<!-- M vulan, 8, haja maṅan ṣuku pat, pha, sugiḥ duve saṛvva tәdə̄-->
.<!-- N vulan , 8, haja maṅan suku phat, pha, sugiḥ dr̥vve sarvǝ vḍa-->
.<!-- P kavolu, tan kavasa hamaṅan suku pat-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 8, haja hamaṅan suku phat, pha, sugiḥ dr̥ve saṛvva vr̥ddi. -->
5985
.<p n="8" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.8">
.
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 8</lem><rdg wit="#G">ka, 8</rdg><rdg wit="#P">kavolu</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#U">vulan, ka, 8</rdg></app>,
5990 <app><lem wit="#G">tan pamaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">aja maṅan</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P">tan kavasa</rdg><rdg wit="#U">aja amaṅan</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P #U">suku paat</lem><rdg wit="#G">va</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pha</lem><rdg wit="#G">polihnya</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
5995 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">sugih drәve</lem><rdg wit="#G">sugih vәnaṅ-vәnaṅ</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#U">sarva vr̥ddhi</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg>
. <rdg wit="#M">sarva tәda</rdg><rdg wit="#N">sarvә vḍa</rdg><rdg wit="#P">
. <gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>.</p>
6000
.
.
.<!-- G ka, 8, tan pamaṅan asu, polihnya, abckik iṁ mahakon, ayu pkik, luputiṁ tuju tluḥ -->
.<!-- M vulan, 9, haja maṅan añjiṁ, pha, hapkik tan pahes-->
6005<!-- N vulan , 9, haja maṅan āñjiṁ, pha, hapkik tan pahes-->
.<!-- P kasaṅa tan kavasa hamaṅan hasu.-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 9, hajā hamaṅan hañjiṁ, pha, hapkik tan pahesan. -->
.
.<p n="9" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.9">
6010 <app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 9,</lem><rdg wit="#G">ka, 8,</rdg><rdg wit="#P">kasaṅa</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#U">vulan, ka, 9</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G">tan pamaṅan asu</lem><rdg wit="#M #N" cause="lexical">aja maṅan añjiṅ</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#P">tan kavasa amaṅan asu</rdg><rdg wit="#U">aja amaṅan añjiṅ</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G">polihnya</rdg><rdg wit="#P">
6015 <gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">apәkik tan pahes</lem><rdg wit="#G">abәcikiṅ mahakon, ayu pәkik, luputiṅ tuju tәluh</rdg><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>.</p>
.
.
.
6020<!-- G ka, 10, tan tumәṅeṅ laṅit, polihnya, ha..pahakon, thәr darggāyuṣā, tan āna vani -->
.<!-- M vulan, 10, tan tumṅeṁ tavaṁ, pha, prajñan kittha-->
.<!-- N vulan , 10, tan tumṅeṁ tavaṁ, pha, prajñān kitthā-->
.<!-- P kadaśa.tan kavasa nәṅeṁ hakaśa-->
.<!-- U vulan, ka, 10, tan tumṅeṁ tavaṁ, pha, prajñān kitā.-->
6025
.
.
.<p n="10" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.10">
.
6030 <app><lem wit="#M #N">vulan, 10,</lem><rdg wit="#G">ka, 10</rdg><rdg wit="#P">kadaśa</rdg>
. <rdg wit="#U">vulan, ka, 10, </rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">tan tumәṅeṅ tavaṅ,</lem><rdg wit="#G" cause="lexical">
. tan tumәṅeṅ laṅit</rdg><rdg wit="#P">tan kavasa nәṅeṅ akaśa</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G">polihnya</rdg><rdg wit="#P">
6035 <gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">prajñan kita.</lem>
. <rdg wit="#G">ha..pahakon, tәhәr dargayuśa, tan hana vani</rdg><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app></p>
.
.
6040
.<!-- G jyeṣṭā, aṅlavar·, polihnya, kedhapa savinuvus, labḍa va……-->
.<!-- M vulan, jyeṣṭa, tan pamaṅana gar̥m, pha, sugiḥ bhumi, tan hilaṁ takonaknā, tuṛ kedhәp kapintuhu-->
.<!-- N vulan , jyeṣṭa, tan pamaṅan gar̥m , pha, sugiḥ bhūmi, tan ilaṁ takonakna, tuṛ keḍǝp kapintuhu-->
.<!-- P jyeṣṭa, hajā haturiṁ histri, yan histri haja haturu riṁ kakuṁ-->
6045<!-- U vulan, jyeṣṭā, tan pamaṅan gar̥m, pha, sugiḥ bhūmi, tān ilaṁ tākonakna, tūr kedhәp kapintuhu. -->
.
.<p n="11" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.11">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">vulan, jyeṣṭa,</lem></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N #U">tan pamaṅan garәm</lem><rdg wit="#M">tan pamaṅana</rdg></app>,
6050 <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. sugih bhūmi, tan ilaṅ takonakәna, tur keḍәp kapintuhu.<note>G and P are different from M N U. Here is the G: jyeṣṭā, aṅlavar·, polihnya, kedhapa savinuvus, labḍa va; P: jyeṣṭa, aja haturiṅ istri, yan istri aja aturu riṅ kakuṅ</note></p>
.
.
.
6055<!-- G da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe -->
.
.<!-- P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṁ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṁ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṁ siṁ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṁ griṁ haguṁ, kedhәpiṁ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgiḥ maru, sugiḥ dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṁ kinasihan tuvan mvaṁ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa-->
.
.
6060<!-- M vulan saddhā, tan paturu lavan istri, histri tan paturu lavan lanaṁ, pha, dr̥man alaki, kinasihaniṁ lanaṁ, lanaṁ kinasiha niṁ vvadon, tūr̥ kedәp sapaṅucapta-->
.
.<!-- N vulan , sadḍā, tan paturū lavan strī, histri tan paturu lavan lanaṁ, pha, dr̥mmam hala ki, kinasihaniṁ lanaṁ, lanaṁ kinasihaniṁ vadon , tuṛ keḍǝp sapaṅucapta -->
.
.<!-- U vulan Asadda, tan paturu lavan istri, histri tan patūru lavan lanaṁ, pha, dr̥man malāki, kinasihānniṁ lānaṁ, lānaṁ kninasihan iṁ vadon, tūr kekedhәp sapaṅucaptā-->
6065
.<p n="12" xml:id="tattvabrata_69.12">
.
.vulan, saddhā, tan paturū lavan strī, strī tan paturu lavan lanaṅ,
.<abbr>pha</abbr>, drәman alaki, kinasihaniṅ lanaṅ, lanaṅ kinasihaniṅ vadon, tur keḍәp sapaṅucapta
6070
.<note>G and P are quite different here. Here the G: da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe; P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṁ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṁ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṁ siṁ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṁ griṁ haguṁ, kedhәpiṁ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgiḥ maru, sugiḥ dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṁ kinasihan tuvan mvaṁ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa</note>.
.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #M #N #P #U"></lem>
6075<note> hana bratta ṅulante ... keḍǝp sapaṅucapta
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.58 <ptr target="#M"/>
. in 3.69 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.69 <ptr target="#P"/>
6080 in 3.149 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.115 </note>
.</app>
.</p>
.</div>
6085
.
.<!-- P nihan bratā ṅaji tutug, ṅa, satavun lavasnya, kramanyā hacaru sudi, sadandanan, bras, 2, kulak, haṛtha, 225, kampuḥ gәnәp sasāri, carokәna riṁ saṅgāṛ, kramanya manaṅkәn pūṛṇnama,
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kaṣā, saṁ hyaṁ hamūṛvva bhuvana, ṅa, pūṛṇnamaniṁ karo, saṁ hyaṁ manusudhana, ṅa, pinaka babu||0||
6090
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ katigā saṁ hyaṁ madhukusuma, ṅa, pinaka havak||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapat, saṁ hyaṁ smarā pina svami. pūṛṇnamaniṁ kalima saṁ hyaṁ manobhava, ṅa, pinaka sanak hatuha hanom||0||
.
6095pūṛṇnamaniṁ kanәm, saṁ hyaṁ hantanu pinakā sanaka kabeḥ. pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu saṁ hyaṁ kama jaya pinaka sānak vaṛgghā||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kavolu pinaka sānak saṁ hyaṁ kama ratiḥ pūṛṇnamaniṁ kasaṅā saṁ hyam manasija pinaka sānak||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kadaśa saṁ hyaṁ hamadhapa vuragil.
6100
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ jyeṣṭa saṁ hyaṁ kumarā pinakā sanak lanaṁ||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ saddhā hyaṁ kumari pinaka sanak vadon, phalanya suka sugiḥ, tәkaniṁ hanak putu buyut, hantuka paripūṛṇna -->
.
6105
.
.<!-- G …..ṇnamaniṁ kanәm, saṁ hyaṁ ṅantanu, minakasanakiṅ ūlun saṁ gulu, habagus puruṣa vicakṣaṇa suka sugiḥ.
