Pūrṇnamaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ manasijā, minaka sanakiṁ ṅulun pamadhe, habagus puruṣa vicakṣaṇa viśeṣa suka sugiḥ. Pūrṇnamaniṁ kavolu, saṁ hyaṁ kāmajaya, mina{ka}sanakiṅ ūlun, habagus puruṣa viśeṣa, vicakṣaṇa suka sugiḥ. Pūrṇnamaniṁ kasaṅa, saṁ hyaṁ hamadapa, minakasanakiṅ ūlun habagus puruṣa viśeṣa vicakṣaṇa suka sugiḥ. Pūrṇama ni sapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ kumarapaḥ, minaka sanakiṅ ūlun uragil, habagus puruṣa viśeṣa, vicakṣaṇa, suka sugiḥ. Pūrṇnamaniṁ deṣṭa, saṁ hyaṁ……..ka…..n lanaṁ, habagus puruṣa vaśeṣa, vicakṣaṇa, suka su…{gih}, pū..{r}ṇnama na{iṁ} saddha, ya komara, minaka hanakiṅ ulun vadon, hayu dr̥man kedhәp suka sugiḥ. Ĩti haji tutuk, phalaniṁ haṅlampahakәn brata ṅaji tutuk, habapa hababu hasanak hanak-anak suka sugiḥ, ya mukti tan kalaṅ-alaṅan, ma, Om̐ sa ba ta å ĩ, na ma śa va ya-->
.
.
6110
.<!-- M nihan haji tutug kavruhakna, pūṛṇnāma niṁ kaṣa, saṁ hyaṁ hamūṛvva bhuvana, pinaka bapa, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun||
.
.pūṛnama niṁ karo, saṁ hyaṁ madhu suddhanā pinaka babu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun||
.
6115
.pūṛṇnamā niṁ katigā, saṁ hyaṁ madu kusumā, pinakiṅ hulun, listvayu paripūṛṇna, dr̥mman kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñā n vicakṣaṇā, suka sugiḥ||
.
.
.pūṛnnama niṁ ṅkapat, saṁ hyaṁ hasmara, pinaka laki niṁ hulun, hapkik prajurit vicakṣanā, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñan ṣuka sugiḥ jayeṁ śatru, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun||
6120
.pūṛṇnama niṁ kalimā, saṁ hyaṁ manoba vā, pinaka hanak iṅhulun, panәṅgek lanaṁ, hapkik prajurit, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun,
.
.pūṛṇnama niṅ kanәm, saṁ hyaṁ hantanu pinaka sanak iṅ hulun lanaṁ, paṅgulu, suka sugiḥ hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun||
.
6125pūṛṇnamā niṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ kāma jaya pina ka sanak iṅhulun lanaṁ panṅaḥ, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun||
.
.pūṛṇnamāni kavolu, saṁ hyaṁ kama ratiḥ, pinakā sanak iṅhulun lanaṁ vuruju, suka sugiḥ hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun||
.
.pūṛṇnama niṁ kasaṅha, saṁ hyaṁ kumara, pinakākṣaṇa, dukiṅ hulu nāpapaṅanten pinaslaṁ||
6130
.
.pūṛṇnama niṁ kaśapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ hamadapā, samanā duk dukiṅ hulun abobot||
.
.pūṛṇnama nim jyeṣṭa, saṁ hyaṁ kumara, pinakā hanak lanaṁ pambayun, hapkik prajurit, hasih iṁ pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan vicakṣaṇā, jayeṁ śatru, hahidhәp pinakeṅ hulun||
6135
.pūṛṇnama niṁ hāsaddhā, saṁ hyaṁ komari, pinakā hanak vadon paṅgulu, listvayu paripūṛṇna, dr̥man kedәp, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñan vicakṣaṇa hahidәp pinakeṅ hulun||0||
.
.
.phala niṁ hulun āṅajī tutug, haṅavruhakәn tanutugā bapa, hababu, tutugga malakya rābi, hanak ānak, tutug asanak, tugu ākaki hanini, tutug āputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tәmbe, habagus kalavān hayu, paripūṛṇna, dr̥mman kedhәp, suka sugiḥ śri sadāna, mas manik, dodot l̥lmәs, hakveḥ daśaḥ vnaṁ vnaṁ hasuku pat, hasuku ro, sugiḥ tanyakna hiren, siddha sāprayojñanā, siddha salāmpaḥ salaku, l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ riṁ tәmbe pañjanman, l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ maṅke, bhaghavan pañarikan hanulisakәn, saṁ hyaṁ triyo daśa sakśi hanakṣeni, bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabayan hañәnәṅī-->
6140
.
.
.<!-- N nihan hajī tutug kavruhakna, puṛṇnamaniṁ kaṣa, saṁ hyaṁ hamuṛvva bhuvaṅna, pinaka bala, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ huluṅ·||
.
6145puṛṅnamaniṅ karo, saṁ hyaṁ maḍu śudḍaṇā, pinaka babu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun ||0||
.
.puṛṇnamaniṁ katigā, saṁ hyaṁ maḍu kusuma, pinakavakiṅ hulun listvayu paripuṛṇna, dr̥mman keḍǝp puruṣā viśeṣa, prajñān vicakṣaṇā, suka sugiḥ||
.
.puṛṇnamaniṅ kapat, saṁ hya ṅ āsmara pinaka lakiniṁ hulun, hapkik prajurit vicakṣaṇā, puruṣā viśeṣa, prajñān suka sugiḥ jayeṁ śatru, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun ||
6150
.puṛṇnamaniṁ kalimā, saṁ hyaṁ manobhava, pinakā hanakiṅ hulun , panǝṅgǝk lanaṁ, hapkik prajurit hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun ||
.
.puṛṇnamāniṅ kanǝm , saṁ hyaṅ hantanū, pinaka sanakiṅ hulun lanaṁ, paṅgulu, suka sugiḥ, hasih pinakeṅ hulun ||0||
.
6155puṛṇmaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṅ kama jaya, pinakā sanakiṅ hulun lanaṁ panṅaḥ, hasiḥ pina keṅ hulun ||
.
.puṛṇnamaniṁ kavolu, saṁ hyaṅ kamā ratiḥ pinaka sanakiṅ hulun lanaṁ vuruju, suka sugiḥ hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun ||
.
.puṛṇnamaniṁ kasaṅha, saṁ hyaṁ kumarā, pinakā kṣanā , dukiṅ hulun hāpapaṅanten pinaslaṁ||
6160
.puṛṇnamaniṁ kaśapuluh, saṁ hyaṅ hamaḍapā, samanā dukiṅ hulun ābobot||
.
.puṛṇnamaniṅ jyeṣṭā, saṁ hyaṁ kumara, pinakāhanak lanaṅ pambayun , hapkik prajurit, hasihiṁ pinakeṅ hulun , puruṣā viśeṣā, prajñān vicakṣaṇā, jayeṁ śatru, hahiḍǝpinakeṅ hulun ||
.
6165puṛṇnamaniṁ hasadḍā, saṁ hyaṅ komari, pinakā hanak vadon paṅguṅgulu, listvasyu paripuṛṇnā, ḍr̥man keḍǝp, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñān vicakṣaṇā, hahiḍǝpinakeṅ hulun ||0||
.
.phalaniṅ hulun āṅajī tutug, haṅavruhākǝn hanutuga bapa, hababu, tutugā malakya rabi, hanak ānak tutugā sanak, tutugākaki hanini, tutugāputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tǝmbe, habagus kalava nāyu, paripuṛṅnā, dr̥man keḍǝp, suka sugiḥ, śrī sadanā, mās maṇik, dodot l̥mǝs , hakveḥ daśiḥ , vnaṁ vnaṁ hasuku pat, hasuku ro, sugiḥ tanyakna hiren , sidḍa saprayojñaṇā, sidḍa salampaḥ salaku, lǝviḥ kapaṅgiḥ riṁ tǝmbe pañjanman, l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ maṅke, bhagavan pañarikan hanulisākǝn , saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sākṣi hanakṣeni, bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabayan hañjǝnǝṅi-->
.
.
6170
.<!-- P nihan haji tutug kavruhakna,
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kāṣā, saṁ hyaṁ hamūṛvva bhuvanā pinaka bapā, hasiri pinakeṁ hulun.o.
.
6175pūṛnamaniṁ karo saṁ hyaṁ madhu sudhana, pinaka babu, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁṅ hulun, listuhayu paripuṛṇna dr̥man kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa prajñan vicakṣaṇa, suka sugiḥ||0||
.
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapat, saṁ hyaṁ svara pinaka lakiniṅ hulun, hapәkik śakti prajurit vicakṣaṇa, prajñan suka sugiḥ, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁ hulun||0||
.
6180pūṛṇnamāniṁ kalimā saṁ hyaṁ manobhava pinakā hanak iṅhulun, panәṅkәk lanaṁ, hapәkik prajurit, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kәnәm, saṁ hanatanu pinaka sānak iṅhulun lanaṁ paṅggulu, suka sugiḥ, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ kamajaya pinaka sanakiṁ hulun lanaṁ, panәṅaḥ, hasiḥ ri pinakeṁ hulun||0||
6185
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kavulu, saṁ hyaṁ kama ratiḥ pinaka sanak iṅhulun lanaṁ wuruju, suka sugiḥ, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kasaṅā, saṁ hyaṁ kumara pinaka sanakiṅ hulun, dukiṁ hulun hapaṅanten pinasәlaṁ||0||
.
6190pūṛṇnamaniṁ kasapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ hamadhapa samaṇa dukiṁ hulun habobot||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ jyeṣṭa saṁ hyaṁ kumarā pinaka hanakānaṁ pambayun, hapәkik prajurit, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣa viśeṣa prajñan, vicakṣaṇa jayeṁ śatru, hahidhәp pinakeṅ hulun||0||
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ hasaddha, saṁ hyaṁ komari pinakā hanak vadon paṅggulu, listuhayu, paripūṛṇna dr̥man kedhәp , puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan vicakṣaṇa hahidhәp pinakeṅ hulun||0||
6195
.phalaniṁ haṅaji tutug haṅavruhakәn hanutuga bapā, hababu tutuga malakyā rabi, mahanakānak, tutug asānak, tutug akaki hanini, tutug aputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tәmnbe habagus kalavan hayu, paripūṛṇna, dr̥man sahidhәp , suka sugiḥ, śri sadhana, mas maṇik dodot l̥l̥mes, kveḥ dasiḥ, vәnaṁ vәnaṁ hasuku pat, hasuku ro, sugihanya kәnahiren, siddha saprayojñāna, siddha salampah salaku,l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ maṅke, l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ kaṁ maṅko, tәmbe pañjanman bhagavān pañarikan hanulisakәn, saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sākṣi, hinakṣeni bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabhayan hañjәnәṅi-->
.
.
.<!-- U nihan haji tutug kavruhakna,
6200
.pūrṇnama niṁ kasa, saṁ hyaṁ hamurvvā bhūvana, pinaka bapa, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁṅ hulun.
.
.pūrṇnama niṁ karo, saṁ hyaṁ madhu suddanā, pinakā bābu, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁṅ hulun.
.
6205pūrṇnama niṁ ka tiga, saṁ hyaṁ madhu kusuma, pinakāvak iṅ hulun, listvā paripūrṇna, dr̥man kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa, pragan vicākṣaṇa, suka sugiḥ.
.
.pūrṇnama niṁ kapāt, saṁ hyaṁ hasmara pinakā laki niṁṅ hulun, hapkik prajurit vicaksaṇā, puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan suka sugiḥ jayeṁ śatru, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun.
.
.pūrṇnama niṁ kalimā, saṁ hyaṁ manobhāva, pinaka hanak iṁṅ hulun, panәṅgәk lanaṁ, hapkik prajurit, hasiḥ pinakeṁṅ hulun.
6210
.pūrṇnama niṁ kānәm, saṁ hyaṁ Atanu, pinaka sānak iṅ hulun lanāṁ, paṅgulu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun. pūrṇnama niṁ ka pitu, saṁ hyaṁ kāmajaya, pinakā sanāk iṅ hulun lānaṁ panṅaḥ, hasiḥ ri pniṁkeṅ hulun.
.
.pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ kamajaya pinaka sanakiṁ hulun lanaṁ, panәṅaḥ, hasiḥ ri pinakeṁ hulun.
.
6215pūrṇnama niṁ kavolu, saṁ hyaṁ kāma ratiḥ, pinakā sānak iṅ hulun lanaṁ varuju, sukā sugiḥ hasiḥ ri pinakeṁṅ hulun.
.
.pūrṇnama niṁ kasaṅa, saṁ hyaṁ kumāra, pinaka sānak, duk iṅhulun hapapaṅanten ināslaṁ.
.
.pūrṇnamā niṁ kasapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ hamādapa, samana duk iṅ hulun abobot.
6220
.pūrṇnama niṁ jyeṣṭā, saṁ hyaṁ kumāra, pinaka sānak lanāṁ pambayun, hapkik prajurit,hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñān vicaksaṇa, jayeṁ śatru, Aidhәp pinakeṁṅ hulun.
.
.pūrṇnama niṁ Asadda, saṁ hyaṁ komari, pinakā hanak vadon paṅgulu, listvāyu, paripūrṇnādr̥man kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, Aidhәpinākeṅ hulun.
.
6225
.phala niṅ hulun aṅaji tutug, haṅavruhakәn hanutuga malakyārabi, hanak anak, tutug asānak, tutug akaki hanini, tutug aputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tәmbe, habagus kalavan hayu, paripūrṇna, dr̥man kedhәp, suka sugiḥ śri sādhanā, mās maṇik, dodot hul̥mәs kveh dasi, vnaṁ vnaṁ hasuku pat, hasuku ro, sugiḥ tan kna hiren, sidda saprayojana, sidda salampaḥ laku, l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ riṁ tәmbe pañjanman, l̥vih kapaṅgiḥ maṅke, bhagavān pañarikan nulisakәn,saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sakṣi anakṣeni, bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabayan hañjәnәṅi-->
.
.
.
6230<!-- M nihan haji tutug kavruhakna, || -->
.
.<!-- N nihan hajī tutug kavruhakna, -->
.
.<!-- P nihan haji tutug kavruhakna-->
6235<!-- U nihan haji tutug kavruhakna-->
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.70">
6240<p xml:id="tattvabrata_70.0">
.nihan aji tutug kavruhakәna, </p>
.
.
.
6245<!-- M pūṛṇnāma niṁ kaṣa, saṁ hyaṁ hamūṛvva bhuvana, pinaka bapa, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ kaṣa, saṁ hyaṁ hamuṛvva bhuvaṅna, pinaka bapa, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ huluṅ-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kāṣā, saṁ hyaṁ hamūṛvva bhuvanā pinaka bapā, hasiri pinakeṁ hulun-->
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ kasa, saṁ hyaṁ hamurvvā bhūvana, pinaka bapa, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁṅ hulun. -->
.
6250<p n="1" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.1">
. pūrṇamaniṅ kasa, saṅ hyaṅ amūrva bhuvana, pinakabapa,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">asih</lem><rdg wit="#P">asi</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P">ri</lem><rdg wit="#U">riṅ</rdg></app>
. pinakeṅ huluṅ</p>
6255
.
.
.
.<!-- M pūṛnama niṁ karo, saṁ hyaṁ madhu suddhanā pinaka babu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun|| -->
6260<!-- N puṛṅnamaniṅ karo, saṁ hyaṁ maḍu śudḍaṇā, pinaka babu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- P pūrnṇamaniṁ karo saṁ hyaṁ madhu sudhana, pinaka babu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṁ hulun, listuhayu paripūṛṇna dr̥man kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa prajñan vicakṣaṇa, suka sugiḥ. -->
.<!-- U pūrṇnamaniṁ karo, saṁ hyaṁ madhu suddanā, pinakā bābu, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁṅ hulun-->
.
.<p n="2" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.2">
6265 pūrṇamaniṅ karo, saṅ hyaṅ madhu sudhana, pinakababu, asih
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P">ri</lem><rdg wit="#U">riṅ</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pinakeṅ hulun</lem>
. <rdg wit="#P">asih ri pinakeṅ hulun, listuhayu paripūrṇa dr̥̥man keḍәp puruṣa viśeṣa prajñan vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih</rdg></app>.</p>
.
6270
.
.
.
.
6275<!-- M pūṛṇnamā niṁ katigā, saṁ hyaṁ madu kusumā, pinakiṅ hulun, listvayu paripūṛṇna, dr̥mman kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñā n vicakṣaṇā, suka sugiḥ-->
.
.<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ katigā, saṁ hyaṁ maḍu kusuma, pinakavakiṅ hulun listvayu paripuṛṇna, dr̥mman keḍǝp puruṣā viśeṣa, prajñān vicakṣaṇā, suka sugiḥ-->
.
.<!-- P [ommited] -->
6280
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ ka tiga, saṁ hyaṁ madhu kusuma, pinakāvak iṅ hulun, listvā paripūrṇna, dr̥man kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa, pragan vicākṣaṇa, suka sugiḥ.-->
.
.
.<p n="3" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.3">
6285 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pūrṇamaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>
. katiga, saṅ hyaṅ madhu kusuma,
. <app><lem wit="#N #U">pinakāvakiṅ</lem><rdg wit="#M">pinakiṅ hulun</rdg></app>
. hulun
. <app><lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">listvayu</rdg><rdg wit="#U">listvā</rdg></app>
6290 paripūrṇa, drәman keḍәp puruṣa viśeṣa,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">prajñan</lem><rdg wit="#U">pragan</rdg></app>
. vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih.</p>
.
.
6295
.
.
.<!-- M pūṛnnama niṁ ṅkapat, saṁ hyaṁ hasmara, pinaka laki niṁ hulun, hapkik prajurit vicakṣanā, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñan ṣuka sugiḥ jayeṁ śatru, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṅ kapat, saṁ hyaṅ āsmara pinaka lakiniṁ hulun, hapkik prajurit vicakṣaṇā, puruṣā viśeṣa, prajñān suka sugiḥ jayeṁ śatru, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun -->
6300<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapat, saṁ hyaṁ smara pinaka lakiniṅ hulun, hapәkik śakti prajurit vicakṣaṇa, prajñan suka sugiḥ, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṁ hulun-->
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ kapāt, saṁ hyaṁ hasmara pinakā lakiniṁṅ hulun, hapkik prajurit vicaksaṇā, puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan suka sugiḥ jayeṁ śatru, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun.-->
.
.<p n="4" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.4">
.pūrṇamaniṅ kapat, saṅ hyaṅ asmara pinakalakiniṅ hulun,
6305 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">apәkik</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">apәkik śakti</rdg></app>
. prajurit vicakṣaṇa,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">puruṣā viśeṣa</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>, prajñan sukha sugih
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">jayeṅ śatru</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. asih pinakeṅ hulun.</p>
6310
.
.
.
.<!-- M pūṛṇnama niṁ kalimā, saṁ hyaṁ manobavā, pinaka hanak iṅhulun, panәṅgek lanaṁ, hapkik prajurit, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun, -->
6315<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ kalimā, saṁ hyaṁ manobhava, pinakā hanakiṅ hulun , panǝṅgǝk lanaṁ, hapkik prajurit hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamāniṁ kalimā saṁ hyaṁ manobhava pinakā hanak iṅhulun, panәṅkәk lanaṁ, hapәkik prajurit, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ kalimā, saṁ hyaṁ manobhāva, pinaka hanak iṁṅ hulun, panәṅgәk lanaṁ, hapkik prajurit, hasiḥ pinakeṁṅ hulun.-->
.
.
6320<p n="5" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.5">
.pūrṇamaniṅ kalima, saṅ hyaṅ manobhava, pinakaanakiṅ hulun, panǝṅgǝk lanaṅ, apәkik prajurit, asih
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pinakeṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">asih pinakeṅ</rdg></app>
. hulun.</p>
.
6325
.
.
.
.<!-- M pūṛṇnamaniṅ kanәm, saṁ hyaṁ hantanu pinaka sanak iṅ hulun lanaṁ, paṅgulu, suka sugiḥ hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun-->
6330<!-- N puṛṇnamāniṅ kanǝm , saṁ hyaṅ hantanū, pinaka sanakiṅ hulun lanaṁ, paṅgulu, suka sugiḥ, hasih pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kәnәm, saṁ atanu pinaka sānak iṅhulun lanaṁ paṅggulu, suka sugiḥ, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ kānәm, saṁ hyaṁ Atanu, pinaka sānak iṅ hulun lanāṁ, paṅgulu, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun.
.
. -->
6335
.<p n="6" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.6">
.
. purṇnamāniṅ kanǝm,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">saṅ hyaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">saṅ</rdg></app>
6340 <app><lem wit="#P #U">atanu</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">antanu</rdg></app>,
. pinakasanakiṅ hulun lanaṅ, paṅgulu,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P">sukha sugih</lem><rdg wit="#U"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">asih</lem><rdg wit="#P">asih riṅ</rdg><rdg wit="#U">asih ri</rdg></app>
. pinakeṅ hulun.</p>
6345
.
.
.
.
6350
.
.<!-- M pūṛṇnamā niṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ kāma jaya pinaka sanak iṅhulun lanaṁ panṅaḥ, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- N puṛṇmaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṅ kama jaya, pinakā sanakiṅ hulun lanaṁ panṅaḥ, hasiḥ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ kamajaya pinaka sanakiṁ hulun lanaṁ, panәṅaḥ, hasiḥ ri pinakeṁ hulun-->
6355<!-- U pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu, saṁ hyaṁ kamajaya pinaka sanakiṁ hulun lanaṁ, panәṅaḥ, hasiḥ ri pinakeṁ hulun.-->
.
.<p n="7" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.7">
. purṇamaniṅ kapitu, saṅ hyaṅ kāma jaya, pinakasanakiṅ hulun lanaṅ panәṅah,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">asih</lem><rdg wit="#P #U" cause="additive">asih ri</rdg></app>
6360 pinakeṅ hulun.</p>
.
.
.
.
6365<!-- M pūṛṇnamāni kavolu, saṁ hyaṁ kama ratiḥ, pinakā sanak iṅhulun lanaṁ vuruju, suka sugiḥ hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ kavolu, saṁ hyaṅ kamā ratiḥ pinaka sanakiṅ hulun lanaṁ vuruju, suka sugiḥ hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kavulu, saṁ hyaṁ kama ratiḥ pinaka sanak iṅhulun lanaṁ wuruju, suka sugiḥ, hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun-->
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ kavolu, saṁ hyaṁ kāma ratiḥ, pinakā sānak iṅ hulun lanaṁ varuju, sukā sugiḥ hasiḥ ri pinakeṁṅ hulun.-->
.
6370<p n="8" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.8">
. pūrṇamaniṅ kavolu, saṅ hyaṅ kāma ratih pinakasanakiṅ hulun lanaṅ vuruju, sukha sugih hasih
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">ri</lem><rdg wit="#P">riṅ</rdg></app>
. pinakeṅ hulun.</p>
.
6375
.
.
.
.
6380
.<!-- M pūṛṇnama niṁ kasaṅha, saṁ hyaṁ kumara, pinakākṣaṇa, dukiṅ hulun āpapaṅanten pinaslaṁ-->
.<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ kasaṅha, saṁ hyaṁ kumarā, pinakā kṣanā , dukiṅ hulun hāpapaṅanten pinaslaṁ-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kasaṅā, saṁ hyaṁ kumara pinaka sanakiṅ hulun, dukiṁ hulun hapaṅanten pinasәlaṁ||0|| -->
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ kasaṅa, saṁ hyaṁ kumāra, pinaka sānak, dukiṅ hulun hapapaṅanten ināslaṁ. -->
6385
.
.<p n="9" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.9">
. pūrṇamaniṅ kasaṅa, saṅ hyaṅ kumara,
. <app><lem wit="#P">pinakakṣana</lem><rdg wit="#M #N">pinakakṣana</rdg><rdg wit="#U">pinakasanak</rdg></app>,
6390 dukiṅ hulun
. <app><lem wit="#P">apaṅanten</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">apapaṅanten</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pinasәlaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">inasәlaṅ</rdg></app>.</p>
.
.
6395
.
.
.
.<!-- M pūṛṇnama niṁ kaśapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ hamadapā, samanā dukiṅ hulun abobot-->
6400<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ kaśapuluh, saṁ hyaṅ hamaḍapā, samanā dukiṅ hulun ābobot-->
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ kasapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ hamadhapa samaṇa dukiṁ hulun habobot-->
.<!-- U pūrṇnamā niṁ kasapuluḥ, saṁ hyaṁ hamādapa, samana dukiṅ hulun abobot. -->
.
.<p n="10" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.10">
6405 pūrṇamaniṅ kasapuluh, saṅ hyaṅ amadhapa, samana dukiṅ hulun ābobot.</p>
.
.
.
.
6410
.
.
.<!-- M pūṛṇnama nim jyeṣṭa, saṁ hyaṁ kumara, pinakā hanak lanaṁ pambayun, hapkik prajurit, hasih iṁ pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan vicakṣaṇā, jayeṁ śatru, hahidhәp pinakeṅ hulun-->
.
6415<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṅ jyeṣṭā, saṁ hyaṁ kumara, pinakāhanak lanaṅ pambayun , hapkik prajurit, hasihiṁ pinakeṅ hulun , puruṣā viśeṣā, prajñān vicakṣaṇā, jayeṁ śatru, hahiḍǝpinakeṅ hulun -->
.
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ jyeṣṭa saṁ hyaṁ kumarā pinaka hanakānaṁ pambayun, hapәkik prajurit, hasiḥ ri pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣa viśeṣa prajñan, vicakṣaṇa jayeṁ śatru, hahidhәp pinakeṅ hulun-->
.
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ jyeṣṭā, saṁ hyaṁ kumāra, pinaka sānak lanāṁ pambayun, hapkik prajurit,hasiḥ riṁ pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñān vicaksaṇa, jayeṁ śatru, Aidhәp pinakeṁṅ hulun. -->
6420
.<p n="11" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.11">
. pūrṇamaniṅ jyeṣṭā, saṅ hyaṅ kumara,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">pinakaanak</lem><rdg wit="#P">pinakasanak</rdg></app>
. lanaṅ pambayun, hapkik prajurit,
6425 <app><lem wit="#M #N">hasihiṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">asih ri</rdg><rdg wit="#U">asih riṅ</rdg></app>
. pinakeṅ hulun, puruṣā viśeṣā, prajñan vicakṣaṇā, jayeṅ śatru, ahiḍǝp pinakeṅ hulun.</p>
.
.
.
6430
.
.<!-- M pūṛṇnama niṁ hāsaddhā, saṁ hyaṁ komari, pinakā hanak vadon paṅgulu, listvayu paripūṛṇna, dr̥man kedәp, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñan vicakṣaṇa hahidәp pinakeṅ hulun-->
.
.<!-- N puṛṇnamaniṁ hasadḍā, saṁ hyaṅ komari, pinakā hanak vadon paṅguṅgulu, listvasyu paripuṛṇnā, ḍr̥man keḍǝp, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñān vicakṣaṇā, hahiḍǝpinakeṅ hulun-->
6435
.<!-- P pūṛṇnamaniṁ hasaddha, saṁ hyaṁ komari pinakā hanak vadon paṅggulu, listuhayu, paripūṛṇna dr̥man kedhәp , puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan vicakṣaṇa hahidhәp pinakeṅ hulun-->
.
.<!-- U pūrṇnama niṁ Asadda, saṁ hyaṁ komari, pinakā hanak vadon paṅgulu, listvāyu, paripūrṇnādr̥man kedhәp puruṣa viśeṣa, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, Aidhәpinākeṅ hulun.-->
.
6440
.
.<p n="12" xml:id="tattvabrata_70.12">
. pūrṇamaniṅ aṣādha, saṅ hyaṅ komari, pinakaanak vadon
. <app><lem wit="#M #P #U">paṅgulu</lem><rdg wit="#N">paṅgugulu</rdg></app>,
6445 <app><lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">listvayu</rdg><rdg wit="#P">listuhayu</rdg></app>
. paripūrṇa, drәman keḍәp, puruṣa viśeṣā, prajñan vicakṣaṇā, ahiḍәp pinakeṅ hulun.
.</p>
.
.
6450<!-- M phalaniṁ hulun āṅajī tutug, haṅavruhakәn hanutugā bapa, hababu, tutugga malakya rābi, hanak ānak,
.
. tutug asanak, tugu ākaki hanini,
. tutug āputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tәmbe,
. habagus kalavān hayu, paripūṛṇna,
6455 dr̥mman kedhәp, suka sugiḥ śri sadāna,
. mas manik, dodot l̥lmәs,
. hakveḥ daśaḥ vnaṁ vnaṁ hasuku pat,
. hasuku ro, sugiḥ tanyakna hiren,
. siddha sāprayojñanā,
6460 siddha salāmpaḥ salaku,
. l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ riṁ tәmbe pañjanman,
. l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ maṅke,
. bhaghavan pañarikan hanulisakәn,
. saṁ hyaṁ triyo daśa sakśi hanakṣeni,
6465 bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabayan hañәnәṅī -->
.
.<!-- N phalaniṅ hulun āṅajī tutug, haṅavruhākǝn hanutuga bapa, hababu, tutugā malakya rabi, hanak ānak
. tutug āsanak, tutugākaki hanini,
. tutugāputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tǝmbe,
6470 habagus kalavan āyu, paripuṛṅnā,
. dr̥man keḍǝp, suka sugiḥ, śrī sadanā,
. mās maṇik, dodot l̥mǝs,
. akveḥ daśiḥ, vnaṁ vnaṁ hasuku pat,
. hasuku ro, sugiḥ tanyakna hiren,
6475 sidḍa saprayojñaṇā,
. sidḍa salampaḥ salaku,
. lǝviḥ kapaṅgiḥ riṁ tǝmbe pañjanman,
. l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ maṅke,
. bhagavan pañarikan hanulisākǝn,
6480 saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sākṣi hanakṣeni,
. bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabayan hañjǝnǝṅi -->
.
.<!-- P phalaniṁ haṅaji tutug haṅavruhakәn hanutuga bapā, hababu tutuga malakyā rabi, mahanakānak,
. tutug asānak, tutug akaki hanini,
6485 tutug aputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tәmnbe habagus kalavan hayu, paripūṛṇna,
. dr̥man sahidhәp , suka sugiḥ, śri sadhana,
. mas maṇik dodot l̥l̥mes,
. kveḥ dasiḥ, vәnaṁ vәnaṁ hasuku pat,
. hasuku ro, sugihanya kәnahiren,
6490 siddha saprayojñāna,
. siddha salampah salaku,
. l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ maṅke,
. l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ kaṁ maṅko,
. tәmbe pañjanman
6495 bhagavān pañarikan hanulisakәn,
. saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sākṣi, hinakṣeni
. bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabhayan hañjәnәṅi-->
.
.<!-- U phala niṅ hulun aṅaji tutug, haṅavruhakәn hanutuga malakyārabi, hanak anak,
6500 tutug asānak, tutug akaki hanini,
. tutug aputu habuyut, tumus riṁ tәmbe, habagus kalavan hayu, paripūrṇna,
. dr̥man kedhәp, suka sugiḥ śri sādhanā,
. mās maṇik, dodot hul̥mәs
. kveh dasi, vnaṁ vnaṁ hasuku pat,
6505 hasuku ro, sugiḥ tan kna hiren,
. sidda saprayojana,
. sidda salampaḥ laku,
. l̥viḥ kapaṅgiḥ riṁ tәmbe pañjanman,
. l̥vih kapaṅgiḥ maṅke,
6510 bhagavān pañarikan nulisakәn,
. saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sakṣi anakṣeni,
. bhaṭāra hyaṁ kabayan hañjәnәṅi-->
.
.
6515
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_13.0">
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">phalaniṅ hulun</lem><rdg wit="#P">phalaniṅ</rdg></app>
. aṅaji tutug, aṅavruhākǝn
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #P">anutuga bapa, ababu, tutuga</lem><rdg wit="#U"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>
6520 malaky arabi,
. <app><lem wit="#P">mahanak anak</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #U">anak-anak</rdg></app>
. tutug asanak, tutug akaki anini, tutug aputu habuyut, tumus riṅ tǝmbe, abagus kalavan ayu, paripūrṇa, drәman
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">keḍәp</lem><rdg wit="#P">sahiḍәp</rdg></app>,
. sukha sugih, śrī sadana, mās maṇik, dodot
6525 <app><lem wit="#M #N">lәmǝs</lem><rdg wit="#P">lәlәmәs</rdg><rdg wit="#U">ulәmәs</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">akveh</lem><rdg wit="#P #U">kveh</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">dasih</lem><rdg wit="#M">daśah</rdg><rdg wit="#U">dasi</rdg></app>,
. vәnaṅ vәnaṅ asuku pat, hasuku ro,
. <app><lem wit="#M #N">sugih tanyakәna hiren</lem><rdg wit="#P">sugihanya kәna hiren</rdg><rdg>sugih tan kәna hiren</rdg></app>,
6530 siddha
. <app><lem wit="#U">saprayojaṇa</lem><rdg wit="#M #N #P">saprayojñana</rdg></app>,
. siddha salampah salaku, lǝvih kapaṅgih
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">riṅ tǝmbe pañjanman</lem><rdg wit="#P">lә̥viḥ kapaṅgih maṅke</rdg></app>,
. lәvih
6535 <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">kapaṅgih maṅke</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="transposition">kaṅ maṅko,
. tәmbe pañjanman</rdg></app>,
. bhagavan pañarikan hanulisākǝn, saṅ hyaṅ triyodaśa sākṣi
. <app><lem wit="#M #N #U">anakṣeni</lem><rdg wit="#P">inakṣeni</rdg></app>,
. bhaṭāra hyaṅ kabayan hañjǝnǝṅi.
6540<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> nihan hajī tutug ... kabayan hañjǝnǝṅi
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.114 <ptr target="#M"/>
6545 in 3.70 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.70 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.142 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.62 </note>
.</app>
6550</p>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- M nyan krama niṁ habratā riṁ śaśiḥ, ka, 4, riṁ pradipadā śukla, caru śuci riṁ saṅgar·, sadan danan sovaṁ, riṁ sor pupulā, skaṛ sataman, hnahakna ri har̥piṁ saṅ amūja, vus niṅ aṅabakti, tiniṛtthan, thaṛ haṅupavaśa, sadinā saratri, Ikaṁ pupulā mvaṁ skaṛ sataman, thәṛ vinaveṁ patuṛvan pinajaṁ pajaṅan, mne riṅ dhavuḥ ro, tka niṁ dhavuḥ, 7, haṅar̥pakna labahan sga pitā, hivak hiṭik ginoreṁ, saha sasahuṛ·,-->
6555
.<!-- N nihan kramaniṁ habratā riṁ śaśiḥ, ka, 4, riṁ praṭipadā śukla, caru śuci riṁ saṅgar·, sadaṇḍanan sovaṁ, riṁ sor pupulāskar sataman, hnahakna riṅ har̥piṁ saṅ amujā, vusniṅ ābhakti, tinirtthan, thǝṛ haṅupavaśā, sadinā saratri, Ikaṁ pupulā mvaṁ skaṛ sataman, thǝṛ vvināveṁ paturvan pinajaṁ pajaṅan, mne riṁ ḍavuḥ, 2, tkaniṁ ḍavuḥ, 7, haṅar̥pakna labahan sgā pitā, Ivak hitik ginoreṁ sahā sasahuṛ·, yan tan ānaniṁ Iṭik, hantigā kunaṁ, gar̥m , hantajinya, catūṛ daśa dinā, ta n dadi hanapak rigǝd, hasiḍǝmpati, ṅa ||0||
.mne ri puṛṇnamaniṁ kapat, yan āhyun āmūjā smarā, hinyasan tikaṁ yaśa riṁ pamarantyan pinajaṁ pajaṅān , huṅgvaniṅ ābratā, yan vala pitambharā, yan vr̥dḍa śvetāmbharā, hamar̥m pva saha parāgi, ryuvusniṁ haśuci hadyus , riṁ saṅgar·, ca, rvaṁ daṅḍanan deñ jaṅkǝp sahā catuṛ·, limas āguṁ, hiseni sgā kuniṁ, hivak hiṭik ginoreṁ, vinaṅgun hurip, gegembon , ṅa, hantigā pinlut, ka mpuhi cicirupan , tañcǝbi skār tlǝṁ, tumpāṅana riṁ limas āguṁ, tetebhogan hiseni sgā kuniṁ, masasahur·, mevak hiṭik ginoreṁ, vinaṅun hurip, lalamaka daluvaṁ, tulisi śvara vyañjana, riṁ hibu dṅǝn , caru mada ṇḍanan sovaṁ deñ jaṅkǝp, caru riṁ sumuṛ·, tumpə̄ṁ, 1, lalampadan , sasamuhan taḍaḥ pavitra, caru riṁ sor kadi hisiniṁ pasiliḥ, tan kari pupulā, skār sstaman , tlasniṁ caru trapakna sir̥miṅa skār, lumkas ḍaṁ gurv amūjā sūṛ yya śevana, kadi ṅrahina, taṅ abhakti sūṛyya, candrā, saṅgar·, Ibu, ḍṅǝn , kabasə̄ṁ sumur·, tiṅkahiṁ haṅabhakti, dukiṁ sore, tṅaḥ vṅi, meḥ rahinā, vusnīṅ aṅabakti, kinonta dyus āsucya taṅ abratā, thǝṛ hiṅaskaran si naṇḍiṅan pras , tiniṛtthañ jinaya jaya, tlas ||
.
.halabuhana bratā, padamə̄l , sgā livәt, tiṅkahiṅ āṅlivәt, ḍaṅḍaṅ tulisana padmā, vusniṅ ānajeni, syoknīṅ antiga tambhar·, tutupi, yan vus matәṅ hnahanā muṅgviṅ ta pi, jinaya jaya, muvaḥ jaṅan raratusan, sabhageyan moliḥ, 108, vārṇna, paruko tulis padmā, Ikaṁ nasi linivǝt tinumpaṅan gaṅan, muvaḥ tumpǝṁ, hisenāna jǝbug ārūm , kaṁ vutuḥ, sadǝk, duk āṅaroni tini tisan maḍu, phān , Ivaknya cārmmaniṁ kbo yos baraṇā, hiṅǝmbanā don , mvaṁ jǝbug ārūm , sami rincaḥ, tlas, nhǝṛ tan kneṁ turu, riṁ rahinanya, samaṅkana jugā sakottamanya, satutugiṁ reḥ|| kunaṁ phalanya, Ilaṁ hikaṁ saṛvva vyadḍi, sāṛvva duṣṭā, saṛvva bhāya, saṛvva bhoga kapaṅguḥ, kakarṣaṇa rikeṁ rāt, lituhayu paripuṛṇna, svāṛgga kapaṅgguḥ, mvaṁ kaniśreyaśan , dulurāna Ulaḥ rahayu, tan paṅambaḥ laraṅān , matvaṁ riṁ vvaṅā tuhā, priyǝmbadā, tan vāk paruṣya, haglə̄m ataṅi, mabratāṅkǝn vei hayu, mvaṁ katpǝtaniṁ kasamyajñanan -->
6560
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.71">
.<ab>nihan kramaniṅ abrata riṅ śaśih, ka, 4, riṅ pratipāda śukla, caru śuci riṅ saṅgar, saḍaṇḍanan sovaṅ, riṅ sor pupulāsәkar sataman, әnahakәna riṅ arәpiṅ saṅ amūjā, vusniṅ
6565 <app><lem wit="#N">abhakti</lem><rdg wit="#M">aṅabhakti</rdg></app>,
. tinīrthan, tәhәr aṅupāvasa, sadina sarātri, ikaṅ pupula mvaṅ sәkar sataman, tәhәr vinaveṅ paturvan pinajaṅ pajaṅan, mәne riṅ ḍavuh,
. <app><lem wit="#N">2</lem><rdg wit="#M" cause="lexical">ro</rdg></app>,
. təkaniṅ ḍavuh, 7, aṅarәpakәna labahan sәga pita, ivak itik ginoreṅ saha sasahur, yan tan hananiṅ itik, hantiga kunaṅ, garәm, antajinya, caturdaśa dina, tan dadi anapak rigǝd, asidampati, ṅa.
.</ab>
6570<ab>
.mәne ri pūrṇamaniṅ kapat, yan ahyun amūjā smara, hinyasan tikaṅ yaśa riṅ pamarantyan pinajaṅ pajaṅān, uṅgvaniṅ abrata, yan vala pitambhara, yan vr̥ddha śvetāmbhara, amarәm pva saha paragi, ry uvusniṅ aśuci adyus, riṅ saṅgar, ca, rvaṅ daṅdhanan den jaṅkǝp saha catur, limas aguṅ, iseni sәga kuniṅ, ivak itik ginoreṅ, vinaṅgun hurip, gegembon, ṅa, hantiga pinәlut, kampuhi cicirupan, tancǝbi sәkar tәlǝṅ, tumpaṅana riṅ limas aguṅ, tetebhogan iseni sәga kuniṅ, masasahur, mevak itik ginoreṅ, vinaṅun hurip, lalamaka daluvaṅ, tulisi svara vyañjana, riṅ ibu dәṅǝn, caru madandanan sovaṅ den jaṅkǝp, caru riṅ sumur, tumpәṅ, 1, lalampadan, sasamuhan taḍah pavitra, caru riṅ sor kadi isiniṅ pasilih, tan kari pupula, sәkar sataman,
.tәlasniṅ caru tәrapakәna sirәmiṅ asәkar, lumәkas dhaṅ gurv amūjā sūrya śevana, kadi ṅrahina, taṅ abhakti sūrya, candra, saṅgar, ibu, dәṅǝn, kabasəṅ sumur, tiṅkahiṅ aṅabhakti, dukiṅ sore, tәṅah vәṅi, meh rahina, vusniṅ aṅabakti, kinonta dyus aśucya taṅ abrata, tәhәr iṅaskāran sinaṇḍiṅan pәras, tinīrthan jinaya jaya, tәlas.
.</ab>
.<ab>
6575alabuhana brata, padamәl, sәga livәt, tiṅkahiṅ aṅlivәt, ḍaṅḍaṅ tulisana padma, vusniṅ anajeni, syokniṅ antiga tambar, tutupi, yan vus matәṅ әnahana muṅgviṅ tapi, jinaya jaya, muvah jaṅan raratusan,
.
.<app><lem type="norm">sabhāgyan</lem><rdg wit="#N">sabhageyan</rdg></app>
. molih, 108, vārṇa, paruko tulis padma, ikaṅ nasi linivǝt tinumpaṅan gaṅan, muvah tumpǝṅ, isenana jǝbug arum, kaṅ vutuh, sadǝk, duk aṅaroni tinitisan madhu, pәhan, ivaknya carmaniṅ kәbo yos baraṇa, iṅǝmbana don, mvaṅ jǝbug arum, sami rinәcah, tәlas, nәhǝr tan kәneṅ turu, riṅ rahinanya, samaṅkana juga sakottamanya, satutugiṅ reh.
.</ab>
6580<ab>
.kunaṅ phalanya, ilaṅ ikaṅ sarvavyādhi, sarvaduṣṭa, sarvabhaya, sarvabhoga kapaṅguh, kākarṣaṇa rikeṅ rāt, lituhayu paripūrṇa, svarga kapaṅgguh, mvaṅ
. <app><lem type="norm">kaniśrayasan</lem><rdg wit="#N"></rdg></app>, dulurana ulah rahayu, tan paṅambah laraṅan, matvaṅ riṅ vvaṅ atuha,
. <app><lem type="norm">priyambada</lem><rdg wit="#N">priyәmbhada</rdg></app>,
. tan vāk paruṣya, agәlәm ataṅi, mabrata aṅkǝn ve hayu, mvaṅ katәpǝtaniṅ kasamyajñānan.
6585<app>
.<lem wit="#M #N"></lem>
.<note> M is not complete: it is started by: nyan krama niṁ habratā...saha sasahuṛ;
.and M: nihan kramaniṁ habratā ... katpǝtaniṁ kasamyajñanan.
.<ptr target="#M"/>
6590 in 3.71 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.71 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
6595
.
.
.
.
6600
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.72" xml:id="tattvabrata_72">
.<ab>
. madhu
. <app><lem type="emn">parkas</lem><rdg wit="#N">parkka</rdg></app>
6605 tu
. <app><lem type="emn">yad</lem><rdg wit="#N">yat</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">bhakṣyaṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">bhakṣaṃ</rdg></app>,
. sarvadeva samanvitah,
. na sthama canarajñatva,
6610 sarva deva samānvitaṃ.
. </ab>
.
.<ab>Ikaṅ devata hana sanidva, ri saṅ hyaṅ madhu parka, sira juga hiḍәpan raṣananta,
. <foreign>kadilihñca mahādeva</foreign>,
6615 arthanya, ikaṅ madhu viṣṇu devatanya, air tәbu brahmā devatanya, pәhan iśvara devatanya, punti mahādeva devatanya.</ab>
.
.<ab>
. <app><lem type="emn">lavaṇe</lem><rdg wit="#N">lavaṇo</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">rudra</lem><rdg wit="#N">rudram</rdg></app>
6620 ity uktaṃ,
. <app><lem type="emn">bhr̥ṅgure</lem><rdg wit="#N">bhrәmgure</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">śambhur</lem><rdg wit="#N">sambhu</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">mucyate</lem><rdg wit="#N">ucyate</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem type="emn">pattrāvāse</lem><rdg wit="#N">patraśvaṣā</rdg></app>
6625 śivo
. <app><lem type="emn">jñeya</lem><rdg wit="#N">jñeyah</rdg></app>,
. ity
. <app><lem type="emn">etad</lem><rdg wit="#N">etat</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">devataḥ</lem><rdg wit="#N">devatā</rdg></app>
6630 sthitaḥ.
.</ab>
.
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.1">hyaṅniṅ uyah rudra, hyaṅniṅ bhrәm guru, hyaṅniṅ layaṅ sambhu, hyaṅniṅ lva śiva, nihan taṅ devata sanidya, hana riṅ madhu parka.</p>
.<ab>
6635 <app><lem type="emn">pituh</lem><rdg wit="#N">vituh</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">pāpaṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">pāpa</rdg></app>
. dahet sarpih,
. <app><lem type="emn">mātuh</lem><rdg wit="#N">vituh</rdg></app> pāpañ ca
. <app><lem type="emn">madhunam</lem><rdg wit="#N">madhūkaṃ</rdg></app>,
6640 <app><lem type="emn">svātipāpaṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">svātipāpa</rdg></app>
. dahet kṣiraṃ,
. <app><lem type="emn">gotrapāpaṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">gatraṃpāpaṃ</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">kadalī ca</lem><rdg wit="#N">kadalisaṃ</rdg></app>.
.</ab>
6645
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.2">arthanya, ilaṅ deniṅ air tәbu pāpaniṅ bapa, kavisarja denya, ilaṅ deniṅ madhu parka, pāpaniṅ babu, kavisarja denya, ilaṅ deniṅ pәhan, pāpaniṅ śarīranta, ilaṅ deniṅ punti, pāpaniṅ vvaṅ sanakta kaḍaṅ varga, kavisarja denya, mataṅnyan kayatnakәna deniṅ mantra madhu parka, ma, Om̐ madhu
. <app><lem type="emn">parkam</lem><rdg wit="#N">pakaṃ</rdg></app>
. idaṃ
. <app><lem wit="#N">puṇyaṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">punyaṅ</rdg></app>,
6650 pavitraṃ pāpa naśanaṃ,
. <app><lem type="emn">Īśvarenāsti</lem><rdg wit="#N">Iśvaranagi</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">saṃsr̥taṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">saṅśrәṣṭah</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem type="emn">punāti</lem><rdg wit="#G">punanti</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="emn">sakalaṃ</lem><rdg wit="#N">sakalañ</rdg></app>
6655 jagat, mam̐, piṅ, 3, mamaṅan, piṅ, 3, maśucya.</p>
.
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.3">saha pūjā parikrama karәhǝn, tәhәr aṅupavāsa, vusniṅ pinūjā, aṅabhakti kadi aṅabhaktiniṅ abrat.</p>
.
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.4">ṅhadva kadva kadevye namah, pūr, Om̐ kusuma yuddha mamaka devye namah, da, Om̐ kadārpa daśa padha devye namah svāhā, pa, Om̐ manobhava strī mandha devye namah, ba, Om̐ makara dvajamandoratha devye namah svāhā, u, Om̐ mantra tatu bhaṅga devye namah, ai.</p>
6660
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.5">iti saṅ hyaṅ haṣṭa Devî. Om̐ hyaṅ hyaṅniṅ hyaṅ smara devāya namah, Om̐ Indrāya namah, Om̐ Om̐ svaṣṭiya namah.</p>
.
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.6">pratyakṣatvamihaloka, manuṣa tvañca visuka devatvaṃ, sūkṣmatvaṃ sakalatvañca, atmatvañca śariratvaṅ.
.Eka rūpañca visuka sadanaṃ, candra vatsa tetemekaṃ, trei lokya viyosa śakti.
6665Iśvara vara devañca, brahmājayañja vijayaṃ, mahādeva varatvañca, viṣṇu vijayare vañca.
.Indra rājaca jayatvaṃ, sarvadevāya ratvañca, sarvadeva devî tatvaṃ, trelokya sevitantah.
.cittamani mahendraśca, sarvakumara rājatvaṅ, kumara rāja sajñaccā, iṣṭa kamacayaṅ jakaṃ.
.aṣṭatanvavi patiñca, ugra devaca sajñakaṃ, sarvapāpa haret siddhi, sarvarogha praharaṇaṅ. sarvaśatru vinaśanaṃ.</p>
.
6670<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.7">smarastavā.</p>
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.8"> nihan kramaniṅ aśeva latri, asūrya śevana kita rumuhun, kadi sadina, huvusniṅ asūrya śevana, mariṅ pamiyosan, aṅarәpakǝn pīta, yan tan hananiṅ pīta, ujuṅaniṅ pisaṅ gәlarәn, śucena rumuhun, yan hananiṅ liṅga mās, salaka kuniṅ, pūjanǝn pratiṣṭa ri ujuṅaniṅ pisaṅ, makādi riṅ pīta, pūjanǝn riṅ kana, gәlarana padmāsana saprakaranya, təkaniṅ deva, pratiṣṭa, utpǝtyakǝn bhaṭāra sakiṅ hr̥dhaya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Am̐ Um̐ namah, iḍǝp saṅ hyaṅ muṅgviṅ liṅga, pūjāni vīja candana, saha sәminiṅ maja, sәkar kunǝṅ, muvah sthityakәna bhaṭāra riṅ liṅga, yan hananiṅ liṅga mās, salaka, yen tan hana salaka, sariniṅ vaduri piṅhe, gavenǝn liṅgakara, mantra sthiti, Om̐ Am̐ Um̐ mam̐ namah, pūjāni rvaniṅ maja, mvaṅ sarvasәkar, candana, vīja, sabhāgyan pūjāniṅ dhūpa, dīpa, ganta, mvaṅ japa ganitri, saha prāṇāyama, saha sǝmbah, liṅanta Om̐ Om̐ liṅga liṅga dipatayei namah, haturana gandhakṣata, puṣpa, dhūpa dīpa, mvaṅ caru, raka vovohan, sәḍah voh, liṅanta aṅaturakǝn, Om̐ Om̐ śivani vedyañca rūm dadami, amr̥ta deva caruvedadami, sa ba ta a i, nama śivāya, a u ma, Om̐. pūjā, piṅ, 3, dukiṅ sore pūrvaka, tәṅah vәṅi, mehniṅ rahina, deniṅ amūjā, tan kantun mantra, Om̐ Om̐ liṅgāye namah, Om̐ sadāśivaṅliṅgāya namah. mehniṅ rahina, ulihakәna sira riṅ antahr̥dhaya, puṇdharika muvah, liṅanta, Om̐ atma liṅggāya namah, Om̐ Om̐ Am̐ mam̐ namah,</p>
.
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.9">yekiṅ mantra pralīna.
.Om̐ śivāya śiva liṅgāya, śiva sarvomaheśvarah, nama śivāya devāya, sadāśiva namostute. brahmā viṣṇviśvaro devah, sarvajñā parameśvara, utpati sthiti linañcah, liṅga deva namo namah. tuṅgal sthiti sarәpiṅ pralīna.</p>
6675
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.10">yen harәp śīva rātri cǝṇdhǝk, liṅanta,
.Om̐ Om̐ liṅgā liṅgādipataye namah, Om̐ Om̐ atma liṅgāya namah, sǝmbah duk sore,
.Om̐ Om̐ paramaśiva liṅgāya namah, sǝmbah tәṅah vәṅi,
.Om̐ Om̐ śūnya liṅgāya namah, sǝmbah meh rahina,
6680sәminiṅ maja pinūjākǝn, sthuti tuṅgal, Om̐ nama śivāya, namo rudrāya, nispada parvatāya, saha sǝmbah sәminiṅ maja kunaṅ.</p>
.
.<p xml:id="tattvabrata_72.11">lviriṅ
. <app><lem type="norm">brata hayva kәna</lem><rdg wit="#N">bratayvakәna</rdg></app>
. riṅ tamah, tamah harane turu, yatika kavaśakәna <app><lem type="emn">hayva</lem><rdg wit="#N">yva</rdg></app> lupa, i kālanta mabrata, hayva juga kita aturu ri rahina, hila hila, hilaṅ ulihta mabrata, asiṅ brata anisphala tan pantuka asiṅ sinadya, mataṅnyan kayatnakәna, hayva iman iman, ikaṅ tapa brata agәṅ phalanya, vāhya sukha katәmu donya, ikaṅ kayogiśvaran, kamokṣan phalanya, mataṅnyan hayva cumacadiṅ sira saṅ lumәkasakǝn brata tapa, hayva memeṅeniṅ vvaṅ abrata, hila hila liṅ saṅ hyaṅ.
6685</p>
.</div>
.
.<!-- G … jala pravira subirāt, sugiḥ tan pamaṅun gave, muvah akaravaṅan, habaṁ rūpanira,[41v] sar̥ṅit gәṅira, ya hiku sariniṁ galuṅan, pinakasamtoniṅ ulun, siṁ tan vruḥ sariniṁ galuṅan, pinakakavudhanan ūlun sa….gat, saravanā, satuṅkәbiṁ rat, siṁ haṅavruhi sāriniṁ ṅgāluṅan, ya pinakasa{na}k iṅulun, pinaka{ka}dhaṅiṅ hulun, sasaṅoniṅ hulun āṅavruhakan sāriniṁ ṅgāluṅan, salave lakṣa, salave kṭi, salave yuta, salave barā, salave hiṅәl, pinakapasasaṅoniṁ ṅhulun, katmu samaṅko katmu tambe, ḷviḥ maṅko ḷviḥ tәmbe, mtu salakṣā sadina. Om̐ I A Om̐, sa…-->
.
6690<!-- N nihan pabratan , haji sariniṅ galuṅān , krama bantǝn ri saṅgaṛ·, bantǝn śuci hadaṇḍanan , riṁ ibu ḍṅǝn , paḍa mabuṅkul , riṁ toya habuṅkul , mantra paṅatǝr ātǝṛ bakti maṅavaṅi, ma, Om̐
. jaya pravira subiṁ rāt, sugiḥ tan pamaṅun gave, muvaḥ hakaravaṅan , habaṁ rūpanira, sār̥ṅit gə̄ṅira, ya hiku sariniṁ galuṅan , pinakāsamtoniṅ hulun , siṁ tan vruḥ sariniṅ galuṅan , pinakā kavulaniṅ hulun , sabhūvana, satuṅkǝbiṁ rāt, siṁ haṅavruhi sariniṅ galuṅān , ya pinaka sanakiṅ hulun, pinakā samtoniṅ hulun , sasaṅoniṅ hulun , haṅavruhākǝn sarīniṅ galuṅan , salave lākṣa, salave kṭi, salave hiṅǝl, pinakā pasasaṅoniṅ hulun , katmu maṅko, katmu tǝmbe, lǝviḥ kātmu tǝmbe, mtu salākṣa sadinā, Om̐ sa ba ta A I, nama śiva ya, A U ma Om̐ -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.73">
6695<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_73"> <app><lem wit="#N">nihan pabratan, aji sāriniṅ galuṅan, krama bantǝn ri saṅgar, bantǝn śuci adaṇḍanan, riṅ ibu dәṅǝn, paḍa mabuṅkul, riṅ toya abuṅkul, mantra paṅatǝr atәhǝr bhakti maṅavaṅi, <abbr>ma</abbr>, Om̐ </lem><rdg wit="#G" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>
.
. <app><lem wit="#N">jaya</lem><rdg wit="#G">jala</rdg></app>
. pravīra
. <app><lem type="norm">subiṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">subi</rdg><rdg wit="#N">subiṅ</rdg></app>
6700 rāt, sugih tan pamaṅun gave, muvah hakaravaṅan, abāṅ rūpanira, sarәṅit gə̄ṅira, ya iku sāriniṅ galuṅan, pinakasamәtoniṅ hulun, siṅ tan vruh sāriniṅ galuṅan,
. <app><lem wit="#N">pinakakavulaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">pinakavudhanan</rdg></app>
. hulun,
. <app><lem wit="#N">sabhuvana</lem><rdg wit="#G">sa..gat, saravanā</rdg></app>,
. satuṅkǝbiṅ rāt, siṅ aṅavruhi sāriniṅ galuṅān, ya
6705 pinakasanakiṅ hulun,
. <app><lem wit="#N">pinakasamәtoniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">pinakaka[ka]dhaṅiṅ</rdg></app>
. hulun, sasaṅoniṅ hulun, aṅavruhakǝn sarīniṅ galuṅan, salave lakṣa, salave kṭi, salave
. <app><lem wit="#N">hiṅǝl</lem><rdg wit="#G">yuta</rdg></app>,
. pinakapasasaṅoniṅ hulun, katәmu
6710 <app><lem wit="#N">maṅko</lem><rdg wit="#G">samaṅko</rdg></app>,
. katәmu tǝmbe,
. <app><lem wit="#N">lǝvih katәmu tǝmbe</lem><rdg wit="#G">lәvih katәmu tәmbe</rdg></app>,
. mәtu salakṣa sadina, <app><lem wit="#N">Om̐ sa ba ta a i, nama śivāya, a u ma Om̐</lem><rdg wit="#G">Om̐ I A Om̐, sa</rdg></app>.
.<app>
6715<lem wit="#G #N"></lem>
.<note> nihan pabratan, haji ... A U ma Om̐
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.113 <ptr target="#G #N"/>
. in 3.72 </note>
6720</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
6725<!-- N nihan bratā hañarin galuṅān,
. krama, yan kalaniṅ galuṅān , habantǝn sarimpǝn , saviji sovaṁ,
. hnahakna ri har̥piṁ saṅgar·,
. kaṁ riṁ saṅgar·, kadi kramaniṁ bantǝn kaṁ lagi lagi,
. kaṁ riṅ ību,
6730 kaṁ ri tṅaḥ,
. vuhāna burat vaṅi, lṅa va ṅi, mvaṁ bras , 2, catu, harttha, 225, pinūjā saparikrama, taṅābhakti, vusiṅ haṅabhakti, hamaṅan sarimpǝn , ryuvusiṁ hamaṅan sarimpǝn , hamaṅan sakavaśa,
. pūjaniṁ hamaṅan sarimpǝn ,
. Om̐ paduka bhaṭāri sāriniṅ galuṅan, manuṣanira kinavruhakǝn sāriniṅ galuṅan, haṅisǝp sariniṁ rahina, haṅisǝp sariniṁ vṅi,
. haṅisǝp sariniṁ śrī sadanā,
6735 haṅisǝp saṛvva sarī,
. haṅisǝp sariniṅ rāt bhūvana kabeḥ,
. hulun vruḥ sariniṅ galuṅan ,
. handadi ya bhujaṅgga l̥viḥ, hakaḍaṅ āratū, suka sugiḥ śarīraniṅ hulun ,
. hanakāna keḍǝp,
6740 haputu habuyut, tumus tumǝrus , tkaniṁ hanak putu buyutiṅ hulun ,
. katkana sapinakṣā niṅhulun , saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sakṣi, Anakṣeniṅ hulun ,
. phalanya, siṅ kaṛyyānta hanmu hayu, kinasihan deniṁ bhūṭā dṅǝn, mvaṁ jnǝk sahisiniṅ pomahan -->
.
.<!-- P nihan brata ñarin galuṅan
6745 kramanya manaṅkәn galuṅan, habantәn jarimpәn
. har̥piṁ saṅgaṛ, sāmpun mar̥p muṅgahākna mariṁ saṅgaṛ,
. riṁ hibu,
. riṁ pagneyan,
. kādi bantәn sisiriḥ, maliḥ muṅgaḥriṁ saṅggaṛ, bras, 2, catu, hartha, 225, l̥ṅa burat vaṅi, yen vus humuja paṅabhakti,
6750 yen vus haṅabhakti hamaṅan haṅinuṁ· sakavasanya.
. nyan pūjanya:
. Ōm̐ paduka bhaṭāra sariniṁ galuṅan, manuṣanira kinavruhakәn sariniṁ galuṅan, haṅisәp sariniṁ rahina haṅisәp sariniṁ vәṅi,
. haṅisәp sariniṁ śri sdhana
. haṅisәp sariniṁ saṛvva sārī,
6755 haṅisәp sariniṁ saṛvva bhuvana, sakabeḥ riṁ hulun,
. vruḥ sariniṁ galuṅan
. handadi ya bhujaṅggā l̥viḥ, hakadaṁ ratu suka sugiḥ sariraniṅm hulun,
. hanak ānak ākedhәp
. haputu habuyut tumus tumәrus tәkaniṁ hanak putu buyuthiṅ hulun,
6760 saṁ hyaṁ triyodaśa sakṣi hanakṣeniṅ hulun.
. Phalanya siṁ kāṛyyanta hanәmu hayu, kinasihan bhūtā dәṅәn, mvaṁ jәnәk sahisiniṁ pomahan-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.74">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_74">
6765 nihan brata <app><lem wit="#N">añārin</lem><rdg wit="#P">ñarin</rdg></app>
. galuṅān,
. <app><lem wit="#P">kramanya</lem><rdg wit="#N">krama</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">yan kālaniṅ galuṅān</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">manaṅkәn galuṅan</rdg></app>,
. abantǝn
6770 <app><lem wit="#P">jarimpǝn</lem><rdg wit="#N">sarimpәn</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">saviji sovaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">әnahakәna ri harәpiṅ saṅgar</lem><rdg wit="#P">harәpiṅ saṅgar</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">kaṅ riṅ saṅgar kadi kramaniṅ bantǝn kaṅ lagi lagi,</lem><rdg wit="#P">harәpiṅ saṅgar, sāmpun marәp muṅgahakәna mariṅ saṅgar</rdg></app>,
. kaṅ riṅ ibu,
6775 <app><lem wit="#N">kaṅ ri tәṅah</lem><rdg wit="#P">riṅ pagәneyan</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">vuhana burat vaṅi, lәṅa vaṅi, mvaṅ bәras, 2, catu, artha, 225, pinūjā saparikrama, taṅ abhakti, vusiṅ aṅabhakti,</lem><rdg wit="#P">kadi bantәn sisirih, malih muṅgah riṅ saṅgar, bәras, 2, catu, artha, 225, lә̥ṅa burat vaṅi, yen vus umuja paṅabhakti</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N">amaṅan sarimpǝn, ryuvusiṅ amaṅan sarimpǝn, amaṅan sakavaśa</lem><rdg wit="#P">yen vus aṅabhakti amaṅan haṅinuṁ· sakavasanya. </rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">pūjāniṅ amaṅan sarimpǝn</lem><rdg wit="#P">nyan pūjānya</rdg></app>,
. Om̐ paduka bhaṭārī sāriniṅ galuṅan, mānuṣanira kinavruhakǝn sāriniṅ galuṅan, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ rahina, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ vәṅi, aṅisǝp sāriniṅ śrī sādhana, aṅisǝp
6780 <app><lem wit="#N">sarvasāri</lem><rdg wit="#P">sāriniṅ sarvasāri</rdg></app>,
. aṅisǝp sāriniṅ
. <app><lem wit="#N">rāt bhūvana kabeh</lem><rdg wit="#P">sarvabhuvana, sakabeh riṅ hulun</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">hulun vruh sāriniṅ galuṅan</lem><rdg wit="#P"> vruh sariniṅ galuṅan</rdg></app>, andadi ya bhujaṅgga lәvih, akaḍaṅ
. <app><lem wit="#N">aratu</lem><rdg wit="#P">ratu</rdg></app>,
6785 sukha sugih śarīraniṅ hulun,
. <app><lem wit="#P">anak anak akeḍәp</lem><rdg wit="#N">akanaka keḍәp,</rdg></app>
. aputu abuyut, tumus tumǝrus, təkaniṅ anak putu buyutiṅ hulun,
. <app><lem wit="#N">katəkana sapinakṣaniṅ hulun</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>, saṅ hyaṅ triyodaśa sakṣi, anakṣeniṅ hulun, phalanya, siṅ kāryanta anәmu hayu,
. <app><lem wit="#N">kinasihan deniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">kinasihan</rdg></app> bhūta dәṅǝn, mvaṅ jәnǝk sahisiniṅ pomahan.
6790<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> nihan bratā hañarin ... sahisiniṅ pomahan
. <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.73 <ptr target="#P"/>
6795 in 3.113 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
6800<!-- N hana bratāsusukan , ṅa, riṁ puṛṇnamaniṅ kapitu, piṁ, 7, sarahina, piṁ 7, savṅi, hamaṅan āṅinūm, haṅigə̄l, bhaṭāra kapitu maveḥ bratā, pha, suka sugiḥ,hanak amitra, diṛgghāyuṣā, keḍǝp kapituhu -->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā sussukan, ṅa, riṁ pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu, piṁ 7, sarahina piṁ, 7, savәṅi hamaṅan haṅinum, haṅigәl, bhaṭāra kapitu maveḥ bratā, phalanya suka sugiḥ, hanakāmitra, diṛgha yuṣa, kedhәp kapintuhu -->
.
.<!-- U hana brātā susukān, ṅa, riṁ pūrṇnāmaniṁ kapitu, piṁ pitu sarahina, pi pitu savṅi, hamaṅana haṅinum haṅigәl, bhaṭāra kapitu maveḥ brātā, pa, suka sugiḥ anak amitra, dirgghā yūṣā kedhәp kapintuhu -->
6805
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.75">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_75">hana brata asusukhan,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>, riṅ pūrṇamaniṅ kapitu, piṅ, 7, sarahina,
6810 <app><lem wit="#N #P">piṅ</lem><rdg wit="#U">pi</rdg></app>
. 7, savәṅi,
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">amaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#U">amaṅana</rdg></app>
. aṅinum, aṅigәl, bhaṭāra kapitu maveh brata,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
6815 sukha sugih, anak amitra, dīrgha yuśa, keḍәp
. <app><lem wit="#P #U">kapintuhu</lem><rdg wit="#N">kapituhu</rdg></app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratāsusukan ... keḍǝp kapituhu
6820<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.75 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.146 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.95 </note>
.</app>
6825</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
6830
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.76">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_76">hana brata dinulaṅ riṅ lek pituṅ lek
. <supplied reason="omitted">,</supplied>
. samayanya,
6835 <abbr>pha</abbr>, kinasihaniṅ rāt.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
6840
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.77">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_77">hana brata malaṅ lek deny amaṅan, deny aṅǝpǝl, pituṅ lek samayanya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, subhaga kinasihaniṅ <app><lem type="norm">strī</lem><rdg wit="#N">istrī</rdg></app>.</ab>
.</div>
6845
.
.
.
.<!-- G hana brata, mavucandrā, sabran soma yan masipat, ůniveḥ buddha hir̥ṁ, dite manis, ůniveḥ sari-sari, saṁ hyaṁ manik badhe devatanya, satahun tigaṁ ṅlek samayanya, pha, masiḥ saṁ hyaṁ candra ditya, tan lamūr katon ayu, pinicaya phalanya -->
6850
.<!-- N hana bratā mahucandrā, ṅa, sabran masocca yen masiphat, ṅūniveḥ buda Ir̥ṁ, mvaṁ dite manis, ṅūniveḥ sari sarikna, saṁ hyaṁ maṇik baḍe hyaṁnya, satahun tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, masiḥ saṁ hyaṁ candrāditya, tan lamūṛ kkatonā hayu, mvaṁ pinicaḍaṁ -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.78">
6855<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_78">hana brata mahucandra,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. sabran maśoca yen masipat, ṅuniveh buddha irәṅ, mvaṅ
. <app><lem type="norm">raditya</lem><rdg wit="#N">dite</rdg></app>
. manis, ṅuniveh sāri sārikәna, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik bade hyaṅnya, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya,
6860 <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. māsih saṅ hyaṅ candrāditya, tan lamur katon ahayu, mvaṅ pinicaḍaṅ.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā mahucandrā ... mvaṁ pinicaḍaṁ
6865<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.112 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.78 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
6870</div>
.
.
.
.
6875<!-- N hana bratā ṅlintaṁ, ṅa, tan pamaṅan , yan tan mtu lintaṅ pipitu sanak, lama tṅaḥ śaśiḥ, pha, sugiḥ dlāha, tuṛūpānta tan ākusut-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata ṅlintaṁ, ṅa, tan pamaṅana yan tan mәtu lintaṁ pipitu sanak, hatәṅaḥ śasiḥ samayanya, phalanya sugiḥ dlahā tuṛ rūpānta tan akusu -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.79">
6880<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_79">hana brata ṅlintaṅ,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. tan <app><lem wit="#N">pamaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#P">pamaṅana</rdg></app>,
. yan tan mәtu lintaṅ pipitu sanak,
. <app><lem wit="#N">lama tәṅah śaśih</lem><rdg wit="#P">atәṅah śasih samayanya</rdg></app>,
6885 <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. sugih dlāha, tur rūpānta tan akusut.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā ṅlintaṁ ... tan ākusut
6890<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.79 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.109 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
6895</div>
.
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratta, sore hamaṅan vus āpasaṁ sande jugā, bratā tan pasuluḥ, ṅa, ya pinaka rūpā, pinaka vuvusīṁ paḍa vvaṁ, pha, sīm sadyanta katkan -->
6900
.<!-- U hana brata sore hamaṅan vus apasaṁ damar sande juga, brata tan pasuluh, ṅa, ya pinaka rūpa, pinaka huvus iṁ pada vvaṁ. pha, si sādhyanta katkān -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.80">
6905<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_80">hana brata, sore amaṅan vus apasaṅ sande juga, brata tan pasuluh,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. ya pinakarūpa, pinakavuvusiṅ padha vvaṅ,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, siṅ sādhyanta katəkan.
.<app>
6910<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta, sore ... sadyanta katkan
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.80 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.73 </note>
6915</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
6920
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.81">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_81">hana brata tan pamaṅan ḍavuh tәlu, tan paṅinaṅ tan paṅinum
.vai, lamun huvusiṅ ḍavuh tiga, vәnaṅ aṅinaṅ amaṅan aṅinum, satahun divasanya,
6925<abbr>pha</abbr>, sugih bhuvana, tur apәkik kaṅ rūpa.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata tan ... apkikaṁ rūpā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
6930 in 3.81 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
6935
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.82">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_82">hana brata, amaṅan naṅkǝn ḍavuh tәlu, amaṅan, aṅinum, kavaśa aṅinaṅ,
6940 <abbr>pha</abbr>, sukha sugih, sәḍǝṅ anom, anulus riṅ niskāla.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, hamaṅan ... riṁ niskalā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
6945 in 3.82 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
6950
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, ṅayu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan tatkalaniṁ saṅeṅe kulon , mvaṁ sakihupiṁ hyaṁ prabhaṅkara, satahun samayanya, hyaṁ prabhaṅkāra hyaṁniṅ bratā, pha, hevanā mamūkti, sidḍa sāprayojñananta -->
.
.<!-- P hana bratāṅyu haranya tan pamaṅana tәkaniṁ saṅeṅe kulon muvaṁ sakiṁ hupi hyaṁ prabhaṅkara hyaṁniṁ bratā, savaṛṣa samayanyā, phalanyā, hevana pamuktinta, siddha saprayojñānanta -->
6955
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.83">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_83">hana brata
6960<app>
.<lem wit="#N">ṅayu</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">aṅyu</rdg>
.</app>,
.<app>
6965<lem wit="#N">ṅa</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">haranya</rdg>
.</app>,
. tan
.<app>
6970<lem wit="#N">pamaṅan</lem>
.<rdg wit="#P">pamaṅana</rdg>
.</app>
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">tatkālaniṅ</lem>
6975<rdg wit="#P">tәkaniṅ</rdg>
.</app>
. saṅeṅe kulon, mvaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">sakihupiṅ</lem>
6980<rdg wit="#P">sakiṅ hupi</rdg>
.</app>
. hyaṅ
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N">prabhaṅkara</lem>
6985<rdg wit="#P" cause="additive">prbhaṅkara hyaṅniṅ brata</rdg>
.</app>, satahun samayanya, hyaṅ prabhaṅkāra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, hevanā mamūkti, siddha sāprayojñananta .
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, ṅayu ... sidḍa sāprayojñananta
6990<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.83 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.108 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
6995</div>
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.84">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_84">hana brata, amaṅan riṅ paturon, sәḍǝṅ kumarañcaṅ sǝṅeṅe,
7000 <abbr>pha</abbr>, drәman alaki.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, hamaṅan ... dr̥man halāki
.<ptr target="#N"/>
7005 in 3.84 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7010
.
.
.
.<!-- G hana bratā, haṅәmbaṁ sabran manis, sarvva kәmbaṁ kinumpulakәn, karapun uyaḥ ar̥ṁ suruḥ pupucuk, yen amaṅan riṁ paturon mar̥piṅ ulon, yen amaṅan davuḥ pisan, phala pkik hakeḥ aṅulaṅunakәn, yen istri haṅulaṅunakәn hadr̥man halaki, kinasihan deniṁ laki kita tәmbe, tūr tan panmu ki marū -->
7015
.<!-- N hana brata haṅǝṁbaṁ sabran manis , saṛvva kǝmbhaṁ kiṅumpulākǝn , lavan huyaḥ har̥ṁ, suruḥ pupucuk, yen āmaṅan riṅ paturon, mar̥piṅ ulon, yan āmaṅan ḍavuḥ pisan , pha, pkik hakeh ūlaṅunakǝn yen istri haṅulahakǝn, dr̥man halaki, kinasihan riṁ paturon, mar̥piṁ hulon hyen āmaṅan-->
.
.
.
7020
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.85">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_85">hana brata
. <app><lem wit="#G">aṅǝmbaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#N">aṅǝṅbaṅ</rdg></app>
. sabran manis, sarvakǝmbaṅ kiṅumpulakǝn,
7025 <app><lem wit="#N">lavan</lem><rdg wit="#G">karapun</rdg></app>
. uyah arәṅ, suruh pupucuk, yen amaṅan riṅ paturon, marәpiṅ ulon, yan amaṅan ḍavuh pisan,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. pәkik
. <app><lem type="norm">akveh</lem><rdg wit="#G #N">akeh</rdg></app>
7030 ulaṅunakǝn, yen
. <app><lem type="norm">strī</lem><rdg wit="#G #N">istri</rdg></app>
. aṅulahakǝn,
. <app><lem wit="#N">drәman</lem><rdg wit="#G">adr̥man</rdg></app>
. alaki, kinasihan
7035 <app><lem wit="#N">riṅ paturon, marәpiṅ hulon yen amaṅan</lem><rdg wit="#G">kita tәmbe, tur tan panәmu ki maru </rdg></app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata haṅǝṁbaṁ ... hyen āmaṅan
.<ptr target="#G"/>
7040 in 3.94 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.85 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7045
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.86">
7050<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_86">hana brata antara bakta,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>, amaṅan kāla
. <app><lem type="norm">tәṅah ṅve</lem><rdg wit="#N">tәṅaṅe</rdg></app>,
. yaniṅ vәṅi sәḍǝṅ sirәpiṅ voṅ, limaṅ lek lavasanya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, tisan kuras, sukha gə̄ṅ de saṅ paṇḍita.
7055<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta hantara ... saṁ pāṇḍita
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.86 </note>
7060</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
7065
.<!-- G hana brata, añjayaṅe, kramanya tan pamaṅan yan liṅsir, savarṣā pituṁṅ lek samayanya, saṁ hyaṁ kr̥ttha bhūvaṇa hyaṁnya, kr̥tta kaṁṅ rat, manuḥ kaṁ maranā, siddhi kinasihaniṁ hyaṁ, kinelriṁṅan deniṁ sarvva galak-->
.
.<!-- N hana brata, hañjaya, ṅa, tan pamaṅan yan liṅsiṛ, satahun pituṁ dinā lavasanya, saṁ hyaṁ kr̥tta bhuvana hyaṁniṁ brata, pha, kr̥tta kaṁ rāt, manuḥ kaṁ pr̥mana, sidḍi kanisihan deniṁ hyaṁ, kineriṅan deniṁ saṛvva galak-->
.
7070<!-- P hana bratā hañjaya, kramanya tan pamaṅan yan lisiṛ savaṛṣa pituṁ dinā samayanya saṁ hyaṁ kr̥tta bhuvana hyaṁ niṁ bratā, kr̥tta taṁ rāt, manuḥ kaṁ pr̥maṇa, phalanya siddi kinasihan deniṁ hyaṁ, kineriṅan deniṁ saṛvva galak -->
.
.
.
.
7075<div type="subchapter" n="3.87">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_87">hana brata,
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">añjaya</lem><rdg wit="#G">añjayaṅe</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N"><abbr>ṅa</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G #P">kramanya</rdg></app>,
. tan pamaṅan yan liṅsir,
7080 <app><lem wit="#N">satahun</lem><rdg wit="#G #P" cause="lexical">savarṣa</rdg></app>
. pituṅ
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">dina</lem><rdg wit="#G">lek</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#G #P">samayanya</lem><rdg wit="#N" cause="lexical">lavasanya</rdg></app>,
. saṅ hyaṅ kr̥ta bhuvana
7085 <app><lem wit="#N #P">hyaṅniṅ brata</lem><rdg wit="#G">hyaṅnya</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N"><abbr>pha</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G #P" cause="transposition"></rdg></app>,
. kr̥ta
. <app><lem wit="#G #N">kaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">taṅ</rdg></app>
. rāt, manuh kaṅ
7090 <app><lem wit="#G">maraṇa</lem><rdg wit="#N #P">prәmana</rdg></app>,
. siddhi <app><lem wit="#N #P">kanisihan deniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">kinasihaniṅ</rdg></app>
. hyaṅ, kineriṅan deniṅ sarvagalak.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P"></lem>
7095<note> hana brata, hañjaya ... saṛvva galak
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.78 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.87 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.94 </note>
7100</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
7105
.
.<!-- N hana bratā nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, yanīm puṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu, hadyus , piṁ, 7, sarahina, piṁ, 7, savṅi, yan paṅloṁ, piṁ, 14, haśeva latri, hacaru śuci sadaṇḍanan , bhaṭāra guru hyaṁniṁ brattā, pha, savighnānta hilaṁ, tūṛ kinasihan deniṁ bhuṭā ḍṅǝn, kinasihaniṁ tuhvan mvaṁ samanta janmā-->
.
.<!-- P hana bratā hanrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, yan riṁ pūṛṇnamaniṁ kapitu hadyus piṁ pitu sarahina, mvaṁ riṁ vәṅi yan paṅloṁ, piṁ, 14, haśeva latri, hacaru śuci, sadandanan, bhaṭāra guru hyaṁnya, phalanya savighnanta hilaṁ tuṛ kinasihan deniṁ buṭā dәṅәn, mvaṁ kinasihan deniṁ tuvan muvaṁ samanta-->
7110
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.88">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_88">hana brata
7115 <app><lem wit="#P">anrus</lem><rdg wit="#N">nrus</rdg></app>
. tuñjuṅ,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">yaniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">yan riṅ</rdg></app>
. pūrṇamaniṅ kapitu, adyus, piṅ,
7120 <app><lem wit="#N">7</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">pitu</rdg></app>,
. sarahina,
. <app><lem wit="#N">piṅ, 7, savәṅi</lem><rdg wit="#P">mvaṅ riṅ vәṅi</rdg></app>,
. yan paṅloṅ, piṅ, 14, haśeva latrī, acaru śuci sadaṇdhanan, bhaṭāra guru
. <app><lem wit="#N">hyaṅniṅ brata</lem><rdg wit="#P">hyaṅnya</rdg></app>,
7125 <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. savighnanta hilaṅ, tur kinasihan deniṅ bhūta ḍәṅǝn, kinasihaniṅ
. <app><lem type="norm">tuhan</lem><rdg wit="#N">tuhvan</rdg><rdg wit="#P">tuvan</rdg></app>
. mvaṅ samanta janma.
.<app>
7130<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā nrus ... samanta janmā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.88 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.127 </note>
7135</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
7140
.<!-- N hana brata, nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, haturu haṅādǝg savṅi, bhaṭāra śiva maveḥ bratā, pha, śakti, sasāṛnya dadi rātū, sugiḥ tan hilaṁ takonakna, magǝḥ deśa, nora voṁ sidḍi gave -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata hanәrus tuñjuṃ, ṅa, haturu haṅadәg savәṅi, bhaṭāra śivā maveḥ bratā, phalanya śakti, sasaṛnya dadi ratu, sugiḥ, tan hilaṁ takonakna, maṅgәḥ deśa, nora rvaṁ siddhi gave -->
.
7145<!-- U hana bratā hanrus tuñjuṁ, haturu haṅadәg savṅi, bhaṭāra siva maveḥ bratā, pha, sugiḥ tan alaṁ, katonaknā, maṅgə̄ maṅə̄h i deṣa, nora voṁ siddi gave -->
.
.
.
.<!-- U hana bratā hanrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, haturu haṅadhәg savṅi, bhaṭāra śiva maveḥ brātā, pha, śakti, sasaṛnya dadi ratu -->
7150
.<!-- U hana bratā hanrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, haturu haṅadhәg savṅi, bhaṭāra śiva maveḥ brātā, pha, śakti, sasaṛnya dadi ratu -->
.
.
.
7155
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.89">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_89">hana brata,
. <app><lem wit="#P #U">anrus</lem><rdg wit="#N">nrus</rdg></app>
. tuñjuṅ,
7160 <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. aturu aṅadǝg savәṅi, bhaṭāra śiva maveh brata,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">śakti, sasarnya dadi ratu</lem><rdg wit="#U" cause="line_omission"></rdg></app>,
. sugih,
7165 tan
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">hilaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#U">alaṅ</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">takonakәna</lem><rdg wit="#U">katakonakәna</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#P">maṅgǝh</lem><rdg wit="#N">magәh</rdg><rdg wit="#U" cause="additive">maṅgә maṅәh i</rdg></app>
. deśa, nora
7170 <app><lem wit="#N #U">voṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">rvaṅ</rdg></app>
. siddhi gave.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā hanrus ... sidḍi gave
7175<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.89 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.143 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.87; 3.94 </note>
.</app>
7180</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
7185
.<!-- N - hana bratta nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, ri taṅgal kapiṁ limaniṅ kapitu, hamati ghni, nhǝṛ tan kneṁ paṅan turu, sarahina, savṅi, bhaṭāra hasiḥ prāṇa hyaṅiṁ bratā, pha, śakti, hamupu sariniṁ brata kabeḥ -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.90">
7190<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_90">hana brata
. <app><lem type="norm">anrus</lem></app>
. tuñjuṅ,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. ri taṅgal kapiṅ limaniṅ kapitu, amati
7195 <app><lem type="norm">agni</lem><rdg wit="#N">ghni</rdg></app>,
. nĕhǝr tan kәneṅ paṅan turu, sarahina, savәṅi, bhaṭāra aśih prāṇa hyaṅiṅ brata,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. śakti, amupu sāriniṅ brata kabeh.
.<app>
7200<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta nrus ... brata kabeḥ
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.90 </note>
.</app>
7205</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
7210<!-- N hana bratta nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, madyus piṁ tigā savṅi, piṁ pitu sarahinā, yanāturu sumandaḥ, pha, vruḥ saguṇaniṁ voṁ kabeḥ, hapkik tan āna maḍani, tuṛṛ prajurit pinaka huluniṁ sajagat -->
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.91">
7215<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_91">hana brata
. <app><lem type="norm">anrus</lem><rdg wit="#N">nrus</rdg></app> tuñjuṅ,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>, madyus piṅ tiga savәṅi, piṅ pitu sarahina, yan aturu sumaṇḍah,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, vruh saguṇaniṅ voṅ kabeh, apәkik tan hana maḍani, tur prajurit pinakahuluniṅ sajagat.
.<app>
7220<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta nrus ... huluniṁ sajagat
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.91 </note>
.</app>
7225</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana brata, nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, hadyus piṁ tigā savṅi, piṁ tigā sarahina, tan paturu gumuliṁ, sumandaḥ vnaṁ, satahun divaśanya, pha, vruḥ satata guṇaniṁ voṁ kabeḥ, prajurit hapkik tanāna madani, pinakā huluniṁ sañjatā, savāṛṇnaniṁ bhūvana norana madā, sanuṣantarā kabeḥ tumiṅhal iṁ sira-->
.
7230
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.92">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_92">hana brata,
. <app><lem type="norm">anrus</lem><rdg wit="#N">nrus</rdg></app>
. tuñjuṅ,
7235 <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. adyus piṅ tiga savәṅi, piṅ tiga sarahina, tan paturu gumuliṅ, sumaṇḍah vәnaṅ, satahun divasanya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. vruh satata guṇaniṅ voṅ kabeh, prajurit apәkik tan hana maḍani, pinakahuluniṅ sañjata, savarṇaniṅ bhuvana norana maḍa, sanūsāntara kabeh tumiṅhaliṅ sira.ś
.<app>
7240<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, nrus ... tumiṅhal iṁ sira
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.92 </note>
.</app>
7245</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
7250<!-- N hana brata, nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, madyus piṁ pitu sarahinā, piṁ pitu savṅi, pha, listuhayu paripuṛṇna, kaṅgapiṁ ratū, kinasihan deniṁ saṁ pāṇḍita -->
.<!-- P - hana brata hadyus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, madyus piṁ pitu sarahina, piṁ pitu savәṅi, phalanya listuhayu paripūṛṇna, kinasihan deniṁ pāndhitā -->
.
.
.
7255<div type="subchapter" n="3.93">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_93">hana brata,
. <app><lem type="norm">anrus</lem><rdg wit="#N">nrus</rdg><rdg wit="#P">adyus</rdg></app>
. tuñjuṅ,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
7260 madyus piṅ pitu sarahina, piṅ pitu savәṅi,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem><rdg wit="#N">listuhayu</rdg></app>
. paripūrṇa,
. <app><lem wit="#N">kaṅgapiṅ ratu</lem><rdg wit="#P"></rdg><rdg cause="additive"></rdg></app>,
7265 kinasihan deniṅ
. <app><lem wit="#N">saṅ paṇḍita</lem><rdg wit="#P">paṇḍita</rdg></app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, nrus ... saṁ pāṇḍita
7270<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.93 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.124 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7275</div>
.
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, nrus tuñjuṁ, ṅa, hadus , piṁ, 7, sarahina, mvaṁ riṁ vṅi, hasisiriḥ kitthā, naṅkǝn vulan aguṁ, pha, vruḥ tan āga saparipolaḥta, bhūvana gegeṛ tumon hiri kitthā -->
7280
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.94">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_94">hana brata,
7285 <app><lem type="norm">anrus</lem><rdg wit="#N">nrus</rdg></app>
. tuñjuṅ,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. <app><lem type="norm">adyus</lem><rdg wit="#P">adus</rdg></app>,
. piṅ, 7, sarahina, mvaṅ riṅ vәṅi, asisirih kita, naṅkǝn vulan aguṅ,
7290 <abbr>pha</abbr>, vruh tan aga saparipolahta, bhuvana geger tumon iri kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, nrus... hiri kitthā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
7295 in 3.94 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7300<!-- N hana brata tri sandya, ṅa, hamaṅan tigaṁ kpǝl , sarahinā, tigaṁ tahun samayanya, pha, mantukiṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ listvayu paripuṛṇna, suka magə̄ṁ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.95">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_95">hana brata trisandya,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
7305 amaṅan tigaṅ kәpǝl, sarahina, tigaṅ tahun samayanya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. mantukiṅ svarga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ
. <app><lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem><rdg wit="#N">listvayu</rdg></app>
. paripūrṇa, sukha magə̄ṅ.
7310<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata tri ... suka magə̄ṁ
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.95 </note>
7315</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
7320
.<!-- G hana brāta, atri ndhya, piṁ tiga dyusiṁ rahina, mviṅi kuḷm, huvusniṁ adyus, māsisig, māsipat, mañurat, pituṅ lek samayanya, phalaniṁ brata, mulihiṁ kendran, sasaṛnya manja_ _ _ tuhayu, paripūṛṇna, prajña ya-->
.
.<!-- N hana brata, tri sanḍya, ṅa, madyus piṁ tigā sarahina, mvaṁ riṁ vṅi, vusiṁ hadyus hasusurā, masiphatā, pituṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, muliḥ mari kendran , sasaṛnya mandādi vvaṁ listvayu paripuṛṇna prajñan -->
.
7325<!-- P hana brata tri sandya, ṅa, piṁ tigā dyus sarahinā, mvaṁ riṁ, vuniṁ hadyus, hasisig, masipat, mañurat, pituṁ lek ṣamayanya, phalanya muliḥ riṁ kendrān, sasaṛnya mañjanma riṁ vvaṁ listvāyu, paripūṛṇna prajñan-->
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.96">
7330<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_96">hana brata,
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">trisandhya</lem><rdg wit="#G">atri ndhya</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"><abbr>ṅa</abbr></lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>, <app><lem wit="#N">madyus piṅ tiga sarahina</lem><rdg wit="#G">piṅ tiga dyus iṅ rahina</rdg><rdg wit="#P">piṅ tiga adyus sarahina</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">mvaṅ riṅ vәṅi</lem><rdg wit="#G">mviṅi kulәm</rdg><rdg wit="#P">mvaṅ riṅ</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">vusiṅ adyus asusura</lem><rdg wit="#G">huvusniṅ adyus masisig</rdg><rdg wit="#P">vuniṅ adyus, asisig</rdg></app>,
7335 <app><lem wit="#N">masipata</lem><rdg wit="#G #P">masipat, mañurat</rdg></app>,
. pituṅ lek samayanya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#G">mulihiṅ</lem><rdg wit="#N">mulih mari kendran</rdg><rdg wit="#P">mulih riṅ kendran</rdg></app> kendran, sasarnya
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">mandadi</lem><rdg wit="#G">manja_ _ _</rdg></app>
7340 <app><lem wit="#N">vvaṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg><rdg>riṅ vvaṅ</rdg></app>
. <app><lem type="norm">lituhayu</lem><rdg wit="#G #N #P">listuhayu</rdg></app>
. paripūrṇa
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">prajñan</lem><rdg wit="#G">prajña ya</rdg></app>.
.<app>
7345<lem wit="#G #N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, tri ... paripuṛṇna prajñan X
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.54 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.96 <ptr target="#P"/>
7350 in 3.53 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7355
.
.<!-- N hana bratta, kraca dyus , ṅa, hadyusarahina vṅi, lǝṅa siphatnya, pha, svaṛggā mantuk riṁ kendrān , mañjanmā vicakṣaṇa hanulus, tuṛ anom apkik kala hāla -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata kracādyus, ṅa, hadyus sarahina vәṅi, l̥ṅa cipatnyā, phalanya mantuk riṁ svaṛgga riṁ kendran, mañjanmā vicakṣaṇa, hanulus tuṛ hapәkik hanvam tan pavicara-->
7360
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.97">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_97">hana brata, kraca adyus,
7365 <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. adyus sarahina vәṅi, lǝṅa
. <app><lem wit="#N">sipatnya</lem><rdg wit="#P">cipatnya</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">svarga mantuk riṅ kendran</lem><rdg wit="#P">mantuk riṅ svarga riṅ kendran</rdg></app>, <app><lem type="norm">majanma</lem><rdg wit="#N #P">mañjanma</rdg></app>
7370 vicakṣaṇa anulus, tur
. <app><lem wit="#N">anom apәkik</lem><rdg wit="#P">apәkik anvam</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N">kalah ala</lem><rdg wit="#P">tan pavicara</rdg></app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
7375<note> hana bratta, kraca ... kala hāla
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.97 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in III…………. </note>
.</app>
7380</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratta, hamaṅan saṛvva mǝntaḥ, bhaghavan haṅgaṣṭi hyaṁniṁ brata, pha, dadi deva, sasaṛnya dadi ratū, kinasiha niṁ hyaṁ, prajurit haṅalahakǝn kabeḥ, norana madanāna, tan kna sehabrata -->
.
7385<div type="subchapter" n="3.98">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_98">hana brata, amaṅan sarvamǝntah, bhagavān aṅgaṣṭi hyaṅniṅ brata,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. dadi deva, sasarnya dadi ratu, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, prajurit aṅalahakǝn <supplied reason="omitted">śatru</supplied> kabeh, norāna maḍanana, tan kәna seh abrata.
.<app>
7390<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta, hamaṅan... kna sehabrata
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.98 </note>
.</app>
7395</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
7400<!-- N hana bratā haśuci lakṣaṇa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan hyan duruṅ ārarahup¸ halǝṅhā, pha, hapkiker̥ṅan , sapari polihiṅ abratā, l̥vǝsiṁ rambut, hasḍǝpiṁ paṅūcap, mvaṁ rūpā -->
.
.<!-- U hana bratā haśuci lakṣaṇā, ṅa, tan pamaṅan yan duaruṁ hararavup, hal̥l̥ṅa. pha, hapkik ker̥ṅan, saparipolah iṁṅ abrātā, l̥vasiṁ rambut, hasdhәp iṁ pāṅucap, mvaṁ rūpā -->
.
.
7405
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.99">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_99">hana brata aśuci lakṣaṇa,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. tan pamaṅan yan duruṅ ararahup,
7410 <app><lem wit="#U">alǝlәṅa</lem><rdg wit="#N">alәṅha</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. apәkik kerәṅan, saparipolihiṅ abrata,
. <app><lem wit="#N">lәvǝsiṅ</lem><rdg wit="#U">lәvas</rdg></app>
. rambut, asәḍǝpiṅ paṅūcap, mvaṅ rūpā.
7415<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā haśuci ... mvaṁ rūpā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.99 <ptr target="#U"/>
7420 in 3.71 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7425
.<!-- N hana brata, nuci lākṣaṇa, ṅa, hamaṅan āhes karuhun , pha, ker̥ṅan saparipolahtā, halit arampiṁ, dr̥mman alaki -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.100">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_100">hana brata, nuci lakṣaṇa,
7430 <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
. amaṅan ahes karuhun,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. kerәṅan saparipolahta, alit arampiṅ, drәman alaki.
.<app>
7435<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, nuci ... dr̥mman alaki
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.100 </note>
.</app>
7440</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, mavastra śudḍa malā, mantranya, Om̐ śudḍa pāpa, śudḍa malā, 3, śudḍa śudḍa pinariśudā, śudḍa śudḍa pinarivastu. phalanya, hilaṁ malā patakā, pāpa kalesanta, samayanya kaṁ bratta, tigaṁ daśa dinā, hanambut riṁ tīlǝm, hasalaḥ riṁ tīlǝm, hasalaḥ bratā, sahā skaṛ rvaniṁ śudḍa malā, ptekakna rvanya, mañomponi petaṅan mantranyā-->
7445
.<!-- P hana brata suddha mala vastranyā, Iti mantranya, ma, Ōm̐ suddha papā[,] suddha māla[,] suddhā suddhā pinarisuddha, Ōm̐, phalanya hilaṁ malā patakā papā kleṣan, samayaniṁ bratā, 30, dinā, manaṅgap riṁ til̥m, saha sәkaṛ[,] suddha malā[,] macaru śuci sadandanan-->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.101">
7450<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_101">hana brata,
. <app><lem wit="#N">mavastra śuddha mala</lem><rdg wit="#P">suddha mala</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">mantranya</lem><rdg wit="#P">iti mantranya, ma</rdg></app>,
. Om̐ śuddha pāpa, śuddha mala,
. <app><lem wit="#N">3</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
7455 śuddha śuddha pinariśuddha,
. <app><lem wit="#N">śuddha śuddha pinarivastu</lem><rdg wit="#P">Ōm</rdg></app>.
. phalanya, hilaṅ malā patakā, pāpa
. <app><lem wit="#N">kaleśanta</lem><rdg wit="#P">kleśan</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">samayanya kaṅ brata</lem><rdg wit="#P">samayaniṅ brata</rdg></app>,
7460 <app><lem wit="#N">tigaṅ daśa dina</lem><rdg wit="#P">30, dina</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">anambut riṅ tilǝm</lem><rdg wit="#P">manaṅgap riṅ tilәm</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">asalah riṅ tilǝm, asalah brata</lem><rdg wit="#P"><gap reason="omitted"></gap></rdg></app>,
. sah sәkar
. <app><lem wit="#N">rvaniṅ śuddha mala</lem><rdg wit="#P">śuddha mala</rdg></app>,
7465 <app><lem wit="#N">pәtekakәna rvanya, mañomponi petaṅan mantranya</lem><rdg wit="#P">macaru śuci saḍanḍanan</rdg></app>.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, mavastra ... petaṅan mantranyā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
7470 in 3.101 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.130 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7475
.
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, yan taṅgal piṁ, 1, taṅgal piṁ, 2, taṅgal piṁ, 3, hakambǝn śudāmalā, havastra sacci, yan vus ālabahan , pha, rū pānta lañjar·, hapkik paripuṛṇna, yan lanaṁ habratta, kalamaṛ deniṁ histri, yan istri, kalamar deniṁ kakūṁ, handaka rūpā haraniṁ bratā maṅkana-->
7480
.<!-- P hana bratā handakā rūpā, ṅa, yan taṅgal hapisan pindo, piṁ tәlu, hakamәn suddha mala, hastra śaci, yan vus ahabahan, phalanya tan kasoran rupānta, dira prajñan -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.102">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_102">hana <app><lem wit="#N">brata</lem><rdg wit="#P">brata andaka rūpa, ṅa</rdg></app>,
7485 yan taṅgal piṅ,
. <app><lem wit="#N">1</lem><rdg wit="#P" cause="lexical">apisan</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">taṅgal piṅ, 2</lem><rdg wit="#P">pindo</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">taṅgal piṅ, 3</lem><rdg wit="#P">piṅ tәlu</rdg></app>,
. akambǝn śuddha mala,
7490 <app><lem wit="#N">avastra</lem><rdg wit="#P">astra</rdg></app>
. saci, yan vus
. <app><lem wit="#N">alabahan</lem><rdg wit="#P">ahabahan</rdg></app>,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">rūpanta lañjar</lem><rdg wit="#P">tan kasoran rūpanta</rdg></app>,
7495 <app><lem wit="#N">apәkik paripūrṇa, yan lanaṅ abrata, kalamar deniṅ
. <app><lem type="norm">strī</lem></app>, yan
. <app><lem type="norm">istri</lem></app>,
. kalamar deniṅ kakuṅ, andaka rūpa haraniṅ brata maṅkana.</lem><rdg wit="#P">dira prajñan</rdg></app>
.<app>
7500<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, yan ... bratā maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.102 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.126 </note>
7505</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
7510<!-- N hana bratta malahāra, ṅa, yan āmaṅan maṅgis , dūṛyyan , sakalviriṁ vovohan , tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, mantuk mariṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṁ bhaṭāra sadḍa śivā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ sujanā-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.103">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_103">hana brata malāhāra,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>,
7515 yan amaṅan maṅgis, duryan, sakalviriṅ vovohan, tigaṅ lek samayanya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, mantuk mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ bhaṭāra saḍāśiva, sasarnya majanma riṅ vvaṅ sugih sujana.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta malahāra ... sugiḥ sujanā
7520<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.103 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7525
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā ṅinaṁ suruḥ tmu ros , jambe taṅ vnaṁ tampakiṁ ladiṁ, ginitik, suruḥ lǝmbaran, hapuḥ bubuk, pha, tguḥ tan pakmitan , tuṛ kkeḍǝp -->
.
7530<div type="subchapter" n="3.104">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_">hana brata ṅinaṅ suruh tәmu ros, jambe taṅ vәnaṅ tampakiṅ ladiṅ, ginitik, suruh lǝmbaran, apuh bubuk,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, tәguh tan pakәmitan, tur keḍәp.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
7535<note> hana bratā ṅinaṁ ... tuṛ kkeḍǝp
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.104 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7540</div>
.
.
.
.
7545<!-- G hana brata, tan pamaṅan jambe tan sinigi riṁ ladiṁ, phalanya, tan maraśa non lalaṇdhәp, jaya riṁ baya, mvaṅ akveḥ asi, saṁ hyaṁ kala -->
.<!-- N hana bratā, tan pamaṅan jambe tan sinigar deniṁ ladiṁ, phā, tan tǝkǝs deniṁ saṛvva laṇḍǝp, jaya ri yuddā tan kevǝhan -->
.<!-- P hana bratā tan pamaṅan jambe tan ṣinigaṛ deniṁ ladiṁ, phalanya, tan tәtәs deniṁ sāṛvva lalaṇdhәp, jāya riṁ yuddhā tan kevәḥ-->
.
.
7550<div type="subchapter" n="3.105">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_105">hana brata, tan pamaṅan jambe tan
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">sinigar</lem><rdg wit="#G">sinigi</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N #P">deniṅ</lem><rdg wit="#G">riṅ</rdg></app>
. ladiṅ, pha, tan
7555 <app><lem wit="#P">tǝtǝs</lem><rdg wit="#G">marasa</rdg><rdg wit="#N">tәkәs</rdg></app>
. <app><lem wit="#N">deniṅ sarvalaṇḍǝp</lem><rdg wit="#G">non lalaṇḍәp</rdg><rdg wit="#P">sarvalalaṇḍәp</rdg></app>,
. <app><lem wit="#N">jaya ri yuddha tan kevǝhan</lem><rdg wit="#G">jaya riṅ baya, mvaṅ akveh asi, saṅ hyaṅ kāla</rdg><rdg wit="#P">jaya riṅ yuddha tan kevәh</rdg></app>. <app>
.
.<lem wit="#G #N #P"></lem>
7560<note> hana bratā, tan ... tan kevǝhan
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.77 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.105 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.93 </note>
7565</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana brata, maharen vatu, de niṅ ābratā, tlūṁ tahun , pha, tguḥ bujana kulit, tūṛ klar -->
7570
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.106">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_106">hana brata, maharen vatu, deniṅ abrata, tәluṅ tahun,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, tәguh <app><lem type="emn">bhuja</lem><rdg wit="#N">bhujana</rdg></app> kulit, tur kәlar.
.<app>
7575<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, maharen ... tuṛ klar
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.106 </note>
.</app>
7580</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.107">
7585<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_107">hana brata, maṅan sakpәlǝl, lavasnya pituṅ vәṅi,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, kinasihaniṅ rāt kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, maṅan ... rat kita
7590<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.107 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7595
.<!-- N hana brata maṅan roṁ kpǝl, lamanyā pituṁ vṅi, pha, guṇā tan kevǝhan -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.108">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_108">hana brata maṅan roṅ kәpǝl, lamanya pituṅ vәṅi,
7600 <abbr>pha</abbr>, guṇa tan kevǝhan.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana brata maṅan ... tan kevǝhan
.<ptr target="#N"/>
7605 in 3.108 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7610<!-- N hana bratā, maṅan tigaṁ kpǝl , tigaṁ vṅi lavasnya, pha, kinasihan deniṁ rāt, himbuḥ himbuḥ tan paṅloṁ -->
.<!-- U hanā brātā hamaṅan tigāṁ kpәl, tigaṁ vṅi lavasnya, pha, kinasihan deniṁ rāt himba himbuhan pahloṁ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.109">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_109">hana brata,
7615 <app><lem wit="#N">maṅan</lem><rdg wit="#P">amaṅan</rdg></app>
. tigaṅ kәpǝl, tigaṅ vәṅi lavasnya,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>,
. kinasihan deniṅ rāt,
. <app><lem wit="#N">imbuh imbuh tan paṅloṅ</lem><rdg wit="#P">imba imbuhan pahloṅ</rdg></app>.
7620<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, maṅan ... tan paṅloṁ
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.109 <ptr target="#U"/>
7625 in 3.104 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7630<!-- N hana bratā tri samaya, ṅa, hamaṅan sgā tigāṁ kpǝl, salek ṣamayanya, saṁ hyaṁ tiga mavveḥ brata, pha, kinasihaniṁ pāṇḍita, guṇa mantra sidḍi -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata tri samaya, ṅa, hamaṅan sgā tigaṁ kpәl, salek samayanya, saṁ hyaṁ tiga maveh brata, pha, kinasiha niṁ pāṇdhita, mvaṁ guṇa mantrā siddi -->
.
.
7635
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.110">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_110">hana brata trisamaya,
. <abbr>ṅa</abbr>, amaṅan sәga tigaṅ kәpǝl, salek samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ tiga maveh brata,
. <abbr>pha</abbr>, kinasihaniṅ paṇḍita, <app><lem wit="#N">guṇa</lem><rdg wit="#P">mvaṅ guṇa</rdg></app> mantra siddhi.
7640<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tri... mantra sidḍi
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.110 <ptr target="#U"/>
7645 in 3.81 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7650
.<!-- N hana bratta, tri samanā, ṅa, hamaṅan tigaṁ kpǝl , sarahina, tigaṁ tahun samayanyā, pha, mantukiṁ pada bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasaṛnya maṁjanmā riṁ vvaṁ lituhayu paripuṛṇna, suka magə̄ṁ -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata tri samayā, ṅa, hamaṅan tigaṁ kәpәl sarahinā, tigaṁ tavun ṣamayanya, phalanya māntukiṁ svaṛggān bhaṭāra viṣṇu. sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ vvaṁ listuhayu paripūṛṇna -->
.
7655<div type="subchapter" n="3.111">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_113">hana brata, tri samanā, ṅa, amaṅan tigaṅ kpǝl, sarahina, tigaṅ tahun samayanyā, pha, mantuk iṅ pada bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya maṅjanma riṅ vvaṅ lituhayu paripurṇna, suka magə̄ṅ.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta, tri ... suka magə̄ṁ
7660<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.111 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.50 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7665</div>
.
.
.
.
7670<!-- N hana brata, Eka bakta, ṅa, hamaṅan sakpǝl , pituṁ vṅi samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.<!-- P hana brata Ekabhakti, ṅa, hamaṅan sakәpәl tәkaniṁ sari sari, pituṁ vәṅi samayanya, phalanya, siṁ priḥ meṅgal katәmu-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.112">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_112">hana brata, Eka bakta, ṅa, amaṅan sakpǝl, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu.
7675<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, Eka ... meṅgal katmu
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.112 <ptr target="#P"/>
7680 in 3.32 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7685
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratta, maṅan pituṁ kpǝl , pituṁ dinā lavasnya, ghaṇa katapākanya -->
.<!-- U hanā brātā hamaṅan pituṁ kpәl, pituṁ dina lavasnya, bhaṭāra ghaṇā veḥ brātā, pha, kinasihān deniṁ rāt kabeḥ.-->
7690
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.113">
7695<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_3.113">hana brata, maṅan pituṅ kpǝl, pituṅ dinā lavasnya, ghaṇa katapākanya. <app>
.<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta, maṅan ... ghaṇa katapākanya
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.113 <ptr target="#U"/>
7700 in 3.103 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7705
.
.<!--N hana bratā, ahamaṅan ro vlas kǝpǝl , pha, sidḍa kaṛyya, hamukti ṅaraniṁ brata maṅkana -->
.
.
7710
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.114">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_114">hana brata, amaṅan ro vlas kǝpǝl, pha, siddha kārya, hamukti ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
7715<note> hana bratā, ahamaṅan … brata maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.114 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7720</div>
.
.<!-- N hana brata, hamaṅan kupat kǝpǝt, mevakā saṛvva śuci, 3, vṅi divaśanya, haṅalaki madā, ṅa, saṁ hyaṁ Iśvara sira turun bratā, ya minakā rūpā sira, pinakāśvaraniṅ aṅiduṁ, manisiṁ panutukān, brahmāṇi hasuṁ rontal, pha, labda vara riṁ rāt, makveḥ hasihi ri kitthā-->
.
.
7725
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.115">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_115">hana brata, amaṅan kupat kǝpǝt, mevakā sarva śuci, 3, vәṅi divasanya, haṅalakimadā , ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ Iśvara sira turun brata, ya minakārūpāsira, pinakāśvaraniṅ aṅiduṅ, manisiṅ panutukān, brahmāṇi hasuṅ rontal, pha, labdha vara riṅ rāt, makveh hasih iri kita.
.<app>
7730<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, hamaṅan ... hasihi ri kitthā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.115 </note>
.</app>
7735</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata, hamaṅan kupat kǝpǝl , tuṅgal hivaknya saṛvva succi, tigaṁ vṅi divaśanya, haṅali padā, ṅa, hyaṅ iśvara turun abrata, pha, ya pinaka rūpā, pinakāśvaraniṅ āṅiduṁ, manisiṁ paṅūcap-->
7740
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.116">
