7745<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_116">hana brata, amaṅan kupat kǝpǝl, tuṅgal hivaknya sarva succi, tigaṅ vәṅi divasanya, haṅali padā, ṅa, hyaṅ iśvara turun abrata, pha, ya pinaka rūpā, pinakāśvaraniṅ āṅiduṅ, manisiṅ paṅūcap.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, hamaṅan ... manisiṁ paṅūcap
.<ptr target="#N"/>
7750 in 3.116 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7755
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata, hamaṅan kupat kǝpǝl , pituṁ viji, hamaṅan rahina, hesuk sore, tṅa ṅe, titigā, sore, roro, Ivaknya hisiniṁ loḥ, salek lavasnya, pha, rinakṣa deniṁ ratū, kinasihan deniṁ voṁ suka tǝmbe -->
.
7760<div type="subchapter" n="3.117">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_117">hana brata, amaṅan kupat kǝpǝl, pituṅ viji, amaṅan rahina, hesuk sore , tṅaṅ ṅve, titiga, sore, roro, Ivaknya hisiniṅ loh, salek lavasnya, pha, rinakṣa deniṅ ratu, kinasihan deniṅ voṅ suka tǝmbe.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, hamaṅan ... suka tǝmbe
7765<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.117 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7770
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, hamaṅan sakpǝl, tatkalaniṁ taḍahan sapulukan, pituṁ vṅi lavasan ika, pha, kinasihaniṁ rāt, mvaṁ jananurāga, Ekaki ṅaraniṁ brata maṅkana -->
.
7775
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.118">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_118">hana brata, amaṅan sakpǝl, tatəkalaniṅ tadhahan sapulukan, pituṅ vәṅi lavasan ika, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt, mvaṅ jana nurāga, Ekaki ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.<app>
7780<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, hamaṅan... brata maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.118 </note>
.</app>
7785</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
7790
.<!-- N hana bratā, haturū haṅadǝg, sabhāgya yen aṅeka padḍa pisan, pituṁ vṅi samayanyā, yen kita hamaṅan sakpǝl sarahina, yan aṅinūm bañu sahlǝd, tluṁ dinā, tluṁ vṅi samayanya, pha, sapocapan riṁ devā, byakta śakti tkeṁ kamokṣan -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.119">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_119">hana brata, haturū haṅadǝg, sabhāgya yen aṅeka paddha pisan, pituṅ vәṅi samayanyā, yen kita amaṅan sakpǝl sarahina, yan aṅinūm bañu sahlǝd, tәluṅ dinā, tәluṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, sapocapan riṅ devā, byakta śakti tkeṅ kamokṣan.
7795<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, haturū ... tkeṁ kamokṣan
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.119 </note>
7800</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
7805
.<!-- N hana bratā, maṅan rvaṁ kpǝl , pituṁ vṅi lavasānya, guṇa mogha ḍataṁ, tan kevu han , phalanya, Anidra ṅaraniṁ bratā maṅkana -->
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.120">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_120">hana brata, maṅan rvaṅ kpǝl, pituṅ vәṅi lavasānya, guṇa mogha dhataṅ, tan kevuhan, phalanya, Anidra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.<app>
7810<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, maṅan ... bratā maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.120 </note>
.</app>
7815</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratta maṅan tigaṁ kpǝl, tri masā, tiga vṅi lavasānya, pha, kinasihaniṁ rat, tri samaya ṅaraniṁ brata maṅkāna -->
.
7820<div type="subchapter" n="3.121">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_121">hana brata maṅan ¬tigaṅ kpǝl, tri masā, tiga vәṅi lavasānya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rat, tri samaya ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkāna.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta maṅan ... brata maṅkāna
7825<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.121 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7830
.<!-- N hana bratā, hamañca gǝmā, ṅa, hamaṅan sgā limaṅ kpǝl sari sarī, limaṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, kinasihan deniṁ samanta janmā, kaśruguṇa, kaviṛyyavān, kāsubhagyān sugiḥ sidḍi mantra -->
.
.<!-- U hanā bratā hamañca gәma, ṅa, hamaṅan sgā limaṁ kpәl sarahina, limaṁṅ lek paveḥ samayanya, pha, kinasiha niṁ sama janmā, kasrugun, kaviṛyyan kasubhāgyan sugiḥ, siddi mantra -->
.
7835
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.122">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_122">hana brata, hamañca gǝmā, ṅa, amaṅan sәga limaṅ kpǝl sari sarī, limaṅ lek samayanya, pha, kinasihan deniṅ samanta janma, kaśruguṇa , kavīryavan, kāsubhagyān sugih siddhi mantra.
.<app>
7840<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, hamañca ... sidḍi mantra
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.122 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.82 </note>
7845</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, maṅan pituṁ kpǝl, saptā latri lavasanya, guṇa mogha ḍataṁ, saṛvva viṣā tan kataman kittha, yeka phalanya, catūṛ mukā ṅaraniṁ brata maṅkana -->
7850
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.123">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_123">hana brata, maṅan pituṅ kpǝl, saptā latri lavasanya, guṇamogha dhataṅ, sarva viṣā tan kataman kita, yeka phalanya, catūr mukā ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
7855<note> hana bratā, maṅan ... brata maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.123 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7860</div>
.
.<!-- G hana brāta maṅan pituṁ kpәl, ṅa, pataṅ lek samayanya, phalanika, amūkti suka riṁ dlāhanta -->
.<!-- N hana bratta, hamaṅān pituṁ kpǝl, pataṁ lek ṣamayanya, pha, hamūkti suka riṁ dlāha -->
.<!-- P hana brata maṅan pituṁ kәpәl sarahinā, pәtaṁ lek ṣamayanya, phalanya, mukti suka kiteṁ dlāhā -->
7865<!-- U hanā brata hamaṅan pituṁ kpәl, pataṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, Amukti suka riṁ dlānta -->
.<!-- U hana brata hamaṅan pituṁ kpәl, pataṅ lek samayanya, pha, hamukti suka riṁ dlāhanta -->
.
.
.
7870
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.124">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_124">hana brata, amaṅan pituṅ kpǝl, pataṅ lek samayanya, pha, hamūkti suka riṅ dlāha.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P #U"></lem>
7875<note> hana bratta, hamaṅān ... riṁ dlāha
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.55 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.124 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.54 <ptr target="#U"/>
7880 in 3.63, 3.65 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
7885
.<!-- N hana bratā, hamaṅan saṅaṁ kpǝl, naṅkə̄n puṛṇnama, mr̥ttiharā, ṅa, molihā tigaṁ kasaṅhā, pha, mantuk mariṁ svaṛgga bhaṭāra Indrā, sasaṛnya mañjanma mariṁ vvaṁ listvayu paripuṛṇnā, sugiḥ saṅkan rare -->
.
.
.
7890<div type="subchapter" n="3.125">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_125">hana brata, amaṅan saṅaṅ kpǝl, naṅkə̄n pūrṇama, mrәttiharā, ṅa, molihā tigaṅ kasaṅhā, pha, mantuk mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra Indrā, sasarnya mañjanma mariṅ vvaṅ listvayu paripurṇnā, sugih saṅkan rare.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā, hamaṅan ... saṅkan rare
7895<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.125 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7900
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata maṅan sadaśa kpǝl , taḍaḥ pisan , sadaśa lek lavasanya, pha, salviṛniṁ lara rogha tan tame kitthā, haṅaḍavā ṅaraniṁ brata maṅkana -->
.
7905
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.126">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_126">hana brata maṅan sadaśa kpǝl, tadhah pisan, sadaśa lek lavasanya, pha, salvirniṅ lara rogha tan tame kita, haṅadhavā ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.<app>
7910<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata maṅan ... brata maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.126 </note>
.</app>
7915</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
7920
.<!-- N hana brata, haṅapitu, ṅa, hamaṅan pituṅ kpǝl , moliha tigaṁ kapitu, pha, mantuk riṁ bhaṭāra brahmā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ vvaṁ sugiḥ saṅkan rare, listvayu paripuṛṇna -->
.
.
.
7925<div type="subchapter" n="3.127">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_127">hana brata, haṅapitu, ṅa, amaṅan pituṅ kpǝl, moliha tigaṅ kapitu, pha, mantuk riṅ bhaṭāra brahmā, sasarnya majanma riṅ vvaṅ sugih saṅkan rare, listvayu paripurṇna.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, haṅapitu ... listvayu paripuṛṇna
7930<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.127 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
7935
.<!-- N hana brata, naṅkǝn radite Umanis , hamaṅan sǝga sakpǝl , tluṁ radite Umanis , pha, tis manak ānak, trus tumus tkaniṅ ānak putu buyut, suka sugiḥ tan kabañcana -->
.
.<!-- P hana brata nāṅkәnradite manis, hamaṅan sakәpәl, tәka roṁ radite hamaṅan roṁ kәpәl, tәka tәluṁ radite hamaṅan tigaṁ kәpәl, phalanyatis manak hanak, tәrus tumus tәkaniṁ hanak putu buyut suka sugiḥ tan kavicarā-->
.
7940
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.128">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_128">hana brata, naṅkǝn radite Umanis, amaṅan sǝga sakpǝl, [oliha] tluṅ radite Umanis, pha, tis manak ānak, trus tumus təkaniṅ ānak putu buyut, sukasugih tan kabañcana.
.<app>
7945<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, naṅkǝn ... tan kabañcana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.128 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.100 </note>
7950</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā tañkul bañu·, ṅa, kramanya, hamaṅan sgā sakpǝl , sadina, beñjaṅanya rvaṁ kpǝl, vuhanannya, 3, kpǝl , tlu nanyā malabahan , ma, Om̐ niroghā, niṛpāpa, niṛmmāla, niṁ bape bu lukaṛ muliḥ jati nityasā. hamaṅan tan pahuyaḥ, tan pahivak, kneṁ dyus kevalā, tan kneṁ lisaḥ, tan kǝneṁ vḍak, tan paṅinūm tuvak, tan paṅinaṁ, tan paturu rahina, tan kabañcaran, pha, Ilaṁ salviriṁ larā rogha -->
7955<!-- P hana brata hañәkul bañyu, ṅa, kramanya, hamaṅan sәga sakәpәl sadinā, beñjaṅnya rvaṁ kәpәl, vuvananya, 3, kәpәl, tlunanya malabahan, mantra niṁ hamaṅan, ma, Ōm̐ niṛroghā niṛpapā nirmala nirbapebu, lukaṛ muliḥ jati nityaṣā hamaṅan tan pahivak, kәneṁ dyus kevala tan kәneṁ lisaḥ tan kәne vәdhak tan paṅinum tuvak tan paṅinum salvir amuroni, tan haṅinaṁ sәr̥ḥ tan paturu riṁ rahinā tan kabañcaran phalanya hilaṁ salviriṁ rarā roghanta-->
.
.
.
.
7960<div type="subchapter" n="3.129">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_129">hana bratañkul bañu, ṅa, kramanya, amaṅan sәga sakpǝl, sadina, beñjaṅanya rvaṅ kpǝl, puhanannya, 3, kpǝl, tlunanyā malabahan, ma, Om̐ niroghā, nirpāpa, nirmmāla, niṅ bape bu lukar mulih jati nityasā. amaṅan tan pahuyah, tan pahivak, kneṅ dyus kevalā, tan kneṅ lisah, tan kǝneṅ vdhak, tan paṅinūm tuvak, tan paṅinaṅ, tan paturu rahina, tan kabañcaran , pha, Ilaṅ salviriṅ larārogha.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tañkul ... larā rogha
7965<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.129 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.58 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7970</div>
.
.<!-- N maniḥ bratta ñkul bañu, riṁ ckokiṁ taṅan paṅan sga sakpǝl , toya sackokiṁ taṅan , tigaṁ dinā samayanya, sabagya, 5, dinā, ma, kbas valuya jati. pha, nirlāra vighna -->
.
.
7975
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.130">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_130">manih brata ñkul bañu, riṅ ckokiṅ taṅan paṅan sәga sakpǝl, toya sackokiṅ taṅan, tigaṅ dinā samayanya, sabagya, 5, dinā, ma, kbas valuya jati. pha, nirlāra vighna.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
7980<note> maniḥ bratta ñkul ... nirlāra vighna
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.130 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
7985</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā ñkul bañu, vaḍaḥ dadasar cmǝṁ, ma, Om̐ hana boloṁ tan pahudǝran , Ana boloṁ tan pamala, nirvighna nirttaṅis, Ōm̐ śrī srī ya namaḥ svāha, Om̐ mam̐ ya namaḥ svahā||hamita ri saṅ āsḍahan brata, ri saṅgar·, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ svāhā-->
.
.<!-- P hana brata mañjiṁ limā, ṅa, yan hamaṅan sәgā kālavan toya riṁ dadasaṛ cәmәṁ, limaṁ dinā samayanya, ma, Ōm̐ hana mala tan paboloṁ, hana mala tan pahudәran niṛrūpadrava, niṛmalā maliṇa yan halabahan bantәn saṛvva śuci l̥ṅa burat vaṅi, mahar̥piṁ saṅgaṛ -->
7990
.<!-- U hana bratā añәkul bañu, śa, vadhaḥnya dhadhasar cәmәng, ma, Om̐ hana boloṁ tan pahedәran, hana boloṁ tan pamala, nirvighna niṁ taṅis, Om̐ śri śri ya namaḥ svāhā. Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ svahā. hamita ri saṅ asdahan brata, riṁ saṅgaṛ, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ svāha -->
.
.
.
7995<div type="subchapter" n="3.131">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_131">hana bratañkul bañu, vadhah dadasar cmǝṅ, ma, Om̐ hana boloṅ tan pahudǝran, Ana boloṅ tan pamala, nirvighna nirtaṅis, Ōm̐ śrī srīya namah svāhā, Om̐ mam̐ ya namah svāhā. hamita ri saṅ āsәḍahan brata, ri saṅgar, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvarāya namah .
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā ñkul bañu ... namaḥ svāhā
8000<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.131 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.60 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.67 </note>
.</app>
8005</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratāñkul bañu, ṅa, hamaṅan sacalovakaniṁ taṅan , pituṁ vṅi samayanya, nasi kalavan bañu, ma, Om̐ niṛroghā, niṛpāpa niṛbapebu, lukǝṁ muliḥ jatinya saḥ, lukar sapāpaniṁ śarīra, mvaṁ pāpaniṁ bapebu-->
8010
.<!-- U hana brata hañkul bañu, ṅa, hamaṅan sacalovoka niṁ taṅan, pituṁ vṅi samayanya, nasi kalavan bañu, ma, Om̐ niroga nirpāpa nirbape bu, lukәṁ muliḥ jātinya saḥ, lukaṛ sapāpa niṁ śarira, mvaṁ pāpa niṁ bapebu-->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.132">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_132">hana bratañkul bañu, ṅa, amaṅan sacalovakaniṅ taṅan, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, nasi kalavan bañu, ma, Om̐ nirroghā, nirpāpa nirbapebu, lukǝṅ mulih jatinyasah, lukar sapāpaniṅ śarīra, mvaṅ pāpaniṅ bapebu.
8015<app>
.<lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratāñkul bañu ... pāpaniṁ bapebu
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.132 <ptr target="#U"/>
8020 in 3.69 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8025
.<!-- G nihan kramaniṁ brāta añakul bañu, mañjiṁ lima, yan amaṅan sakәpәl pinuluk, bañu sacḷkuk, mantra, Om̐ åna boloṁ tan paundәran, hana boloṁ tan pamala, nirvighnā nirtaṅis, Om̐ śrī ya ve namu nama svāhā, maliḥ amuluk sgā, bañu saclakuk, maniḥ mantra, maniḥ amuluk sgā, bañu maṅkana, yan muspa, 3, sakavaśa denta abhukti, avusan aṅinum bañu, aṅinaṁ -->
.
.<!-- N hana brata ñkul bañu, mañjiṁ limā, ṅa, puluṁ kaṁ skul, 1, Inumi bañu, 1, maliḥ hamuluṁ skul, 1, hinūmi bañu, piṁ tlu hiṅane, raris hamaṅan, sakar̥piṅ āmaṅan vnaṁ, vusaniṅ āmaṅan, ṅinūm bañu, raris ākmuḥ havajik, haṅinaṁ, mari vtǝṅi voṁ, samaṅkana huga kramanya, saglǝmiṅ abrata, Utama lavasnya satahun, ma, Om̐ hana boloṁ tan pamala, hana boloṁ tan paUndǝrān, niṛvighna nirttaṅis niṛrogā, nirUpādravā, niṁ mala malinā, pha, hilaṁ saṛvva malā niṁ śarīranta, kinasihan deniṁ saṁ prabhu, mvaṁ deva sih iri kitthā-->
.
8030
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.133">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_133">hana brata ñkul bañu, mañjiṅ limā, ṅa, puluṅ kaṅ sәkul, 1, Inumi bañu, 1, malih hamuluṅ sәkul, 1, hinūmi bañu, piṅ tlu hiṅane, raris amaṅan, sakarәpiṅ amaṅan vәnaṅ, vusaniṅ amaṅan, ṅinūm bañu, raris ākmuh havajik, haṅinaṅ, mari vtǝṅi voṅ, samaṅkana huga kramanya, saglǝmiṅ abrata, Utama lavasnya satahun, ma, Om̐ hana boloṅ tan pamala, hana boloṅ tan paUndǝrān, nirvighna nirttaṅis nirrogā, nirUpādravā, niṅ mala malinā, pha, hilaṅ sarva malāniṅ śarīranta, kinasihan deniṅ saṅ prabhu, mvaṅ deva sih iri kita.
.<app>
8035<lem wit="#G #N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata ñkul ... iri kitthā
.<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.60 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.133 </note>
8040</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8045<!-- G mantraniṁ ankul bañu, ma, saṁ dr̥mbāmoha, sira amaṅana mariṁ pajagalan, saṅ kāla visāya, sira maṅana mariṁ pajuden, saṁ kāla ṅadhaṁ, sira amaṅa{na} mariṁ dhalan guṁ, saṅ kāla kaṭuṁ, sira maṅana mariṁ pasar·, ri uvus adyusa rumuhun, makaramāsa, māsisiga, marvi-rvihan-->
.<!-- N hana bratta ñkul bañu, ma, saṁ dr̥mba moha, maṅana riṁ pasaṛ, saṁ kāla ṅaḍaṁ, sira maṅana riṁ dalan guṁ, saṁ kāla katuṁ, sira maṅanā riṁ pajagalan , vusanirā hamaṅan, muliha mariṁ rāga valunaniṅ hulun, rovaṅaniṅ hulun makaṛyyā hayu, Om̐ sidḍi rastu-->
.
.<!-- P mamantra mañәkul bañu, saṁ dr̥mba moha sira hamaṅana mariṁ pajagalan, saṁ kāla viṣaya sira hamaṅan riṁ pajuden, saṁ kāla ṅadam sira hamaṅan mariṁ dalan guṁ, saṁ kāla katum sira hamaṅan riṁ pasaṛ haguṁ, ri vuvus sira hamaṅan haṅinum, sira mulihā mariṁ raga valunakveṁ hulun, rovaṅaniṅ hulun hamaṅun hayu-->
.
8050<!-- U brāta hañәkul bañu, ma, saṁ dr̥mbha moha siḥ hamaṅana riṁ pajagalan, saṁ kālā ṅadhaṁ sira hamaṅana riṁ dalan guṁ saṁ kalā viṣaya sira hamaṅana riṁ pasaṛ, saṁ kāla kәtuṁ sirā hamaṅana riṁ pajuden, vus sira hamaṅan mulihā sira riṁ rāga valu niṅ hulun, rovaṅāniṅ hulun hamaṅan kāṛyya hayu, Om̐ siddi rastu-->
.
.
.
.
8055<div type="subchapter" n="3.134">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_134">hana brata ñkul bañu, ma, saṅ drәmba moha, maṅana riṅ pasar, saṅ kāla ṅadhaṅ, sira maṅana riṅ dalan guṅ, saṅ kāla katuṅ, sira maṅanā riṅ pajagalan, vusanirā amaṅan, muliha mariṅ rāga valunaniṅ hulun, rovaṅaniṅ hulun makaryyā hayu, Om̐ siddhir astu.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#G #N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta ñkul ... Om̐ sidḍi rastu
8060<ptr target="#G"/>
. in 3.61 <ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.134 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.57 <ptr target="#U"/>
. in 3.68 </note>
8065</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā tan paṅinūm bañu, tatkalaniṅ amaṅān , yan kaśr̥ḍǝp, hatlasan pisan kita maṅan pituṅ lek ṣamayanyā, pha, tan āsǝr̥t kaṁ sinadyanta, mogha mrih iri kita -->
8070
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.135">
.<p n="3.135">hana brata tan paṅinūm bañu, tatkalaniṅ amaṅān, yan kaśrәdhǝp , hatlasan pisan kita maṅan pituṅ lek ṣamayanyā, pha, tan āsǝrәt kaṅ sinadyanta, mogha mrih iri kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
8075<note> hana bratā tan ... mrih iri kita
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.135 </note>
.</app>
.</p>
8080</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratta tan paṅinūm bañu, satahun divaśanyā, pha, śakti, hyaṁ pādma hyaṁniṁ bratā -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.136">
8085<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_136">hana brata tan paṅinūm bañu, satahun divasanyā, pha, śakti, hyaṅ pādma hyaṅniṅ brata.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratta tan ... hyaṁniṁ bratā
.<ptr target="#N"/>
8090 in 3.136 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8095<!-- N hana brata hamaṅan havaḍaḥ godoṁ, sinaṅga riṁ taṅan kivā, tan pavuvuḥ, pha, kinasihan deniṁ rāt, vkasan tan paṅinūm bañu, saglǝmiṅ abratā, sidḍa sadyā phalanya -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.137">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_137">hana brata amaṅan havadhah godoṅ, sinaṅga riṅ taṅan kiva, tan pavuvuh, pha, kinasihan deniṅ rāt, vkasan tan paṅinūm bañu, saglǝmiṅ abrata, siddha sadyā phalanya.
.<app>
8100<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata hamaṅan ... sadyā phalanya
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.137 </note>
.</app>
8105</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana brata hamaṅan tan pembuḥ, pituṁ tahun samayanyā, pha, bhoga gə̄ṁ tka -->
.<!-- P hana brata maṅan tan pembuḥ, pituṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya bhoga magәṁ tinәmunta -->
8110<!-- U hāna brata hamaṅan tan pahimbuḥ, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu. hanā U brata hamaṅan tan pahimbuḥ, pituṁ tahun samayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.138">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_138">hana brata amaṅan tan pembuh, pituṅ tahun samayanyā, pha, bhoga gə̄ṅ təka.
.<app>
8115<lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
.<note> hana brata hamaṅan ... gə̄ṁ tka
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.138 <ptr target="#P"/>
. in 3.21 <ptr target="#U"/>
8120 in 3.56, 3.57 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8125<!-- N hana brata, tan dadyā tambǝḥ, pituṁ vṅi lavasānya, medā prājja sidḍa kaṛyya phalanya, Aniraṁ ṅaraniṁ bratā maṅkana -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.139">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_139">Hana brata, tan dadyā tambǝh, pituṅ vәṅi lavasānya, medā prājja siddha kārya phalanya, Aniraṅ ṅaraniṅbrata maṅkana.
.<app>
8130<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata, tan ... bratā maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.139 </note>
.</app>
8135</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā tan pavuvuḥ, tan paṅinūm bañu, lamun sāmpun āṅinaṁ, haṅinūm bañu vnaṁ, saglǝmiṅ habrata, pha, prajurit kittha -->
.
8140<div type="subchapter" n="3.140">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_140">hana brata tan pavuvuh, tan paṅinūm bañu, lamun sāmpun āṅinaṅ, haṅinūm bañu vәnaṅ, saglǝmiṅ habrata,
.pha, prajurit kita.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
8145<note> hana bratā tan ... prajurit kittha
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.140 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
8150</div>
.
.<!-- N hana brata hamaṅanāron , sinaṅgā tan patḍa tan pavuvuḥ, tigaṁ vṅi la vasnya, pādma raṅkǝp, ṅa, saṁ hyaṁ capuṛiṁ rāt sira turun ābrata, pinakā gulu jariji suku, thǝṛ kinasihaniṁ rāt -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.141">
8155<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_141">hana brata amaṅanā ron, sinaṅgā tan patdha tan pavuvuh, tigaṅ vәṅi lavasnya, pādma raṅkǝp, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ capuriṅ rāt sira turun ābrata, pinakāgulu jariji suku, tәhәr kinasihaniṅ rāt.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata hamaṅanāron ... kinasihaniṁ rāt
.<ptr target="#N"/>
8160 in 3.141 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8165<!-- N hana bratā hamaṅan tan pavuvuḥ, pituṁ vṅi lavasnyā, sidḍa kaṛyya, kinasihaniṁ rāt phalanya -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.142">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_142">hana brata amaṅan tan pavuvuh, pituṅ vәṅi lavasnya, siddha kārya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya.
.<app>
8170<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā hamaṅan ... rāt phalanya
.<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.142 </note>
.</app>
8175</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana brata hamaṅān papā davun, sinaṅga riṁ taṅan kivā, tan patḍa tan patambǝḥ, hyaṁ hekṣasaṇā turun abratā, pha, kinasihaniṁ rāt -->
.
8180<div type="subchapter" n="3.143">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_143">hana brata amaṅan papā davun, sinaṅga riṅ taṅan kiva, tan patdha tan patambǝh, hyaṅ hekṣasaṇā turun abrata, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana brata hamaṅān ... kinasihaniṁ rāt
8185<ptr target="#N"/>
. in 3.143 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
8190
.<!-- N hana bratā tan dadya tambǝḥ, pituṁ vṅi lavasanyā, medaprajjā sidḍa kaṛyya phalanyā, Anira ṅāraniṁ brata maṅkana -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.144">
8195<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_144">hana brata tan dady atambǝh, pituṅ vәṅi lavasanyā, meda prajjā siddha kārya phalanyā, Anira ṅāraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.<app>
.<lem wit="#N"></lem>
.<note> hana bratā tan... brata maṅkana
.<ptr target="#N"/>
8200 in 3.144 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8205
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.145">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_145">hana brata, yan amaṅan tan patdhā tan patambǝh, pha, tan paśatru kita riṅ niṣkalā.</ab>
.</div>
8210
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.146">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_146">hana brata mona, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan paṅūcap, tigaṅ tahūn samayānya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ rudrāya namah . pamit, pha, kinatvaṅan deniṅ jagat, siddha saprayojñānanta.</ab>
.</div>
.
8215
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.147">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_147">hana brata, maṅan amona, tan paṅinum bañu, vusiṅ amaṅān haṅinūm bañu, haṅūcapaknā, pha, tan knā gǝgǝriṅə̄n, viśeṣā riṅ bhūmi, keḍәp kapintuhu, pituṅ śaśih divasanya.
.</ab>
.</div>
8220
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.148">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_148">hana brata, munarakā, tan paṅūcap lamun amaṅan, tluṅ tahun samayanya, bhaṭāra rūdra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, ginañjar deniṅ hyaṅ kabeh, guṇa təka.</ab>
.</div>
.
8225<div type="subchapter" n="3.149">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_149">hana brata, muna maṅan. muna nap. muna muris. muna susur muna bhaṣmā. muna napuh. muna ṅisiṅ.</ab>
.
.<p>kunaṅ mulihiṅ munā,</p>
.
8230<p n="1"> muna maṅan, pha, vicakṣaṇā dirgghā yuṣā kita.</p>
.
.<p n="2"> munanap, pha, kinasihan deniṅ rāt, prabhu vikū.</p>
.
.<p n="3"> muna bhasma, pha, mantuk iṅ bhaṭārī rātrī, sasarnya majanma riṅ vikū śakti.</p>
8235
.<p n="4"> muna napuh, pha, kinasihaniṅ paṇḍita, mvaṅ deva prabhu, rahayu riṅ pañjanmanta.</p>
.
.<p n="5"> muna ṅisiṅ, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu, bahu siṣya kita.</p>
.
8240<p n="6"> muna sisig, pha, jaya kāryanta, prabha kiteṅ kamokṣan.</p>
.
.<p n="7"> muna muris, pha, siddha kāryanta, pinrihta muna təka.</p>
.</div>
.
8245<div type="subchapter" n="3.150">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_150">hana brata, pañca mukā, ṅa, naṅkǝn kalivon hamona sasore, haṅraṅkus brata kabeh, pha, hamaṅgih suka magə̄ṅ, majanma riṅ sugih sәkul hamukti saṅkan rare, keḍәp deniṅ rāt kabeh.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8250<div type="subchapter" n="3.151">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_151">hana brata ṅunir, ṅa, yan amaṅan sәkul kinunirān, lavasnya saglǝmiṅ ābrata, bhaṭāra mahādeva hyaṅnya, pha, mulih mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra mahādeva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ dam puvavaṅ, sugih dana hulun, labdha vara ri saṅ āhulun.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8255<div type="subchapter" n="3.152">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_152">hana brata amaṅan kuñit, makālalab, Amanah kañcana, ṅa, pha, sugih hmās.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.153">
8260<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_153">hana brata, haṅuniṅ, ṅa, sәkul kuniṅ juga pinaṅan, yan tan maṅkana, kunir juga makalalab, pituṅ tahun samayanya, bhaṭārī ratih hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra mahādeva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ dam puvavaṅ śakti.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā ṅuniṅ, ṅa, kuniṛ paṅan rumuhun, salek lavasnya, ma, Om̐ niṛyyā ya namaḥ svāha -->
8265<!-- U hana bratā ṅuniṅ, paṅan rumuhun, savulan lavasnya, ma, Om̐ nirya namaḥ svāhā -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.154">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_154">hana brata ṅuniṅ, ṅa, kunir paṅan rumuhun, salek lavasnya, ma, Om̐ niryyāya namah svāhā.</ab>
. <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
8270 <note> hana bratā ṅuniṅ, ... namaḥ svāha <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.154 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.76 </note>
.</app>
.
8275</div>
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.155">
8280<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_155">hana brata, hambhīma, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevakā Uyah, satahun tigaṅ lek divasanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvarāya namah, pamit, pha, siṅ pinrih meṅgal katәmu, kinasihan de saṅ pāndhita, mvaṅ deva bhūtha sih īri kita.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.156">
8285<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_156">hana brata mbhima, ṅa, yan taṅgal, piṅ 12, riṅ kapitu, hamatihāra, pha, suka vrәddhi, tūr sidi mantra, jayeṅ śatru, keḍәp kapintuhu deniṅ rat, hamupu saprajjāniṅ voṅ kabeh.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.157">
8290<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_157">hana brata ambhīma, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevakā Uyah, putihiṅ taluh, bhaṅ pṭak, pa, amaṅan ktan bāṅ, bavaṅ bāṅ, pva, amaṅan sәga kuniṅ, mevaka kuniṅiṅ taluh, va, amaṅan ktan hirṅ, mevakā bakulā, ka, amaṅanā sәga hamañca varṇnā, mevekā salvirnya, pha, sugih mās salakā, mvaṅ vsi
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8295
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.158">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_158">hana brata mona turu sumaṇḍah, tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ um̐ um̐ viṣṇu ve namah, pha, labdha vara kita, mandi sakcapta.
.</ab>
8300</div>
.
.
.
.<!-- N hanā bratta turu sumandyaḥ, ṅa, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra sambhu maveḥ bratta, pha, hapkikevanan tajā kulā -->
8305<!-- U hana bratā haturu sumandāh, salek lavāsnyā, bhaṭāra śambu maveḥ brata, pha, hapkik yovana, tajakula -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.159">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_159">hana brata turu sumandyah, ṅa, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra sambhu maveh brata, pha, hapkikevanan tajā kulā.</ab>
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
8310 <note> hanā bratta turu ... tajā kulā <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.159 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.86 </note>
.</app>
.</div>
8315
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.160">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_160">hana brata, humbhakarṇna, ṅa, yan aturu, miriṅ satahun, roṅ tahun samayanya, devantara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ devantarāya namah, pamit, pha, putra vrәddhi, pamtik vәnaṅ vәnaṅ madasih samā vrәddhi.
.</ab>
.</div>
8320
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratta, kumavaśa, ṅa, pituṅ kulǝm tan knā riṅ turu rahina vṅi, pha, viṛyyavan sidḍa sakaṛyyanta, tan pamaṅgiḥ kevǝḥ -->
.<!-- P hana brata haṅupavaṣā, pituṅ vәṅi lavasnyā tan kәneṅ nidra riṅ rahinā vәṅi, phalanya, viṛyyavan, sakahyunta siddha kapaṅgiḥ -->
8325
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.161">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_161">hana brata, kumavaśa, ṅa, pituṅ kulǝm tan knā riṅ turu rahina vәṅi, pha, viryyavan siddha sakāryanta, tan pamaṅgih kevǝh.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratta, kumavaśa ... pamaṅgiḥ kevǝḥ <note>
8330 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.161 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.83 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
8335
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.162">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_162">hana brata, niṅibu, ṅa, amaṅan sarva hibu, pataṅ lek divaśānya, pha, mulih riṅ [svarga] bhaṭāra rudra, sasarnya majanma riṅ kulā !saṅ kumbhakarṇnā, haturu tan paṅlihan, rahinā vәṅi tur aṅūpavaśā, pha, keḍәp saparipolahta.!
8340</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata, tan pamaṅan tan paturū, saṅ hyaṅ tan kaviśeṣā hyaṅnya, pha, svaṛggā titisnya -->
8345<!-- P hana bratā, tan paṅan tan paturu, brata saṅ hyaṅ tan kaviśeṣan, ṅa, phalnya svaṛgga titisnya -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.163">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_163">hana brata, tan pamaṅan tan paturū, saṅ hyaṅ tan kaviśeṣā hyaṅnya, pha, svarga titisnya.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
8350 <note> hana brata, tan ... svaṛggā titisnya <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.164 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.113 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
8355</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, l̥viḥ turu, ṅa, tan tr̥ṣṇeṅ paṅān, bhaṭāri keśavā hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, mantuk riṅ svaṛgga bhaṭāra śivā, mañjanmā ri kula putra, luputiṅ lara vighnā, subhāga hanulus -->
.<!-- P hana brata l̥viḥ turu, ṅa, tan tr̥ṣṇeṅ paṅan, bhaṭāra keśava hyaṅnya, phalanya mantuk riṅ svaṛggan bhaṭāra śiva, mañjanma riṅ kula putra, luputiṅ saṛvva vighna, subhaga anulus -->
8360
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.164">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_164">hana brata, lәvih turu, ṅa, tan trәṣṇeṅ paṅān, bhaṭārī keśavā
.hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, mantuk riṅ svarga bhaṭāraśiva, majanma ri kula putra, luputiṅ lara vighnā, subhaga hanulus.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
8365 <note> hana bratā, l̥viḥ ... subhāga hanulus <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.165 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.116 </note>
.</app>
.
8370</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
8375<div type="subchapter" n="3.165">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_165">hana brata, mopavaśā pituṅ ratrī, hatәhәr tan kneṅ turu rahina vәṅi, bhaṭāra śīvā hyaṅiṅbrata, ma, Om̐ nāma śivāya, pamit, pha, viyyavan , [pha,] sakāryanta siddā, tәhәr siddhi
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8380
.<!-- N hana brata hambhira, ṅa, yan hamaṅan mevakā Uyaḥ kevalā, satahun tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, priḥ meṅgal katmu, deva bhūtha sih iri kittha -->
.<!-- P hana brata mbira, ṅa, yan hamaṅan mevak huyaḥ kevala, satavun lavasnyā mvaṅ tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya. ma, Ōm̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ. phalanya siṅ priḥ Eṅgāl katәmu tuṛ kinasihan deniṅ devabhuṭa, kinasihan deniṅ rāt -->
.<!-- U hana bratāmbira, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevaka huyaḥ, satahun tigaṅṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāreśvara hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ mam̐ Iśvara ya namaḥ, pamit, pha, siṅ pinriḥ heṅgal katmu, kinasihiṅ rāt kita, mvaṅ deva bhutāsihi ri kita -->
.
8385
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.166">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_166">hana brata hambhira, ṅa, yan amaṅan mevakā Uyah kevalā, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, prih meṅgal katәmu, deva bhūtha sih iri kita.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
8390<note> hana brata ambhira... kita<note>
.</note>
.<ptr target="#N"/> in III.167 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.30 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.13 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
8395</div>
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.167">
8400<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_167">hana brata aṅlavar, ṅa, tan pamaṅaniṅ uyahan, satahun divasanya, bhaṭāra saṅkara hyaṅnya, pha, mulih riṅ kendran, sasarnya majanma riṅ listvayu prajña kita. </ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata, ṅlavar, ṅa, tan pamaṅan huyaḥ, pat vulan ptaṅ vṅi samayanya, bhaṭāra saṅkara hyaṅnya,pha, mantuk mariṅ kendran, sasaṛnya mañjanmā listuhayu paripuṛṇnā -->
8405<!-- P hana bratā ṅlavaṛ, ṅa, tan pamaṅan huyaḥ, pat ulan pәtaṅ vәṅi samayanya, bhaṭāra saṅkāra hyaṅnya, phalanyā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā listuhayu paripūrṇna -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.168">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_168">hana brata, ṅlavar, ṅa, tan pamaṅan huyah, pat vulan ptaṅ vәṅi samayanya, bhaṭāra saṅkara hyaṅnya, pha, mantuk mariṅ kendran, sasarnya majanma listu hayu paripurṇnā.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
8410 <note> hana brata, ṅlavar ... listuhayu paripuṛṇnā <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.169 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.81 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
8415</div>
.
.
.
.
8420
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.169">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_169">hana brata, aṅupavāsa, ṅa, lamunāmaṅān haṅgugut huyah ārәṅ rumuhun, 3, tavun divasanya, bhaṭārī gaṅgā hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ gaṅgāya nama svāhā, pha, saparipolahta kinerәṅan deniṅ jagat.
.</ab>
.</div>
8425
.
.<!-- N hana brata, maṅan tumpǝṅ hivak huyaḥ har̥ṅ, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, ya pinakarūpā, pinakāśvaraniṅ kiduṅ caritta, pha, manisiṅ panutukan -->
.<!-- P hana brata maṅan tumpәṅ hivaknya huyaḥ har̥ṅ, pәtaṅ tavun samayanya, kinasihan deniṅ padhanta janmā -->
.
8430<div type="subchapter" n="3.170">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_170">hana brata, maṅan tumpǝṅ hivak huyah harәṅ, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, ya pinakarūpā, pinakāśvaraniṅ kiduṅ caritta, pha, manisiṅ panutukan.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, maṅan ... manisiṅ panutukan <note>
. </note>
8435 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.171 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.85 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8440
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.171">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_171">hana brata, amaṅan kǝmbhaṅ, naṅkǝn, U, hivak uyah ārәṅ, vusiṅ amaṅan, haṅinaṅ suruh pupucuk, aṅliṅggā kǝmbaṅ, ṅa, pha, suka sugih, rūpā haheṅ.
8445</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
8450<div type="subchapter" n="3.172">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_172">hana brata, amaṅan tan pahuyah, pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, śaktinta dhataṅ, tәhәr kinatvaṅān deniṅ hyaṅ. </ab>
.</div>
.
.
8455
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.173">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_173">hana brata, amaṅan arasotih, ṅa, hadahar uyāh ārәṅ minakā vulam, lama pituṅ dinā, ranini padukā bhaṭārī śarasoti hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, prajñan.
.</ab>
.</div>
8460
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.174">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_174">nihan krәtta maśa, ṅa, hayuni ṅhulun, sakārya hayu, makadi vatǝk habrata, nūt āvarah,</ab>
.<p n="1">śaśih ka, 1, taṅ, piṅ, 10, saṅ hyaṅ vira kusuma devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan sarva buṅkah, pha, sugih hanom bhrәman āvǝvka ta sira.</p>
.<p n="2">śaśih, 2, taṅ, piṅ, 7, saṅ hyaṅ jaya kusuma devatanya, bratanya hayva maṅan sapi, pha, luputeṅ tuju tluh tarañjanā, drәman āhiven iven.</p>
8465<p n="3"> śaśih, 3, taṅ, piṅ, 9, saṅ hyaṅnakā devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan bavi, pha, tan katampǝkan griṅ āguṅ.</p>
.<p n="4">śaśih, 4, taṅ, piṅ, 15, saṅ hyaṅ āsmarā devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan sarva roṇḍon, pha, dadi siṅ tinandur.</p>
.<p n="5">śaśih, 5, paṅloṅ, piṅ, 15, saṅ hyaṅ mahādeva devatanya, bratanya, hayva sǝhǝk yan aṅūcap, hayva nǝṅbaṅ boñcah, pha, drәman āvǝvkā.</p>
.<p n="6">śaśih, 6, taṅ, piṅ, 8, saṅ hyaṅ atanu devatanya, bratanya, hayva haṅinǝp, riṅ paluluṅhan, pha, sugih tan kelaṅ elaṅān.</p>
.<p n="7">śaśih, 7, taṅ, piṅ, 13, saṅ hyaṅ manasijā devatanya, bratanya, haṅrakā, pha, sugih keḍәp kapaṅgih siṅ giṇa harṣa.</p>
8470<p n="8">śaśih, 8, taṅ, piṅ, 2, saṅ hyaṅ hanaṅgarā devatanya, bratanya, hayva amaṅan paṭik vǝnaṅ suku phat, pha, sugih patik vǝnaṅ.</p>
.<p n="9">śaśih, 9, taṅ, piṅ, 6, saṅ hyaṅ ravī devatanya, bratanya, hayva maṅan hasu, pha, hapkik raspati prajurit.</p>
.<p n="10">śaśih, 10, taṅ, piṅ, 4, saṅ hyaṅ brahmā devatanya, bratanyā, hayva maṅanān dǝlәṅ riṅ luhur, pha, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, mvaṅ voṅ mule hakeh āsih iri kita.</p>
.<p n="11">śaśih, jyeṣṭā, taṅ, piṅ, 5, saṅ hyaṅ leka jayā devatanya, bratanya, haṅlampar ānanapu, pha, keḍәp mandi sakcaptā.</p>
.<p n="12">śaśih, saddhā, taṅ, piṅ, 1, saṅ hyaṅ pisodharī deva tanya, bratanya, hayva turu lavan istri, pha, keḍәpāhomah omah.</p>
8475<p>Iyā ṅitaṅ kariṅ vulan, krәtta maśa haranya, den asthiti sira, keṅə̄takna yva lupa.</p>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.175">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_175">hana brata, saninigrahā, ṅa, tan mamati haghni ri kālaniṅ tumpǝk kalivon[,] kramanyā ta mumujā, hananapuh eṅ saṅgar, tamvitā nǝmbahā ri bhaṭāra śīvaditya, lviriṅ caru riṅ saṅgar, Anapunar, Arih, rәmbaṅ, tambo lagu hakah haraka, phalā, kambaṅ vaṅi, burat vaṅi, lṅa vaṅī, sdhǝṅan Ikṣu, dhipā, dhūpa, den asaṅkǝp, devadarvi nasab, vijā, dhupa, Ika kahatur i bhaṭāra, ma, Om̐ namo bhagavatye vaśūdeva ya, sarva tuṣṭān, dadāsime, Om̐ śrī gurubhyo namah, devacarundādasimahātrәpti svāhā.</ab>
8480</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.176">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_176">tlas ta ṅavaṅiha ta kita, ma, Om̐ sūryya putra ya namah . samaṅkana taṅ brata lkasaknā, hayva ta pramadā riṅ brata, kunaṅ yan kalaṅan āgriṅ, sakalviraniṅ āṅalaṅana, pinakāvuruṅaniṅ brata, hayva pinakṣakǝn ikāṅ brata, kaliṅanya mvitana juga muvah, kunaṅ yan tan kalaṅanā, hanulus rahayu, pakṣakna hikā, pha, riṅ dlāhanta dadi ratu suka vaya katәmu, pinakāśraya deniṅ padhanta ratu, keḍәp kapintuhu deniṅ rat kabeh.</ab>
.</div>
8485
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.177">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_177">Iti sanibrata, kayatnakna de saṅ met hayu, ndan ikā hayva malәtuh Ikaṅ āmbǝk, mataṅyan ikā hayvā miṣya buddhi, tātkalanta maṅanakǝn brata, Apan yan tan karakṣa Ikaṅ brata denta, maṅdadyakǝn vighnaniṅ śarirā, yan Enak denta rumakṣa sarīra, makājñana buddhi mahottamā, malilaṅāhniṅ niravarāṇa, tan paglǝglǝh , tan karaktan karṇna sulā, mvaṅ rajah tamah, Ika ta maṅdadyakǝn svarga magə̄ṅ, ṅūniveh jñāna viśeṣā, vruha ri kramanira sovaṅ sovaṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
8490
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.178">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_178">hana brata sabran manis, ṅa, tan pamaṅan tampakiṅ āpuy, rvaṅ vulan samayanya,
.sabran pahiṅ tan pamaṅan tampakiṅ aghni, rvaṅ vulan samayanya,
.sabran pon tan padus tan palәṅhā, tan pararavup, tan pakәkmuh, rvaṅ vulan samayanya,
8495sabran vage, tan paturu gumuliṅ, rvaṅ vulan samayānya,
.sabran kalivon, tan paṅūcap ūcap, rvaṅ vulan samayanya,
.
.pha, ginañjar deniṅ vatǝk devata kabeh, norana nūkrәttani, tan ilaṅ takonaknā, drәventa tǝmbe.
.
8500</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.179">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_179">nihan haji pabrata, yaniṅ taṅgal piṅ lima, hanuju kalivon, paṅūpāvaśa,</ab>
8505<p n="1"> Esuknya riṅ manis, amaṅan kupat pāṇdhava, 5, Ivaknya kacaṅ, pha, dukiṅ halit duruṅ ānmu, yan vus āgə̄ṅ hamaṅgih suka sugih haguṅ dunya.</p>
.
.<p n="2">pa, amaṅan kupat syāṅ anti, 9, Ivaknya komak, pha, tinuṅgu deniṅ rāma reṇā, haṅantos haputu habuyut, kinadhama deniṅ bapebu, kapti ni hulun.</p>
.
.<p n="3">pva, amaṅan kupat sidayu, 7, Ivaknya sudhaṅ, pha, haṅāpti listvayu, halit ārampiṅ aṅlәlǝnte, tan āmadhani, suka sugih drәmman baṅkit, pinarәkan pinakāpahulunaniṅ marū. </p>
8510
.<p n="4"> va, amaṅan kupat sih tan pәgat, 4, Ivaknya taluh, pha, haṅapti suka sugih, drәmman sidi baṅkit, keḍәpiṅ alaki, tan kavaśa lakinta haṅluṅhani, pinūji deniṅ matva, tanāna ṅesǝm.</p>
.
.<p n="5"> ka, handha kupat gnǝp, 8, Ivaknya raraśmen , pha, haṅapti suka sugih haguṅ viryya, hañjǝnǝṅ hardda nareśvarī, keḍәp āṅūcap. Esūk riṅ manis, handha kupat siddha luṅguh, 10, Ivaknya dagiṅ loh, sagarā dhanū, halas sāvah, dagiṅ pomahan, [phalanya], haṅāptisukā sugih haguṅ viryya, kinajrihan deniṅ śatru, kinadamā deniṅ balā mvaṅ varga, pinarәkan deniṅ bāla sabran, tan ivaṅ deniṅ bāla, sami vatra tan āna ṅsal, sidi mandi tan paṅūcap, rәmrәm Ikaṅ vvaṅ kabeh, riṅ panaṅkilan, tinaṅkiliṅ bāla sakiṅ doh, habahan təka sakiṅ tanāna, sabran sabran, yan vadon sinivi deniṅ maru, tan āna madhani, sadera ṅrehaknā, vrәddhi putra, kinajrihan deniṅ santanā, virryya bhukti, hembah mañabuh, himbuh himbuh tan paṅloṅ. sāmi dānūr dahā.</p>
.</div>
8515
.
.<!-- G hana brāta nuṅkurat, ṅa, kalivon hama, manis amadhuhara, pahiṅ habāyu hara, pvan atoya hara, vage haghnihara, pūṛṇnama tiḷm hamatihara, piṅ rvana kabeḥ Ika, hakabeḥ phalanya, hamupiṅ brata kabeh -->
.<!-- N hana bratta nuṅku rāt, ṅa, kā, handumā. U, hamaḍūharā, pva, hambayuhāra, pva, hatoyahara, va, haghnihāra, puṛṇnamā, tīl̥m, hamatihāra,piṅ rvanakā, ṅa, pha, hamupusi bratta kabeḥ -->
.<!-- U hana bratā nuṅkurāt, ṅa, kalivon duma. manis hamadhuhāra. pahiṅ hambāyuhāra. pvan hatoyahara. vage hagnihāra. purṇnama til̥m hamatihāra. piṅ rva nikā, ṅa, Ikā ta kabeḥ, pha, hamuvusi brata kabeḥ -->
8520
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.180">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_180">hana brata nuṅku rāt, ṅa, kā, handumā . U, hamadhūharā, pva , hambayuhāra, pva, hatoyahara, va, haghnihāra, purṇnamā, tīlәm, hamatihāra, piṅ rvanakā, [ṅa], pha, hamupu si brata kabeh.
.
.<app><lem wit= "#G #N #U"></lem>
8525<note> hana bratta nuṅku ... bratta kabeḥ <note>
.</note>
.<ptr target="#G"/> in III.56 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.179 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.64 </note>
.</app>
.
8530</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, mañcadara, ṅa, manis hamaṅan sga putiḥ, pahiṅ hamāṅan ktan bāṅ, pvan hamaṅān sga kuniṅ, vage hamaṅan ktan īr̥ṅ, kalivon hamaṅan ktan hamañca vārṇna||0|| vetan hamaṅan hantǝlu putiḥnya, kidul surā, kulon hantǝlu kuniṅ, loṛ bakakul, riṅ tṅaḥ śarasi bāṅ hāti, pha, suka sugiḥ-->
8535<!-- U hana bratā mañca vara, ṅa, manis humaṅan sgā putiḥ, pahiṅ hamaṅan laktan bāṅ, pon hamaṅan sgā kuniṅ, vage hamaṅan ktan hir̥ṅ, kalivon, hamaṅan ktan amañca varṇna, ṅa, vetan hamaṅan sgā putiḥ mvaḥ Āntәlu putiḥnya, kidul sura, kulon hantalu kuniṅnya, lor bakatul, riṅ tṅaḥ sarasi bāṅ hatiḥ, pha, suka sugiḥ -->
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.181">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_181">hana brata, mañcadara, ṅa, manis amaṅan sәga putih, pahiṅ hamāṅan ktan bāṅ, pvan amaṅan sәga kuniṅ, vage amaṅan ktan īrәṅ, kalivon amaṅan ktan hamañca vārṇna. vetan amaṅan hantǝlu putihnya, kidul surā, kulon hantǝlu kuniṅ, lor bakakul, riṅ tәṅah śarasi bāṅ hāti, pha, suka sugih.
8540 <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, mañcadara ... suka sugiḥ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.180 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.80 </note>
.</app>
8545</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
8550<div type="subchapter" n="3.182">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_182">hana brata, hanūt sāpta vara, ṅa, ra, hasisirih, 5, ra. ca, hasisirih, 4, ca. A, asisirih, 3, A. bu, hasisirih, 7, bu. vrә, hasisirih, 8, vrә. śu, hasisirih, 6, śu. śa, hasisirih, 9, śa. pha, suka sugih, vәnaṅ sakama kama.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8555<div type="subchapter" n="3.183">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_183">hana brata, amaṅan sәkul āṅgi sarahup, sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, tan patdha tan patambǝh, tigaṅ vәṅi samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ siddhi rākṣa sira turunābrata, huṅgvānira riṅ rāt, pha, tdhunaniṅ drәman hagave hayu, tan kapjahan vka kita, trus tumus tkeṅ vkā vet bet.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8560<div type="subchapter" n="3.184">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_184">hana brata, maṅan sәkul saravup, sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, tan patәdha tan patambǝh, lalab kevala, 3, vәṅi lavasnya, kārya hana putra, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ sandi rāṣa sira turun abrata, huṅgvanira riṅ śarīra, riṅ rahasya, kәdhukaniṅ dūmānā gave hayu, kveh putra kveh vvaṅ vlas āsih iri kita.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8565<div type="subchapter" n="3.185">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_185">hana brata, amaṅan sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, saivaknya, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, pakṣa hidhǝp, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ kuverā hyaṅnya, ya pinaka rūpa, pinaka kulit, pinaka halis, [phalanya,] siddhiniṅ vvaṅ abәcik i pambǝkan.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8570<div type="subchapter" n="3.186">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_186">hana brata, amaṅan sәkul, pituṅ lek divasanyā, pha, akveh mahyun iri kita, hanvā ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8575<div type="subchapter" n="3.187">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_187">hana brata, maṅan sәga kevala, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, hyaṅ puravāt sira turun abrata, pha, sucāra vruh ri kaliṅanya.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8580
.<!-- N hana bratā, hamaṅan sgā putiḥ, riṅ taṅgal hapisan, saṅ hyaṅ prasidḍa turunā bratā, satahun samayanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt, haṅliraṅ ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana -->
.<!-- P hana brata hamaṅan sәkul putiḥ, yan taṅgal, 1, haliraṅ haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ prasiddha turun habratā, satavun ṣamayanya, phala nya kinasihan deniṅ rāt -->
.<!-- P hana brata maṅan sәga putiḥ, yan taṅggal hapisan, hamәliraṅ haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ prasiddhā turun habrata, satavun lavasnya, phalanya kinasihan deniṅ rāt sira -->
.
8585<div type="subchapter" n="3.188">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_188">hana brata, amaṅan sәga putih, riṅ taṅgal hapisan, saṅ hyaṅ prasiddha turunā brata, satahun samayanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt, haṅliraṅ ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, hamaṅan ... brata maṅkana <note>
8590 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.187 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.61 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.134 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
8595</div>
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.189">
8600<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_189">hana brata, amaṅan sәga balaka, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ paravan hyaṅnya, pha, vruhiṅ ācarā kaliṅanya.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8605<!-- N hana bratā, maṅan sgā putiḥ, 5, puluṅ, ktan bāṅ, 5, ktan jnar, 5, tri ḍatū bratā, 5, mañcavara, saṅ hyaṅ padmā rāṣa tumurun ābratā, pinkā socca, bāyu śabda Iḍǝp, sugiḥ tan hina sāhambǝk phalanya -->
.<!-- U hana brata hamaṅan sgā putiḥ, 5, puluṅ tkān bāṅ, 5, sgāṛ jnaṛ, 5, si dhātu, brata, 5, mañca vara, saṅ hyaṅ padma rāṣa tumurun brata, pinaka śoca bāyu idhәp, pha, sugiḥ tan hina sakāmbәk -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.190">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_190">hana brata, maṅan sәga putih, 5, puluṅ, kәtan baṅ, 5, kәtan jnar, 5, tri dhatū brata, 5, mañcavara, saṅ hyaṅ padmā rāṣa tumurun ābrata, pinkā socca, bāyu śabda Idhǝp, sugih tan hina sāhambǝk phalanya.
8610
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, maṅan ... sāhambǝk phalanya <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.189 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.79 </note>
8615</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8620
.<!-- N hana bratā, hañkul haṅgi, hulam pahi, laṅa tṅaḥ lek, ranini paduka bhaṭārī Uma hyaṅ niṅ brata, pha, vavanon vastu, kinarmmakniṅ hakeḥ -->
.<!-- U hana bratā hañaṅkul haṅgi, hulam pahi, lamanya satṅaḥ lek, ranini pādukā bhaṭāri Uma hyaṅ niṅ bratā, pha, vavadon, svasta, kinarmma niṅ hakeḥ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.191">
8625<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_191">hana brata, añәkul haṅgi, ulam pahi, laṅa tәṅah lek, ranini paduka bhaṭārī Uma hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, vavanon vastu[,] kinarmakәniṅ akeh.</ab>
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, hañkul ... kinarmmakniṅ hakeḥ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.190 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.102 </note>
8630</app>
.</div>
.
.
.
8635<div type="subchapter" n="3.192">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_192">hana brata, amaṅan sәkul āṅgi, anaṅgap, 7, pur, sira saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣā tumuruna brata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, vadon viṣṇu anәmu, tan ahalavas tur prajñan, vicakṣaṇa, suka sugih riṅ dlāha.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8640<div type="subchapter" n="3.193">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_193">hana brata, amaṅan sәkul pañca varṇa, aren tiniṅkah cakra
.tinañcǝban vrәtti, denta maṅan maṅkana tatkāla kalivon, añakra bhuvana, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅśivatma sira turuna brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakayuṣa, pinakalaku, dadi vvaṅ aṅuripi jagat, suka sugih vәnaṅ pinakasariniṅ jagat, riṅ niṣkāla.
.</ab>
.</div>
8645
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.194">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_194">hana brata jaga varṇa, ṅa, amaṅan sәkul, balañan[,] pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, keḍәp deniṅ rāt, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, bisāgamǝl aṅiduṅ, viryavan.
.</ab>
.</div>
8650
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.195">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_195">hana brata, yan amaṅan hanǝmbah sәkul, pituṅ rātri divasanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ hyaṅ, śrī cittamaṇi ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.</ab>
.</div>
8655
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.196">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_196">hana brata naṅga sәkul, tinumpaṅan vrәtti, yan pәjah ikaṅ vrәtti, pavusan kita pamaṅān, pituṅ vәṅi lavasanya, salviriṅ hagata tan tame kita, aṅañcaṅ ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.</ab>
.</div>
8660
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.197">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_197">hana brata, yan amaṅan tinañcǝban vrәtti[,] vulan, saṅ hyaṅ anuṅkǝbi jagat hyaṅnya, ya minakārūpā hayu apәkik, [pha], riṅ dadi vvaṅ suka sugih, vәnaṅ amatūt jagat riṅ niṣkala.</ab>
.</div>
.
8665<div type="subchapter" n="3.198">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_198">hana brata, amaṅan tinañcǝban tuṅgul, tiniṅkah bhīma, hyaṅ maṇik teja, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ paṅirut jagat turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakalaku, pinakateja, [pha,] aśrī iṅiriṅ sañjata, sakṣat kǝmbaṅ tinuṅgulan, śakti aṅrәbahakǝn jagat riṅ niṣkala.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8670<div type="subchapter" n="3.199">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_199">hana brata, avrәtti, ṅa, yan amaṅan tinañcǝban vrәtti, pәjah taṅ vrәtti, havusān amaṅan, sapta rātri divasanya, pha, sarva rogha tan tumameṅ śarīranta.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8675<div type="subchapter" n="3.200">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_200">hana brata, aṅǝmbaṅ, ṅa, lamun a [36r]maṅan kǝmbaṅ rumuhun, tigaṅ tahun tigaṅ lek divaṣanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅnya, pha, deva sih iri kita.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8680<!-- End of 200 -->
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, ṅǝmbhaṅ, ṅa, tan luṅha yan kaparan tamu, bhaṭāra viśeṣā maveḥ bratā, pha, tan ilaṅ takonakna, hamaṅgiḥ deśa noranā voṅ sidḍi gave -->
.<!-- U hana bratā ngәmbaṅ, ṅa, tan luṅa yan kaparān tatāmu, bhaṭāra viśeṣa maveḥ bratā, pha, sugiḥ tan ilaṅ takonakna, manggə̄h iṅ deśa nora voṅ siddi gave -->
.
8685
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.201">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_201">hana brata, ṅǝmbaṅ, ṅa, tan luṅha yan kaparan tamu, bhaṭāra viśeṣā maveh brata, pha, sugih tan ilaṅ takonakәna , amaṅgih deśa norana voṅ siddhi gave.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, ṅǝmbhaṅ ... sidḍi gave <note>
8690 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.201 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.88 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
8695</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata hajātukar, ṅa, hamaṅan hasaṇḍiṅ pūlavā kǝmbaṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra guru maveḥ brattha, pha, hakaṛmma halaki hanom, tūṛ kinasihaniṅ pāṇḍita -->
.<!-- U hāna brātā haja tukāṛ, ṅa, hamaṅan hasaṇdhiṅ pulavā kәmbaṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra guru maveḥ brata, pha, hakāṛmma halaki hanom, tuṛ kinasiha niṅ pāṇdhitā -->
8700
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.202">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_202">hana brata hajātukar, ṅa, amaṅan asaṇdhiṅ pulava kǝmbaṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra guru maveh brata, pha, akarma alaki anom, tur kinasihaniṅ paṇḍita.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
8705 <note> hana brata hajātukar ... kinasihaniṅ pāṇḍita <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.202 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.89 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
8710</div>
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.203">
8715<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_203">hana brata, maṅan kǝmbaṅ naṅkǝṅ manis, hyaṅ maṇisumila haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ asmara hyaṅnya, ya pinakarūpa, aśrī sumilah, pasamuhaniṅ akeh riṅ niṣkala.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div><div type="subchapter" n="3.204">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_204">hana brata, yan amaṅan, tinumpaṅan kǝmbaṅ campaka, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik pudhak haraniṅ brata, hyaṅ vidakā turunābrata, ya minakarūpa, apәkik anulus, [pha] tumitis iṅ menak, ring dadi vvaṅ, suka sugih, vicakṣaṇa riṅ niṣkala. </ab>
8720</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.205">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_205">hana brata, maṅan lalab luṅluṅan, mvaṅ kinǝmbaṅakǝn, 2, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik arṣana hyaṅnya, bhaṭāra bāyu sira turunābrata, ya minakarūpa , pinakaurip[,] pinakarambut, pinakalǝye , pinakaidhǝp, pinakagulu, pinakasindhuvā, pinakalimbeyan, [pha] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, sukā sugih, ambǝk ahәniṅ, akǝmbaṅ avə̄h riṅ niṣkala.
.</ab>
8725</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.206">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_206">hana brata, amaṅan lalab balaka, sambǝl sinamohva , mantra patala, ṅa, hyaṅ baśūki turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakālit, pinakadalamakaniṅ suku, pinakatahulan, pinakakәliṅ, [pha,] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, suka sugih, lәmah sīma, kinapeṅin deniṅ voṅ riṅ niṣkala.
.</ab>
8730</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.207">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_207">hana brata, yan amaṅan tinumpaṅan vīja, saṅ hyaṅ vira kusuma, ṅa, hyaṅ jayaniṅ rāt turunābrata, ya minakarūpa, pinakajәnǝṅ, pinakapamulu, śakti aheṅ rūpanta, [pha,] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, suka sugih, rāja drәvve, mās pirak, putra putri riṅ niṣkala.
.</ab>
8735</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.208">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_208">hana brata, yan amaṅan tinumpaṅan sәkar vaṅi vaṅi, saṅ hyaṅ mūrvva gaṇḍa vaṅi haraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik sumirit hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa , pinakakulit, pinakahambu, [pha] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, mrәbuk arūm, anǝrus tkeṅ kadaton riṅ niṣkala.
.</ab>
8740</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.209">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_209">hana brata, yan amaṅan sәkar śrigaḍiṅ, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik śrī danti hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakagugusi, pinakahuntu, [pha] aśri sakeṅ huntunta, suka sugih, !saṅ hyaṅ vidayaka sira turunābrata, pinakarūpa, apәkik anulus, tumitisiṅ menak, prakavi vicakṣaṇa riṅ niṣkala!.
.</ab>
8745</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.210">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_210">hana brata, yan amaṅan alamak sukǝt, puṣpani smrәti, ṅa, bhaṭāra smara hyaṅnya, ya pinakālas, [pha,] nәhәr kinasihaniṅ bapebu.
.</ab>
8750</div>
.
.<!-- 13/13/2026 -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.211">
8755<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_211">hana brata, amaṅan alamak patra, amūrti prāṇa, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pagər gunuṅ sira turunābrata, ya pinakahuntu, [pha,] dirgha yuṣa, pәjah tan pahavan kadga.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.212">
8760<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_212">hana brata, [amaṅan] aren roṇḍon, pituṅ vulan pituṅ vәṅi divasanya, bhaṭāra mahīśvara hyaṅnya, pha, mulih mariṅ bhaṭāra mahiśvara, sasvarga sira, sasarnya majanma riṅ juru baṣa, labdhavara ri san ahulun.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.213">
8765<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_213">hana brata, amaṅan aren upih, pinuluṅ kuyupakәna , pha, sugih dodot, mvaṅ siñjaṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.214">
8770<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_214">hana brata, [amaṅan] haren pampat, kvehnya, 73, aṇḍaniṅ janur, iṅaṅge, pha, suka sugih, apәkik halus havakta, jarijinta lәmǝs.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.215">
8775<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_215">hana brata, sarvagata, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pahupa, pataṅ lek pataṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, bisa gamәl aṅiduṅ, vāk bhajra siddhi mantra, jayeṅ śatru kedhәp deniṅ rāt, suka sugih saṅkan rare.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.216">
8780<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_216">hana brata, asiṅ ṅaranya, !pisan amaṅan kinaṅ!, yan amaṅan sumәlapāṅinaṅ, nәhәr tan pahupa, salek lavasnya, bhaṭārī Uma hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ yanā Devî nama svāhā, !ahes!, pha, suka sugih hamǝpǝki kadhaton.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, tan paṅinaṅ, hañǝmbuṅ kevalā, salek ṣamayanya, saṅ hyaṅ majaya hyaṅniṅ bratta, pha, habhra sumilaḥ miyat kabeḥ, keḍǝp āṅūcapta deniṅ rāt -->
8785<!-- U hana brata tan paṅinaṅ, hanәmbaṅ saUlan, saṅ hyaṅ kāmajaya hya niṅ bratā, pha, habhru dumilaḥ, siṅ miyat kabeḥ, kedhәp paṅucapta, deniṅ rāt -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.216.1">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_216.1">hana brata, tan paṅinaṅ, añǝmbuṁ kevala, salek ṣamayanya, saṁ hyaṅ majaya hyaṅniṁ bratta, pha, habhra sumilah miyat kabeh, keḍǝp aṅūcapta deniṁ rāt·
.
8790 <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, tan ... deniṅ rāt <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.218 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.77 </note>
.</app>
8795</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.217">
8800<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_217">hana brata, saṅgga ṅinaṅ, ṅa, satahun salek lavasnya, pha, drәman malakya rabi, ratu asih, ahes, ma, Om̐ braśri vastuya nama svāhā.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8805
.<!-- N hana bratā, hasihaniṅ layon, ṅa, haṅinaṅ tan pambuñcal spaḥ, tigaṅ tavun samayanya, sahiṅ spaḥ kinampelākǝn, bhinaṣmi, Iki pitutūṛnya, ma, Om̐ bhaṭāra mati, hahurip mani hamoriṅ megha, tumitis dadi saṛvvendaḥ, pinakā buktiniṅ hulun, sa ba ta A I namā śiva ya -->
.<!-- U hana bratā hasiha niṅ layon, ṅa, hanginaṅ tan pambuñcal spaḥ tigaṅ tahun samayanya, sahiṅ spaḥ kinampelakәn, bhinaṣmi, Iki pitutūrnya, ma, Om̐ bhaṭāra māti, haurip maniḥ, hamor iṅ megha, tumitis dadi saṛvvā Endaḥ, pinaka bhūkti niṅ hulun, sa ba ta A I, nama śiva ya -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.218">
8810<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_218">hana brata, asihaniṅ layon, ṅa, aṅinaṅ tan pambuñcal sәpah, tigaṅ tavun samayanya, sahiṅ sәpah kinampelakǝn, bhinaṣmi, Iki pitutūrnya, ma, Om̐ bhaṭāra mati, ahurip mani amoriṅ megha, tumitis dadi sarvvendah, pinakabuktini ṅhulun, sa ba ta A I namā śiva ya.
. <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, hasihaniṅ ... namā śiva ya <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.219 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.112 </note>
8815</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, hadahaṛ pucaṅ tṅaḥ vlas, vulamaniṅ pahi, ranini paduka bhaṭāri hanuṅkurāt hyaṅniṅ bratā, pha, habcikaṅ jariji -->
8820<!-- U hāna brātā hadahaṛ pucāṅ, satṅaḥ vlas, hulamā niṅ pahi, ranini padukā bhāṭāri hanuṅkurāt, hyaṅ niṅ brāta, pha, habcik kaṅ jariji -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.219">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_219">hana brata, adahaṛ pucaṅ tәṅaḥ vәlas, vulamaniṅ pahi, ranini paduka bhaṭāri hanuṅkurāt hyaṁniṁ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ jariji.
. <app><lem wit="#N"></lem>
8825 <note> hana bratā, hadahaṛ ... habcikaṅ jariji <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.220 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.100 </note>
.</app>
.
8830</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.220">
8835<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_220">hana brata, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ dhūpa dhamar, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik teja, ṅa, hyaṅ maṇik muntab sira turunā brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakateja, śakti mahabhāra, [pha,] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, abhrā murub sumilah, aheṅ jәrih kaṅ rāt denta.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.221">
8840<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_221">hana brata, adahar pucaṅ tәṅah vәlah, vulamaniṅ pahi, ranini paduka bhaṭārī anuṅkurāt hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ jariji.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
8845<!-- N hana bratā, damar haguṅ ṅaranya, tan pamaṅan kasurupan saṅ hyaṅ sūṛyya, savārṣa lamanya, kaṅ pinaṅan, yuyukan, bavaṅ huṅkul, tarāsi, sasivi, rarakā malo, caṅkuk saṛvvan vinaṅkul, prutāmuṛadaṅan, pha, kacakṣu riṅ saṛvva rusit, luputiṅ sāṛvva sāstra, tan maṅhel vinuṛuknya, tumusiṅ hajī, haṅlariṅ kevuḥ, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅ bratta -->
.
.<!-- U hana brata maṛ aguṅ, ṅa, tan kasurupān saṅ hyaṅ sūṛyya savaṛṣa sәṅkәṛnyā kaṅ pinaṅanya yuyuk, bavaṅ huṅkul, taraṣi, sasivi, raraka malo, caṅkuk saṛvvan vinuṅkul, prut amūradaṇan, phalanya, kacakṣu riṅ saṛvva rusik, luputiṅ saṛvva śāstra, tan maṅel vinuruktā, tumusiṅ haji, taṅlariṅ kevuḥ,bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅ nira hyaṅniṅ bratā -->
.
.
8850<div type="subchapter" n="3.222">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_222"> hana brata, damar aguṅ ṅaranya, tan pamaṅan kasurupan saṅ hyaṅ sūryya, savarṣa lamanya, kaṅ pinaṅan, yuyukan, bavaṅ huṅkul, tarasi, sasivi, rarakā malo , caṅkuk sarvan vinuṅkul, prutāmuradaṅan, pha, kacakṣu riṅ sarva rusit, luputiṅ sarva śāstra, tan maṅhel vinuruknya, tumusiṅ hajī, aṅlariṅ kevuh, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅ brata.
. <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, damar ... hyaṅniṅ bratta <note>
. </note>
8855 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.222 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.120 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
.</div>
8860
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.223">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_223">hana brata, pasaṅ sande, ṅa, tan pamaṅan kasurupan saṅeṅe, pha, apaḍaṅ kaṅ hati, yan asisinahu eṅgal bisa.
8865</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hanā bratā, tan pamaṅan riṅ puṛṇnamanīm kadaśa, hantuk tigaṅ pūṛṅnamaniṅ kadaśa, pha, svaṛgga sakāla katmu,mañjanma riṅ ratū, paripūṛṇnā nurāga riṅ rāt -->
8870<!-- P tan paṅan riṅ pūṛṇnamaniṅ kadaśa, hantuk tigaṅ pūṛṇnamaniṅ kadaśa, phalanya svaṛgga katәmu sakāla, mañjanmā riṅ ratu paripūṛṇna, nurāga riṅ rāt -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.224">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_224">hana brata, tan pamaṅan riṅ pūrṇamaniṅ kadaśa, antuk tigaṅ pūrṅamaniṅ kadaśa, pha, svarga sakala katәmu, mañjanma riṅ ratu, paripūrṇānurāga riṅ rāt.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
8875 <note> hanā bratā, tan ... riṅ rāt <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.224 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.99</note>
.</app>
.
8880</ab>
.</div>
.
.<!-- p xml:id="tattvaBrataJava_01.17" n="5" -->
.
8885
.<!-- N hana brata, mūṛṅnama sadā, ṅa, pūṛṇnama tan pamaṅan tkaniṅ paṅloṅ hapisan tīlǝm tkaniṅ taṅgal hapisan, pha, sugiḥ manrus, katkan sapinakṣanira riṅ bhūmi, saṅ prajuritiṅ bhūmi hyaṅniṅ brata -->
.<!-- P hana bratā hamūṛṇnamā saddhā, ṅaranya kramanyā, pūṛṇnama tan paṅān tәkāniṅ paṅloṅ hapisan, til̥m tәkaniṅ taṅgal hapisan, saṅ prajuritiṅ bhumi hyaṅnya hyaṅniṅ brata, phalanya sugiḥ manәrus tәkana pinakṣānira riṅ bhūmi -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.225">
8890<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_225"> hana brata, mūrṅama sadā, ṅa, pūrṇama tan pamaṅan tәkaniṅ paṅloṅ apisan tilǝm tәkaniṅ taṅgal apisan, pha, sugih manәrus, katәkan sapinakṣanira riṅ bhūmi, saṅ prajuritiṅ bhūmi hyaṅniṅ brata.
.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, mūṛṅnama ... hyaṅniṅ brata <note>
. </note>
8895 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.225 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.107 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8900
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.226">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_226">hana brata akasukhan, ṅa, riṅ pūrṅamaniṅ kapitu, piṅ, 7, sarahina, piṅ, 7, savәṅi, amaṅan aṅinum, aṅigǝl, bhaṭāra kapitu maveh brata, pha, suka sugih, anak amitra, dīrgha yuṣa, keḍәp kapintuhu.
.</ab>
8905</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.227">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_227">
. hana brata, mәnǝr ri taṅgal, piṅ, 3, maṅan kuñit, mūrṇama sadā, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ trisandhi hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra mahādeva, ya pinakarūpa, pinakapamulu, mvaṅ kavicakṣaṇan, [pha,] tan kaluputan.</ab>
8910
.<ab>taṅgal, piṅ, 4, amaṅan kәtan irәṅ, amukti labdha, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ cadu śakti hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra viṣṇu, ya pinakarupa, pinakarambut, [pha,] siddhaniṅ ṅvaṅ, anvargakǝn bapebu.</ab>
.
.<ab>taṅ, piṅ, 5, […] amañcavara śakti, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pañcavara hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan bhaṭāra śiva, ya pinakarūpa, pinaka Idhǝp, pinakatǝndhas [pha,] siddhaniṅ ṅvaṅ sugih tan kaharṣa.</ab>
.</div>
8915
.
.<!-- N hana bratā maṅān rakā, puṛṇnama limaṅ rakā, sira saṅ hyaṅ patūt siḥ tumurunā bratā, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakālalakon suka sugiḥ tan panambut kaṛyya -->
.<!-- U hāna bratā hamaṅan rakā, pūrṇnama til̥m ṅrakā, sira saṅ hyaṅ patutan siḥ tumurun abratā, ginañjaran sakti lima, pinakārama, pinakālalakon, sukā sugiḥ tan panambut, kāṛyya -->
.
8920<div type="subchapter" n="3.228">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_228">hana brata maṅan raka, pūrṇama limaṅ raka, sira saṅ hyaṅ patūt sih tumurunābrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakarāma, pinakalalakon suka sugih tan panambut kārya.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā maṅān ... panambut kaṛyya <note>
8925 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.228 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.110 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
8930</div>
.
.
.
.
8935
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.229">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_229">hana brata, mūrṇama tilәm, ṅa, maṅupavaśa[,] aṅraka kunǝṅ, [pha] utaṅiṅ atvanta, kәna sinahur[,] polihnya sakarәpta.
.</ab>
.</div>
8940
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.230">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_230">hana brata, ṅraka naṅkǝn kalivon, patra, ṅa, hyaṅ taruṇa turunābrata, [ya] pinakarūpa, [pha] siddhaniṅ vaṅ sugih lәmah śima.</ab>
.</div>
.
8945<div type="subchapter" n="3.231">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_231">hana brata, maṅan sarva phala, talǝs huvi vahvahan pisaṅ kunaṅ, pituṅ vәṅi lavasnya, kasubhagan kinaharṣan deniṅ istri phalanya, Abhoh kayu ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8950<div type="subchapter" n="3.232">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_232">hana brata, maṅan phala gantuṅ, davun sinabraṅ, ṅa, pha, prajurit.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8955<div type="subchapter" n="3.233">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_233">hana brata, maṅan sarva buṅkah, sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa hyaṅniṅ brata, suka sugih, puṣṭaka lǝṅǝn phalanya.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8960<div type="subchapter" n="3.234">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_234">hana brata, amaṅan sarva phala, sapta rātri lavasnya, pha, kinasihaniṅ strī, yaniṅ strī kinasihaniṅ kakuṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8965<div type="subchapter" n="3.235">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_235">hana brata, amaṅan tur ambaṅkit, bhaṭārī keḍәp hyaṅniṅ brata, ṅgonaniṅ amimiti, riṅ pavon, punaṅ kininaṅ sәḍah sapon den tuvuh, lalamak lampuyaṅ, tan pamaṅan tan paṅinaṅ, yan tan panggugut lampuyaṅ, pha, vavadon tan pagigilutan, keḍәp malaki.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8970<div type="subchapter" n="3.236">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_236">hana brata, amaṅan katambat tigaṅ bulih, naṅkǝn kalivon, tan pamaṅan paran paran, pituṅ kalivon samayanya, pha, apәkik tur lǝmǝsiṅ rambut.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
8975<div type="subchapter" n="3.237">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_237">hana brata, ambhūmi lәpa, ṅa, amaṅan jaṅaniṅ lǝlǝpa kabeh, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra Iśvara maveh brata, pha, kinasihaniṅ svami, keḍәp alaki, kinasihaniṅ
.hyaṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
8980
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.238">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_238">hana brata, amaṅana mimba, salek lavasnya, pha, athāravit.
.</ab>
.</div>
8985
.
.<!-- N hana brata, sāṛvva tatā, ṅa, hamaṅan luṅggahiṅ ganḍa ruṣa kliṅ, mvaṅ campaka garūs, bhaṭāra sāmbhu hyaṅnya, pha, muliḥ, riṅ svaṛgga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ riṅ bhaṭāra śiva -->
.<!-- P hana brata saṛvva tatā, ṅa, hamaṅan luṅgāhiṅ gada ruṣa kliṅ mvaṅ cāmpakā garus, bhaṭara sambu hyaṅnya, phalanya, muliḥ riṅ svaṛggan bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ riṅ bhaṭāra śiva -->
.
8990<div type="subchapter" n="3.239">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_239">hana brata, sarvatata, ṅa, amaṅan luṅggahiṅ gaṇḍa rusa kәliṅ, mvaṅ campaka garus, bhaṭāra śambhu hyaṅnya, pha, mulih[,] riṅ svarga bhaṭāra guru, mvaṅ riṅ bhaṭāra śiva.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, sāṛvva ... bhaṭāra śiva <note>
. </note>
8995 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.239 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.80 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9000
.<!-- G hana brāta vijahara, ṅa, Amaṅanvija rumuhun, saha pucukiṅ gaṇḍa ruṣā, pucukiṅ ṅalalaṅ, phalanya prajñā na kinasihaniṅ strī -->
.<!-- N hana brata, vijāharā, ṅa, hamaṅan vija rumuhun, sahā pucukiṅ ganḍaruṣā, pucukiṅ halaṅ halaṅ, pha, prajñān kittha, sihaniṅ histri -->
.<!-- U hana brata vijahara, ṅa, hamaṅan sāṛvva vija rumuhun, saha pucuk iṅ gandha ruṣa pucuk iṅ ṅalaṅ ṅalaṅ, pha, prajñan kitā, siha niṅ stri -->
.<!-- P hana brata miśahara, ṅa, hamaṅan vijā rumuhun, saha pucukim gaṇdha ruṣā kliṅ, pucukiṅ halaṅ alaṅ, phalanya, praṇa kinasihan deniṅ stri -->
9005
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.240">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_240">hana brata, vījāharā, ṅa, amaṅan vīja rumuhun, saha pucukiṅ gaṇḍa rusa, pucukiṅ alaṅ-alaṅ, pha, prajñan kita, sihaniṅ istrī.
.<app><lem wit="#G #N #P #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, vijāharā ... sihaniṅ istri <note>
9010 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.33 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.240 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.15 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.33 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
9015
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.241">
9020<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_241">hana brata, maṅan sarva luṅgah luṅgahan, pucukiṅ dukut lәpas, pucukiṅ alaṅ-alaṅ, tuñjuṅ, vija tәluṅ jumput, sapta rātri pituṅ dina lavasanya, siddha kārya saphalanya, Amūrva ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.242">
9025<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_242">hana brata ṅantavali, ṅa, amaṅan hantavali, pañjaṅnya salǝṅkat madhya, pituṅ tumpǝk kalivon patәlasanya, mirica pituṅ viji, ligundi pituṅ muñcuk, pha, salara vighna hilaṅ donya, sojarira keḍәp, !...! katәmu maṅke mvaṅ dlāha.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.243">
9030<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_243">hana brata nirambu, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarva binumbon, satahun lavasnya, pha, mulih mariṅ svarga bhaṭāra rūdra, sasarnya majanma ri listvayu, apәkik prajurit.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.244">
9035<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_244">hana brata, amaṅan kәtan baṅ[,] pituṅ vәṅi, hirәṅ pituṅ vәṅi, ivaknya sarva śuci, arariṅ śakti, ṅa, bhagavān paraśara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, akadaṅ voṅ pәkik.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9040<!-- N hana bratā, maṅan ktan ya takǝp, voṅ tuṅgal tuṅgalriṅ kalivon, 7, hǝmbanya pāla, sahaṅ, mñan, Aṅgara kasih āmaṅan, 7, halaṇḍyan, sira saṅ hyaṅ hasihiṅ praṇā turuna brata, ginañjaran śakti lima, pha, suka sugiḥ, sapatinya vnaṅ-->
.<!-- U hana bratā, hamaṅan liktan takәp voṅ tuṅgal riṅ kālivon, 7, hәmbanyaphala, mñan, sahaṅ, haṅgara kāsiḥ hamaṅan, 7, halaṇdhyan, sira saṅ hyaṅ asih iṅ prāṇa, sira turun abrāta, ginañjaran sakti lima, pha, suka sugiḥ, sapatinya vnaṅ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.245">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_245">hana brata, maṅan kәtan[,] ya taṅkǝp , voṅ tuṅgal tuṅgal riṅ kalivon, 7, hǝmbanya phala, sahaṅ, mәñan, aṅgara kaśih amaṅan, 7, alaṇdhyan, sira saṅ hyaṅ asihiṅ prāṇa turunābrata, ginañjaran śakti lima, pha, suka sugih, sapatinya vәnaṅ.
9045
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, maṅan ... sapatinya vnaṅ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.245 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.108 </note>
9050</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9055
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.246">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_246">hana brata, anila, ṅa, amaṅan kәtan hirәṅ, satahun samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra viṣṇu, sasarnya majanma riṅ mantrī.
.</ab>
.</div>
9060
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.247">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_247">hana brata, murāṇa, ṅa, amaṅan ñahñah lan gula tәbu, lamanya tigaṅ dina, pha, tan kataman siṅ saparanta.</ab>
.</div>
.
9065<div type="subchapter" n="3.248">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_248">Hana brata, maṅan tan dady akarvan, pituṅ lek lavasnya, suka magə̄ṅ phalanya, eka patra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.249">
9070<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_249">hana brata, tan kapadan, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pakǝmbulan, aduluran pañcamuna, sahuripnya riṅ amaṅan, alalab roṇḍon, mvaṅ kǝmbhaṅ, uttamaniṅ brata kabeh, pha, tan kapadan viśeṣa, maṅkana polahira saṅ viku
.tәmǝn tәmǝn.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9075
.<!-- G hana brata, kramanya tan vәnaṅ hākәmbulan amaṅan, pataṅ varṣa samayanya, phalanya, mantukiṅ bhaṭāra rudra, jānma riṅ vikulaputra, kadaṅ haji, nuraggā -->
.<!-- N hana brata, hamaṅan tan pakǝmbulan, ptaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, mantuk riṅ svaṛgga bhaṭāra rudra, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṅ kula putra, kaḍaṅ hajī subhagā -->
.<!-- P hana brata tan kavasa hamaṅan hakәmbulan, pәtaṅ tavun, samayanyā, phalanya mantuk riṅ svaṛggan bhaṭāra rudrā, mañjanmā riṅ kula putra, hakadaṅ haji, subhaga -->
.
9080<div type="subchapter" n="3.250">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_250">hana brata, amaṅan tan pakǝmbulan, pәtaṅ tahun samayanya, pha, mantuk riṅ svarga bhaṭāra rudra, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ kulaputra, kaḍaṅ haji subhaga.</ab>
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, hamaṅan ... hajī subhagā <note>
. </note>
9085 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.79 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.250 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.95 </note>
.</app>
.</div>
.
.
9090<!-- N hana brata, haṅaju, ṅa, hamaṅan riṅ vaton salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveḥ brata, pha, tka hatuduhiṅ paliṅgihan, keḍǝp tka ruruṅeniṅ voṅ -->
.<!-- U hana brāta hanaju, ṅa, hamaṅan riṅ vāton, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveḥ bratā, pha, tkā hatuduh iṅ paluṅguhan, kedhәp, tka rurube niṅ voṅ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.251">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_251">hana brata, aṅajum , ṅa, amaṅan riṅ vaton salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveh brata, pha, tәka atuduhiṅ paliṅgihan, keḍәp tәka ruruṅeniṅ voṅ.
9095<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, haṅaju ... ruruṅeniṅ voṅ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.251 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.83 </note>
.</app>
9100</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
9105
.<!-- N hana bratā, hamutriṅ paṅkon, ṅa, hamaṅan pinaṅku, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādevā maveḥ brattā, pha, kinasihan deniṅ bapa hibu, malakya rabi, sasaṛnya dadi bhujaṅga l̥viḥ -->
.<!-- U hana brātā hamutriṅ paṅkon, ṅa, hamaṅun pinaṅku, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveḥ brata, pha, kinasihan deniṅ bapa Ibu, satyā rabi, sasanya dadi bhujaṅga l̥viḥ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.252">
9110<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_252">hana brata, amutәriṅ paṅkon, ṅa, amaṅan pinaṅku, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra mahādeva maveh brata, pha, kinasihan deniṅ bapa ibu, malakya rabi, sasarnya dadi bhujaṅga lәvih.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, hamutriṅ ... bhujaṅga l̥viḥ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.252 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.84 </note>
9115</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9120
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.253">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_253">hana brata, amaṅan [ri] ryaghūrṇita, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, siddhi mantra, listvayu paripūrṇa.</ab>
.</div>
.
9125
.<!-- N hana brata, naṅkə̄nāra, ṅa, yan āmaṅan haṅagǝm jinaḥ, 7, salek ṣamayanyā, saṅ hyaṅ rūdrā hyaṅniṅ bratā, pha, haklāṛ tan kneṅ śrī kitthā -->
.<!-- U hana brāta tān angkәn nāra ṅaranya, yan hamaṅan aṅagәm jina, pituṅ lek samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ rudra hyaṅ niṅ brata, pha, haklaṛ tane kneṅ griṅ kitā -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.254">
9130<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_254">hana brata, naṅkə̄nāra, ṅa, yan amaṅan aṅagǝm jinah, 7, salek samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ rūdra hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, akәlar tan kәneṅ śrī kita.
. <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, naṅkə̄nāra ... griṅ kitā <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.254 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.78 </note>
9135</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9140<!-- N hana brata, hasaṇḍiṅ jinaḥ keteṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra Indra maveḥ bratā, pha, prajñā prakavi, Aṣṭa kosalā, sasaṛnya dadi patiḥ sugiḥ -->
.<!-- U hana bratā āsaṇdhiṅ jinaḥ, saketeṅ, salek lavasnyā, bhaṭāra Indra maveḥ bratā, pha, prajñan prakavi, haṣthā kośala, sasaṛnya dadi patiḥ śugiḥ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.255">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_255">hana brata, asaṇḍiṅ jinah keteṅ, salek lavasnya, bhaṭāra Indra maveh brata, pha, prajña prakavi, Aṣṭa kośala, sasarnya dadi patih sugih.
9145<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, hasaṇḍiṅ ... patiḥ sugiḥ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.255 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.90 </note>
.</app>
9150</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
9155<!-- G hana brata, amaṅan aṅandhut, savarṣā samayanya, phalanya, sugiḥ, siddhi mandhi, havak braja, subaggā -->
.<!-- N hana brata, maṅan āṅadut, satavun lavasnya, pha, sugiḥ sidḍi mandi, vāk bhajrā subhagā -->
.<!-- P hana brata hamaṅan haṅadut, savaṛṣa lavasnyā, phalanya sugiḥ siddhi maṇdhi mahavak bajrā, subhāga-->
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.256">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_256">hana brata, maṅan aṅadut, satavun lavasnya, pha, sugih siddhi mandi, vāk bhajra subhaga.
9160<app><lem wit="#G #N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, maṅan ... bhajrā subhagā <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#G"/> in III.88 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.256 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.122 </note>
.</app>
9165</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
9170<!-- N hana brata, hamaṅan kupat pāṇḍava, 3, paṅanǝn esuk, 1, paṅanǝn taṅaṅe, 1, paṅanǝn sore, 1, pha, rinakṣa deniṅ rāt, kinasavitan deniṅ samā janma, haja nali vavak tayanya,tan pamuruṅ poliḥnya -->
.<!-- U hana brāta hamaṅan kupāt pāṇdhava, 3, paṅanәnnen aEsuk, 1, paṅanәn tṅaṅe, 1, paṅanәn sore, 1. pha, rinākṣa deniṅ rāt, kinasāvitan deniṅ sama janma, tan pamurup oliḥnya -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.257">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_257">hana brata, amaṅan kupat pāṇḍava, 3, paṅanǝn esuk, 1, paṅanǝn tәṅah ṅve, 1, paṅanǝn sore, 1, pha, rinakṣa deniṅ rāt, kinasavitan deniṅ sama janma, hajana livavaktayanya, tan pamuruṅ polihnya.
9175 <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, hamaṅan ... pamuruṅ poliḥnya <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.257 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.72 </note>
.</app>
9180</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
9185<div type="subchapter" n="3.258">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_258">hana brata, maṅan kupat, mevaka sarva śukla, tәluṅ vәṅi divasanya, bhaṭāra Iśvara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha[,] biṣa ṅiduṅ, abәcikiṅ ulon, manisiṅ panutukan, mvaṅ kinasihaniṅ voṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9190<div type="subchapter" n="3.259">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_259">hana brata, adahar lәpǝt, lama tәṅah vulan, ranini kundaṅ kasih hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, arampiṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9195<div type="subchapter" n="3.260">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_260">hana brata, naḍah tumpəṅ, sahasta pañjaṅnya, śūnya ivaknya uyah arәṅ kevala, anarasvatī, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ pitu tan palavan hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakaprajña, sih malakya rabi, siddhaniṅ vaṅ sugih tan surud, mvaṅ pradaṇānuṅku rāt.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9200<div type="subchapter" n="3.261">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_261">hana brata, maṅan tumpəṅ, lavasnya tәṅah śaśih, lamun tan kavaśa, pituṅ dina, ranini paduka bhaṭārī hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ gulu.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9205<!-- N hana bratā, haṅado savguṅ, bhaṭāra rūdra maveḥ brata, pha, sugiḥ rumbe -->
.<!-- U hana bratā hadәṅo savguṅ, bhaṭāra rudra maveḥ bratā, pha, sugiḥ rumbe -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.262">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_262">hana brata, adva savәguṅ, bhaṭāra rūdra maveh brata, pha, sugih rumbe.
9210<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, haṅado ... sugiḥ rumbe <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.262 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.91 </note>
.</app>
9215</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata, hasidakǝp sarahinā, bhaṭāra saṅkara maveḥ bratā, pha kinasihaniṅ voṅ -->
9220<!-- P hana brata hasidakәp sarahina, bhaṭāra śaṅkāra maveḥ brata, phalanya kinasihan deniṅ voṅ -->
.<!-- U hana brātā hasidakәp, sarahina, bhaṭāra śaṅkara maveḥ bratā, pha, kinasihaniṅ voṅ -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.263">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_263">hana brata, asidakǝp sarahina, bhaṭāra saṅkara maveh brata, pha kinasihaniṅ voṅ.
9225 <app><lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, hasidakǝp ... kinasihaniṅ voṅ <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.263 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.144 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.92 </note>
.</app>
9230</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
9235
.<!-- N hana bratā, lumaku savṅi sarahinā, pha, dadi deva guru, sasaṛnya dadi viku bahu siṣya, hapkik rupā, teja tiniṅhalan, sugiḥ saṅkan rare, sugīh tus tumus -->
.<!-- P hana brata lumaku savәṅi, sarahinā, sasaṛnya dadi deva guru bavu siṣya, pәkik rupa tejā, sugiḥ saṅkan rare, hus tumus -->
.<!-- U hana bratā lumaku savṅi sarahina, bhaṭāra guru maveḥ bratā, pha, sasaṛnya dadi devaga guru, bāhuśiṣya hapkik rupā, suteja tiniṅhalān, sugiḥ saṅkan rare, sugiḥ trus tumus -->
.
9240
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.264">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_264">hana brata, lumaku savәṅi sarahina, pha, dadi deva guru, sasarnya dadi viku bahu siṣya, apәkik rūpa, teja tiniṅhalan, sugih saṅkan rare, sugih tus tumus.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, lumaku ... tus tumus <note>
9245 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.264 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.145 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.93 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
9250</div>
.
.
.
.
9255<!-- N hana brata, hamlə̄ṅ tutuk sarahinā vṅi, puṛ, saṅ hyaṅ hanmu jagat sira turunābrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti limā, pinakārāma, pinakalalakon vadon, listvayu, prajñān, lanaṅ vicakṣaṇā, suka sugiḥ, maṅke kalavan tǝmbe-->
.<!-- P hana brata hamaleṅ tutuk, sarahina savәṅi, mar̥p pūṛvva, saṅ hyaṅ hanәmu jagat sira turun habratā,ginañjaran śakti lima pinaka lalakon vadon, lituhayu prajñān, lanaṅ vicakṣaṇa, suka sugiḥ maṅke kalavan tәmbe -->
.<!-- U hana bratā hamlәṅ tutuk sarahinā, savṅi, pūr, saṅ hyaṅ hanmu jagat sira turun abratā, ginañjaran sakti lima, pinakārapi, pinalalakon vaṅ vadon, listuhayu prajñan, lanaṅ vicakṣaṇā, sukā sugiḥ maṅke kaṅ kalāvan tәmbe -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.265">
9260<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_265">hana brata, amәlәṅ tutuk sarahina vәṅi, pur, saṅ hyaṅ anәmu jagat sira turunābrata, pha, ginañjaran śakti lima, pinakarāma, pinakalalakon vadon, listvayu, prajñan, lanaṅ vicakṣaṇa, sukha sugih, maṅke kalavan tǝmbe.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, hamlə̄ṅ ... kalavan tǝmbe <note>
. </note>
9265 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.265 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.148 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.107 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9270
.
.<!-- N hana bratā ṅalamuñə̄ṅ, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ lbūṛ jagat sira turunā brata, ginañjaran śakti lima, voṅ tuṅgal sakvehiṅ sira habratā, ya pinakārūpā, pinakalakon, vastu rahayu, lanaṅ vadon suka sugiḥ dr̥mman keḍǝp -->
.<!-- U hana brātā ṅalamuñәṅ, pūṛ, saṅ hyaṅ l̥buṛ jagat sira saṅ turunābrātā, ginañjaran ṣakti lima, voṅ tuṅgal sakveh iṅ sira habratā, yan pinaka pūpa, pinakā lālakon, vastu rahayu, lanaṅ vadon sukā sugiḥ, kedhәp -->
.
9275<div type="subchapter" n="3.266">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_266">hana brata ṅālamuñə̄ṅ, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ lәbur jagat sira turunābrata, ginañjaran śakti lima, voṅ tuṅgal sakvehiṅ sira abrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakalakon, vastu rahayu, lanaṅ vadon suka sugih drәman keḍәp.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā ṅalamuñə̄ṅ ... dr̥mman keḍǝp <note>
9280 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.266 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.113 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
9285
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.267">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_267">hana brata, ṅalacakra, ṅa, sira saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa riṅ bhuvana, sira turunābrata, ginañjarān śakti tigaṅ rakṣa , sakvehaniṅ abrata, pha, suka sugih, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, lanaṅ vadon.
9290</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.268">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_268">hana brata, mañca vaśa gina, ṅa, tan paṅlavaniṅ vadon aṅucap, naṅkǝn manis, yan vadon tan paṅucapiṅ kakuṅ, tan paṅinaṅ suruhiṅ apvan, lǝlǝmbaran vәnaṅ, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tinūtiṅ mās, salviriṅ drәventa tǝmbe.</ab>
9295</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, kukuśaniṅ śarīra, ṅa, tan pamaṅan suku pat, lavasnyā sakavaśahaniṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ candu śakti sira turunā brata, ya minakarūpā, pinakavaṅkoṅ, sidḍaniṅ vvaṅ muṣṭikā, keh avlas, rovaṅ hasih iri kitā, haṅraṅkus bratā -->
.<!-- U (ha)na, bratā hakukusa niṅ śarīra, ṅa, tan pamaṅan suku pat, lavasnya sakāvaśā-niṅṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ caduśakti sira turun abrata, ya pinakā rūpa, pinaka vaṅkoṅ, sidda niṅ vvaṅ mustikā, rovaṅ akeḥ havlas riṅ sira, haṅraṅkul haṅrangkus brata -->
9300
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.269">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_269">hana brata, kukusaniṅ śarīra, ṅa, tan pamaṅan suku pat, lavasnya sakavaśahaniṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ cadu śakti sira turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakavaṅkoṅ, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ muṣṭika, keh avәlas, rovaṅ asih iri kita, aṅraṅkus brata.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
9305 <note> hana bratā, kukuśaniṅ ... haṅraṅkus bratā <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.269 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.74 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
9310</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana brata, tan pamaṅan bavi, hyaṅ manasija hyaṅnya, pituṅ tavun samayanya, pha, luputiṅ griṅ haguṅ, tuṛ kinasian deniṅ jagat -->
.<!-- P hana brata tan pamaṅan bavi, hyaṅ manaśija hyaṅnyā, lavasnya pituṅ tavun, phalanya, luputiṅ griṅ haguṅ kinasihan deniṅ jagat -->
9315
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.270">
