.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_270">hana brata, tan pamaṅan bavi, hyaṅ manasija hyaṅnya, pituṅ tavun samayanya, pha, luputiṅ gәriṅ aguṅ, tur kinasihan deniṅ jagat.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, tan ... deniṅ jagat <note>
9320 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.270 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.103 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
9325
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, tan pamaṅan sr̥galā, pha, rupānta tan akusut -->
.<!-- P hana brata tan pamaṅan sr̥galā, phalanya rūpanta tan akusut -->
9330<div type="subchapter" n="3.271">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_271">hana brata, tan pamaṅan śrәgāla, pha, rūpanta tan akusut.
.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, tan ... tan akusut <note>
9335 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.271 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.104 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
9340</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.272">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_272">hana brata, tan pamaṅan ayam, pituṅ lek samayanya, pha, tan pamaṅgih marū.</ab>
.</div>
9345
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, tan pamaṅan hayam, satahun samayanya, pha, tan panmu marū, tūṛ dr̥maman -->
.<!-- P hana brata tan pamaṅan hivak hayam, satavun lavasnya, phalanya tan panәmu maru tuṛ dr̥man -->
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.273">
9350<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_273">hana brata, tan pamaṅan ayam, satahun samayanya, pha, tan panәmu marū, tur drәman.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, tan ... tūṛ dr̥maman <note>
. </note>
9355 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.273 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.137 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9360
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.274">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_274">hana brata, akәrisa, ṅa, tan pamaṅan yan tan pasisig rumuhun, sari sarī, bhaṭārī śvari hyaṅniṅ brata, satahun sayamanya, pha, prajña, tavitan labdha mās kita.</ab>
9365</div>
.
.
.
.
9370<!-- N hana brata ñandiṅ ḍaḍap, lama tigaṅ dinā, tan pamaṅan, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅnya, pha, svaṛgga l̥viḥ dinuṅkapnyā, subhagā kittha, kula putra hathǝṛ viśeṣā, bahuḍǝṇḍa ñakrāvr̥tti -->
.<!-- P hana brata ñandiṅ dadap tigaṅ dinā lavasnyā, tan pamaṅan vәkasanya maṅkana, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅ bratā. phalanyā svaṛgga l̥viḥ dinuṅkapnya, śubhaga kulā putrā, hatәhәṛ viśeṣā bavudaṇdha ñakravaṛti -->
.
.
.
9375<div type="subchapter" n="3.275">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_275">hana brata ñandiṅ dhadhap, lama tigaṅ dina, tan pamaṅan, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅnya, pha, svarga lәvih dinuṅkapnya, subhaga kita, kula putra atәhǝr viśeṣa, bahudhǝṇdha ñakra vrәtti.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata ñandiṅ ... bahuḍǝṇḍa ñakrāvr̥tti <note>
. </note>
9380 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.275 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.114 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9385
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.276">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_276">hana brata, ṅapitu, ṅa, naṅkǝn dvadaśi śukla pakṣaniṅ kapitu, aṅupavaśa, bhaṭāra bhīma hyaṅnya, ma, Om̐ bam̐ bhīmā ya namah, pamit, pha, viryavan kapintuhu deniṅ rāt, sugih mās pirak, hulun putra vrәddhi, siddha sakāryanta.</ab>
.</div>
9390
.
.
.<!-- N hana brattha, ṅr̥spati, ṅa, kramanyā naṅkǝn vr̥spati ṅupavaśa, pha, listuhayu kitthā, siṅ kāṛyyanta hayu -->
.<!-- P hana brata maṅvr̥spati, ṅa, kramanya haṅupavasa, manaṅkәn vr̥spati, phalanya listuhayu siṅ kināṛyya hayu -->
9395
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.277">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_277">hana brata, ṅrәspati, ṅa, kramanyānaṅkǝn vrәspati ṅupavaśa, pha, listuhayu kita, siṅ kāryanta hayu.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
9400 <note> hana brattha, ṅr̥spati ... kāṛyyanta hayu <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.277 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.119 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
9405</div>
.
.
.
.
9410
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.278">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_278">hana brata, tan pamaṅan pituṅ rātri, pha, viryavan siddha sakāryanta.
.</ab>
.</div>
9415
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.279">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_279">hana brata, ṅupavaśa, sacandra samayanya, riṅ ka sapuluh, pha, kapituhu deniṅ rāt, mās pirak tәka vrәddhi, kinasihan deniṅ paṇḍita.</ab>
.</div>
.
9420
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, yan tkaniṅ vton, tan pamaṅan saṛvvambǝkan, pha, hantuka homaḥ homaḥ, tan suruḍarmmanya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅnya -->
.<!-- U hana brata yan tәkaniṅ vәton, haja maṅan saṛvva mambәkan, phalanya hantuka homa homaḥ tan surud dhaṛmmanya, hyaṅ rudra hyaṅnya -->
.
9425<div type="subchapter" n="3.280">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_280">hana brata, yan tәkaniṅ vәton, tan pamaṅan sarvvāmbǝkan, pha, antuka omah omah, tan surud dharmmanya, bhaṭāra rudra hyaṅnya.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, yan ... rudra hyaṅnya <note>
. </note>
9430 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.280 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.110, III.136 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9435
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.281">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_281">hana brata tan pamaṅan sarvvāmbǝkan, pva, ka, pha, keḍәp deniṅ rāt.</ab>
9440</div>
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.282">
9445<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_282">hana brata, amiraṅ, ṅa, tan pamaṅan sarva prāṇa prāṇi, satahun tigaṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭārī pabyavara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, siṅ prih meṅgal katәmu, deva sih iri kita.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9450
.<!-- N hana bratā, yan āmaṅan hasandiṅ puṣpa liṅgā, haṅliga praṇā, ṅa, hyaṅ haṅgaṣṭi sira turunā bratā, pha, keḍǝpiṅ rāt, tūṛ rūpānta muntab, śakti prajurit mahābhara, yan dadi vvaṅ habhra murub, tan kasoran rūpānta, diṛgghā yuṣa paripūṛṇna, puruṣā viśeṣā-->
.<!-- P hana bratā yan hamaṅan hasandiṅ puṣpa liṅgā haṅliga praṇa haraniṅ bratā, phalanya kedhәpiṅ rāt, turupāntu muntab sakәti prajurit, mahambara, yan dadi vvaṅ habhra murub, tan kasoran rupānta, diṛghgā yuṣa viśeṣa -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.283">
9455<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_283">hana brata, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ puṣpa liṅga, aṅliga prāṇa, ṅa, hyaṅ aṅgaṣṭi sira turunābrata, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt, tur rūpanta muntab, śakti prajurit mahābhara, yan dadi vvaṅ abhra murub, tan kasoran rūpanta, dirggha yuṣa paripūrṇna, puruṣa viśeṣa.
.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, yan ... puruṣā viśeṣā <note>
. </note>
9460 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.283 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.25 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9465
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.284">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_284">hana brata, aṅliṅga pәraṅ, ṅa, yan amaṅan asaṇḍiṅ duhuṅ, bhaṭāra rūdra hyaṅiṅ brata, pha, Akveh vvaṅ tumaṅgalaṅ asih iri kita.
9470</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.285">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_285">hana brata, aṅubi, ṅa, amaṅan aṅinum bañu rumuhun, huvusiṅ amaṅan, tan vәnaṅ aṅucap lavan voṅ, pha, akәlar, suka sugih, tan kǝna gәriṅ, tan sasar kapintuhu deniṅ rāt.</ab>
9475</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.286">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_286">hana brata, maṅan tan pembuh, tan paṅinum bañu, pha, śakti kiteṅ ri niṣkala, lavasnya sagәlǝmiṅ abrata, saṅ hyaṅ dura dasih hyaṅnya, tatkālaniṅ abrata, tan paturviṅ rahina, [pha,] apaḍaṅ riṅ rūpa, apaḍaṅ kaṅ ati, kinasihaniṅ rat.</ab>
.</div>
9480
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.287">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_287">hana brata, ñәkul bañu, [ṅa,] tan pamaṅan sәga sadina, tan paturviṅ rahina vәṅi, aṅayapakǝn tәkeṅ polihnya, añjanma hayu, ma, rāga śūnya mahiśi taya, amaṅan sәga satatak, siniratiṅ toya añar, pamit, vus mapamit, madahar, sakantunanya, hayva mañapuhaṅ.</ab>
.</div>
.
9485<div type="subchapter" n="3.288">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_288">hana brata ñәkul bañu, mañjiṅ lima ṅaranya, kavaśa amaṅan suruh, maṅan sәkul inumi toya, sәga sakәpǝl tinatak ri lәpa lәpaniṅ taṅan, vәnaṅ inumi bañu sabran sore, lavasiṅ abrata, satavun, yan kavaśa, mokṣa salviriṅ lara, vighnaniṅ śarīra Ilaṅ donya.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.289">
9490<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_289">hana brata, tan paṅinum vvai, tatkāla savuku galuṅan, Aṅhiṅ tāmaṅan antiga binǝṅdhǝm, harәpiṅ dhәṅǝn, sambi aṅadǝg tәṅaṅ ṅve tatkāla guṅe, Arddhaṇa bhaṭāra mrәtyu, phalanya kәdhuk timbul, tutug tumuvuh, puruṣa viśeṣa, śakti vani, kineriṅan deniṅ jagat, labdha vara gragaluṅān.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.290">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_290">hana brata, aṅambaṅ, ṅa, yan amaṅan kinambaṅakәn riṅ bañu, satavun samayanya, bhaṭāra viṣṇu maveh brata, pha, mañjanma riṅ kaḍaṅ ajī, sugih vәsi, tūr keḍәp kavi prajurit.</ab>
9495</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.291">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_291">[nyan ta saṅ citta varaṇā, umarah [ri] saṅ vala kula, mūla tattvaniṅ dadi kabeh, pahenak paṅrәṅə̄nta, mūlabhoktaniṅ kanirāśrayan, mvaṅ kābhyudayan, bhāvanya mvaṅ lakṣaṇanya, pūrvanya mvaṅ vәkasnya, maṅkana liṅ saṅ vala kula, nǝmbah hulun, Om̐ viku satakvan[,] tānaku, kita pva siksa ṅaran ika, duga-duga tumakvan, vuvus maṅkana, rәṅə̄n siptan i ṅhulun.
.
9500pūrvaṃ śrī puruṣānte, varānugraha makanya, saṅ rojyam, narāsakane, Ayavaṃ vidyaṃ prajayaṃ.
.
.maṅkana pariñciniṅ cipta, kaliṅanya, pūrva haraniṅ mimitan, tripuruṣa haraniṅ brahmā viṣṇu Iśvara, vara ṅaraniṅ amiddhi , anugraha haraniṅ panuṅsuṅ , manoka ṅaraniṅ devata, saroja ṅaraniṅ manūtra, nara ṅaraniṅ mānuṣa, sakāla ṅaraniṅ samaṅke, yaśa ṅaraniṅ kirti, vidyā ṅaraniṅ hajī, aprayadha ṅaraniṅ pūjā,
.
.kaliṅanya, bhaṭāra sira magave pratapa riṅ vana giri, maṅaṣkāra bhaṭāra, bhaṭārī, Atitah kasukan amragat trәṣṇā, anusupi vanavāsa, maṅǝnakǝn tapa, manaṅsāra rāga, tinūt deniṅ manūṣa maṅke, atapa abrata, ayoga asamadhī, ayajña dāna kīrti,
9505
.maṅhanakǝn brata apayapanya, Ulandriya, rumәgǝp pañcendriya, tuṅgalakәna riṅ tri sandhyā, piṇdhakǝn riṅ kaparāmarthan, vaḍahana yoga, sahabana samadhi, tindihana brata, tuṅgunǝniṅ dāna kīrti, laṅlaṅana riṅ āgama, pagǝrana pupūjān sasapon, lavaṅana saṅgarma, ugǝr ugǝrana sadā, inǝbana tuhu, tindihana kañciṅanā parāmartha,
.
.yeka ulahaniṅ saṅ tumaki-taki kābhyudayan, kābhyudayan ṅaranya, kavibhavan, kavibhavan ṅaranya, bandha savita, bandha savita ṅaranya, kasugihan kula rūpa, śakti vani, nirogha nirvighna , cakṣyah lavajjanā, subrata dīrgha yuṣa yovaṇa aveta urip, maṅkana phalaniṅ brata yan inabhyāsa, ya kābhyudayan de saṅ surupa, maṅkana liṅ saṅ citta varaṇa, riṅ saṅ vala kula.
.
9510nambah hulun, mapa riṅ kanirāśrayan, mәne pukulun,
.
.mәne kami varah iri kita, lakoni siptaṅku riṅ lagi rumuhun,
.
.sājña pukulun, vurukәniṅ brata pukulun, pariñcinya, mvaṅ phalanya, A U ma.]</ab>
9515</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.292">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_292">hana brata, tan pamaṅan tan paturu, bratanira saṅ hyaṅ vәkasniṅ kavi viśeṣa. pha, svarga lәvih, titisnya añakravartti, subhaga anulus, anurāga riṅ rāt, katәkan sapinakṣanira riṅ bhūmi, dinuluriṅ āyu, śakti vani mahābhāra.
.</ab>
9520</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.293">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_293">hana brata, ambhairava pakṣa, siṅ pinaṅan, tuhun tan trәṣṇeṅ turu, bhaṭāra pavakānugrahani, mvaṅ devata, [pha,] bhūta gandharva masih, janmanya puruṣa viśeṣa, subhaga hanulus, ajrih kaṅ sarva galak.</ab>
.</div>
9525
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, tan paṅgilani saṛvva tinaḍaḥ, sambara, ṅa, pha, viṛyyavan sidḍa sugiḥ saṅkan rare -->
.<!-- P hana bratā ntan paṅilaniṅ tadaḥsaṛvva tinadaḥ, vunive tadaḥ, brata sambarā ṅaranya, phalanya siddha viṛyyavan, sugiḥ saṅan rare -->
9530
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.294">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_294">hana brata, tan paṅgilani sarva tinaḍah, sambarana , ṅa, pha, viryavan siddha sugih saṅkan rare.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, tan ... saṅkan rare <note>
9535 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.293 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.87 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
9540</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, ṅar̥ṅ, ṅa, hamaṅan har̥ṅ rumuhun bhaṭāri gaṅga hyaṅniṅ bratā, ma, Om̐ gaṅgā ya namaḥ, salek ṣamayanya, pha, tan ker̥ṅan deniṅ jagat -->
.<!-- U hana brata ṅar̥ṅ, ṅa, hamaṅan har̥ṅ rumuhun, bhaṭāri gaṅgā hyaṅ niṅ brata, ma, Om̐ gaṅga ya namaḥ. salek ṣamayanya, pha, tan ker̥ṅān deniṅ jagat -->
9545
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.295">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_295">hana brata, ṅarәṅ, ṅa, amaṅan harәṅ rumuhun[,] bhaṭārī gaṅga hyaṅniṅ brata, ma, Om̐ gaṅgā ya namah, salek samayanya, pha, apәkik kerәṅan deniṅ jagat.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, ṅar̥ṅ ... deniṅ jagat <note>
9550 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.294 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.75 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
9555</div>
.
.
.
.
9560
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.296">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_296">hana brata, yan amaṅan maivak harәṅ tumpə̄r, pәtaṅ tavun samayanya, pha, keḍәp riṅ samanta janma, kinasihaniṅ rāt, keḍәpiṅ arabi anak anak. </ab>
.</div>
.
9565
.
.<!-- N hana brata nitikramā, ṅa, hamaṅan sadinā sapisan, saṅ hyaṅ smara hyaṅniṅ bratā, pha, siṅ priḥ meṅgal katmu, diṛgghā yuṣā -->
.<!-- P hana brata hanitikrama, ṅa, hamaṅan sadinā sapisan, hyaṅ smara hyaṅniṅ brata, phalanya siṅ priḥ katәkan, diṛgha yuṣa -->
.
9570<div type="subchapter" n="3.297">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_297">hana brata, maṅan apisan, pituṅ lek pituṅ vәṅi samayanya, pha, kinasihaniṅ rāt.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana brata nitikramā ... diṛgghā yuṣā <note>
. </note>
9575 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.297 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.117 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9580
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.298">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_298">hana brata nitīkrama, ṅa, amaṅan sadina sapisan, saṅ hyaṅ smara hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, siṅ prih meṅgal katәmu, dirghyuṣa. </ab>
.</div>
9585
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.299">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_299">nahan brata, maṅan piṅ saptami, pituṅ lek samayanya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya.</ab>
.</div>
.
9590<div type="subchapter" n="3.300">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_300">hana brata, ambhūmi amasar bhuvana, ṅa, pha, sugih lәmah sīma. </ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.301">
9595<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_301">hana brata, maṅaniṅ lәmah, pituṅ śaśih lavasnya, kinasihaniṅ rāt phalanya, bhūmi ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.302">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_302">hana brata, mañcavara, ṅa, U, marәp maṅetan amaṅan, pa, marәp kidul amaṅan. pva, marәp aṅulon. va, marәp aṅalor amaṅan. ka, siṅ harәpira maṅan, duluranya lalab kabeh, mvaṅ kǝmbaṅ hanūt kadi varṇaniṅ sәga, pañcavarṇa, putih kuniṅ abaṅ Irәṅ, riṅ teṅah pañcavarṇa, deva rata hyaṅnya, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga pada bhaṭāra śiva, !pamit!, ma, Om̐ Om̐ śrī jagat guru paduke bhyo namah. sasarnya mañjanma rata añakravr̥tti, tan kapadhān. </ab>
9600</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.303">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_303">hana brata, mañca vara dalәm, ṅa, kramanya, amaṅan uyah kevala, amaṅan sәkul kevala, salek tәluṅ dina samayanya, vus maṅkana, ulam kevala, vus maṅkana, toya kevala, vus maṅkana, aṅinaṅ kevala, vus maṅkana lavasnya, kәneṅ paṅan, tan kәneṅ turu, samaṅkana lavasnya, saṅ hyaṅ vәkasiṅ anuṅku rāt hyaṅnya ikaṅ brata, tan upir upir sukanta, mantuk riṅ svargan bhaṭāra dharma, janmanya suka maṅan aṅaṅgur, tan aṅhel panambut gave, suka sugih tan pasaṅkan, kaṅ vvaṅ masih deva bikṣuka, muleh iri kita.</ab>
.</div>
9605
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, luhuriṅ kayu, ṅa, tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, pha, vr̥dḍi putra, tuṛ keḍǝp siṅ paṅūcap -->
.<!-- P hana brata luhuriṅ kayu tigaṅ lek ṣamayanya, phalanya vr̥ddhi putra, tuṛ kedhәpiṅ paṅucap -->
9610
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.304">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_304">hana brata, luhuriṅ kayu, ṅa, tigaṅ lek samayanya, pha, vrәddhi putra, tur keḍәp siṅ paṅucap.
. <app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, luhuriṅ ... siṅ paṅūcap <note>
9615 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.303 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.98 </note>
.</app>
.
.</ab>
9620</div>
.
.
.
.
9625<div type="subchapter" n="3.305">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_305">hana brata, aturu luhuriṅ kayu, salek divasanya, pha, śakti kasiddhyan kapaṅguh.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9630
.<!-- N hana brata, haṅelaśa, ṅa, hasaṅidaniṅ halasāvguṅ, tan papasa deniṅ voṅ, ṅūniveḥ saṛvva sato, hasǝp, pha, prajurit riṅparavu, haṅuṅgahana bahanya, va, har̥ṅ prajurit riṅ darāt lugutanā vatu, saṅ budā subratā, sasaṛnya dam puvavaṅ riṅ paravu, sugiḥ savaḥ, tūṛ sugiḥ paravu-->
.<!-- P hana brata haṅaleṣā, ṅa, hasaṅidan riṅ halas havәguṅ tan kapapasa deniṅ voṅ, huni kaṅ saṛvva sato, hasәp phalanya, prajurit riṅ paravu, haṅuṅgahana bahanya, har̥ṅ prajurit riṅ dhara tlugu tana vatu, saṅ buddha hasuṅ bratā, sasaṛnya dadi mpu vavaṅ riṅ prabu, sugiḥ savaḥ, tuṛ sugiḥ joṅ -->
.<!-- U hana bratā haṅalasa, hasaṅidā niṅ halas savguṅ, tan kapapasa deniṅ voṅ, hunakaṅ saṛvvā sato, hasәpnya, pha, prajurit riṅ pravu, haṅunggahana bahanya ve, har̥ṅ pr̥jurit riṅ dharāt tlung gutāna vatu, saṅ budda subrātā, sasaṛnya dadidәmpu havaṅ riṅ paravu, tūr sugiḥ parahu. tūṛ sugiḥ savah -->
.
9635<div type="subchapter" n="3.306">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_306">hana brata, aṅalasa, ṅa, asaṅidaniṅ alas savәguṅ, tan papasa deniṅ voṅ, ṅuniveh sarva sato, asǝp, pha, prajurit riṅ paravu, aṅuṅgahana bahanya, va, harәṅ prajurit riṅ darāt luṅguhana vatu, [devatanya] saṅ buddha subrata, sasarnya dam puvavaṅ riṅ paravu, sugih savah, tur sugih paravu.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P #U"></lem>
. <note> hana brata, haṅelaśa ... sugiḥ paravu <note>
9640 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.305 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.146 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.96 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
9645
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.307">
9650<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_307">hana brata, ṅraka sabran tilәm mvaṅ pūrṇama, sarva putus, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ silih asih maveh brata, pha, tinuṅgviṅ rāma reṇa, suka sugih prih avak, tur tan paṅubiṅ voṅ atuha.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.308">
9655<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_308">hana brata, maṅan gǝḍaṅ tan kinulitan, tәluṅ vәṅi samayanya, saṅ hyaṅ murṣita hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, apәkik, yen istri mǝṅgǝpiṅ pahyunan, abәcikiṅ buddhi, vruhiṅ kaliṅanya, pituturiṅ bapebu.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.309">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_309">hana brata, maṅan tuhuṅ pitpit rumuhun, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik muñcar, ṅaraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik aṅuñci pǝpǝt sira turunābrata, pinakabaghā, pinakarūpa, paṅadǝganiṅ vavadon, pinakalistvayu, [pha] drәman manis ta kita, lindihǝn voṅ apәkik, drәman anak anak, aputu riṅ niṣkala.</ab>
9660</div>
.
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, ṅgiliṛ kacaṅ, ṅa, kramanya, haṅuvaśa savguṅ, hamaṅan savguṅ, hyaṅ prajā sadā hyaṅniṅ bratā, pha,mantuk riṅ svaṛggan bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasaṛnya mañjanma suka sugiḥ, l̥viḥ hanulus, yan lanaṅ puruṣā kula pratyakṣa nurāga kittha, sugiḥ pisis riṅ dlāla, yan istrī samaṅkana -->
.<!-- P hana bratā liṛ kacaṅ, ṅa, kramanya haṅupavasa savәguṅ, hamaṅan savәguṅ, braja saddha hyaṅnya, phalanya mantuk riṅ svaṛggan, bhaṭāra Iśvara, pañjanma riṅ kula putra, suka sugiḥ l̥viḥ, halus, lanaṅ puruṣa, kula pratyakṣā nuraga kitā, viśeṣa subhaga riṅ dlahā -->
9665
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.310">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_310">hana brata, ṅgilir kacaṅ, ṅa, kramanya, aṅuvāsa savәguṅ, amaṅan savәguṅ, hyaṅ prajā sadā hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, mantuk riṅ svargan bhaṭāra Iśvara, sasarnya mañjanma suka sugih, lәvih anulus, yan lanaṅ puruṣa kula pratyakṣa anurāga kita, sugih pisis riṅ dlāha, yan istri samaṅkana.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
9670 <note> hana bratā, ṅgiliṛ ... istrī samaṅkana <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.309 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.115 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
9675</div>
.
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.311">
9680<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_311">hana brata, yan amaṅan sinaren kasumba, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik pari rāja, ṅa, hyaṅ maṇik teja bhūmi turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakarah-dagiṅ, pinakahati, [pha,] riṅ dadi vvaṅ, suka sugih, listvayu, sәkar analum, akǝmbaṅ avoh riṅ niṣkala.
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9685
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.312">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_312">hana brata, maṅan sәkul sapuluṅ, saṅ hyaṅ maṇik tampa, ṅaraniṅ brata, saṅ hyaṅ maṇḍala hyaṅniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakakukusaniṅ śarīra, [pha,] asǝsǝkan kanakāguṅ, kalavan alit, aśrī asambaṅ jarijya, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ suka sugih, tan pәgat sādhana, mvaṅ mās maṇik, kinanti jagat kinanti japa kita riṅ dlāha.</ab>
.</div>
.
9690
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.313">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_313">hana brata, maṅān sәkul putih kuniṅ, aṅkǝn kalivon, humārәp purvva, mevaka bhīra, paṅan pisan saṅaṅ kalivon divasanya, Uttamā saṅaṅ vulan, bhaṭāra śiva hyaṅniṅ brata, papalihan hyaṅ antadeva, ya pinakarūpa, pinakasamūha, pinakadirgha yuṣa, yan lanaṅ pinakapәkikan, pinakapolah, pinakararas, yan vadon pinakakahayon pinakapolah , pinakahibon, pha, mulihiṅ svarga bhaṭāra śiva, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ prabhu añakravarti, viku, bhujaṅga, śeva sogata, sugih malǝṅkә riṅ mās pirak, sarva sosoca, rare, hulun, kәbo sapi, mrәgādi, vrәddhi putra, tinuṅgviṅ bapebu, kaki nini, ma, Om̐ hram̐ hrim̐ sah parāmaśivāditya ya namah, ahyas.</ab>
.</div>
9695
.
.<!-- N hana bratā, hamiṣeṣa, ṅa, yan āmaṅan tan pahupā, hanlasanā skul, yan vus kinur̥n kur̥n, ma, Atma tutūraknā mariṅ bhaṭāra viśeṣa, humuṅguḥ riṅ vindu naḍā, sakāla niṣkāla, viśeṣa bhaṭāra bajā, matya turu, matyā luṅguḥ, matyā ṅadǝg, l̥sāl̥yǝp, pavak tan paśarīra sakāla niṣkāla -->
.<!-- P hana brata hamiśeṣā, ṅa, yan hamaṅan tapa hupā hanәlasana sәkul, yan vus kinur̥n kur̥n, ma, hatma tuturākna mariṅ bhaṭāra vaśeṣa, vusaha muṅguḥ riṅ vindhu nagha sakāla niskālāviśeṣa bhaṭāra bajā, matyā luṅguḥ, matya hadәg lәm halәyәp, pavak tan paśarira sakāla niskāla -->
.
9700<div type="subchapter" n="3.314">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_314">hana brata, amiśeṣa, ṅa, yan amaṅan tan pahupa, anlasana sәkul, yan vus kinurәn kurәn, ma, Atma tuturakәna mariṅ bhaṭāra viśeṣa, umuṅguh riṅ vindu nadha, sakāla niṣkāla, viśeṣa bhaṭāra baja, maty aturu, maty aluṅguh, maty aṅadǝg, lәsālәyǝp, pavak tan paśarīra sakāla niṣkāla.
.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, hamiṣeṣa ... sakāla niṣkāla <note>
9705 </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.313 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.112 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
9710
.
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.315">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_315">hana brata, nūtakǝn saśila bhaṭāra gaṇa, amuṣpa gaṇa, ṅa, yan amaṅan sәga nǝm kǝpǝl, sarahina, tiṅkahiṅ amaṅan, śīla gaṇā, nǝm vulan samayanya, pha, mantuk iṅ bhaṭāra guru, sasarnya mañjanma riṅ viku Ijo, śakti dūra darśana, sojar ira keḍǝp.</ab>
9715</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.316">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_316">hana brata, maṅan sәga sinaṅga ri taṅan kiva, tan patәdha tan patambǝh, tan apilih ivaknya, Apan mayoni, ṅa, hyaṅ siddhi narasiṅha turunābrata, ya pinakarūpa, pinakalaku, [pha,] siddhaniṅ vaṅ anambadani śabda, sihniṅ rāt, ma, Om̐ Om̐ siddhi kāraṇāya namah svāhā, yan ahyas.</ab>
.</div>
9720
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.317">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_317">hana brata, jaṅga varṇa, ṅa, amaṅan sәga balaka, pituṅ dina lavasnya mābhyāsa, pha, keḍәp savuvusta deniṅ rāt, prajñan vicakṣaṇa, biṣa gamǝl aṅiduṅ.
.</ab>
.</div>
9725
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.318">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_318">hana brata, jaga śatru, ṅa, saṅ hyaṅ saptanala hyaṅniṅ brata, kramanya, taṅgal pisan piṅ ro tәmu taṅgal piṅ pitu, lamun huvus sumurup vulan juga kita vәnaṅ aturu, livat saṅkeṅ taṅgal piṅ pitu, sakarәptāturu, maṅkāneṅ krәṣṇa pakṣa, lamun mәtu vulan juga kita turu, livat saṅke rika, sakarәpta turu, pha, riṅ dadi vvaṅ sugih, tan hana nuskr̥ta , riṅ niṣkāla.
.</ab>
.</div>
9730
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.319">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_319">hana brata, mūrāba, ṅa, maṅlәkasa taṅgaliṅ kapat mabrata, maṅana purāṇa, kǝmbaṅ nāgasāri, kulalaṭa, malabahaniṅ pūrṇama , polihnyāpәkik hayu tan pasiriṅ, ma, Om̐ smarāya namah, yan ahyas.</ab>
.</div>
.
9735
.<!-- N hana bratā, taṅgal piṅ savlas, Atikukus, ṅa, phalanya viṛyya, dr̥man ānulus -->
.<!-- P hana brata taṅgal piṅ savәlas, hatikukus, ṅa, phalanya suka viṛyya, dr̥man hanulun muvaṅ hanulus -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.320">
9740<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_320">hana brata, taṅgal piṅ savlas, Atikukus, ṅa, phalanya virya, drәman anulus.
.<app><lem wit="#N #P"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, taṅgal ... muvaṅ hanulus <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.319 <ptr target="#P"/> in III.111 </note>
9745</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9750
.<!-- N hana bratā, maṅan āron āron, hulam kalapā binakaṛ, lima vlas dinā divaśanya, saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣā hyaṅ niṅ bratā, pha, habcikaṅ hulon -->
.<!-- U hana bratā hadahāṛ ron, lima vlās dina, hulamnya kalapa binakāṛ, sa hyaṅ viśeśa hyāṅ niṅ brātā, pha, habcik kāṅ hulon -->
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.321">
9755<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_321">hana brata, maṅan aronāron, ulam kalapa binakar, lima vәlas dina divasanya, saṅ hyaṅ viśeṣa hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, abәcik kaṅ hulon.
.
. <app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā, maṅan ... habcikaṅ hulon <note>
. </note>
9760 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.320 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.99 </note>
.</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
9765
.
.
.<!-- G hana brata, hamaṅan tan minaron, pituṅṅl ek samayanya, pha, siddhākaryyanta-->
.<!-- N hana brata, hamaṅan tan paron, pituṅ lek divaśanya, pha, sidḍakaṛyya, jaya patra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana -->
9770
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.322">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_322">hana brata, amaṅan tan paron, pituṅ lek divasanya, pha, siddhakārya, jaya patra ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.
.
.<app><lem wit="#G #N"></lem>
9775 <note> hana brata, hamaṅan ... brata maṅkana <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#G"/> in III.102 <ptr target="#N"/> in III.321 </note>
.</app>
.
9780</ab>
.</div>
.
.
.
9785<div type="subchapter" n="3.323">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_323">hana brata, ṅavaśakәn sakvehiṅ brata, pha, mantuk iṅ svarga bhaṭāra Umapati, [pha,] janmanya prabhu añakravartti, viku śakti bahu sikṣa, labdha vara subhaga.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.324">
9790<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_324">hana brata, kadi rare, tan kinatәṅǝtakәn, pha, tan pavali valyañjanma kita, sasarnya dadi ratu. </ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.325">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_325">nihan brata, amati agni, asisirih, 3, dina, tan pamaṅan sakalvirnya, tutug 3, dina, alabahan, tur tīrthanana, pha, hilaṅ pāpa kleṣaniṅ śarīra.
9795</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.326">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_326">hana brata, amaṅan sǝsǝdhǝp rumuhun, pituṅ tavun divasanya, bhaṭārī vastu hyaṅniṅ brata, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt.</ab>
9800</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.327">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_327">hana brata, maṅan mevak uyah harәṅ, pha, keḍәp riṅ rāt, kineriṅan deniṅ bhuvana, kinajrihaniṅ śatru.</ab>
.</div>
9805
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.328">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_328">Ana brata, mamaṅan catur varṇa, limaṅ vәṅi lavasanya, prajña śakti phalanika, tәhǝr kinasihaniṅ rāt, Apurvva kita, sakabdhu ṅaraniṅ brata maṅkana.</ab>
.</div>
.
9810
.
.<!-- N hana bratā maṅan riyanā, 5, tluṅ lek lavasnya, pha, halus jarijinta, ni romanirā -->
.<!--U hana brātā hamaṅan rahina, 5, tluṅ lek lavasnya, pha, halus jarijinta, mvaṅ romanta -->
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.329">
9815<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_329">hana brata maṅan riyana, 5, tәluṅ lek lavasnya, pha, halus jarijinta, niromanira.
.<app><lem wit="#N #U"></lem>
. <note> hana bratā maṅan ... ni romanirā <note>
. </note>
. <ptr target="#N"/> in III.328 <ptr target="#U"/> in III.109 </note>
9820</app>
.</ab>
.</div>
.
.
9825
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.330">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_330">hana brata, ṅantara, ṅa, maṅan tṅaṅ ve , tәṅah vәṅi, tigaṅ lek lavasnya mabhyāsa, pha, śakti saturasta, suka magə̄ṅ.</ab>
.</div>
.
9830<div type="subchapter" n="3.331">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_331">hana brata, maṅan pituṅ kәpǝl, sadina, pituṅ rahina samayanya, mabrata, catur ṅaraniṅ brata, [pha] riṅ dadi vvaṅ sarva vәsi tan tumamāhi śariranta, riṅ niṣkāla.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.332">
9835<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_332">hana brata, yan amaṅan tan paluṅguh, saṅ hyaṅ hayu maveh brata, saṅ hyaṅ laku laku haraniṅ brata, ya pinakarūpa hayu raspati, [pha] suka riṅ lakunta, lәbur tampakta aśri iṅiriṅan, deniṅ pavoṅan, siddhaniṅ vvaṅ suka sugih, amūkti sāriniṅ kaḍaton, kita riṅ dlāha.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.333">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_333">hana brata, amadhapa, ṅa, amaṅan riṅ paṅkon, malamak patra, saṅ hyaṅ sūkṣma maveh brata, phalanya sapolahta pantǝs, tan pәgat sihniṅ malakya rabi, salek samayanya, ma, Om̐ sūkṣmāya namah, pamit.
9840</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.334">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_334">hana brata, tan pamaṅan sarvāmbǝkan, naṅkǝn pon, mvaṅ kalivon, pha, keḍәpiṅ rāt.</ab>
9845</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.335">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_335">hana brata, yan amaṅan aṅilo riṅ pahesan, naṅkǝn pūrṇama, satavun divasanya, pha, mañjanma riṅ kabayan buyut sugih.</ab>
.</div>
9850
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.336">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_336">nihan aji rambut, amaṅan sәga hirәṅ, naṅkǝn caturthi, śukla pakṣa, ma, hulun aṅaji rambut, tan abaṅ, tan ana raṅraṅ, tan ana putih, sәlǝm abuluniṅ gagak, adava, alambas, atәtәl, ṅkon rambutin hulun, katәmu maṅko, lәvih kaṅ tǝmbe hulun aṅaji rambut, vastu hulun aṅaji rambut, Om̐ sa ba ta A I namā śivāya.</ab>
.</div>
.
9855<div type="subchapter" n="3.337">
.<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_337">hana brata, mona mūjā, pha, deva masih iri kita. </ab>
.</div>
.
.<div type="subchapter" n="3.338">
9860<ab xml:id="tattvabrata_338">hana brata, mona, ṅa, yan aṅisiṅ, yan ahuyuh, yan adyus, yan alәlәṅa, yan abasahan, yan lumaku, pituṅ lek samayanya, bhaṭāra śiva maveh brata, sasarnya sugih duve, sugih vәka, tur keḍәp, mañjanma riṅ mantrī.</ab>
.</div>
.
.<div>
.<p>I śaka, 1722. Vai, ka, vrә, vara mrakih, praṭipadā riṅ śukla pakṣa, Asuji maśa, rah, 2, tǝṅgǝk, 2. I rika divasanya, pūrṇna linikhita. </p>
9865</div>
.
.</div>
. </div><!--end of edition section-->
.
9870
.<div type="translation">
.
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_00"> Om̐. let there be no obstacle</p>
.
9875<p corresp="#tattvabrata_01">This is the "Right Behaviour in [Performing] Observances". When you perform an observance, do not do it haphazardly, without having permission to the one who is in charge of the observances, [namely] the reverend Kaki Citragopta [and] Nini Citragopta. [The request] should be received [by means of] an offering of a white and green betel leaf on a well. The mantra is: “My Lord Kaki Citragopta and Nini Citragopta, I ask permission to perform an observance. My Lord, please accompany me when I perform an observance! Everything that I strive after, let it be obtained! If I make a mistake when performing an observance, let it be blamed on the reverend one who is in charge of the observances!” All your observances [will then be] like that.
.
.Further, the teeth-polishing leaves [have to be used] by the one who carries out the observances. The exceedingly good one is the hambulu; the result is [to become] rich in gold. There are the teeth-polishing leaves of the kayәn; the result is many children. There are the teeth-polishing leaves of the vaṅkal; the result is [to become] rich in rice. There are the teeth-polishing leaves of the lampәni; the result is that you are successful. The dosage of all the mixtures are the same. It is appropriate to pay full attention to it.
.
.</p>
9880
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_02">This is the "Holy Scripture on the Observances". One who makes an effort to obtain the supernatural qualities should devote his full attention to it. The supernatural qualities of the observance, without having the philosophy’s body of the truth, [just like] bars of hedge its philosophy, because [the truth] is used as the bounding body, together with the philosophy of the observance. And also for someone who will release supernatural powers, they are just like the left and right bodies.
.
.Thus the philosophy of observance and asceticism. That is why the one who makes an effort to obtain the goodness should perform it. [If] young people perform it, he will obtain the result of the observance at the young age. It will not be successful if it is not to be done (performed); it is not taking the arrangement from the one who arranged it. [Just like] when [one] cooks rice in the morning and eats [it] in the morning, cooks rice at noon and eats [it] at that noon, and if cook rice at evening and eats it in that evening, if it is not cooking, it is not eating. [The conclusion is] all conducts will obtain all the yields. That is the right way [in performing the observance]. Because of the bad and good conduct will be obtained, that is why good conduct should be done without delay. It originates from the philosophy of observance. </p>
.
9885
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_03">This is the "Detail Type on the Observances". It should be known</p>
.
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_1">There is the observance of ‘cutting off the taste’: if one eats half, and then stands up for chewing betel. It’s better if one does not speak. After chewing betel, one can eat again. Its duration is one year. The deity is the Lord Uma. Mantra: "Om̐ salutations to Umā. [I take] leave!" Its result is the love of husband and wife will not cut off, and all people will love [you].</p>
.
9890<p corresp="#tattvabrata_2">There is the observance of ‘eating rice ṅgi’: its duration is seven months. The deity is the Lord Vastu. Mantra: "Om̐ salutations to Vastu. [I take ] leave!" Its result is the love of husband and wife is not cut off, and also all humans are love and pity to you.
.</p>
.
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_3"> There is the observance of the ‘earth-leaf’: if one eats without using leaves, and [placing the food] openly on earth. The deity is reverend Vaiśravaṇa. Its appointed duration is one year and seven months. Mantra: “Om̐ sam̐ salutations to Vaiśravaṇa. [I take ] leave!”. Its result is being rich in land, piece of ground, and you will be loved by the king of the world and priests.
.
9895</p>
.
.
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_4"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_5"></p>
9900<p corresp="#tattvabrata_6"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_7">There is the observance of ‘full moon’ (mūrṇama): you are fasting every full moon. Its appointed duration is seven years and seven months. The deity is the Reverend Ratih. Mantra: “Om̐ salutations to Śrī Ratih! [I take] leave. Its result is that your work will be successful, God and Demon will love you.
.</p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_8"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_9"></p>
9905<p corresp="#tattvabrata_10"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_11"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_12"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_13"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_14"></p>
9910<p corresp="#tattvabrata_15"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_16"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_17"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_18"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_19"></p>
9915<p corresp="#tattvabrata_20"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_21"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_22"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_23"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_24"></p>
9920<p corresp="#tattvabrata_25"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_26"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_27"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_28"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_29">There is an observance when one eats following the moonlight. The technical details are as follows. On the first day after the waxing moon, [you eat only] a handful. If the waxing period of the moon increases, it [should be] added by a handful until fifteen handfuls when the full moon, because it adds a handful every day. However, on the waning moon, it should decrease by a handful every day. Finally, one fasts when the dark moon. Its appointed duration is three months.
9925The deity is the Lord Indra.
.Mantra: “Om̐ salutations to god Indra!” [I take leave].
.
.Its result is to reach the heaven of the Lord Śiva. [Alternatively, if] something goes wrong, one is reborn as a smart king, and the priest who has many disciples. 
.</p>
9930<p corresp="#tattvabrata_30"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_31"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_32"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_33"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_34"></p>
9935<p corresp="#tattvabrata_35"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_36"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_37"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_38"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_39"></p>
9940<p corresp="#tattvabrata_40"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_41"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_42"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_43"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_44"></p>
9945<p corresp="#tattvabrata_45"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_46"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_47"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_48"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_49"></p>
9950<p corresp="#tattvabrata_50"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_51"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_52"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_53"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_54"></p>
9955<p corresp="#tattvabrata_55"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_56"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_57"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_58"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_59"></p>
9960<p corresp="#tattvabrata_60"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_61"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_62"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_63"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_64"></p>
9965<p corresp="#tattvabrata_65"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_66"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_67"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_68"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_69"></p>
9970<p corresp="#tattvabrata_70"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_71"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_72"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_73"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_74"></p>
9975<p corresp="#tattvabrata_75"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_76"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_77"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_78"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_79"></p>
9980<p corresp="#tattvabrata_80"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_81"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_82"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_83"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_84"></p>
9985<p corresp="#tattvabrata_85"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_86"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_87"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_88"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_89"></p>
9990<p corresp="#tattvabrata_90"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_91"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_92"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_93"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_94"></p>
9995<p corresp="#tattvabrata_95"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_96"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_97"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_98"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_99"></p>
10000<p corresp="#tattvabrata_100"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_101"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_102"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_103"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_104"></p>
10005<p corresp="#tattvabrata_105"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_106"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_107"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_108"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_109"></p>
10010<p corresp="#tattvabrata_110"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_111"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_112"></p>

.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_114"></p>
10015<p corresp="#tattvabrata_115"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_116"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_117"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_118"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_119"></p>
10020<p corresp="#tattvabrata_120"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_121"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_122"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_123"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_124"></p>
10025<p corresp="#tattvabrata_125"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_126"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_127"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_128"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_129"></p>
10030<p corresp="#tattvabrata_130"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_131"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_132"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_133"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_134"></p>
10035<p corresp="#tattvabrata_135"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_136"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_137"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_138"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_139"></p>
10040<p corresp="#tattvabrata_140"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_141"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_142"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_143"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_144"></p>
10045<p corresp="#tattvabrata_145"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_146"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_147"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_148"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_149"></p>
10050<p corresp="#tattvabrata_150"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_151"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_152"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_153"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_154"></p>
10055<p corresp="#tattvabrata_155"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_156"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_157"></p>
.<p corresp="#tattvabrata_158"></p>

hana brata yan amaṅan anūtakǝn vulan ... śiṣya təka; in P the title of the brata, mantra, and result is same with other witnesses, but tend to different in the technique to perform the observance. This is the complete passage of the ms P. "hana bratā hañutakәn hulan·, yan hamaṅan taṅgal hapisan·, sakәpәl·, taṁ, 2, rvaṁ kәpәl·, muṅgah sakәpәl· sadinā, tәkāniṁ taṅgal·, piṁ, 14, pūṛnama hamr̥ti, yan paṅloṁ hapisan·, piṁ, 14, sinuddhana sakәpәl·, tәkaniṁ til̥m hamr̥ti, tigaṁ lek· ṣamayanya, bhaṭārendra hyaṁnya, ma, Ōm̐ surendra ya namaḥ, pamit·. phalanya mantukiṁ bhaṭāra śivā, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ ratu, mvaṁ riṁ vikva bhavu siṣyā kitā." hana bratta miramiśa,... hayu tmǝn G in 3.39 M in 3.40 N in 3.40 P There are two passages in P that is quite similiar to this brata. I consider to choose passage in order 3.34 instead of 3.92 because its more similiar to other mss. However, I put that brata in 3.92 as follows: hana brata niṛmaṅśā, kramanya tan pamaṅān, kәbo, celeṁ, sāpi, vәdus, salviriṁ kәna vәlaḥ dagiṁnyātan pamaṅanta kevala siṁ tan kәneṁ holaḥ dagiṁnya paṅanәn, hasiniṁ lvaḥ pinakādinya hisiniṁ tambak kunaṁ, karaṁ karaṁ vәnaṁ paṅa:nәnta, pituṁ tavun samayanya, phalanya l̥viḥ sakeṁ samanta janmā tanana haṅilaṅi sukanta U in 3.39 M N
hana bratta niramiṣa,... deva bhūṭā sih iri kittha M in 3.41 N in 3.41 candra vr̥tti M N U
cakravratti Gñakravartti Pvrr̥ti G P

hanā bratta nūtakǝn ... sojarīra keḍǝp M in 3.51 N in 3.51 P in 3.45, and in 3.140 that is quite similiar to this passage. Here is the brata: hana brata nutakәn puṣpa bhaṭāra gaṇa, ṅa, hamaṅan nәm kәpәl, sadinā dina, phalanya mantukiṁ padhā bhaṭāra guru, sasaṛnya mañjanmā riṁ viku hijo, śakti duradaṛṣaṇa, sojarira kedhәp U in 3.48 paṅinum G M N P

G and P are different from M N U. Here is the G: jyeṣṭā, aṅlavar·, polihnya, kedhapa savinuvus, labḍa va; P: jyeṣṭa, aja haturiṅ istri, yan istri aja aturu riṅ kakuṅ vulan, […] vulan, saddhā, tan paturū lavan strī, strī tan paturu lavan lanaṅ, pha, drәman alaki, kinasihaniṅ lanaṅ, lanaṅ kinasihaniṅ vadon, tur keḍәp sapaṅucapta G and P are quite different here. Here the G: da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe; P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṁ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṁ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṁ siṁ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṁ griṁ haguṁ, kedhәpiṁ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgiḥ maru, sugiḥ dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṁ kinasihan tuvan mvaṁ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa. hana bratta ṅulante ... keḍǝp sapaṅucapta in 3.58 in 3.69 in 3.69 in 3.149 in 3.115
G and P are quite different here. Here the G: da, tan paturu lavan stri, polihnya, dr̥man omahhe; P hasadhā, hayvaha tumuṅkuliṁ pr̥thivi. phalanya siṁ tinanduṛ dadi mvaṁ siṁ hiṅiṅon dadi luputiṁ griṁ haguṁ, kedhәpiṁ hanakānak, halaki rabi kinatoṅa:n, tan hamaṅgiḥ maru, sugiḥ dlahā, tan kelaṅan tan pavicara tuṛ kinasihan padhanta janmā mvaṁ kinasihan tuvan mvaṁ kavivicakṣaṇa, kinasihan deniṁ paṇdhita, vraddhi putrā, bavu vaṛggā diṛgha yuṣa G M N P U

M is not complete: it is started by: nyan krama niṁ habratā...saha sasahuṛ; and M: nihan kramaniṁ habratā ... katpǝtaniṁ kasamyajñanan. M in 3.71 N in 3.71 parkas em.
